name: =?utf-8?Q?Brencia=20Berry?=
subject: Get Out the Vote for PA Special Election!
body:
| | | |
---
| | | It’s time to GOTV! In Pennsylvania, Democrats must elect Heather Boyd in the State House District 163 Special Election on **Tuesday, May 16** to maintain their one-seat majority and keep control of the legislature. As Gov. Josh Shapiro [said in a recent ad](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=780e964558&e=d6c5c7d7ec), “If Republican extremists win, they’ll take away my veto power by putting a constitutional amendment on the ballot to outlaw abortion, even in cases of rape and incest.” Take some time in the next few days to help make sure we keep Pennsylvania blue!
---
|
---
|
---
| Join the DNC Call Crew and _special guest Rep. Joanna McClinton_ this coming [Thursday, May 11 at 6 pm ET / 3 pm PT](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=3aaa315d8c&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to call voters in PA House District 163 and ensure that Heather Boyd, a former member of the local school board, is elected.
---
|
---
| Can’t make Thursday? No worries! The DNC Call Crew will also be hosting a phone bank on [Monday, May 15 at 6 pm ET / 3 pm PT](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=adae9b04a5&e=d6c5c7d7ec) with _special guest Gisele Barreto Fetterman_ to make a last-minute push for PA House District 163. So much is on the line in this special election - make sure to GOTV for Heather Boyd!
---
|
---
| | | _Copyright © 2023 DNC Community Engagement, All rights reserved._

DNC Community Engagement430 S Capitol Street, SEWashington, DC 20003

Fellow Conservative,

On April 27th, two-term West Virginia Governor Jim Justice announced he's challenging Joe Manchin for the Senate seat he currently occupies.

**Republican's haven't held this seat since 1959;** Justice’s entrance into the race is a big deal. Joe Manchin has been in office since 2010 and is the **LAST federally elected Democrat from West Virginia.**

As we gear up for what is expected to be one of the most fierce, contentious campaigns of the 2024 election,**[we’re asking that you take a moment to fill out our official 2023 Senate Questionnaire today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f9c626518503407fac15303383e3ee94&_e=cr9zP4LVrmJScIjoeYcD8HhekdvdJ4ZVbFZqjJYU8bRkeqRVTK3d4QGR2bdcLJ3rn0xygUODmh797fBNWVE4y-goP_qboXNoPTAHlDdlQfruDl2h1u51OHlpx2Xu8zBrR10uqZ73QC2TIPncf8SKklh3FUh-R5uEwmJOqzotp34nxgBGNa_bcaLzsDrB1nt4jfL2qvSjvszRA1KvAQD7hhyEBTpBkWQwQGmDNQibDzxG3NOiWoH0-oGXWSE4RjKKX5SjUHmJqOYI1_KPwG0dpUfmMkYusVqpEaE0rZ3nLCN42wDstZquMoc7dpaySe1MlnyT7nu1o_PhgwhgIurYz1G4333xAZfksYSM15J0_EzJLzsPDQqipUzcYo14Kvf-GfhbM0y_ALI-YpbCrhQRv2UfOYj_HqJ8zuzQK0AbZ1A%3D)**

**We need 400 responses by 11:59 tonight. Please let us hear from you.**

[** START HERE-> **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f9c626518503407fac15303383e3ee94&_e=cr9zP4LVrmJScIjoeYcD8HhekdvdJ4ZVbFZqjJYU8bRkeqRVTK3d4QGR2bdcLJ3rn0xygUODmh797fBNWVE4y-goP_qboXNoPTAHlDdlQfruDl2h1u51OHlpx2Xu8zBrR10uqZ73QC2TIPncf8SKklh3FUh-R5uEwmJOqzotp34nxgBGNa_bcaLzsDrB1nt4jfL2qvSjvszRA1KvAQD7hhyEBTpBkWQwQGmDNQibDzxG3NOiWoH0-oGXWSE4RjKKX5SjUHmJqOYI1_KPwG0dpQiBoxz8IIxKkvc8zJPJ9ntBufCBaYLJMB8WUym8OT9xxPksnwlTeb36L9pV-0XCz7e6pSm04_giN4oM35g0jbhj-wlc_xgvyQ1pPybU6pReaP8mYq_2B6QJ1nmca9f8MIJvdPHDyxH9XGrUOg16TJc%3D)
Not only does Sen. Manchin drive an **$80,000 Maserati SUV** around D.C., but he also lives on a **$700,000 houseboat** in one of city's most upscale neighborhoods. **And he's spent more than $1 million in campaign funds on fine dining at fancy restaurants**.

**American people are paying the price.**

**Sen. Manchin isn’t going to go quietly into the night**. His time in the Senate has afforded him the national spotlight, which won’t be easy for him to give up. He’s a constant presence on cable news, and the Washington, D.C. social scene.

Please, if you can,**[take two minutes right now and submit your response to our questionnaire.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f9c626518503407fac15303383e3ee94&_e=cr9zP4LVrmJScIjoeYcD8HhekdvdJ4ZVbFZqjJYU8bRkeqRVTK3d4QGR2bdcLJ3rn0xygUODmh797fBNWVE4y-goP_qboXNoPTAHlDdlQfruDl2h1u51OHlpx2Xu8zBrR10uqZ73QC2TIPncf8SKklh3FUh-R5uEwmJOqzotp34nxgBGNa_bcaLzsDrB1nt4jfL2qvSjvszRA1KvAQD7hhyEBTpBkWQwQGmDNQibDzxG3NOiWoH0-oGXWSE4RjKKX5SjUHmJqOYI1_KPwG0dpdHLge30dQk4QOVd7FOQ0oQo03UXA8cr100pla5pAXwkpr57sW5Q2SMFy8NMNF-X9-e7VjLDgo5IUijmZxmgLzoBAsPb7N42SUkILWyrbaHGzcHNr2NTuW56zLmOL9wOXWBCyn8u6EKkutNkPQLNedM%3D)** We’re looking to conservatives like you for guidance ahead of what we’re expecting to be an extremely hard-fought campaign.

[** START HERE-> **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f9c626518503407fac15303383e3ee94&_e=cr9zP4LVrmJScIjoeYcD8HhekdvdJ4ZVbFZqjJYU8bRkeqRVTK3d4QGR2bdcLJ3rn0xygUODmh797fBNWVE4y-goP_qboXNoPTAHlDdlQfruDl2h1u51OHlpx2Xu8zBrR10uqZ73QC2TIPncf8SKklh3FUh-R5uEwmJOqzotp34nxgBGNa_bcaLzsDrB1nt4jfL2qvSjvszRA1KvAQD7hhyEBTpBkWQwQGmDNQibDzxG3NOiWoH0-oGXWSE4RjKKX5SjUHmJqOYI1_KPwG0dpSMoFPBkCaw6-SttYjHNzORZf85fKKjaTQhzKYh4332EWPW0lsoiqrJsSCNYMAvOFtCvnBuYOhhFZqV_SlUBSy2Nz4e8vTslZnmmi1IzOubPpn6VNwVByYj6Q8QGZ3xGDEpzu26qlLh3lgoA6w0UHpw%3D)

Respectfully,
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f9c626518503407fac15303383e3ee94&_e=cr9zP4LVrmJScIjoeYcD8HhekdvdJ4ZVbFZqjJYU8bRkeqRVTK3d4QGR2bdcLJ3rn0xygUODmh797fBNWVE4y-goP_qboXNoPTAHlDdlQfruDl2h1u51OHlpx2Xu8zBrR10uqZ73QC2TIPncf8SKklh3FUh-R5uEwmJOqzotp34nxgBGNa_bcaLzsDrB1nt4jfL2qvSjvszRA1KvAQD7hhyEBTpBkWQwQGmDNQibDzxG3NOiWoH0-oGXWSE4RjKKX5SjUHmJqOYI1_KPwG0dpagSayDeqnMK2EoQ5DJRAzKumsbUOOsWw-C92nIlViaPSouLtapU6fKeM-2lDTE5Hhyd-85YMvLgpLmLwFxr68vPwtf1H9XGrzZGCLivXJBV_XXzI7XyU7lxowWSSNv4uVchnWZjYrfiDbGYWdFF-so%3D) Team Justice

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: re: a hearing in Parkland
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P
body:
We need a hearing on gun violence — now.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63116622/405632437/857475129?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzAxYzZkYi05MGVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3HPAgLGi3Y6A0lK0pwC96j9aOzVcKN09RIKZgeXVcDs=)
---
Eight people were murdered in Texas over the weekend by an AR-15 style assault rifle. One of the victims was just three years old. But still, "thoughts and prayers" are the only proposals my House Republican colleagues have offered. So I'm offering a different idea.

**I've called on the Chairs of both the House Judiciary Committee and the House Oversight Committee to hold a joint field hearing in my hometown of Parkland to examine gun violence and the success of red flags.** I know they're extremely busy with their current lineup of hearings on public urination and run-of-the-mill conspiracy theories but let me explain why I'm calling for this field hearing:

I went to Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School. I knew something had to be done when 17 innocent people were gunned down there. **So, I worked with my colleagues across the aisle — many of whom were rated A+ by the NRA — and asked them to come with me to Parkland. To see the tragedy for themselves. To walk the grounds where children and teachers lost their lives.**

Together, we PASSED the Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School Public Safety Act. It raised the age to buy guns from 18 to 21 and instituted red flag laws, which have been used more than 9,000 times since 2018. This was all done with bipartisan support under a Republican legislature and signed into law by a Republican governor.

[**We need a federal hearing on gun violence to come up with solutions together, and we need it NOW. Will you add your name to my campaign petition, and demand action to end gun violence? They'll never listen to us — the vast majority of Americans who support gun reform — unless we DEMAND it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63116623/405632438/-97450415?refcode=JMFC_20230510_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzAxYzZkYi05MGVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3HPAgLGi3Y6A0lK0pwC96j9aOzVcKN09RIKZgeXVcDs=&emci=d5880be5-3eef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ec01c6db-90ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6576167) | [SIGN YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63116624/405632439/-97450415?refcode=JMFC_20230510_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzAxYzZkYi05MGVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3HPAgLGi3Y6A0lK0pwC96j9aOzVcKN09RIKZgeXVcDs=&emci=d5880be5-3eef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ec01c6db-90ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6576167)

clean_body: We need a hearing on gun violence — now. | = Eight people were murdered in Texas over the weekend by an AR-15 style assault rifle. One of the victims was just three years old. But still, "thoughts and prayers" are the only proposals my House Republican colleagues have offered. So I'm offering a different idea. I've called on the Chairs of both the House Judiciary Committee and the House Oversight Committee to hold a joint field hearing in my hometown of Parkland to examine gun violence and the success of red flags. I know they're extremely busy with their current lineup of hearings on public urination and run-of-the-mill conspiracy theories but let me explain why I'm calling for this field hearing: I went to Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School. I knew something had to be done when 17 innocent people were gunned down there. So, I worked with my colleagues across the aisle — many of whom were rated A+ by the NRA — and asked them to come with me to Parkland. To see the tragedy for themselves. To walk the grounds where children and teachers lost their lives. Together, we PASSED the Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School Public Safety Act. It raised the age to buy guns from 18 to 21 and instituted red flag laws, which have been used more than 9,000 times since 2018. This was all done with bipartisan support under a Republican legislature and signed into law by a Republican governor. | Thank you, Jared Moskowitz Congressman, FL-23 | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. Box 8784, Coral Springs, FL 33065 www.jaredforflorida.com/ Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact, make a=. to receive fewer emails. to update your information. **It’s not an exaggeration, team.**

Simply put, the fringe “independent state legislature” at the center of _Moore v. Harper_ is a willful misinterpretation of our Constitution. If the Republican lawmakers advancing this theory prevail, it would give control of our elections to anti-democracy politicians and pave the way for:
❌ Purges of voters from voting rolls
❌ Cuts to early voting & vote-by-mail options
❌ Discriminatory barriers to voting access
❌ Fewer protections against voter intimidation
❌ Rigged voting maps
**Team, we can’t sit around and wait to see how SCOTUS rules. Instead, we must continue efforts to help elect pro-democracy candidates nationwide who will work to protect our elections regardless of what the Court does.

Are you with us?**
[Yes! I’m donating today to support the NDRC](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63116633/405632909/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230510_FR_5L_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyMDFjNmRiLTkwZWYtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MVSPjRwvlzlw7zbxZCv2NxmHD49fBE4aFEq17mcPKPQ=)

**“We will continue to stay engaged – EVERYWHERE – to protect our democracy.”
– A.G. Holder**
---
Here’s our promise to you: No matter what happens, the NDRC will keep fighting for fairness all across the country. **We hope you’ll join us.**

clean_body: | | = It’s not an exaggeration, team. Simply put, the fringe “independent state legislature” at the center of Moore v. Harper is a willful misinterpretation of our Constitution. If the Republican lawmakers advancing this theory prevail, it would give control of our elections to anti-democracy politicians and pave the way for: ❌ Purges of voters from voting rolls ❌ Cuts to early voting & vote-by-mail options ❌ Discriminatory barriers to voting access ❌ Fewer protections against voter intimidation ❌ Rigged voting maps Team, we can’t sit around and wait to see how SCOTUS rules. Instead, we must continue efforts to help elect pro-democracy candidates nationwide who will work to protect our elections regardless of what the Court does. Are you with us? = “We will continue to stay engaged – EVERYWHERE – to protect our democracy.” – A.G. Holder Here’s our promise to you: No matter what happens, the NDRC will keep fighting for fairness all across the country. We hope you’ll join us. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Katie Porter
subject: The last time we dealt with this was the GI bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=22682%2E3422442%2EJ8MK22)
I just wrapped up a busy few days in the Bay Area, and one of the number one concerns I heard from people: the high cost of housing.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230510-1?refcode=EMAH10_1_EMA_20230510_V1_F&refcode2=22682_3422442_J8MK22&akid=22682%2E3422442%2EJ8MK22)
Here’s what I told folks: We haven’t seriously invested in housing since the GI Bill. Instead the federal government has ignored this problem for decades, claiming it’s a state and local issue. **That’s bullshit.**
**In the Senate, lowering the cost of housing will be one of my top priorities. I’d push the federal government to get creative and increase assistance and supply.**
As I meet voters, I hear from so many young people who think they’ll never be able to afford a home, and from Californians who’ve lived here for decades and fear they’ll have to leave because of rising rent. **This isn’t a hopeless issue, but we need to elect leaders who aren’t afraid to take on the biggest challenges we face.**
Your donation helps keep me on the road, meeting-and-greeting with voters. It’s only because of your support that we were able to host these events.
We’re just getting started—[**can you make a donation today that will allow us to keep connecting with Californians?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230510-1?refcode=EMAH10_1_EMA_20230510_V1_F&refcode2=22682_3422442_J8MK22&akid=22682%2E3422442%2EJ8MK22)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230510-1?refcode=EMAH10_1_EMA_20230510_V1_F&refcode2=22682_3422442_J8MK22&akid=22682%2E3422442%2EJ8MK22)**
Thanks for being a part of this,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH10_1_EMA_20230510_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=22682_3422442_J8MK22&akid=22682%2E3422442%2EJ8MK22)**

Katie Porter for Senate

Irvine, CA 92616

name: Gary Sinise
subject: These heroes are counting on you
body:
This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.| | | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=329a878160874f9aaeb4dc9c0a3b8c8e&_t=k0xmHFSrsBXq28iYKI9Pk9RALWnPqb0EAJR2f75gvxtytNtxHHIBNpXIwP8cd-O8u_8ORWNCgXDrvkLG4y66NhiBA6z6-c_-m2L1IU7hRb0%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=329a878160874f9aaeb4dc9c0a3b8c8e&_t=k0xmHFSrsBXq28iYKI9Pk9RALWnPqb0EAJR2f75gvxtytNtxHHIBNpXIwP8cd-O8u_8ORWNCgXDrvkLG4y66NhiBA6z6-c_-m2L1IU7hRb0%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=329a878160874f9aaeb4dc9c0a3b8c8e&_e=x4doVvfPF6sSsk6nLoL_kTm6AjtJK8OAhZZxO1pr2OMvesucP7MDpRBLlsQhTcRiD8C50qMojOP4jxHDOlTZgzibXPAW0bB9iTKSPwg23qL2P0yWJvfFiyql6wKDSOlKIPF_Qmqt5fdbkbxVc9r-cgoBB8L7Jfmz8f_UtBTrINHkAviEnxCqVAbwbgy1BfhzTZyRBEA-iqow0-lmbrtxVs2HVaOYG4yK5QNFMzoBSzhseYtu19zx_SL84xfKmBhXKZBMFxyKxg_z-6ySxgSiJzN1MM7mHWmpqvt1vyeaPzTJL8rOVOnsdKHMOHEiJjPR)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ — but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=329a878160874f9aaeb4dc9c0a3b8c8e&_e=x4doVvfPF6sSsk6nLoL_kTm6AjtJK8OAhZZxO1pr2OMvesucP7MDpRBLlsQhTcRiD8C50qMojOP4jxHDOlTZgzibXPAW0bB9iTKSPwg23qL2P0yWJvfFiyql6wKDSOlKIPF_Qmqt5fdbkbxVc9r-cgoBB8L7Jfmz8f_UtBTrINENaavc2MRtfTHkNZ9Vy3It5WAeYBQO4-q_BrwhpfsG0UW81I_PBU8v7eyIVna0DGFzrz5Mp6gJ13vgjvaRcyMUOcsJY3ofeGgIp63jGFlNnXxuRIhhHxAX2NcKD5w1qF4HdCB7kpP9HpGM5BKBgYTh)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=329a878160874f9aaeb4dc9c0a3b8c8e&_e=x4doVvfPF6sSsk6nLoL_kTm6AjtJK8OAhZZxO1pr2OMvesucP7MDpRBLlsQhTcRiD8C50qMojOP4jxHDOlTZgzibXPAW0bB9iTKSPwg23qL2P0yWJvfFiyql6wKDSOlKIPF_Qmqt5fdbkbxVc9r-cgoBB8L7Jfmz8f_UtBTrINHromuVaHw6XtMxxPXirdFZIff-JtpXiEQaIklg7OdgDFe0xXKOFtJYolk2U_kVF1vhs1k5VaRj0iV_G6u5CVOjYWAgPWF_iIPAKT9WjyNuWvJvgSs_s_r4ZtHXamIY21q7MqFgUXX_Jj-yq7yilq0-)
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=329a878160874f9aaeb4dc9c0a3b8c8e&_e=x4doVvfPF6sSsk6nLoL_kTm6AjtJK8OAhZZxO1pr2OMvesucP7MDpRBLlsQhTcRiD8C50qMojOP4jxHDOlTZgzibXPAW0bB9iTKSPwg23qL2P0yWJvfFiyql6wKDSOlKIPF_Qmqt5fdbkbxVc9r-cgoBB8L7Jfmz8f_UtBTrINEbhYYaD1-IhUI_X-cbra4sclJtoKWWDt-vh8ZppQsywW5iXuPBYhj7-FLU1Z3yC9r2OvnHFGwLjcV1gHDIZJjxOp4I4GOi1T3La5HpJ7YCVVoK9crZOWjkhulWagHS55dG2A60QWluYAw0SyISdpa3)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=329a878160874f9aaeb4dc9c0a3b8c8e&_e=x4doVvfPF6sSsk6nLoL_kTm6AjtJK8OAhZZxO1pr2OMvesucP7MDpRBLlsQhTcRiD8C50qMojOP4jxHDOlTZgzibXPAW0bB9iTKSPwg23qL2P0yWJvfFiyql6wKDSOlKIPF_Qmqt5fdbkbxVc9r-cgoBB8L7Jfmz8f_UtBTrINH_uGtILcTTl0m5OpqkeiU7GblXgV0BAX5XuDDwVq8K3z6sutGHluf6pY-SMQbCOxIC65UHFz55xR3K-r-wbDmLhWvc0EAgwYsNKZXKmeASoU4BrqTpEaEMjGmaPtrAWiwPidG0DOQZPjdidtxQVmeg)
---

The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=329a878160874f9aaeb4dc9c0a3b8c8e&_e=x4doVvfPF6sSsk6nLoL_kTm6AjtJK8OAhZZxO1pr2OMvesucP7MDpRBLlsQhTcRiD8C50qMojOP4jxHDOlTZgzibXPAW0bB9iTKSPwg23qL2P0yWJvfFiyql6wKDSOlKIPF_Qmqt5fdbkbxVc9r-cgoBB8L7Jfmz8f_UtBTrINGjTh1UAtAzdeMf2KKorWtyJnBYqo-z6EjX7b9N3FHrmPg7S-cSV-iAl1XdGL9-8zRnvvPgAeW_3lsoQsy0Qdbl6M61uG9glu18_-JuNmZmI-Fj2hhaf-ZOz7qRiz8auIQ4YqyIwGo6XFpE55BnHcPU) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=329a878160874f9aaeb4dc9c0a3b8c8e&_e=x4doVvfPF6sSsk6nLoL_kTm6AjtJK8OAhZZxO1pr2OMvesucP7MDpRBLlsQhTcRiD8C50qMojOP4jxHDOlTZgzibXPAW0bB9iTKSPwg23qL2P0yWJvfFiyql6wKDSOlKIPF_Qmqt5fdbkbxVc9r-cgoBB8L7Jfmz8f_UtBTrINHjS2r-omRJG39AbGgsVichJUuUPKc1nybIL0iF-z6a3E0FCBcKxPMTHDjjNOSJU9Ldk9osHhxvR5EHI3oFnEejqMpXJWbCWlmtSneEsP5W9L-zHVq7D8ffnrp3G6HDpQVpjYZ1P-Nv1Azl5ES1rSx8)

Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade

clean_body: This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.| | | | Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY — but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump, that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. - When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is more important now than ever — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever. Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. * Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom. But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honorary Grand Marshal National Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. Fellow Conservative,

On April 27th, two-term West Virginia Governor Jim Justice announced he's challenging Joe Manchin for the Senate seat he currently occupies.

**Republican's haven't held this seat since 1959;** Justice’s entrance into the race is a big deal. Joe Manchin has been in office since 2010 and is the **LAST federally elected Democrat from West Virginia.**

As we gear up for what is expected to be one of the most fierce, contentious campaigns of the 2024 election,**[we’re asking that you take a moment to fill out our official 2023 Senate Questionnaire today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ae66baf06e7f45d48e7f5400f1972ac7&_e=Th7V6fvSUTbCRtjB5WEU47xh44Qm1Q98Je74QwXSpZ6HtFjC3YFQ42wkXJz2t6EGJtnSYog68CiO2PeDZcvbNkPUKJ6IF2k5CTz8mO5SFmHC_I6hp-KxXeVFd-ZVe54xd_H5loEv9sf0OmtL_l6hLFUZaglMoUqdqOhmbYb6CIL8--IHQ2EZcSEk8s4uUaVUeTq1iYC2nTdoaXgq3AOkK-NO2glrbtsQBbERr5x7xmJb_mwMdyee2e9jxWZ8Id1-NC8wlDcocr8OeZTbwamcv58RtxuXOV6My_y2nagZh8DD1GUAB-Wc6fAdx7ngD5KB2ZsEnBbxrclQuVCqvV3JJn9wqSYSMfNcdhusY-q29IggH_Hz4KQCyLSZRM6CLtz9IrWbtVPy-ssg7s36H2_jzh1gfFrYRUKaYemj74yFqoM%3D)**

**We need 400 responses by 11:59 tonight. Please let us hear from you.**

[** START HERE-> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ae66baf06e7f45d48e7f5400f1972ac7&_e=Th7V6fvSUTbCRtjB5WEU47xh44Qm1Q98Je74QwXSpZ6HtFjC3YFQ42wkXJz2t6EGJtnSYog68CiO2PeDZcvbNkPUKJ6IF2k5CTz8mO5SFmHC_I6hp-KxXeVFd-ZVe54xd_H5loEv9sf0OmtL_l6hLFUZaglMoUqdqOhmbYb6CIL8--IHQ2EZcSEk8s4uUaVUeTq1iYC2nTdoaXgq3AOkK-NO2glrbtsQBbERr5x7xmJb_mwMdyee2e9jxWZ8Id1-NC8wlDcocr8OeZTbwamcvy1jvdmr0AVv3gdAKT1PUgZLzoHUOb8dUjG03eUnfeYitRlHzJPi8_g4cCRFeXAzHf1FGS41l9QCIBTJA4UMk9QBO4lc9-urzPMbjugR-S9ALl9xn5aUHVVXs9TEuRgZde3fYtxsCiq9MQimYOp3Z38%3D)
Not only does Sen. Manchin drive an **$80,000 Maserati SUV** around D.C., but he also lives on a **$700,000 houseboat** in one of city's most upscale neighborhoods. **And he's spent more than $1 million in campaign funds on fine dining at fancy restaurants**.

**American people are paying the price.**

**Sen. Manchin isn’t going to go quietly into the night**. His time in the Senate has afforded him the national spotlight, which won’t be easy for him to give up. He’s a constant presence on cable news, and the Washington, D.C. social scene.

Please, if you can,**[take two minutes right now and submit your response to our questionnaire.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ae66baf06e7f45d48e7f5400f1972ac7&_e=Th7V6fvSUTbCRtjB5WEU47xh44Qm1Q98Je74QwXSpZ6HtFjC3YFQ42wkXJz2t6EGJtnSYog68CiO2PeDZcvbNkPUKJ6IF2k5CTz8mO5SFmHC_I6hp-KxXeVFd-ZVe54xd_H5loEv9sf0OmtL_l6hLFUZaglMoUqdqOhmbYb6CIL8--IHQ2EZcSEk8s4uUaVUeTq1iYC2nTdoaXgq3AOkK-NO2glrbtsQBbERr5x7xmJb_mwMdyee2e9jxWZ8Id1-NC8wlDcocr8OeZTbwamcvwsifLd-YHiXiNyp81NLQoOpUaJgr8F_bgMlE3i4K2x5xFGDirL-ZczDoGBL8niq_giywEQyuWd0HaTmHORKljmFLYTn8GZv16f0eBxxK7WblxfLU1qUfOz54VNHyvPvthfGm9HLbDsytu2n3aLEHxE%3D)** We’re looking to conservatives like you for guidance ahead of what we’re expecting to be an extremely hard-fought campaign.

[** START HERE-> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ae66baf06e7f45d48e7f5400f1972ac7&_e=Th7V6fvSUTbCRtjB5WEU47xh44Qm1Q98Je74QwXSpZ6HtFjC3YFQ42wkXJz2t6EGJtnSYog68CiO2PeDZcvbNkPUKJ6IF2k5CTz8mO5SFmHC_I6hp-KxXeVFd-ZVe54xd_H5loEv9sf0OmtL_l6hLFUZaglMoUqdqOhmbYb6CIL8--IHQ2EZcSEk8s4uUaVUeTq1iYC2nTdoaXgq3AOkK-NO2glrbtsQBbERr5x7xmJb_mwMdyee2e9jxWZ8Id1-NC8wlDcocr8OeZTbwamcvx0u2fruPq8aKUL_21McGv4XdXmULnllHja2Rkv59ppckdaREn7KDiW-PtJQEO5Rx4GhubFNiliSKquZXFJSbuzbiFNxuTnuT2i-UGkXRbiWp7TuXPFHDw4ZuJhOKdrAKLMJI1y8uFTZ8R-pMyKkBxc%3D)

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs. Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team. Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog. Join the Conversation: | Paid for by Jim Justice for U.S. Senate

Peter,

On April 27th, two-term West Virginia Governor Jim Justice announced he's challenging Joe Manchin for the Senate seat he currently occupies.

**Republican's haven't held this seat since 1959;** Justice’s entrance into the race is a big deal. Joe Manchin has been in office since 2010 and is the **LAST federally elected Democrat from West Virginia.**

As we gear up for what is expected to be one of the most fierce, contentious campaigns of the 2024 election,**[we’re asking that you take a moment to fill out our official 2023 Senate Questionnaire today.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=059cd49b76da49bd884399102e84c566&_e=BqB1uMerKT3V5OMtFXT1Ra8X8oG1pnjv-x4DMDiPXzJ3ndhkPrclCz_-GnsXG4FKIsnUI1xCtBrPbSLZRWtz8cDqJXj5509u949YH6nfHEjDSJTzuaeFHwtile2j46oQbfrt6pYGD4pKZ6WYgueESpQ3KLFwzDrDGuf6YVqh6Tx-2gDdLGTttJF-gwm_K5VL_DnKX2BdkoYzhevQzdKOTWB8C2YP4yd9HkHx7cmTB_BOLL2pQemGnQvNru9BJ5kRWAmt7_7EQHd6ofpubTfvK9B-UVEmXubQCMqn5gxaRhR7Skq-DYrfNWn9yLSnKy89kedlv6DukOirBn7u8AtudN9yL0010U4HoXPxQLHTcsZteS3MfS65pTVStx1FzV0SD71-rqsUADFoTdpEszq59_uEgoFThawAQ9-I3Lb6tdo%3D)**

**We need 400 responses by 11:59 tonight. Please let us hear from you.**

[** START HERE-> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=059cd49b76da49bd884399102e84c566&_e=BqB1uMerKT3V5OMtFXT1Ra8X8oG1pnjv-x4DMDiPXzJ3ndhkPrclCz_-GnsXG4FKIsnUI1xCtBrPbSLZRWtz8cDqJXj5509u949YH6nfHEjDSJTzuaeFHwtile2j46oQbfrt6pYGD4pKZ6WYgueESpQ3KLFwzDrDGuf6YVqh6Tx-2gDdLGTttJF-gwm_K5VL_DnKX2BdkoYzhevQzdKOTWB8C2YP4yd9HkHx7cmTB_BOLL2pQemGnQvNru9BJ5kRWAmt7_7EQHd6ofpubTfvK7XU9VuW0pSxDvqGVpRAWPFZf5f5ph9xjMQ72vkdBJc9JxKmxPqDzkSGM61nhpZFt9uj3OrL1OKnztSk75bx4LLxxuaidAMf2VRq43pqeb--NL2Oxqa1hJZnfblBSbvNAE5GlL_HuanBEA0-ZPfJijo%3D)
Not only does Sen. Manchin drive an **$80,000 Maserati SUV** around D.C., but he also lives on a **$700,000 houseboat** in one of city's most upscale neighborhoods. **And he's spent more than $1 million in campaign funds on fine dining at fancy restaurants**.

**American people are paying the price.**

**Sen. Manchin isn’t going to go quietly into the night**. His time in the Senate has afforded him the national spotlight, which won’t be easy for him to give up. He’s a constant presence on cable news, and the Washington, D.C. social scene.

Please, if you can,**[take two minutes right now and submit your response to our questionnaire.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=059cd49b76da49bd884399102e84c566&_e=BqB1uMerKT3V5OMtFXT1Ra8X8oG1pnjv-x4DMDiPXzJ3ndhkPrclCz_-GnsXG4FKIsnUI1xCtBrPbSLZRWtz8cDqJXj5509u949YH6nfHEjDSJTzuaeFHwtile2j46oQbfrt6pYGD4pKZ6WYgueESpQ3KLFwzDrDGuf6YVqh6Tx-2gDdLGTttJF-gwm_K5VL_DnKX2BdkoYzhevQzdKOTWB8C2YP4yd9HkHx7cmTB_BOLL2pQemGnQvNru9BJ5kRWAmt7_7EQHd6ofpubTfvKz_WJn3GlzJKYqWTN_ZYvLBmoSdnLVLPKusx5XgFcKAH0Q34FfCk9Opxi2c7gd1BNm5Q3AL4pgnSZJKC0f4rvbYEGk4hm0BVV35SjGKnH16tU6fRnI-g888A1eEhJbzvXTIHNG9L47dePEhPjclygks%3D)** We’re looking to conservatives like you for guidance ahead of what we’re expecting to be an extremely hard-fought campaign.

[** START HERE-> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=059cd49b76da49bd884399102e84c566&_e=BqB1uMerKT3V5OMtFXT1Ra8X8oG1pnjv-x4DMDiPXzJ3ndhkPrclCz_-GnsXG4FKIsnUI1xCtBrPbSLZRWtz8cDqJXj5509u949YH6nfHEjDSJTzuaeFHwtile2j46oQbfrt6pYGD4pKZ6WYgueESpQ3KLFwzDrDGuf6YVqh6Tx-2gDdLGTttJF-gwm_K5VL_DnKX2BdkoYzhevQzdKOTWB8C2YP4yd9HkHx7cmTB_BOLL2pQemGnQvNru9BJ5kRWAmt7_7EQHd6ofpubTfvK2Sv-nXuCP1I8Zww7BwwxYg9ghBOs0MiP2RzcwZc5djhMtdUc91n9oLxNZXUVQfW_t35uTvF1zIfzGIc5T9O0NoUZThoaDodHnLQbuAXG2lY-lWwQMLBMgrwQoQbL0LWlKU0_Mxkeog-vpjOHUq_lu8%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=059cd49b76da49bd884399102e84c566&_e=BqB1uMerKT3V5OMtFXT1Ra8X8oG1pnjv-x4DMDiPXzJ3ndhkPrclCz_-GnsXG4FKIsnUI1xCtBrPbSLZRWtz8cDqJXj5509u949YH6nfHEjDSJTzuaeFHwtile2j46oQbfrt6pYGD4pKZ6WYgueESpQ3KLFwzDrDGuf6YVqh6Tx-2gDdLGTttJF-gwm_K5VL_DnKX2BdkoYzhevQzdKOTWB8C2YP4yd9HkHx7cmTB_BOLL2pQemGnQvNru9BJ5kRWAmt7_7EQHd6ofpubTfvKxu00GyY3BuNw9czTtZYUAS-J0mfkdB3qqrOk2vJJDHbfO0BQuZ99D71aXWmR8jE79a3ytxyhTW6g2REIIpr7ANEwff5u72rMWnpVoELfYRtNH4Q0YEVswBvOtDnBfq1v4NUZtlI5poNlrw1wcx7oY4%3D) Team Justice

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

clean_body: | | | | The numbers are in... Peter, the inflation numbers are in... | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Team Lori 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \- =

body:
| | | Team -- Donald Trump just wrapped up his CNN town hall, and it went just as we predicted: **He spread lies, rallied his MAGA base, and _relentlessly_ attacked President Biden and Democrats.**

We must fight back _now_ to ensure that Trump and his allies don’t take back the Senate in 2024, but you _still_ haven't answered Chuck Schumer's call! **So please, before the midnight deadline:**

**[Chip in $5 NOW to stop Trump’s MAGA allies, defend vulnerable Democrats, and protect our Democratic Senate majority >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/12693?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230510-meSchumer2-SchumerTrumpTownHallBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230510-meSchumer2-SchumerTrumpTownHallBump-Pros-sl1&akid=10748%2E9716520%2EZX0qYk)**

| | [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/12693?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230510-meSchumer2-SchumerTrumpTownHallBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230510-meSchumer2-SchumerTrumpTownHallBump-Pros-sl1&akid=10748%2E9716520%2EZX0qYk)
---

Thank you,

Team DSCC

\---------Forwarded Message---------
Sender: Chuck Schumer
Date: Wednesday, May 10, 2023
Subject: Trump's taking the stage

Team, I need you to read this:

Donald Trump is moments away from taking the stage at a nationally-televised CNN town hall. **He’s sure to use every second of it to rally his supporters and spread as many lies and conspiracy theories as he can.**

**[We simply can't let Trump and his allies go unchallenged. Will you chip in $5 to help defend our Democratic Senate majority from Trump’s cronies ahead of his televised town hall? >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/12693?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230510-meSchumer2-SchumerTrumpTownHallBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230510-meSchumer2-SchumerTrumpTownHallBump-Pros-sl1&akid=10748%2E9716520%2EZX0qYk)**

Look, I can’t emphasize enough how dangerous this could be. Trump has been indicted on over 30 felony counts, spread countless election conspiracy theories, and harmed our country in innumerable ways. Now he’s about to spread _even more lies_ in front of the entire nation.

**Unless we stand up against Trump and his allies _immediately_ , our chances of defeating his lies and defending the Senate could evaporate.**

Now’s the time to dig deep and respond with the full power of our grassroots movement. **I've set an emergency rapid-response goal to raise $50,000 tonight to help Democrats fight back, but right now we’re running $3,783 short!**

**[So please, chip in $5 or more right now to defend the Senate and stop Trump's MAGA candidates from taking away our Democratic majority >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/12693?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230510-meSchumer2-SchumerTrumpTownHallBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230510-meSchumer2-SchumerTrumpTownHallBump-Pros-sl1&akid=10748%2E9716520%2EZX0qYk)**

We need your help to defend our Senate majority. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: Don Huffines
subject: it's time to ELIMINATE vehicle safety inspections...
body:
Stop the parasitic money grabbers and support HB 3297 in the Texas Senate so Texans can finally experience a little liberty with our vehicles.
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-zcdjht-yuddtktydi-p/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zcdjht-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## **Liberty Report: Pay Up or Don 't Drive**
## _" Stop the parasitic money grabbers and support HB 3297 in the Texas Senate so Texans can finally experience a little liberty with our vehicles."_
[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zcdjht-yuddtktydi-y/) DALLAS, TX, May 10, 2023 -- The Texas House passed HB 3297, which would eliminate vehicle inspections! This legislation now has a public hearing THURSDAY in the Senate Committee on State Affairs. This out-of-date program is just one more property tax Texans are forced to pay. Enough is enough.I spent four years in Austin trying to eliminate this program, and I almost did in 2017. We must support HB 3297 in the Texas Senate so Texans can finally experience a little liberty with our vehicles.**[My weekly column in the Dallas Express discusses this idiotic policy. Go check it out!](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zcdjht-yuddtktydi-j/)** Huffines Liberty Foundation President, former State Senator Don Huffines, issued the following statement:_" I am quite familiar with the car business and trust me when I tell you: vehicle inspections are a scam. You are being ripped off. Texas is the only Republican state to still have this policy."_Huffines further added:_" Look at the groups that are working to keep this worthless and out-of-date program: Gulf States Toyota (billionaires), Alliance for Automotive Innovation, and all of the state inspection shops making money on Texas car owners (with the government!)."_ [Read Op-ed](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zcdjht-yuddtktydi-t/) The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of **liberty** , **prosperity** , and **virtue** in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.###
### _Help us advance liberty and prosperity in Texas:_
[Donate](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zcdjht-yuddtktydi-h/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zcdjht-yuddtktydi-k/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zcdjht-yuddtktydi-u/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zcdjht-yuddtktydi-o/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zcdjht-yuddtktydi-b/) | [ Share ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-fb-zcdjht-yuddtktydi-x/) | [ Tweet ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-tw-zcdjht-yuddtktydi-f/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-zcdjht-l-z)
---|---|---
[www.HuffinesLiberty.com](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zcdjht-yuddtktydi-n/)[info@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:info@huffinesliberty.com)

[#VeteranOfTheDay Navy Veteran Ryan Job](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zip1e6hg287j5qjgqke0mo8t514tcqun2p8p0cj0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr2d9j6kprct9jmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9j6f835cui60pt3ekonacjk6err6cbgmkoj8d7lkeq36t7lkdqj2t9iegprb8jkugprb8lnm8rq48d245p25oh4cdgecpr4s9g60pr24no)
Ryan Job was born in Washington state in March 1981. He was raised in Issaquah, Washington, and attended Issaquah High School. After graduation, he enrolled in the University of Washington, where he studied for three years before joining the Navy in 2002. He began boot camp in December of that year in Great Lakes, Illinois, and graduated in February 2003.

name: American Update
subject: Learn from C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien
body:
C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century’s most beloved works of literature

This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666170%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WbmMhLXKHyN7zVEKFSngUw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century’s most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

Today, I want to share an exclusive and free video series with you that considers Lewis and Tolkien in the context of their membership in the Inklings--an informal professor-student literary group at Oxford in the 1930s and 40s.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666171%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fXmg8vdOboer%2b0cny8yXBw&sysid=1)
**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings by using this secure link now:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666172%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g6tMxCpvTfMYXnxbS01KoQ&sysid=1)**

C.S. Lewis is best known for his Narnia books--such as _The Lion, the Witch, and the Wardrobe_ --and his apologetics, including _Mere Christianity_. Indeed, Lewis is one of the greatest Christian apologists of all time.

J.R.R. Tolkien’s most renowned works are _The Hobbit_ and _The Lord of the Rings _trilogy.

That both were men of genius is indisputable. Both men also devoted countless hours to honing their craft. This included subjecting their writing to the scrutiny of their fellow Inklings, who met regularly for conversation and to read aloud from and discuss their current work.

**The Inklings are a fascinating topic of study, which is why we’ve created a free online video series for you to enjoy. **

The video series, titled “The Inklings,” was filmed on the Hillsdale College campus. It examines the ideas that bound the Inklings, what they accomplished, and the continuing importance of their works today--with a special focus on Lewis and Tolkien.

**You can use the secure link below to receive instant access to “The Inklings” free video series:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666172%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g6tMxCpvTfMYXnxbS01KoQ&sysid=1)**

Lewis and Tolkien thought the Inklings’ meetings contributed significantly to their literary success. As models of civil discussion and intelligent debate, they stand in stark contrast to today’s “cancel culture.”

The Inklings, are therefore, worth studying not only for their great literary achievements but also because they exemplify the free speech that is essential to the pursuit of truth.

That’s why Hillsdale College created a free online video series on the Inklings. I hope you’ll use the secure link above and start watching it today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien met regularly with an informal literary group named the Inklings.

Now, you can examine the philosophical, theological, and literary ideas that bound the Inklings together with a free video series from Hillsdale College.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666172%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g6tMxCpvTfMYXnxbS01KoQ&sysid=1)**

---
| |
---

American Update
---

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: BREAKING: Title 42 Expiring
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
The Biden Administration is shamefully allowing Title 42 to expire without any thought of a suitable replacement. |
Fellow American,

Today is the day I've been warning you about ...

...Title 42 is set to expire at 11:59 PM tonight and hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants are ready to flood into our country. They are waiting across the border and will be crossing into the United States tomorrow.

**The Biden Administration has no one to blame but themselves for this reckless immigration mistake.** Title 42, enacted by President Trump, is a vital tool in securing the border and stemming the excessive illegal border crossings. It will be gone tomorrow, and all hell is about to break loose, with over _1 MILLION_ Border Patrol encounters with illegals expected in the next 90 days.

The Biden Administration is shamefully allowing Title 42 to expire without any thought of a suitable replacement, putting border towns and communities across America at risk.

Joe Biden is making a political play with our safety and ending Title 42 because it's a _"Trump-era"_ policy, and he is not replacing it to appease the _far-left_ Democrats. [**It's time to kick these people out of office, Fellow American.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61790283:sdbN07DBN:m:1:877327319:27D73D7ADF7C29A25A4D46DC3F1C24A9:r)

But this is more than just a border crisis. _This is a national security and humanitarian crisis in the making caused by the inaction of the far-left. We MUST secure our southern border._

| [** ADD YOUR NAME IF YOU AGREE -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61790283:sdbN07DBN:m:1:877327319:27D73D7ADF7C29A25A4D46DC3F1C24A9:r)
---

Border Patrol is already overwhelmed, encountering nearly 6,300 individuals crossing illegally every day. **Tonight, that number is expected to \- at minimum - double.**

Under President Trump's leadership, Republicans were united to secure our border and make our nation safe. But over the past two years, the Biden Administration has unraveled all our hard work.

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61790283:sdbN07DBN:m:1:877327319:27D73D7ADF7C29A25A4D46DC3F1C24A9:r)
Lindsey Graham

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW_msR7DiN

Strange...and disturbing.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW_msR7DiN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

What
strange times we live in. Strange...and disturbing.

Would you
have ever imagined seeing headlines about churches and ministries
being vandalized and, in some instances, set on fire-all while
authorities seem to turn a blind eye to the violence?

Or
stories about how the FBI opened investigations into Catholic
parishes in the United States?

How about
the significant decrease in church attendance, which dropped by
up to 15 million people per week, due to COVID lockdowns that
forced many houses of worship to close?

These
news stories demonstrate the mounting pressure Christians
encounter in our increasingly secular society. In many ways, it
seems like faith in America is under siege.

That's
one reason we're releasing our latest free online course,
"Ancient Christianity," this month. I hope you'll enroll today
using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61790588:W_msR7DiN:m:3:2532013465:E662D6B3422736E3911FBD61EE7CCFA7:r

The
course delves into the hardships and courage of early Christians
who endured terrible persecution for their faith. At the same
time, they shaped the Christian church and established the
foundations of the Western world, including the United States.

Their
examples of "faith that overcomes" can inspire us today.

For
instance, the course covers the Roman Emperor Nero's persecution
of Christians and introduces Tertullian, the first Latin
Christian theologian. Many historians believe Tertullian was a
lawyer who defended Christians from legal persecution, and he
wrote against Rome's treatment of women, abortion, and
immorality.

That's
why, after enrolling, I hope you'll join us in promoting "Ancient
Christianity" to millions of your fellow citizens.

To
achieve this objective, we've set a goal to raise $500,000 by
midnight on May 22 to share this important free online course
with as many people as possible.

The
faithful backing of supporters like you makes our free online
courses possible. You also allow us to reach and teach millions
through other educational outreach efforts, like Imprimis and our
K-12 education programs.

And every
supporter like you really matters to us because we refuse EVERY
PENNY of taxpayer funding-even indirectly in the form of federal
or state student loans and grants.

We must
educate ourselves. Looking back at the Christians of the past, we
can see how they faced the overpowering might of an empire and
set an example for us to follow.

So, will
you help us reach and teach people just like you-urging them to
enroll in "Ancient Christianity"?

Using
this secure link, you can enroll and chip in to offset our
development and promotional costs with a tax-deductible gift of
$25, $50, or any amount.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61790588:W_msR7DiN:m:3:2532013465:E662D6B3422736E3911FBD61EE7CCFA7:r

Together,
we can secure the blessings of civil and religious liberty for
the next generation of Americans-so they don't have to live
through even stranger times than the ones we live in today.

Warm
regards,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

For more information please follow the URL below: Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out: To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-72107452135-echo3-12EFF59F5EC823CBEDC10BBC5481A567@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line. ----Powered by Paramount/Conservative Connect----

name: Don Huffines
subject: I need your help.
body:
We have our best chance in 70 years to eliminate this unnecessary big government program.
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-zchkid-yuddtktydi-n/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zchkid-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## **Let's eliminate vehicle inspections in Texas.**
## Stop the parasitic money grabbers and support HB 3297 in the Texas Senate so Texans can finally experience a little liberty with our vehicles.
Patriots,While in the Texas Senate I spent four years trying to eliminate this program, and I almost killed it in 2017. We have our best chance in 70 years to eliminate this unnecessary big government program.Please join me in supporting HB 3297 in the Texas Senate so Texans can finally experience a little liberty with our vehicles. This legislation passed the House and now has a public hearing THURSDAY in the Senate Committee on State Affairs. This out-of-date program is just one more property tax Texans are forced to pay. Enough is enough.I am quite familiar with the car business, and trust me when I tell you: vehicle inspections are a scam. You are being ripped off. Texas is the only Republican state to have this policy still.Look at the groups working to keep this worthless and out-of-date program: Gulf States Toyota (billionaires), Alliance for Automotive Innovation, and all of the state inspection shops making money on Texas car owners (with the government!).Please thank bill sponsor Sen. Mays Middleton (512 463-0111) and State Affairs Chairman Sen. Bryan Hughes (512 463-0101).Additionally, please call the State Affairs Committee members and urge them to vote for HB 3297:Sen. Angela Paxton: (512) 463-0108
Sen. Paul Bettencourt: (512) 463-0107
Sen. Brian Birdwell: (512) 463-0122
Sen. Morgan LaMantia: (512) 463-0127
Sen. Jose Menendez: (512) 463-0126
Sen. Tan Parker: (512) 463-0112
Sen. Charles Perry: (512) 463-0128
Sen. Charles Schwertner: (512) 463-0105
Sen. Judith Zaffirini: (512) 463-0121Thank you for the help!
Don Huffines PS: Below are some resources on this issue.Huffines Liberty Foundation research paper on vehicle inspections: [Read Paper](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zchkid-yuddtktydi-y/) My op-ed on vehicle inspections: [Read Op-ed](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zchkid-yuddtktydi-j/) The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of **liberty** , **prosperity** , and **virtue** in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.###
### _Help us advance liberty and prosperity in Texas:_
[Donate](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zchkid-yuddtktydi-t/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zchkid-yuddtktydi-h/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zchkid-yuddtktydi-k/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zchkid-yuddtktydi-u/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zchkid-yuddtktydi-o/) | [ Share ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-fb-zchkid-yuddtktydi-p/) | [ Tweet ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-tw-zchkid-yuddtktydi-x/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-zchkid-l-f)
---|---|---
[www.HuffinesLiberty.com](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zchkid-yuddtktydi-b/)[info@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:info@huffinesliberty.com)
(214) 526-3000 The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization. Contributions are tax-deductible.
By completing forms on this website, you agree to receive marketing and communications from the Huffines Liberty Foundation. [Preferences](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.updatemyprofile.com/t-zchkid-17329976-yuddtktydi-z) | [Unsubscribe](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-u-zchkid-yuddtktydi-v/)

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: I really need your help. Please chip in $100 today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Early voting has already begun
| | | |
---
|
---
---
| |
---
| Friend could you please make a $100 donation right now?
---
| EARLY VOTING HAS ALREADY STARTED. PLEASE HELP US WITH THE FINAL PUSH
---
| |
---

Friend Early voting has already begun and I really need your help. Could you please make a $100 donation today or give what you can to get me over the finish line?
Successful campaigns are expensive. It costs money to reach voters through mail, radio and TV. And you know I'm not funded from the deep pockets of lobbyists and PACs. I work for you.
I've been going door to door most every day. I'm amazed at the number of people who still don't know there's an election going on now through Tuesday, June 20 despite all of our signs, mailers and email blasts. It's amazing.
I'm a fighter for you and I know I can win this re-election fight if everyone gives something. If you can't give $100, please give something. If you can give more, please do. The more you give, the more people I can reach. It's that simple.
The RINO politicians don't want me back in the Virginia Senate representing you. They want a puppet they can control. Look no further than my opponent's campaign finance report to figure out who they will work for.
Thanks to those of you who answered the call and donated recently. I know who you are and I thank you for your faithful generosity.
How much does it mean to you to keep your conservative fighter in the Senate? If they silence me, who will fight for you?
And you don't have to live in Senate District 12 to give. You may not be able to vote for me, but I can vote for you. Vote with your dollars.
---

subject: re: My way of saying THANK YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Will you join me for dinner?
| | Friend,
---
As I’ve always said, the strength of our campaign will NEVER be determined by the size of our supporters’ contributions, but by the sheer number of grassroots patriots in our ranks.
_Simply put, no big-money special interest will ever own me!_
And unlike Crooked Joe Biden, who only cares about the donors who will make him rich, hardworking Americans like **YOU** are my only special interest.
**Which is why I decided to extend a special invitation to our incredible grassroots donors – _no matter the amount of your gift_ – to enter a contest to join me at my beautiful golf club in Bedminster on June 13 (the eve of my birthday) for a dinner event!**
You don’t have to worry about a thing, Friend. I’ll take care of it all:
* Flights
* Accommodations
* Tickets to the event

_And my favorite part, we’ll even take a photo together so that you’ll always remember this amazing evening!_
[**So please, make a contribution of any amount – _truly, even just $1_ – to be automatically entered to win.**](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGL2zAQhX_N-GZjjxRZOvjQXZFLoNAe2tJLkCXZmSDJRpYbtr--OKR7_d5jeB9j4hpo-higfwPEG7kNEIF9AcQLf_v1VVx-XnRtuv5brcWJP44U3wGxfKz-s_q60vhoKBy015Ub0Eq0tvJDJyTrFVc9r26DMop7LplrlZ-sQnWScpTcqU6gZf1Y0YAtsvbUda3kClWjhHJcThNzUraj6YC3D0qNW5IJ7l7yHtfGLrEKw62UdXtOOgOeN2_37JsHpezd0TiY-eNrE30ma-r7QqnU055cNrRRmmu7xEileA94TjYY0Qkzjo6P4yQ7xoCd9xKv0TvaIzD98hUH3JY9Ww9MW7qaF7MmrobmBEy_nNr_yZKKTwWYlkooQHFNgRwwffdSyL95_j4_4fMjTM_6R3gX5reu8uDWB4VAm-iBt_Ox4HD7FwAA___GHY1B)

Friend,
Grassroots donors like you are the bedrock of our MAGA movement.
That’s why I’m always thinking of ways to show my appreciation for all of your support.
And recently, I just came up with a new great idea...
On the eve of my birthday, I’ll be hosting a fundraising dinner at my beautiful golf course in Bedminster....
_**...So why not offer the chance for a grassroots donor to join us!**_
_If you win, your flight, your accommodation, your delicious meal will all be on me. And you can even bring a guest._

clean_body: Will you join me for dinner? | | Friend, As I’ve always said, the strength of our campaign will NEVER be determined by the size of our supporters’ contributions, but by the sheer number of grassroots patriots in our ranks. Simply put, no big-money special interest will ever own me! And unlike Crooked Joe Biden, who only cares about the donors who will make him rich, hardworking Americans like YOU are my only special interest. Which is why I decided to extend a special invitation to our incredible grassroots donors – no matter the amount of your gift – to enter a contest to join me at my beautiful golf club in Bedminster on June 13 (the eve of my birthday) for a dinner event! You don’t have to worry about a thing, Friend. I’ll take care of it all: Flights Accommodations Tickets to the event And my favorite part, we’ll even take a photo together so that you’ll always remember this amazing evening! | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Sun, May 7, 2023 Subject: I came up with an idea I think you’ll like To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | Friend, Grassroots donors like you are the bedrock of our MAGA movement. That’s why I’m always thinking of ways to show my appreciation for all of your support. And recently, I just came up with a new great idea... On the eve of my birthday, I’ll be hosting a fundraising dinner at my beautiful golf course in Bedminster.... ...So why not offer the chance for a grassroots donor to join us! If you win, your flight, your accommodation, your delicious meal will all be on me. And you can even bring a guest. | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Save America JFC by clicking . Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking or by texting "JUNEDINNER" to 88022 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone, you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from the Save America JFC. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 to opt out. Entries must be received between May 5, 2023, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and ends on May 15, 2023, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) "Prize Winner" will receive a trip for two to a June 13, 2023 dinner event at Trump National Golf Club Bedminster consisting of the following: (i) round-trip coach class airfare for the Prize Winner and one (1) guest to the event destination from the major U.S. airport nearest Prize Winner's residence within the 48 contiguous United States; (ii) two (2) tickets to the dinner event featuring President Donald J. Trump; (iii) two (2) day one (1) night first class hotel accommodations (1 room, double occupancy); (iv) one (1) photograph of the Prize Winner and guest with President Trump; approximate retail value ("ARV") of the Prize: $5,000. The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: your exclusive invite
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, the race for Senate here in New York is well underway — and the stakes couldn't be higher.
Last year, Republicans flipped four congressional seats across my state, enough to help give them control of the House. At the same time, Lee Zeldin, a right-wing radical, came within single digits of the governor's mansion. _And now, he's hinting that he may challenge me in 2024._
Listen, I'm not afraid of a tough fight. Zeldin's tweets attacking my campaign don't faze me, because I'm focused on delivering results for the people I represent in the Senate.
But make no mistake: Defending this seat and flipping those congressional seats back to blue won't be easy. **Control of the House AND the Senate are on the line here in New York — and the GOP's megadonors will do whatever it takes to make these races go their way.** A strong grassroots team is absolutely essential to our success here.
**That's why I'm asking key members of my grassroots team to join my exclusive 2024 Reelection Focus group — and I've specifically included you on this list.[_Friend, your input would be so appreciated — can you spare just a few minutes to share your thoughts with me?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63121608/405673843/1179401769?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4143-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDlhNWQ2Yy1mY2VmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TDKIwt5WsfeV0qvQq4hHFmVHHn7iZJZv3wd_eKWBB-I=&emci=3d083025-a4ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=3d9a5d6c-fcef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**

---
Thank you so much. I'm looking forward to reading through your responses.

With gratitude,

Kirsten
|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63121610/405673845/1575385346?code=jtk4143-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDlhNWQ2Yy1mY2VmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TDKIwt5WsfeV0qvQq4hHFmVHHn7iZJZv3wd_eKWBB-I=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63121611/405673846/1575385346?code=jtk4143-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDlhNWQ2Yy1mY2VmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TDKIwt5WsfeV0qvQq4hHFmVHHn7iZJZv3wd_eKWBB-I=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63121612/405673847/1575385346?code=jtk4143-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDlhNWQ2Yy1mY2VmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TDKIwt5WsfeV0qvQq4hHFmVHHn7iZJZv3wd_eKWBB-I=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

body:
Live & Online Prayer Meeting For Trump with Pastors For Trump, General Flynn, Roger Stone & More
| | | [](https://100090.io.directiq12.com/hit?sid=87ok9ku33m5eqavrqw&linkid=0&link=30c164b9178149deb09d056f2e278f49)

Prayer Meeting, Trump Doral May 11 at 7:00pm Eastern with General Flynn, Roger Stone and Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
Christians, Friends and Media, I wanted to personally invite you to tonight's Pastors For Trump prayer meeting from 7-8:30pm at the Trump Doral in Miami, Florida. As a member of our community, you know how important it is to come together in prayer and support for our President and our nation. That's why we're bringing together some of the most influential pastors, speakers, and musicians to lead us in a powerful time of worship and prayer. We'll be joined by Jimmy Levy from American Idol, as well as General Flynn, Roger Stone and David and Stacy Whited from Flyover Conservatives. This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to stand with fellow believers and pray for our nation and its leaders. And what better place to do it than at the luxurious Trump Doral resort? Don't miss out on this incredible event. Space is limited so please click the link below to reserve your spot today (there are no walk-ins allowed). Media inquiries must be directed to [kristin@thinkrightpr.com](mailto:kristin@thinkrightpr.com) You can watch live at the link below and on this Rumble [LINK](https://100090.io.directiq12.com/hit?sid=87ok9ku33m5eqavrqw&linkid=2&link=5cb4a6707ec64db7832c0bb98e4190d1)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Ted Cruz has a strong Democratic challenger in Rep. Colin Allred, an ex-NFL player and civil rights attorney with a record of winning tough races against Republicans in Texas.
body:
Sacking Ted Cruz from the Senate
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T119220f6-0a56-43f0-89ae-0eddc96473f7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**We have just the person to sack Ted Cruz, who in recently released recordings plotted to steal the 2020 election for Trump. What we've predicted is official: _Rep. Colin Allred will challenge Ted Cruz for his Senate seat in 2024._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T93795bce-a02f-43b6-8e2b-f18af39351a0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _This is huge, and by that I don't just mean Colin Allred:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td5d09af8-437d-4224-bcdd-dfd551b91478/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Yes, he's a large guy who played football in the NFL. But he's a real tough guy--not a petrified wimp play-acting tough like Cruz. _**_Allred was raised by a single mother and worked his way up to joining the Obama Administration. Then, in a huge upset, he knocked off GOP Rep. Pete Sessions in 2018 in a key swing seat._**_ Allred's the highest profile Black politician in Texas, with charisma as large as he is._ _Meanwhile, In addition to being a sleazoid who left Texans to freeze as he jetted off to Cancun, Cruz betrayed America. _**_Cruz is on tape talking to nutball Maria Bartiromo about creating a fake commission to steal the election in 2020._** [**_The legal system will do what it'll do. What ___we__ _ can do is kick Cruz' seditionist arse outta the Senate in '24, when Allred destroys this shell of a man who barely held on by 2.5% vs Beto O'Rourke in '18. So, will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to elect outstanding Allred and remove Cruz from public life?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7177d315-4134-403e-b45c-f5ad287030c5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping us elect a champion, and ousting a despicable traitor._ Cliff
