| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb7b64981-678d-4ec0-822c-2ed7569bb219/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: Biden Family Accused, Legislator Admits to Hiding Bibles, Amazon’s $10 Delivery Scheme
body:
Leaders of the House Oversight Committee have accused President Biden’s family and their associates of taking in more than $10 million from foreign nationals while Biden was VP.

Leaders of the House Oversight Committee have accused President Biden’s family and their associates of taking in more than $10 million from foreign nationals while Biden was VP.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)

# Thursday May 11, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today we’re covering the House’s accusation against the Biden family of influence-peddling, an Arizona legislator under fire for hiding Bibles, and Amazon’s new plan to pay customers $10 to pick up their own packages. Is this your first time reading The Flyover? ## Biden Family Accused of Receiving Millions
Leaders of the House Oversight Committee have accused President Biden's family and their associates of taking in [more than $10 million](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHOozAQhJ_GdKD12gancHGNu1x7JbLxEvbkYA6cIN7-lNR_N9KMNJ--P_fxHjjz-vgdnuTqXMYwVX7TCKaVskU1YpPcTISkGnKyt8qCsaiaxWlAEw1giBZtjINJQ9A4wWT6FIebbNghoAIjpQS0Rnakeiv7pKeoZzubIDRQ4lr27m_htS4056u8ae-m8myyW2rdDqF-CfQC_Xme3esItaRwfQYC_VHLfgn0K52HQL-VzJWnT_wcC_RgBHoJAv1SXge1j7K1kROtLa__Xrxf7blwpfbbCvQDIGB_0wCDQN_sLm0n58xHPwgNj2fg_GWrP6v6HwAA___P5Ged) from foreign nationals while Biden was VP, and they've laid out a trail of bank documents for the Justice Department to follow. The accusations of Biden-family influence peddling have accelerated in recent weeks, leading Rep. Nancy Mace, one of the committee members to tell the DOJ to ["get off its ass and investigate."](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O8yAQAJ8Gd1j8GAcXFF_jLl97pYVhcTbCYJlVfHn7U66-aoopRpqv-3L3mLFs__0OjlJdfCB8wSIMl5IrvaguugSgQHfg5Gi1FcYq3T3cNGkzSj8kHeQ0rtLflJnApFuyaTKr6dApobQwUkqhrJE96NHKMQ5hHZJNxrNBQESqZ_-sWOgBKb_rC84-1L3L7kF0NKb_MTUzNV_X1af6XeBqH8_UfNSMhKExNRdfwpvvPgAnyLnxWJ98A-I1JY7lBY1w8wT8OKFhhEJ8_aA7XTwuzBnbeGOD2HaP-TdPf9_4CQAA___OImLv) During a press conference Wednesday, the committee focused particularly on $3 million in payments from a Romanian businessman after Biden met with Romania's president. The White House labeled the accusations as "innuendo" and a "political stunt."
## Santos Pleads Not Guilty, Still Running
Rep. George Santos [pleaded not guilty](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQAL_G7hwtCxhSULwmXV57pbWGxeZEjAVcovv7U66-cjTNaD7uy51STsf2nx7seiwL-Z6evICehJhQLjgGF5mR5chOzFZa0BbluLsIxmJYiWg1WonANmhjtTBmXT1jGJNDQAlaCAFotbiwnK2Yg_KrijZqGhRwSL3Uy2dJR9855u_y5Hrx5TFmt_d-tkH-G_A24I3Og1_trd5Qe_KZB7xtXOrGU6OjlzZFDlwpT36nunGbvs5Andsk5TwbgisAGsEaAJW-0mqUDTYGb8fqwvlKOac2m0HB9qCUfzP631d-AgAA__-cLGJm) Wednesday to 13 charges of federal money laundering, fraud, and theft relating to the financing of his election campaign. The embattled congressman, who admits he fabricated virtually his entire life story during his campaign, was taken into custody and released on a $500,000 bond. His [next court appearance](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGO6yAQheGngY4IBjCmoLiNu9x2S4vgwWZFTITHWeXtV0m99aejI_1f1_kaSy37-j_eMVBuc0xUnjhLK5QSoGfgS8iIgJpjUMOoR2lH0HwL3uoknXTOWJ-c80aC98OohsEO2aQbLwEkaGmVUhJGqy6o37yYdDN5zDYyI3Ep1Prlu5WdNsz11Z7YL6ndeQ0b0eNg-h-DicFEG26l1rcxmDquZ41U2s5gSu3sJG6RqOLBYNLeO6O9WLH1FcURd2qHKLtI50FteYm2C6VFxgV7rCJtsa-fIe9hefyUWssxOGbkeo_l88jp7zi_AQAA__8lZWUJ) will be on June 30. Santos says he will not resign, and House Speaker Kevin McCarthy, who already removed him from all committees, has signaled that Santos [can remain in office](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu7CAQQNGvwR0rmLExLihe425fm9JiYbAnwbCyyUb--yipU9_iSuftvtw9Zy7rf7-Ta6kuPjR-0aIGqbUEXKCLLhEBYUdOG4tWDRaw29xgLE79-IhhwqDCaIyyZNIUEPU0xqljBwpQDVprBXbQN0JjtYl9ePTJpsGLXlHkVo_be-XSNkr5qi86bqHuXXZba89T4D8Bs4DZP8JYrp8kYF6pHivJ05dWT8klcmg7lSY_6MVF7iH4o22X3OrnSQJmjYDKqlHA3B0uPr84Zz7NKHq17p7z77H9DfAdAAD__yCWW48) while his legal case plays out.
## US Scrambles to Find Solution to Migrant Crisis
US officials say they're ill-prepared for the flood of migrants expected to begin today when Title 42 Covid-era limits expire. The Border Patrol has been apprehending [over 10,000 migrants a day](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGunDAQAL8GukVrGzhTUKShu7QpkbEX2MhgZG-O3N8_3atfPdJoNH-e89Nx5HP77Q4aZU2z88IvmrEDpUCbWddhXIk0mZpG1VtjsbPa1Pu4uhbRGqf88HBLj4OiZbAGnfdKaTPUPGrUBjulFGrbqYZMb1UfWr-0q107V7VIgSXl5m_iU3Za4zu9KDc-HXUcd5GrVOZXpadKT_d9N2v6f9JdPrzS05UiC_tS6WlJOVCGy0lOEQpRAYWICAdv2Z0CdPr07xTKBYJ7g9vJBRCWSNDqAnQG2HnbqQjQizJk8h9lqPMYrptj5NI_qha3w3H87pOfd30FAAD__zHpbgc), the highest ever recorded, and is already at capacity with 28,000 migrants in detention. Because the system is so strained, White House officials plan to direct border authorities to begin releasing migrants into the U.S. [without the ability to track them](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQgOGnsTcsOLBDBoYu3tK1o3WGc3ItBgtorLx91c6d_-XX93FbbsiR0_0dd3Jtywv6xk9a5CiUEqAX6IPbiIB0T05NVls5WtD9w2EwCmFdr2RDIIIJYLraoDevDXqNPTuQoOWolJJgRzWQnqyagvGr2ew2YmckBW65DJ-ZU3vQFl_5SWXwee-je7R21E6_dTB3MJ_nOaTVJzrrb-9gPnLkxr52MK8cKAkMOydxRExV5BKoiEKRsJLY-V4wtSq-q0hZnPgSraD_EsUntPoiTV9cOE6Oket06Yy878jxb6T97_ITAAD__4nCZo8) at all. In another fundamental policy shift, The White House will begin denying [asylum to migrants](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uMyEQAJ_mrsOC5ce4oPgad_7alCeOXeyN4LA4YsdvHzl1ytE0o_m4LJfIhbfr_1gpjNyWmAY_aJFWKCVALzBjyERAeqagnNdeWg96voU1JYvJr-Dx5OQJk4TjETBnWjOANDMHkKClVUpJ8FYdSDuvHJq0muyzjZORhDxaP3w23saNcnm1B_VDanUu4TbGfZ_0vwnOE5zjfaPn_lZv6INToQnOla89bmMXlb45NbG2jtRF3F_lq4rBo5AwIEw0yVrtHBlYrc7gXM7eR-8kIEqce8D7k0vh3R0nI681cvntGH9v-QkAAP__Hixi_A) who arrive at the U.S.-Mexico border without first applying online or seeking protection in a country along the way, drawing criticism from pro-immigration groups.
➤ **CNN** faced a barrage of criticism for giving Donald Trump the stage last night in a live, two-hour CNN Town Hall. The network, which will likely see an enormous ratings spike, shrugged off the criticism, declaring Trump a leading presidential candidate. clean_body: Leaders of the House Oversight Committee have accused President Biden’s family and their associates of taking in more than $10 million from foreign nationals while Biden was VP. Leaders of the House Oversight Committee have accused President Biden’s family and their associates of taking in more than $10 million from foreign nationals while Biden was VP. | | | | | | Thursday May 11, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today we’re covering the House’s accusation against the Biden family of influence-peddling, an Arizona legislator under fire for hiding Bibles, and Amazon’s new plan to pay customers $10 to pick up their own packages. Is this your first time reading The Flyover? and never miss a thing. How did our Editor do today? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover and tell us exactly what you liked or didn't like in today's edition. Want to stay informed throughout the day? and stay in touch. | Biden Family Accused of Receiving Millions Leaders of the House Oversight Committee have accused President Biden's family and their associates of taking in from foreign nationals while Biden was VP, and they've laid out a trail of bank documents for the Justice Department to follow. The accusations of Biden-family influence peddling have accelerated in recent weeks, leading Rep. Nancy Mace, one of the committee members to tell the DOJ to During a press conference Wednesday, the committee focused particularly on $3 million in payments from a Romanian businessman after Biden met with Romania's president. The White House labeled the accusations as "innuendo" and a "political stunt." Santos Pleads Not Guilty, Still Running Rep. George Santos Wednesday to 13 charges of federal money laundering, fraud, and theft relating to the financing of his election campaign. The embattled congressman, who admits he fabricated virtually his entire life story during his campaign, was taken into custody and released on a $500,000 bond. His will be on June 30. Santos says he will not resign, and House Speaker Kevin McCarthy, who already removed him from all committees, has signaled that Santos while his legal case plays out. US Scrambles to Find Solution to Migrant Crisis US officials say they're ill-prepared for the flood of migrants expected to begin today when Title 42 Covid-era limits expire. The Border Patrol has been apprehending , the highest ever recorded, and is already at capacity with 28,000 migrants in detention. Because the system is so strained, White House officials plan to direct border authorities to begin releasing migrants into the U.S. at all. In another fundamental policy shift, The White House will begin denying who arrive at the U.S.-Mexico border without first applying online or seeking protection in a country along the way, drawing criticism from pro-immigration groups. ➤ CNN faced a barrage of criticism for giving Donald Trump the stage last night in a live, two-hour CNN Town Hall. The network, which will likely see an enormous ratings spike, shrugged off the criticism, declaring Trump a leading presidential candidate. () ➤ Sen. Dianne Feinstein is returning to the Senate this week after facing calls that she should immediately resign. The 89-year-old senator, who has said this is her last term, has been absent for months due to illness, which has stalled several Democratic initiatives. () ➤ An Arizona lawmaker who was caught on video hiding Bibles under couch cushions to keep them from other House members is now the target of an ethics investigation. Democrat Rep. Stephanie Stahl Hamilton, who is herself a Presbyterian minister, says the Bible-hiding was a prank. () ➤ Vice President Kamala Harris will deliver the commencement speech at West Point later this month, the first woman ever to do so. It will also mark her first visit to the military academy. () ➤ West Virginia basketball coach Bob Huggins will take a million-dollar pay cut and three-game suspension as part of a deal to return to the team next season. Huggins was under investigation for using an anti-gay slur in a radio interview this week. () ➤ Golf 's PGA Championship tournament this month will include 18 golfers from the controversial Saudi-backed LIV Tour. The PGA chose to invite all eligible LIV golfers, including Phil Mickelson, Dustin Johnson, Brooks Koepka, and Cam Smith. () ➤ The national champion Georgia Bulldog football team has declined an invitation to visit the White House. The team said the June 12 date of the invitation from President Joe Biden and First Lady Jill Biden conflicted with its schedule. () Market Report 5/10/23 | ▲ | Nasdaq Natl. Assoc. of Securities Dealers Automated Quotations | 4,137.64 | + 1.04% ---|---|---|--- ▲ | S&P S&P Global Rating | 4,136.48 | + 0.45% ▼ | DOW J Dow Jones Industrial Average | 33,531.00 | - 0.4% ▼ | BTC Bitcoin | $27,439.0 | - 0.66% ▼ | IEP Icahn Enterprises LP | $32.22 | - 15.14% ➤ Big Stock Move : Icahn Enterprises, corporate raider Carl Icahn's conglomerate, fell 15 percent in trading Wednesday on news that federal investigators are seeking financial information related to the company's governance. () ➤ Anheuser-Busch InBev took another hit Wednesday as an analyst at HSBC downgraded the beverage giant's stock from "buy" to "hold" due to the ongoing Bud Light brand crisis. HSBC warned investors there were "deeper problems than ABI admits." () ➤ Consumer prices rose 0.4% in April, a smaller increase than in March, but still a sign of continuing inflation. Stubbornly high rents were the primary cause, though grocery store prices fell by 0.2 percent. () ➤ Microsoft signed a surprising agreement with Helion Fusion to buy electric power generated from nuclear fusion technology beginning in 2028. Fusion technology remains experimental and unproven, and scientists are skeptical of the deal's ability to deliver. () ➤ The first babies using DNA from three people have been born in Britain, British fertility authorities announced. The triple-parent fertility technology was used to prevent genetic defects in the embryos. () ➤ A meteorite that hit a New Jersey home may have originated from Halley’s Comet. Scientists believe the rock came from the Eta Aquarids meteor shower, created by debris thrown off by the famous comet. () ➤ Amazon is offering US shoppers $10 to pick up their purchases instead of having them delivered more expensively to their homes by truck. The company says it applies to customers who have never used Amazon Pickup or have not used that service in the last 12 months. () ➤ Buddy Holly , a petit basset griffon Vendeen, was the top winner of this year's Westminster Dog Show. Monty the Giant Schnauzer won the top prize in the Working Group category. () ➤ MTV News is shutting down after 36 years, part of the widespread cuts and layoffs announced by Paramount TV, owner of MTV. The long-running pop-culture newscast is most famous for asking presidential candidate Bill Clinton the immortal question: "Boxers or briefs?" () | Daily Quote | “They’re going to do anything they can to keep (Trump) from winning. It ain’t gonna work...people are gonna see through the lines, a New York jury, he had no chance.” -Alabama GOP Sen. **I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. * my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

** _And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. Folks, We won our last campaign by 112 votes – and I attribute that win to knocking on doors. Team Greenhalgh _**can’t**_ be outworked. Our goal is to hit over 500 doors this weekend and we need your help to hit our numbers.**Are you willing to knock on doors with me this Saturday?** **WHERE:** Republican Party of Virginia Beach HQ 2955 Virginia Beach Blvd #105, Virginia Beach, VA 23452**WHEN:** Saturday May 13th at Noon **WHAT TO BRING:** Sneakers and a cell phone Will this be your first time knocking? Don’t worry! My team and I are happy to teach you all the tips and tricks and can send you out with an experienced knocker. Questions and RSVPs can be directed to my campaign manager, Abby, at [abby@karengreenhalgh.com ](mailto:abby@karengreenhalgh.com?subject=Door%20Knocking%205/13 "abby@karengreenhalgh.com") Hope to see you on Saturday! Karen

### SPRING SOCIAL WITH DEL. RASOUL THIS SATURDAY

### EVA LYNCH-COMER "WRITER BY BUS" PROJECT

Ride Solutions, the Roanoke Arts Commission and the Greater Roanoke Transit Authority commissioned poet Eva Lynch-Comer to create public art that encourages people to use public transportation such as the Valley Metro. This spring, Lynch-Comer rode the buses for free to find inspiration.
Lynch-Comer's writing for the Writer By Bus project will be published in September for Transit Month.
Photo: Scott P. Yates

Located at 1001 Winchester Ave SW, Roanoke, VA 24015. ### Jade Harris for Senate
### SD-3

Jade Harris is a Rockbridge County native, and she is running for State Senate because she believes the 3rd senate district deserves to be represented by someone who fights for expanded mental healthcare access, protects reproductive choice, and isn't afraid to stand up to the bullies and demagogues derailing our political system.
Protecting trans rights, repealing right to work, strengthening unions, and supporting our farmers are just a small glimpse into her legislative priorities. Revitalizing our state's infrastructure, creating a favorable environment for job creation, and supporting our public education system are a few of the other items she is dedicated to addressing.

### RCPS Teacher of the Year Commending Resolution
---
At a school board meeting earlier this week, Delegate Rasoul presented Adria Cintron, the Roanoke City Public Schools 2023 Teacher of the Year, with a Commending Resolution that the General Assembly passed for her in honor of her accomplishments.
Adria is an 8th grade English teacher at Woodrow Wilson Middle School.

---

| **🚨 NEW POLL 🚨 **
Fellow American,

We're gaining momentum. (❗ ❗ ❗)

**Another new poll has us TIED with VP Mike Pence and AHEAD of Nikki Haley!**

I may have launched this campaign just a few months ago - but conservative voters are taking notice of our outsider campaign.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

According to _Roll Call,_ the GOP has a 2.5 point advantage in Georgia— but it’s _**STILL**_ rated as a tossup.

If we don’t move fast, the GOP advantage could grow, and Georgia could fall into the GOP column. [**_Can we count on you to rush a donation right now to help us build out our voter outreach and voter protection work?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63120135/405668161/702231530?refcode=20230511.1_GAPU_5U&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTdkMjk2ZS1mNmVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cOL1JfKtMgHimYlCnMLUMrGkkKtEtAgH--qkVrT5VrE=)

It’s critical that all Democrats in Georgia know when, where, and how to cast their ballots – and it’s also important that we make sure they know WHY they’re casting them.

We’re up against some of the most extreme Republicans in the entire country, Peter. This is Marjorie Taylor Greene’s home state, and now that she’s become the face of the GOP, her power is only growing in Georgia.

[**_We can’t let the GOP continue to build an advantage in Georgia. Pitch in right now to help us turn the tide and keep Georgia blue._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63120136/405668162/702231530?refcode=20230511.1_GAPU_5U&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTdkMjk2ZS1mNmVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cOL1JfKtMgHimYlCnMLUMrGkkKtEtAgH--qkVrT5VrE=)

Thank you for your support,

GA Dems

[Donate to 1776 Project PAC](https://substack.com/redirect/8cdf6844-bad1-4b9d-830c-031d47b80aa7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Local Elections Are Important**
Parents play a vital role in education, and their involvement is crucial to ensure that our schools are held accountable for delivering excellent education. Parental involvement goes beyond attending parent-teacher conferences or volunteering for school events; it is also about actively engaging with school administrators and policymakers to confirm that children are receiving the best possible education without any bias towards any particular ideology. Parents also deserve to know what their children are reading in school libraries and learning in the classroom. 1776 Project PAC works hard to find reasonable candidates who will support parental involvement and reject radical ideologies.
[Share 1776's Newsletter](https://substack.com/redirect/1caed75c-07ab-487b-a707-400d4fc63d2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Winning in Texas**
Our goal is to rid America's schools of radical, left-wing agendas one election at a time. Last year, all 15 of our endorsed candidates won in Texas. Voters around the state chose to secure conservative leadership for their school boards. Texas Governor Greg Abbott supports parental rights and has said "parents are angry about the woke agenda that is being forced on their children in their schools," [during an event.](https://substack.com/redirect/535839d6-7b46-4320-85fa-ee09b1b5814f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
On May 6th 1776 Project PAC candidates won 5 out of 6 seats in Tarrant County:
_Carroll ISD, Tarrant, TX_
Eric Lannen
_GCISD, Tarrant, TX_
AJ Pontillo
Mary Humphrey
_Keller ISD, Tarrant, TX_
John Birt
Chris Coker
[Follow 1776 Project PAC on Twitter](https://substack.com/redirect/9b2980fe-f9f5-4e05-8ca8-83a6d78592c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Loudoun County Retaliation**
Exposed plans among parents in Loudon County reveal that radical activists were [actively planning violence](https://substack.com/redirect/6b416deb-32ee-4f0d-846c-513f2722eaba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) against parents who spoke up at school board meetings. The disturbing messages within the group discussed threats of harm and conspired to harass. Attacking parents who speak up is shocking and dangerous. This all comes after the federal government [labeled parents](https://substack.com/redirect/0cad65f8-d6ed-44e1-bad4-c9f678b3c731?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) who spoke up as domestic terrorists, clearly the domestic terrorists are the individuals threatening and harassing parents with good intentions.
It is imperative that parents have a seat at the table when it comes to their child's education. The radical leftist ideology takes issue with granting parents the power to make informed decisions for their children and subsequently garnering respect for those decisions from others. By empowering parents, we strengthen families and, in turn, our communities.
[Donate to 1776 Project PAC](https://substack.com/redirect/8cdf6844-bad1-4b9d-830c-031d47b80aa7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**One District at a Time**
Parents are leading a movement to take back control of their public schools. But, to make it successful, we all need to do our part. That means registering to vote on time, learning about local school board candidates, and showing up to vote on election day. Together, we can continue this trend of parents pushing back against what they see as problematic education and making sure they have a say in their children's schooling.
1776's Newsletter is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell 1776's Newsletter that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments.

subject: My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley ran for the seat last cycle in his first political race, nearly defeating a 30-year career politician and Republican Marcus Molinaro – losing 50.8% to 49.2% in a district where some Democrats on the ticket lost by more than 6 points. Josh will win this time!
body:
NY-19 is a path to taking the House back
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d4eba3a-d476-4ce7-906e-22ba17e7b8e0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._

|

| |
---
| | | | | [__](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta4551cc2-c89c-40b9-85fd-2a2f42d0a526/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hey, it’s Al Franken. My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley just made a BIG announcement. [**Josh is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District — a key district to taking back the House in 2024.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6ee7d38d-198e-46fb-95fa-8522532005a4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) He ran for the seat last cycle in his first political race, nearly defeating a 30-year career politician and Republican Marcus Molinaro – losing 50.8% to 49.2% in a district where some Democrats on the ticket lost by more than 6 points. Josh will win this time!

He’s not taking corporate PAC money and he’s counting on individual supporters like you and me.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T48016497-2a1b-49fb-b235-24c2d7def028/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** This is important to me. | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWPjQscDNe

ACI - Religious Liberty Survey

I am fearful that legal persecution will intensify
against Americans holding to faith-based values

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWPjQscDNe

Fellow
American,

There is
a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me
worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values.

After the
Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and
signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only
intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Are you
concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our
founding-Religious Liberty?

In
addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act, numerous
examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v.
BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL
RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few
examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to
faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to
their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act,
brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal
Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and
organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex
marriage failed.

This has
the potential to only intensify legal persecution against
individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to
faith-based values.

The
American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to
preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation
for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty,
Community, and Life.

Whether
it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield
after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a
cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I
am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?

Please
share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning
religious liberty in America.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61791253:WPjQscDNe:m:3:2532013465:2616C9C108959A4878C4E6FAD896BA52:r

Thank you
for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWPjQscDNe

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWPjQscDNe

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-72110063699-echo3-18BE808B8AAB5B2D249F9C541B9D0E71@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

----Powered by Paramount/Conservative Connect----

name: American Update
subject: Study Ancient Christianity
body:
I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666114%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3gyzlAt9BqFIZMtwKemJVA&sysid=1

Dear Friend,

I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we’ve produced our newest online course, “Ancient Christianity,” which we’ll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666114%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3gyzlAt9BqFIZMtwKemJVA&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666125%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=43gwuyC47qzfxyYxkFmgHg&sysid=1 https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666114%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3gyzlAt9BqFIZMtwKemJVA&sysid=1

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

American Update

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1085%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=y5AyVOZQGv2I25JK4WVCjA&sysid=1 Unsubscribe

name: Jessica Anderson, Heritage Action
subject: ALERT: Threat identified to our elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
Fellow Conservative, we’re bringing your attention to a growing concern that is affecting our election system...

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp87j1jjqno63hk7471nrqsu0vkfbai77srncbbo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3h64or6c9h2bs)
---
| | Fellow conservative, we’re bringing your attention to a growing concern affecting our election system: **_ranked-choice voting_.** Ranked-choice voting is a flawed election scheme pushed by Left-wing mega-donors and political operatives seeking more influence and control over our nation's elections.
At Heritage Action, we believe it should be “easy to vote and hard to cheat.”

But ranked-choice voting makes it “hard to vote and easy to cheat.” In multiple states where it has been tried, ranked-choice voting has decreased voter turnout!
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrceksnfqagnh4k118t7eatnustudbl5e1lrs9sg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3h64or6c9h2bs)
---
Heritage Action is _already_ working in states across the country to stop this voting scheme from being implemented further. That's why I am asking you to [**join us and add your name**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9roegeo32oqncqat3lmvf5p8ia5asveia8l8fm8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3h64or6c9h2bs)**** to the growing list of concerned Americans who are standing up against this flawed system. Together, we can work to preserve the integrity of our elections and ensure that the voices of the people are fairly heard. [**Please add your name today to help us stop Ranked-choice voting >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zndtlgjkgb2b4slap990eivob4kr16ipkb8a7ido_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3h64or6c9h2bs) Thank you,Jessica AndersonExecutive Director | Heritage Action

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Study Ancient Christianity
body:
I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfb75sp95m18icsvdd1lrcvmsmpmt2g1uj1eh5p0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3h64or6c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlbdrrc5albe51jkvjr76st6pt8h2mo8qcrb5q8o_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3h64or6c9h2bs)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgvc1djn6vmrv4s60tejq9pds295847k3kvphe38_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3h64or6c9h2bs)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---

name: Brent Bozell
subject: The media wants a race war
body:
The radical leftwing media is doing what it does best

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze779qjiclf0569gkum2ad07hb6mtr5jms9u38j0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3h6cpb2chh2bs)

Friend,

The radical leftwing media is doing what it does best - fearmongering and creating division in our country.

Make no mistake. This is deliberate. The media wants a racial war in order to tear American society apart and use it as a means for gun control and big government solutions. They are creating a racial division to bolster their Democrat masters. _Americans must remain united regardless of race, religion, etc., despite the media 's attacks to divide us._

It's all about what they report and what they don't report.

**What they report** : A white man in New York City kills a black man (who was violently threatening passengers).

**What they don 't report**: The homeless black man had 44 prior arrests for violent criminal acts, including the attempted kidnapping of a 7-year-old and assault on a senior citizen.

**What the media also didn 't report**: The same week as the subway situation unfolded, a black man in Oklahoma murdered two white people because of their race.

Do you see how it works? This meme perfectly summarizes the media.
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znnusnfpmu007b13dsrr5bihbjbb2ojdk3nisqq0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3h6cpb2chh2bs)
As President of the Media Research Center (MRC), I have dedicated my life to exposing and destroying the leftwing media. It's been an uphill battle, but I believe we are on the cusp of victory. **I am raising $55,000 online to support our critical work to destroy the media 's reputation, fire their radicals, and drive them bankrupt.**

**_Here 's how MRC has successfully destroyed the media's reputation_:**
* **STEP 1:** MRC records every single mainstream news program. Our staff collects thousands of hours of news coverage every week.

* **STEP 2:** MRC staff reviews hours of content to find the biggest lies and fake news told by the media. We record it and keep it in our archive.

* **STEP 3:** We take the clips of the biggest lies and fake news and create video compilations and expose the media to the American people. Using our online network of activists, MRC broadcasts the lies to MILLIONS of people.

Our viral videos are shared not only online but among conservative news sites worldwide. Our stories often create breaking news and help take down radical leftists in the media like Don Lemon and even help bring lawsuits against them.

The media will not stop until they are destroyed, and the average American regards them with disdain.

Here 's how MRC has successfully destroyed the media's reputation: STEP 1: MRC records every single mainstream news program. Our staff collects thousands of hours of news coverage every week. STEP 2: MRC staff reviews hours of content to find the biggest lies and fake news told by the media. We record it and keep it in our archive. STEP 3: We take the clips of the biggest lies and fake news and create video compilations and expose the media to the American people. Using our online network of activists, MRC broadcasts the lies to MILLIONS of people. Our viral videos are shared not only online but among conservative news sites worldwide. Our stories often create breaking news and help take down radical leftists in the media like Don Lemon and even help bring lawsuits against them. The media will not stop until they are destroyed, and the average American regards them with disdain. Their agenda is to destroy our country, and we are the solution. Help MRC defeat the radical leftwing media once and for all. ** I don't have billionaires like the media supporting MRC. I count on hardworking Americans who believe in truth and honesty, and traditional American values. Please send your support today. Thank you, Brent Bozell Founder and President of MRC The mission of the Media Research Center is to create a media culture in America where truth and liberty flourish. The MRC is a research and education organization operating under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code, and contributions to the MRC are tax-deductible. Friend, In breaking news that surprises absolutely no one, the House Oversight and Accountability Committee has finally confirmed what we all suspected: The Biden family has been up to no good. They apparently worked with their business associates to create more than 20 companies and received more than $10 million from foreign nationals [while Joe Biden served as vice president](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=629bb26aafb54fe894c5a6d1c65ee8bc&_e=GwIrHrxQ_U51Ho9b01rdUcfDSNDF1bGMrPvSDtQoLVECgsOjNz0QFsTp07oTtjM0b2TivHwV3w9dO87jtRY-CwcnTsJmc7nxHR7EjPYRQ1XQ2K01cuBp3tjTRUHlHWsVZUjudHCnV7nPYGKdRa4q7NtjnIeq_5knaB_fLduV-AACLDrzG5o-15mKWsJ0xl4PDftQu5QDx9zdz5I-cH8T2fEvKjCI1SN4Mc07js2rKk54ykCqtnNV9hn6IltfNQEDfqBfqB48j1F0wou4EzgqkNW69BOse5PZE6bYhkHinfwUUEFZNTBbKIRPh_OrSIfLjnvImBVswafhWt12BMQ8EQ%3D%3D). Peter — it’s no secret that being an educator is one of the most challenging and underpaid professions in our country.

Teachers are crucial to molding the minds of our future generations. They put in countless hours preparing lesson plans, grading assignments, maintaining a safe classroom environment, and providing support to their students.

Despite their selflessness, they are forced to grapple with large class sizes, low wages, a lack of classroom resources, and tense public scrutiny — leading to extreme levels of stress and burnout.

President Biden recognizes the critical role that teachers play and is determined to fight for higher wages. He knows that a strong public education system starts with supporting our teachers.
But we want to know where you stand: **Do you agree that it’s time to give our public school teachers a raise?**

name: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen Action
subject: BIG NEWS for climate: Join Gov. Jay Inslee, Leah Stokes, and me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
TOMORROW: We discuss EPA’s new rules for power plants
| | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4542?t=2&akid=13320%2E53494%2Enovuan)
---
Friend,
**EPA just proposed new carbon pollution standards for power plants, and that's big news for climate.**
Tomorrow, I'm going to sit down with Washington Governor Jay Inslee and a panel of climate champions to talk about what these rules mean, why they are so important, and how we can work to make them even stronger.
**[RSVP right now for the live virtual event with Governor Jay Inslee, Energy Innovation CEO Sonia Aggarwall, Dr. Leah Stokes, and more TOMORROW at 9 AM PT / 12 PM ET.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4542?t=3&akid=13320%2E53494%2Enovuan)
**
[RSVP NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4542?t=4&akid=13320%2E53494%2Enovuan)
---
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4542?t=5&akid=13320%2E53494%2Enovuan)

These climate pollution standards are the single most effective tool this administration has for reducing carbon emissions, **and we need your help defending these rules against Big Polluters.**
**[Join me and a line-up of climate experts tomorrow for "Big News for Climate: EPA’s New Power Plant Rules" to learn about the rules and why we need your help.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4542?t=6&akid=13320%2E53494%2Enovuan)
**
[RSVP NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4542?t=7&akid=13320%2E53494%2Enovuan)
---
Hope to see you there,
Lena Moffitt
Executive Director
Evergreen Action

* * *
**P.S.** Can't make it for the live event? **[RSVP anyway](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4542?t=8&akid=13320%2E53494%2Enovuan)** , and we'll send you a recording.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=13320%2E53494%2Enovuan). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

Friend, last week, I joined Lawrence O'Donnell on MSNBC to talk about why I'm running for Senate to defeat Ted Cruz.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63121560/405673606/2115750350? amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2586-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4OWE1ZDZjLWZjZWYtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=m6hll6FOMtKf8osobSnP7KTMpeSMTpBnxKeVO7K2-Xw=)
The thing about Ted Cruz is, he's in this for Ted Cruz – he's _always_ going to put himself first, and quite frankly, it's embarrassing to call him our senator.

But I know we can win this thing and finally put Texans first. CNN says Cruz is one of the most vulnerable senators in the country, and just hours after I launched my campaign, Cook Political Report _increased_ Democrats' chances of flipping this seat!

**So I want you to know I'm running this race for _all_ Texans and that we can win – but I need your help, friend. Friend, I believe deeply in public service, and I recognize that it's not about me. I'm proud to represent North Texas, and I've never lost sight of the fact that I was elected to speak for the folks in my district. That's the kind of leader every single person in our great state deserves.

This race isn't going to be easy. Ted Cruz is at the mercy of special interests and corporate donors. They give him millions in exchange for his loyalty.******But I'm running a grassroots campaign because I answer to the folks who elect me – not the highest bidder. So I'm counting on you to make sure I have the money I need to win this race.**

**[Will you donate $15 or more – split between my campaign and American Bridge PAC – to help me reach my $3,000,000 goal by midnight? Every dollar truly makes a difference in our fight to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue, and defend the Senate →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63121566/405673612/2115750350? amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2586-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4OWE1ZDZjLWZjZWYtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=m6hll6FOMtKf8osobSnP7KTMpeSMTpBnxKeVO7K2-Xw=)**
Thank you so much. Let's do this!

Colin Allred

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: “Special Counsel Zooms In on Possible Criminal Charges”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
The witch hunts truly will never end... and that is why we MUST win.

| | | [ ](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79289%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=i5bxpxpG4cUiNemdxPDHXQ&sysid=1)
---
Friend,
The radical Left will never stop...
**In Trump Probe, Special Counsel Zooms In on Possible Criminal Charges** [Source: _Wall Street Journal_]
They will continue to viciously attack me, smear me, and even **ARREST** me despite not having committed a single crime.
The Deep State will continue this assault on _my_ freedom solely because I fight for _YOUR_ freedom...
_... Because it’s not really me they’re after, it’s YOU - I’m just standing in the way._
When I first came down the golden escalator at Trump Tower, I denounced the Washington Swamp and put you FIRST. And together, for the first time in decades, WE created a government _of_ , _by_ , and _for_ the PEOPLE.
For that, the globalist special interests, the entrenched bureaucrats, and the Deep State have all made me their public enemy #1.
But despite the endless despicable witch hunts, not a day goes by where my resolve wavers.
**_Time and time again, I am reminded of the more than 74 MILLION American patriots who make up our incredible MAGA movement. _**
YOU are my courage, my strength, and my hope.
And with every new witch hunt they throw our way, I only grow that much more confident that we WILL win back the White House and SAVE our country in 2024!
**[Please make a contribution of ANY amount- _truly even just $1_ - to help continue to DEFEND our movement from the never-ending witch hunts - for 1,500% impact. ](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79280%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vtX%2fYd7YqO5n0T%2fEomH3Cw&sysid=1)**
Thank you and God bless you,
| [ ](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79289%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=i5bxpxpG4cUiNemdxPDHXQ&sysid=1)

| | Peter, A secure southern border is vital to our national security. We may be thousands of miles away from the Texas and Mexico border, but we're feeling the repercussions right here in Maryland's 6th District. In March alone 2,848 pounds of deadly fentanyl and 13,639 pounds of methamphetamine were seized at the southern border. With our border security stretched so thin, just imagine how much actually got through... and ended up in Maryland. [_**I am creating a _Border Brigade_ coalition of strong Americans who support securing our border. Join the coalition by signing up here!**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=270ad825d56a49ba87f38e53284ca32a&_m=54958aed09c741afbeaf2f008977c496&_e=dPSYvxwSN_kIXMn8-g9bzPFYPefnXYGw298kFWooNgv4H_Tc-R63R5VzU9q7a1c87txuJrf51p3R4DpzlkKSEAVY7vmk28NgdLtWJrQvfl_-LtGRUrZbf07Ylipj7lmlLNtM4ESSPG7JcA8EI8LJ_7ZS3gZoPjpBZdcIEgZFeijP4Z5uEYyG_0Y4E6GICTupR8n1yeu9YZznbzH3PjRsZewZAeiArD1kSMg0IjFGxdG-mNBvU2DEyWyQgm8ymhKt)

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, A secure southern border is vital to our national security. We may be thousands of miles away from the Texas and Mexico border, but we're feeling the repercussions right here in Maryland's 6th District. In March alone 2,848 pounds of deadly fentanyl and 13,639 pounds of methamphetamine were seized at the southern border. With our border security stretched so thin, just imagine how much actually got through... and ended up in Maryland. Since Joe Biden took office, 6.3 million illegal immigrants have illegally crossed the border. As your voice in Congress, I will work to fix our broken immigration system so we can protect our country and allow legal law-abiding immigrants to achieve the American dream. Thank you, Mariela Roca | | | | | | |

[_**Peter, I’m about to ask you to become an official 2023 Democratic Member with $15 before midnight. But first, please let me explain why donations from our members are so important. This election is our historic opportunity for Democrats to take back the House. name: David Horowitz
subject: The next election could be the last
body:
I’m writing you this email today because I’ve learned critical information

| |
---
| |
---
| | I’m writing you this email today because I’ve learned critical information about the far-left’s plan to turn America into a socialist nation that will rock you to your core. My latest book **“[ Final Battle: The Next Election Could Be the Last](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zea99vep04rc1rthlo7guq4dul1us78cgq23evj0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3h66oj6c5h2bs)”[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zai1o7pm996ip2sglukjl97tlnedmo79cgdmjd18_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3h66oj6c5h2bs)** lays out how the left plans to influence our elections to destroy the very freedoms America was founded on. And this crucial information needs to be in the hands of every American patriot.But don’t take my word for it – take the word of Donald Trump and other patriots concerned for America’s future.
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za3oj7msn773v0btkerjo6a0htommliitfb0orl0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3h66oj6c5h2bs)

| | |

| |

**\-- Dinesh D’Souza****New York Times Bestselling Author and Filmmaker**

| |
---
| _"Final Battle_ may be the most devastating book-length indictment of the Democratic Party yet written. This is nothing less than a handbook for the salvation of the United States of America.”
---
**\-- Dennis Prager****Nationally Syndicated Radio Talk Show Host**
---
| | |
---
| | **With your donation of $35 or more today, I will mail you a copy of my must-read new book _Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last_.**Thousands of patriotic Americans who felt disenfranchised after the 2020 elections are reading my book, **“[ Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze0jkbf1l46hce3k21hf004m07784agvv3iasln0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3h66oj6c5h2bs)”**They’re learning about the damage the radical left has done to the integrity of our elections and what you and I need to do to fight back and restore America.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8rd95b0pf045i96l3t0m3tvcs27ntbdjcqqb7kg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3h66oj6c5h2bs)
---
| | You see, 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary determined to bring America as we know it to its end...
---
**_I was one of them... before I saw the truth..._**
---
| | That’s how I know the radical Left inside and out— because I was deeply involved. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – the largest magazine for radical Marxists.But after the Black Panthers murdered my friend and aided the Communists in Vietnam, I finally opened my eyes to their lies. I cast my vote for Ronald Reagan, and never looked back. And ever since, I’ve dedicated my life to exposing and destroying their radical plans for our country.That’s exactly what I write about in my latest book **[Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjikrr286obpun7td80i66ca42onbkdeboqg2k1o_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3h66oj6c5h2bs)** **That’s why I’m asking you to join me and thousands of other Americans in this fight, through a donation of $35 or more today. With your $35 donation I’ll send you a complimentary copy of Final Battle so you can read the truth the Left is fighting so hard to keep out of your hands.** The Left thrives when no one knows what they’re doing, why they’re doing it, or who’s helping them do it. That is why I’ve dedicated my life to exposing the methods and motives of the radical left to American patriots like you.
---
| | In Freedom,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. As Trump said in his speech in Waco, TX: “2024 is the final battle, it’s going to be the big one.” We must arm as many Americans as we can with the truth about 2020 and the leftist plans for America. **Will you donate $35 today so I can mail you your copy right away?**

name: Shift WA
subject: A special session & poll results
body:
Democrats essentially legalized hard drug during this year's legislative session. Despite having big majorities in the State House and Senate, they again failed to pass a new drug possession law. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61792745:W8XKscDN8:m:1:2610672541:09EC64E05E10DD166576522E7D63D29A:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends,

Democrats essentially legalized hard drug during this year's legislative session. Despite having big majorities in the State House and Senate, they again failed to pass a new drug possession law. Their failure is because too many Democrat legislators want to legalize hard drugs.

That's how unhinged far too many Democrats have become.

Next week, Governor Jay Inslee will call lawmakers back to do their job in a special session with the public needing something more than another stopgap measure. And - once again - we here at Shift WA will be here to inform you on what's happening in Olympia.

All this recent liberal chaos highlights the importance of the upcoming gubernatorial race.

With Democrats moving further and further to the left, it's more important than ever that voters know the truth about each candidate's beliefs and track record. **Mainstream media outlets will try to hide the truth from you about just how far to the Left the Democrat candidates are - but we'll be shining a light on reality.**

And speaking of the gubernatorial race, we're excited to share the results of our recent poll asking our readers which candidate they most want to see win in 2024. Thousands of people participated. Here are the results:

1. Semi Bird (R), Richland School Board: 16%
2. Bob Ferguson (D), Attorney General of WA: .7%
3. Hilary Franz (D), Public Lands Commissioner of WA: .5%
4. Raul Garcia (R), Doctor/Former Gubernatorial Candidate: 17%
5. Mark Mullet (D), State Senator (Issaquah): 1.8%
6. Jim Walsh (R), State Representative (Aberdeen): 30%
7. J.T. Wilcox (R), State Representative (Yelm): 19%
8. Other (give us your pick!): 15%

And of the many potential candidates you listed in the "other" category, recipients listed former GOP U.S. Senate candidate Tiffany Smiley most often with 30% of the "other" vote.

We love keeping readers informed - but our work depends entirely on the generous contributions of people like you. _**[Will you consider contributing $100, $50, or $25 today?](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61792746:W8XKscDN8:m:1:2610672541:09EC64E05E10DD166576522E7D63D29A:r)**_

Thank you for your ongoing support,

The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61792747:W8XKscDN8:m:1:2610672541:09EC64E05E10DD166576522E7D63D29A:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14198337&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oW8XKscDN8).
---

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing this school district and we need your help
body:
If you're sick and tired of the radical Left running roughshod over our rights...

| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, If you're sick and tired of the radical Left running roughshod over our rights... If you've had it with the do-nothings in Washington who've let these radicals take over our government, intelligence community, schools, media, and corporations... I'm right there with you. My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I'm an attorney and a conservative. And since the do-nothings in Washington won't lift a finger to stop the radicals who are destroying our country... ...I'm helping patriots just like you take matters into their own hands by...
---
...dragging these freedom-robbing radicals into court, ...bringing them to justice, ...and making them pay.
---
In a minute, I'll tell you more about some of the cases my non-profit the _Center for American Liberty_ and I have taken on and won to defend freedom and shut down the Left. [**But first, I have to tell you the urgent reason I 'm writing you today and why I'm asking you to make a tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z25l84pso7kdnojm83g05r8r3ed40inu5q8nqsgg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3h66p74s1h2bs) And even though we've never met, I'm asking you to join the fight for parental rights with me. Our client is a mother who's risking everything to stand up to the out-of-control radicals in California schools. And if she wins, what a victory it'll be for all of us who are sick and tired of these elitist "educators" lecturing us... and hijacking our children and grandchildren! This landmark case was announced on **Jesse Watters Primetime** but in case you missed it, let me recap... **Aurora Regino 's daughter was in the 5th grade in California's Chico Unified School District when a school guidance counselor took it upon herself to "assess" that Aurora's daughter was a "boy." ** Aurora's daughter was given a new name, new pronouns, and a whole new identity to be used secretly at school. **_There wasn 't a single phone call home._** On the contrary, the guidance counselor manipulated Aurora's daughter into keeping everything that was going on a secret from her own mother. If you're the conservative I think you are, you see the real and present danger here. **If we lose this case, for the first time in American history, schools across the country will have a green light to overturn a parent 's authority and values.** **And radicals will be 100% free to use government schools -- the schools you 're forced to pay for -- as re-education centers for every one of their twisted and anti-American ideas that go against what you and I believe. ** Aurora Regino is suing California's Chico Unified School District because PARENTS have a fundamental right under the Fourteenth Amendment of the United States Constitution... ...to direct the upbringing of their children. Radicals at the California Department of Education think they can get away with what they're doing because they adopted "guidelines" that PROHIBIT schools from notifying parents of gender transitions until the _student_ decides its ok! I can tell you, as long as I'm involved, no California Dept. of Ed "guideline" is going to tell parents how to raise their children! Aurora's daughter was 11-years-old when her guidance counselor convinced her she was a "boy." By law, she wasn't old enough to get a tattoo or get her learner's permit to drive. But the woke radicals at the California Department of Education say 11-year-olds can make life-altering decisions about their gender. And parents need to be kept in the dark. I don't know what's more insane... ...that we're talking about girls being boys or that schools think they should have more control over children than parents do! Our case can stop this madness. Our case MUST stop this madness. But on her own, Aurora Regino would never have the resources to battle the leftist giants in California. **Battles like this are why I started the _Center for American Liberty_.**
---
**> > We bring together attorneys who want to fight for what's right...** **> > People like Aurora Regino who otherwise would have no choice but to let these elitist radicals steamroll right over her and her daughter...** **> > And patriots like you who offer whatever financial support you can to fund these freedom-saving cases. **
---
| | And our unique strategy is taking down the Left. The _Center for American Liberty_ has already won THREE Supreme Court cases... we've had multiple victories for religious freedom... ...and right now, in addition to Aurora Regino's case concerning parental rights.... ...we're fighting to stop government censorship of conservatives... to get justice for journalist Andy Ngo who was beaten by Antifa thugs while liberal politicians did nothing... ...and we just launched a historic case suing activist doctors who mutilate children with barbaric "transgender" surgeries. The _Center for American Liberty_ is honored to be fighting in the courts to protect your freedom to say what you want, to live according to the dictates of your conscience, and to pass on your values to the next generation. [**Will you help us by making an urgent donation of $35, $50, $100 or more today?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6m5girjo9jjjkuuk8tjhvvpbrest2a7pit19fqo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3h66p74s1h2bs) Your generous gift is your direct way to help Aurora Regino -- and all the other patriots whose cases we're working on right now. But I can't wait two weeks, three weeks, or a month to know what resources we have to use. The Left is gathering its army to defeat us. And the giant ACLU has already tried to throw its might behind the radicals at the Chico Unified School District. [**So please, will you make a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $75, $100, $200 $500, or more? Contributions of ANY size are so appreciated.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zked0misobug1bbd1tlbdjhuhpgjtus5dod18cq8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3h66p74s1h2bs) But because the stakes are so high in this case, I have to mention -- I'm looking for 10 patriots who are able to rush back $1,000 each in the next 48 hours to fund this case as we prepare for oral arguments. Whether you can help with $35, $1,000 or any amount higher or lower, your gift will go far in this battle to beat back the Left. Thank you, my fellow patriot. Some days it seems like the radicals will never stop advancing -- but I know we can bring them to a screeching halt in the courts. Thank you for doing your part.
---
| | Thank you and God Bless,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
Founder & CEO
---
|
---
| | P.S. Time is critical. [**Please rush your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $200, $500, $1,000 or more in the next 48 hours. It 's time to stop these radicals and make them pay. **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zag5461ga9brlqcjkjrq8g0b953nd0ioqorgdop0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3h66p74s1h2bs)
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm39t6m4q07chso9rm504so8kqu8umrfafkjrrkg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3h66p74s1h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5v8ue7kh7tv4qh9cvohu9ln1n9ghb5p14jcpg68_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3h66p74s1h2bs)
---

---

---

---

|
---

Deroy Murdock
---

Battles like this are why I started the Center for American Liberty. > We bring together attorneys who want to fight for what's right... > > People like Aurora Regino who otherwise would have no choice but to let these elitist radicals steamroll right over her and her daughter... > > And patriots like you who offer whatever financial support you can to fund these freedom-saving cases. | | And our unique strategy is taking down the Left. The Center for American Liberty has already won THREE Supreme Court cases... we've had multiple victories for religious freedom... ...and right now, in addition to Aurora Regino's case concerning parental rights.... ...we're fighting to stop government censorship of conservatives... to get justice for journalist Andy Ngo who was beaten by Antifa thugs while liberal politicians did nothing... ...and we just launched a historic case suing activist doctors who mutilate children with barbaric "transgender" surgeries. The Center for American Liberty is honored to be fighting in the courts to protect your freedom to say what you want, to live according to the dictates of your conscience, and to pass on your values to the next generation. Your generous gift is your direct way to help Aurora Regino -- and all the other patriots whose cases we're working on right now. But I can't wait two weeks, three weeks, or a month to know what resources we have to use. The Left is gathering its army to defeat us. And the giant ACLU has already tried to throw its might behind the radicals at the Chico Unified School District. But because the stakes are so high in this case, I have to mention -- I'm looking for 10 patriots who are able to rush back $1,000 each in the next 48 hours to fund this case as we prepare for oral arguments. Whether you can help with $35, $1,000 or any amount higher or lower, your gift will go far in this battle to beat back the Left. Thank you, my fellow patriot. Some days it seems like the radicals will never stop advancing -- but I know we can bring them to a screeching halt in the courts. Thank you for doing your part. | | Thank you and God Bless, Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO | | | P.S. Time is critical. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. body:

Peter, You may not know me, but my name is Hung Cao.
I’m a legal immigrant from Communist Vietnam, a 25-year special operations Navy Veterans and a father of five.
I know you get a lot of emails asking for money, but today, I’m not going to do that - **I’m only asking for you to sign onto our vision for America.**
You see, I was born in a country where people were executed for trying to fight for the freedoms too many of us take for granted.
After my father was put on a kill list for speaking out against the Communist Party, we were able to legally come to America, where my parents worked hard to build a life for us.
I came here at four years old not knowing a word of English. But by the time I was 18, I was a cadet in the Naval Academy preparing to serve my country.
_But after 25 years of service in Naval Special Operations, I knew I had to take my fight for America to a new arena._
Watching the Left try to erase the American Dream I owe my life to makes me absolutely sick, Peter. With their socialist agenda, they’re trying to slowly erode the freedoms my family came to this country for years ago.
**I won’t stand for it.**
I know you get a ton of emails, but today, I’m asking you one simple question: [**will you sign on to our mission to UNLEASH American potential and defend the American Dream?**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=27825d9bb83b40238328cb72d6c1ccd2&_e=et3byBDlx5UkFY_aF7sdqN7HqQQCkw2PWMLIjkeItdxPsTOZwEtCeBisWxgeehfiXt91pUhqieylBXUuxR2I10a56XVo10qDn2t6uGjIuBiCtSabBS9TmJ48cUP7PV7OW8TEFb3tFn5q9sK48U1kwl3ZGEZ3sWPj08aB86s_ITBCt8lVySfCu7hSxzhiLmm6m15pjqvS5EkMfSpyJB2Z2Lm-mf0Pu1g08LdnaQ65Z11QraOAyPTOj8oQx-wVc7A3L0qnwI9nDzcYr8-qwwDqSGxdcRcLHx6Rsyld1d6YzjKJakzlieJsKvbByUQqu5_G_2xfOUcpKnzFqr2nTg_aaduJUUvs749iT6bdi04Vp_UK3mdTqtI9o2_6dOKbZYHo)
---

body:
Thank you for standing with me during the recent Firehouse Primary...
| | |

| **Friend,** **Thank you for standing with me during the recent Firehouse Primary. It was an incredibly important moment in our campaign, and I am proud of the work we did together.Our campaign faced a challenging opponent who not only tried to tear me down, but also tried to sow seeds of division and tear apart our party from within.** **But, we fought back and emerged victorious!** **Now, our focus must shift to the general election and taking back the Virginia Senate. This is not going to be an easy task.****We are up against well-funded opponents who will stop at nothing to hold onto their power and push their progressive agenda.****We cannot afford to let that happen. ** **Our conservative principles are on the line, and we must fight to protect them.** **But, we cannot do this alone. Winning this election**** _will require a significant investment of time, energy, and resources._****That's why I am reaching out to you today. I need your help to ensure we have the resources we need to win in November. Every dollar you contribute will help us purchase yard signs, run ads, and reach more voters.** **We cannot afford to sit back and let the other side win.****W _e must take the fight to them_****and show that we are not going to let them take away our freedoms and most of all our conservative values. We need to send a clear message to these Leftist Democrats that their time is up, and that we are going to take back the Virginia Senate.** **So, I am asking you to dig deep and contribute whatever you can. Whether it's**** _$20, $50, $100, or $500_****, every dollar counts and will help us achieve victory. ** **Thank you for your continued support, and I look forward to working with you to take back the Virginia Senate.** **Your Humble Servant,**

clean_body: Thank you for standing with me during the recent Firehouse Primary... | | | | | | | | | | | Friend, Thank you for standing with me during the recent Firehouse Primary. It was an incredibly important moment in our campaign, and I am proud of the work we did together.Our campaign faced a challenging opponent who not only tried to tear me down, but also tried to sow seeds of division and tear apart our party from within. But, we fought back and emerged victorious! Now, our focus must shift to the general election and taking back the Virginia Senate. This is not going to be an easy task.We are up against well-funded opponents who will stop at nothing to hold onto their power and push their progressive agenda.We cannot afford to let that happen. Our conservative principles are on the line, and we must fight to protect them. But, we cannot do this alone. Winning this election will require a significant investment of time, energy, and resources.That's why I am reaching out to you today. I need your help to ensure we have the resources we need to win in November. Every dollar you contribute will help us purchase yard signs, run ads, and reach more voters. We cannot afford to sit back and let the other side win.W e must take the fight to themand show that we are not going to let them take away our freedoms and most of all our conservative values. We need to send a clear message to these Leftist Democrats that their time is up, and that we are going to take back the Virginia Senate. So, I am asking you to dig deep and contribute whatever you can. Whether it's $20, $50, $100, or $500, every dollar counts and will help us achieve victory. Thank you for your continued support, and I look forward to working with you to take back the Virginia Senate. Your Humble Servant, | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for and Authorized by Friends of Bryce Reeves | | | | | | | | P.O. Box 7021 Fredericksburg, VA 22404, United States | | or

Peter,

It takes courage to stand on principle – and that’s exactly what Coach is doing.

As you know, he’s been leading the charge to force the Department of Defense to reverse the immoral and illegal expansion of its authority to advance the radical left’s extreme pro-abortion agenda.

The swamp has put a target on his back. The liberal media has attacked him relentlessly. **_And now, Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell is out there telling the press that he doesn’t support Coach’s hold on military confirmations!_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/c9617eb9906c7a97/ebb6ee368d1e2d25c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Coach’s position is clear, and this changes nothing. He WILL NOT back down.

[**Will you stand behind him in this fight today?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/c9617eb9906c7a97/51f0099e9c0913dec3d6b838967d376c/33013)

Courage is in short supply in Washington. Far too many lawmakers are willing to let the Biden Administration legislate from the White House and the Department of Defense, when they do not have the authority to do so.

_We must stand strong for the rule of law, no matter who caves to these radicals!_

**[Show Coach you have his back. Every contribution is a huge help as we work to share his message and rally conservative patriots across America behind him.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/c9617eb9906c7a97/8d99c49b613ccd22c3d6b838967d376c/33013)**

| | Dear Peter, I wanted to remind you that the Roosevelt Awards Dinner is only three weeks away, and we have a lot to celebrate! **Please join us Thursday, June 1st at 6:00 PM to honor Attorney General Andrea Campbell and former Massachusetts Democratic Party Chair Gus Bickford with the Eleanor and President Franklin Roosevelt Awards at the Fairmont Copley Plaza Hotel (138 St. James Avenue, Boston, MA).** We are also very excited to roll out the first ever Activist Award to honor Chris Condon who dedicated his life to the people of Massachusetts through his work as a labor organizer and political strategist. [**Learn more about Chris’s work through Yvonne Abraham’s Globe column**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63134447/405706937/231198599?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWI1ZDBiYi0wN2YwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mt_BJBXGVPYxuSU2Kcsd45Eqg5hHcbTYbVQVKAD4g38=&emci=1ab0ac10-38ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=85b5d0bb-07f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=17281370)**. ** For this year’s reception, sponsorships and tickets can be purchased [**by clicking here**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63134448/405706938/1634963590?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWI1ZDBiYi0wN2YwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mt_BJBXGVPYxuSU2Kcsd45Eqg5hHcbTYbVQVKAD4g38=).
