name: Gov. Gavin Newsom
subject: re: extreme Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Republicans are stumbling over one another to be the first to advocate for national abortion bans, reject common sense gun laws, and make it harder to raise our voices and exercise our right to vote. | | |
---
Since President Biden announced his reelection campaign sixteen days ago, we’ve seen the 2024 Republicans double down on their worst, most dangerous ideas. They are stumbling over one another to be the first to advocate for national abortion bans, reject common sense gun laws, and make it harder to raise our voices and exercise our right to vote. Republicans have no fear bragging about these positions because they’re catering to the most extreme fringe of their party. **_These values are totally out of step with those of the American people._** That’s why I’m supporting Joe Biden. He’s spent the first two years of his presidency -- not to mention the last 40 years of his career -- fighting for working people. He believes in creating an America where everyone has a chance to succeed. And crucially in this moment, he believes in _democracy_ \-- in fighting back against extremists who are systematically attacking the very foundations of our free society. **Voters across the country rejected extreme Republican ideology in 2020 by electing Joe and Kamala, winning seats in Congress, and flipping the Senate. Now, President Biden needs our help to win again. So, if you can, I am asking you to chip in $25 today to his reelection campaign:** | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Julia DeGraw
subject: They did it again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63136900/405716337/-2111708638?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhNzg3NjdmLTBjZjAtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9kcf8VOMmojD-j84JxlmnP-gScLTthrJjOYN_PwWAQ0=&emci=da11e4bc-8def-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=fa78767f-0cf0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) | | | Peter, For over a week, multiple Republican senators have walked out on their jobs as lawmakers, and the Oregon Senate has been brought to a halt. At a time like this, [**we need to tell these lawmakers to stop their undemocratic walkout and voice our support for the lawmakers who are doing their jobs, showing up to work and representing our interests.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63136901/405716338/-2111708638?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhNzg3NjdmLTBjZjAtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9kcf8VOMmojD-j84JxlmnP-gScLTthrJjOYN_PwWAQ0=&emci=da11e4bc-8def-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=fa78767f-0cf0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) When lawmakers walk out on the job, they are walking out on all of us. These Republican lawmakers are holding captive bills that Oregonians strongly favor, such as support for stable housing, accessible healthcare, our rural economies, and protection from drought and wildfires exacerbated by the climate crisis. Senate Republicans have a history with walking out on their jobs. [They walked out three years in a row from 2019 to 2021](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63136902/405716339/425470842?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhNzg3NjdmLTBjZjAtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9kcf8VOMmojD-j84JxlmnP-gScLTthrJjOYN_PwWAQ0=&emci=da11e4bc-8def-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=fa78767f-0cf0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230), and they’re doing it again now. In the past, these walkouts resulted in them playing hooky. They demanded lawmakers kill bills that many Oregonians support (like bold climate action) in exchange for their return to work. As Oregon voters, we do not support walkouts. Just last fall, voters in 34 of 36 Oregon counties — including communities that Senate Republicans represent — overwhelmingly voted in favor of Measure 113, sending a clear message that lawmakers need to show up and do their job. That’s the will of the people. [**Help us remind them that we want them to do their jobs, not hold bills hostage. And if you have a Democratic state senator, thank them for showing up to work and ask them to stay strong against the demands of these walkout Republicans.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63136903/405716340/-2111708638?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhNzg3NjdmLTBjZjAtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9kcf8VOMmojD-j84JxlmnP-gScLTthrJjOYN_PwWAQ0=&emci=da11e4bc-8def-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=fa78767f-0cf0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) In partnership, Julia DeGraw

name: Jessica Anderson, Heritage Action
subject: Why we’re fighting Ranked-Choice Voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
Fellow conservative, we’re bringing your attention to a growing concern affecting our election system:

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7990mlb4f3lrhojmp6b745a33nhn9ctmq4glt5g_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j68pb7c3h2bs)
---
| | Fellow conservative, we're bringing your attention to a growing concern affecting our election system: **_ranked-choice voting_.** Ranked-choice voting is a flawed election scheme pushed by Left-wing mega-donors and political operatives seeking more influence and control over our nation's elections.
At Heritage Action, we believe it should be "easy to vote and hard to cheat."

But ranked-choice voting makes it "hard to vote and easy to cheat." In multiple states where it has been tried, ranked-choice voting has decreased voter turnout!
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0jfhgn3ufn3818mjku3sm03l7v3op2khedg7imo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j68pb7c3h2bs)
---
Heritage Action is _already_ working in states across the country to stop this voting scheme from being implemented further. That's why I am asking you to [**join us and add your name**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhc4pl6ap8ojht2epeqg7s848di3fqgc988d9hf8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j68pb7c3h2bs)**** to the growing list of concerned Americans who are standing up against this flawed system. Together, we can work to preserve the integrity of our elections and ensure that the voices of the people are fairly heard. [**Please add your name today to help us stop Ranked-choice voting >>>**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z14n79gdde4focqn18gl7jjlgkv3r0cs4bijapmg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j68pb7c3h2bs) Thank you, Jessica Anderson Executive Director | Heritage Action
---
|
---
Heritage Action is proud to be _the most effective_ grassroots conservative organization around. We turn conservative rhetoric into meaningful action and campaigns. ****

name: Andy Kim
subject: It's my job, plain and simple
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63137018/405716774/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWRjMzliYi0wY2YwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hWGGnuzUSuu34s7VHHfvLHFizEVIhIGkQH42hf4V-7w=&emci=2ab1ee56-8bef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=cedc39bb-0cf0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=26261389)
---

| | When people see the dysfunction in Washington and they get frustrated, they'll ask me why I continue to do this job, why I deal with the ups and downs. I tell them it's because**I believe in the power of good government.** I'm proud to fight alongside some of the most dedicated leaders in our country. While a disappointing number of my colleagues on the other side act without little to no regard for veterans or working families, there are still public servants who truly understand what it means to serve the public. **And even in these tough times, we are making progress.** _Small steps are still steps forward._ **[Here's the truth I wouldn't be here without people like you. I'm counting on you to power our movement now. Can you donate $3 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63137020/405716776/-821065315?refcode=2023-05-11-hopeful&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=cedc39bb-0cf0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWRjMzliYi0wY2YwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hWGGnuzUSuu34s7VHHfvLHFizEVIhIGkQH42hf4V-7w=)** [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63137022/405716778/-821065315?refcode=2023-05-11-hopeful&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=cedc39bb-0cf0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWRjMzliYi0wY2YwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hWGGnuzUSuu34s7VHHfvLHFizEVIhIGkQH42hf4V-7w=) **I show up to work every day to try and make things better for everyday Americans. It's my job, plain and simple.** That's why I've introduced bipartisan legislation this Congress to continue helping small businesses, supporting emergency medical services, and supporting servicemembers around the globe. **Of course, there is more work to be done, and I remain hopeful that we can accomplish things that will make people's lives better.** I have faith in my dedicated colleagues and in people like you. I want you to know that there are leaders showing up every single day, fighting for a brighter, better future. **[Our movement is made up of people who believe in the power of good government and dedicated leaders. Will you fuel our movement with a donation of $3? We can't do it without you!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63137025/405716781/-821065315?refcode=2023-05-11-hopeful&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=cedc39bb-0cf0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWRjMzliYi0wY2YwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hWGGnuzUSuu34s7VHHfvLHFizEVIhIGkQH42hf4V-7w=)** More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: | | | | When people see the dysfunction in Washington and they get frustrated, they'll ask me why I continue to do this job, why I deal with the ups and downs. I tell them it's becauseI believe in the power of good government. I'm proud to fight alongside some of the most dedicated leaders in our country. While a disappointing number of my colleagues on the other side act without little to no regard for veterans or working families, there are still public servants who truly understand what it means to serve the public. And even in these tough times, we are making progress. Small steps are still steps forward. = = I show up to work every day to try and make things better for everyday Americans. It's my job, plain and simple. That's why I've introduced bipartisan legislation this Congress to continue helping small businesses, supporting emergency medical services, and supporting servicemembers around the globe. Of course, there is more work to be done, and I remain hopeful that we can accomplish things that will make people's lives better. I have faith in my dedicated colleagues and in people like you. I want you to know that there are leaders showing up every single day, fighting for a brighter, better future. = More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress. | This email was sent by Andy Kim for Congress P.O. Box 211 Marlton, NJ 08053 United States Email is an important way for Andy Kim to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Jessica Anderson, Heritage Action
subject: Why we’re fighting Ranked-Choice Voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
Fellow conservative, we’re bringing your attention to a growing concern affecting our election system:

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoqpmt60ifnq1pvhqqmlp3qd07a683o3vp9rg7bo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j68pb7c3h2bs)
---
| | Fellow conservative, we're bringing your attention to a growing concern affecting our election system: **_ranked-choice voting_.** Ranked-choice voting is a flawed election scheme pushed by Left-wing mega-donors and political operatives seeking more influence and control over our nation's elections.
At Heritage Action, we believe it should be "easy to vote and hard to cheat."

But ranked-choice voting makes it "hard to vote and easy to cheat." In multiple states where it has been tried, ranked-choice voting has decreased voter turnout!
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zve5f8d0u1na3gckq78dcbtpikcl8s84ig7ve0po_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j68pb7c3h2bs)
---
Heritage Action is _already_ working in states across the country to stop this voting scheme from being implemented further. That's why I am asking you to [**join us and add your name**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9cet9s5julfltggob53mgbnk70i9hoej5jm8m60_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j68pb7c3h2bs)**** to the growing list of concerned Americans who are standing up against this flawed system. Together, we can work to preserve the integrity of our elections and ensure that the voices of the people are fairly heard. [**Please add your name today to help us stop Ranked-choice voting >>>**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7jgqvltmnu5rjhgo5ruk302c2oodha9guq301bo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j68pb7c3h2bs) Thank you, Jessica Anderson Executive Director | Heritage Action
---
|
---
Heritage Action is proud to be _the most effective_ grassroots conservative organization around. We turn conservative rhetoric into meaningful action and campaigns. ****

name: campaign@keithellison.org
subject: $50 refund for dpwillis67@gmail.com
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417 Keith Ellison for Attorney General

We’ve made claiming your refund as easy as possible. Once you make your contribution, our team will mail you a receipt and an application. Simply fill out the application, mail it to the MN Department of Revenue, and they’ll send you your refund!

We’re making huge steps forward, but we can’t take anything for granted. Republicans are still raising money and doing everything they can to attack and obstruct our agenda, including Keith’s special-interest-backed opponent from 2022.

The (R) or the (D) behind someone's name does NOT matter.

_Because we have _liberals_ in BOTH parties._

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Not great.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
First, the good news...
#

**First, the good news:**

Our campaign is funded by a record number of individual donations made by people from all backgrounds and from all communities — almost all of these donations coming from working people united in their desire for change.

Meanwhile, poll after poll shows us leading against Senator Sinema and Kari Lake — winning in a 2 person race or three person race.

**Now, the bad news.**

The average donation to our campaign has slipped from $40, to $30, now all the way down to $21 this month. It’s a refreshing change for people sick of the role money plays in politics, but we haven’t had the number of donations so far in May to reach our goals. Not great.

So we have two options:

First, either we need lots and lots of donations to help us reach our goals. Or, we need people to chip in just a bit more than they normally would.

Normally we ask people who haven’t given to our Senate campaign to contribute $3.

But today, we need to ask you to do a bit more, if you can. Will you? For Ruben? For this race? For a good vote in the Senate for the next six years?

[**Can you please contribute $10 to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate in Arizona? Our goals are not arbitrary, they are set to reach what we need to win this race.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.79Akcp&refcode=em230511-1-500&t=1&akid=627%2E734936%2EeH5ugO)

_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $10](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.pt2_oL&amount=10&refcode=em230511-1-500&t=2&akid=627%2E734936%2EeH5ugO)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.pt2_oL&refcode=em230511-1-500&t=3&akid=627%2E734936%2EeH5ugO)**
---
Thank you. We don’t have any billionaires waiting in the wings to fund this campaign. It’s up to us. Together.
For Arizona. For America.
Ruben Gallego for Arizona

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=627%2E734936%2EeH5ugO). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=627_734936_eH5ugO&akid=627%2E734936%2EeH5ugO)

name: Congressman Ron Barber
subject: Why I'm supporting Kirsten Engel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hello,
I’m Ron Barber, the former Congressman for Southern Arizona.
In 2011, I was working as Representative Gabby Gifford’s District Director. Everything changed after a lone gunman opened fire at a constituent event. Nineteen people were shot — including myself — and six lives were tragically lost.
After Rep. Giffords stepped down to focus on her rehabilitation, at her behest, I ran to fill the vacancy. I ran because Southern Arizona deserved a representative who put them first, who would work across the aisle when it made sense, and who wasn’t afraid to tackle the biggest issues facing us today.
Those reasons are also why I’m proud to endorse Kirsten Engel today for Arizona’s Sixth Congressional District.
I know Kirsten has what it takes to fight for Arizona. She’ll listen to constituents from across her district, and advocate for them in good faith.
If you want to join me in supporting her campaign, you can donate here >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_051123_Barber]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: [] Hello, I’m Ron Barber, the former Congressman for Southern Arizona. In 2011, I was working as Representative Gabby Gifford’s District Director. Everything changed after a lone gunman opened fire at a constituent event. Nineteen people were shot — including myself — and six lives were tragically lost. After Rep. Giffords stepped down to focus on her rehabilitation, at her behest, I ran to fill the vacancy. I ran because Southern Arizona deserved a representative who put them first, who would work across the aisle when it made sense, and who wasn’t afraid to tackle the biggest issues facing us today. Those reasons are also why I’m proud to endorse Kirsten Engel today for Arizona’s Sixth Congressional District. I know Kirsten has what it takes to fight for Arizona. She’ll listen to constituents from across her district, and advocate for them in good faith. If you want to join me in supporting her campaign, you can donate here >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Donate $5 [] Donate $25 [] Donate $100 [] Donate $1500 [] Donate $3300 [] Donate Other [] Right now, Republicans in Congress are focused on rolling back our fundamental rights and cutting earned benefits for veterans and seniors. We need leaders who will actually fight for our best interests. Kirsten will work for the people who live in the District regardless of their party affiliation. Her opponent, Juan Ciscomani, only works for Kevin McCarthy. Arizona deserves better than Ciscomani and his partisanship. Kirsten can win this seat, but she needs our support to take on the Republican establishment. Can we count on you to donate now? [] Best, — Congressman Ron Barber [] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer. She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District. In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? name: Kevin Tordoff, Americans United for Life
subject: We must protect survivors of abortion
body:
A baby is born – alive – after surviving an attempted abortion.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5uuq9fuomlp1om5g0nfio076fei2kkavb35edjg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6cob6cdh2bs)
---
Friend, A baby is born – alive – after _surviving_ an attempted abortion. But what happens next is not the same in all places ... because, friend, that precious baby’s life is NOT YET protected in all 50 states! [**Will you stand with Americans United for Life to help us ensure born-alive babies are given medical care in _all 50 states_? Please add your name to our urgent national petition right now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpart3j4mippjk5mqnasc5rghevej1s4jflh5s40_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6cob6cdh2bs)
---
[Sign the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0qf3ouqi9eo6oqauqqg1n192gls93jkv8t73rk8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6cob6cdh2bs)
---
Thanks to advances in medical science, babies as young as just 21 or 22 weeks gestation can increasingly survive outside the womb – but only with the care of medical professionals. **But in many states, babies of that age or later who survive abortion _are not given legal protection_.** Friend, I’m sure you would agree that infants surviving attempted abortions are in critical need of medical intervention to provide comfort care and increase their chances of survival... ...and born-alive infants who survive an abortion attempt deserve to be protected under the law, treated with human dignity, and given appropriate care! [**Please help Americans United for Life continue to fight to protect born-alive babies in all 50 states. Add your name to this urgent petition now to stand with us.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3pr3st2brmptus0q6qedoffnj07jhlbdovebg18_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6cob6cdh2bs)
---
[Sign the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6g3cs7aiu97il9kokbrf4kdptn3ffdpt94oqh10_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6cob6cdh2bs)
---
Your support today can help protect precious babies in America this year. Currently, just eight states in the U.S. report abortion information on born-alive infants. From those eight states, reports show that 35 infants in 2020 and 2021 were born alive and another 8 babies were born alive just in Florida in 2022. Nationally, there are no numbers available. But in a study that looked at 241 children aborted for having a suspected fetal anomaly between 20 and 24 weeks, 122 infants _survived_ the procedure! [**Please stand with Americans United for Life’s efforts to ensure abortion survivors receive care to increase their chances of survival and alleviate their pain. All 50 states need to treat these children with human dignity; if you agree, please sign our petition today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z93i34agob9n86el6v783ev0qmqu51jrb9c615o8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6cob6cdh2bs) As America’s first national pro-life organization, AUL has saved thousands of precious lives through behind-the-scenes work in America’s legislatures, courts, and public life. _We’re in pursuit of real change and tangible impact._ Americans United for Life is committed to exposing the truth about abortion and protecting the most vulnerable through policy and legislation. We’re representing those without a voice, advancing the human right to life, and working on your behalf to:
* Ensure all 50 states and every territory have policies that require healthcare professionals to provide medically appropriate and reasonable care for survivors of abortion.
* Establish enforcement mechanisms to ensure that born-alive infants receive proper medical care.
* Provide civil and criminal penalties for violation of laws that protect babies who survive attempted abortions.

No one has a right to commit infanticide, nor justify the denial of basic protections for the born, living human infants. But, without legislative protections, born-alive babies In a majority of states will continue to suffer. [**The most vulnerable lives need our help, which is why I need your signature on the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zedn1ncm38d8a1r94r4dmjcjmio91eim5tik0ug0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6cob6cdh2bs) Founded in 1971, two years before the tragic _Roe v. Wade_ decision, Americans United for Life is still fighting for preborn and born-alive babies over 50 years later! _Since our founding, those not yet born have been dehumanized, life itself has become politicized, and the most vulnerable have faced increasing marginalization due to their age, ability, or perceived value._ Americans United for Life is working to ensure all survivors of abortion are welcomed throughout life and protected by law. But we can’t do this work alone. This is a fight we will win — culturally and legally, locally and nationally — if we have the support of Americans who recognize the importance of protecting born-alive babies. [**Will you sign this petition to help us protect survivors of abortion in all 50 states?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z81ukvtffcae4va9kss0b7cdvcckbruof0bm14h8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6cob6cdh2bs)

clean_body: A baby is born – alive – after surviving an attempted abortion. | | | Friend, A baby is born – alive – after surviving an attempted abortion. But what happens next is not the same in all places ... because, friend, that precious baby’s life is NOT YET protected in all 50 states! Thanks to advances in medical science, babies as young as just 21 or 22 weeks gestation can increasingly survive outside the womb – but only with the care of medical professionals. But in many states, babies of that age or later who survive abortion are not given legal protection. Friend, I’m sure you would agree that infants surviving attempted abortions are in critical need of medical intervention to provide comfort care and increase their chances of survival... ...and born-alive infants who survive an abortion attempt deserve to be protected under the law, treated with human dignity, and given appropriate care! Your support today can help protect precious babies in America this year. Currently, just eight states in the U.S. report abortion information on born-alive infants. From those eight states, reports show that 35 infants in 2020 and 2021 were born alive and another 8 babies were born alive just in Florida in 2022. Nationally, there are no numbers available. But in a study that looked at 241 children aborted for having a suspected fetal anomaly between 20 and 24 weeks, 122 infants survived the procedure! As America’s first national pro-life organization, AUL has saved thousands of precious lives through behind-the-scenes work in America’s legislatures, courts, and public life. We’re in pursuit of real change and tangible impact. Americans United for Life is committed to exposing the truth about abortion and protecting the most vulnerable through policy and legislation. We’re representing those without a voice, advancing the human right to life, and working on your behalf to: Ensure all 50 states and every territory have policies that require healthcare professionals to provide medically appropriate and reasonable care for survivors of abortion. Establish enforcement mechanisms to ensure that born-alive infants receive proper medical care. * Provide civil and criminal penalties for violation of laws that protect babies who survive attempted abortions. No one has a right to commit infanticide, nor justify the denial of basic protections for the born, living human infants. But, without legislative protections, born-alive babies In a majority of states will continue to suffer. Founded in 1971, two years before the tragic Roe v. Wade decision, Americans United for Life is still fighting for preborn and born-alive babies over 50 years later! Since our founding, those not yet born have been dehumanized, life itself has become politicized, and the most vulnerable have faced increasing marginalization due to their age, ability, or perceived value. Americans United for Life is working to ensure all survivors of abortion are welcomed throughout life and protected by law. But we can’t do this work alone. This is a fight we will win — culturally and legally, locally and nationally — if we have the support of Americans who recognize the importance of protecting born-alive babies. For life, Kevin Tordoff Americans United for Life Americans United for Life 1150 Connecticut Avenue NW, Suite 500 Washington, DC 20036 GOP Presidential 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:
Hear Riley's story about having to compete against a biological man in Division 1 Swimming | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/08e413d5f29f/big-news-mark-ronchetti-launches-podcast-12229292?e=567664f14c)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
# _EPISODE 2: Riley Gaines speaks out & Ava learns how to drive_
|
---

It’s been a great launch for No Doubt About It, and thank you so much for all the support so far!
We are overwhelmed by the reaction to the show. Please continue to download and like the podcast if you’re liking the content!
Our second episode features Riley Gaines, the University of Kentucky swimmer who has become an advocate for protecting the integrity of women’s sports.
Riley gained national attention when she was forced to compete against Lia Thomas, a biological male who identifies as female.
When Riley and Lia Thomas tied in the 200-meter freestyle competition, biological male Thomas was given the trophy, and Riley was sent home empty-handed. You have to listen to Riley’s story of standing up for women in the face of an increasingly aggressive transgender movement.
We asked Riley how this process and the past six months have changed her, and Riley’s answer may surprise you.
Riley also shares a powerful message for the people behind the intimidation campaign that’s been waged against her.
Riley has gone from not just an elite college athlete, but a leader in the fight for the integrity of all women’s sports.
The No Doubt About It Podcast is on all major podcast platforms, and you can watch the episode at the video below.
[](https://nodoubtabouititpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=78fe4ab19c&e=567664f14c)
| [No Doubt About It Podcast Website](https://nodoubtabouititpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bfcbb5e1ef&e=567664f14c)
---
Also - we need you! With your help, we can keep bringing important and fascinating guests and expand the reach of the message.
Independent media is critical to getting the truth out in the world. Your help can make that happen!
Also, please listen and "subscribe" or "follow" us on our YouTube Channel and on your favorite podcast platform. The links to the podcast platforms are below.

| | | | | | | | | | [Spotify Podcasts](https://nodoubtabouititpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=049fe5efd8&e=567664f14c)

We are so grateful for your support. The more you listen to and support the podcast, the more we can share the truth about what happens in our world.
It's time for normal, everyday people to step up and push back on the media & extreme voices in our world.
Check out episode 2 on your favorite podcast platform.
God bless,
Mark & Krysty Ronchetti

When Riley and Lia Thomas tied in the 200-meter freestyle competition, biological male Thomas was given the trophy, and Riley was sent home empty-handed. You have to listen to Riley’s story of standing up for women in the face of an increasingly aggressive transgender movement. We asked Riley how this process and the past six months have changed her, and Riley’s answer may surprise you. Riley also shares a powerful message for the people behind the intimidation campaign that’s been waged against her. Riley has gone from not just an elite college athlete, but a leader in the fight for the integrity of all women’s sports. The No Doubt About It Podcast is on all major podcast platforms, and you can watch the episode at the video below. | Also - we need you! With your help, we can keep bringing important and fascinating guests and expand the reach of the message. Independent media is critical to getting the truth out in the world. Your help can make that happen! Also, please listen and "subscribe" or "follow" us on our YouTube Channel and on your favorite podcast platform. The links to the podcast platforms are below. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | You can also watch the show on our YouTube channel: | We are so grateful for your support. The more you listen to and support the podcast, the more we can share the truth about what happens in our world. It's time for normal, everyday people to step up and push back on the media & extreme voices in our world. Check out episode 2 on your favorite podcast platform. God bless, Mark & Krysty Ronchetti | Follow Us on Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter! | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2023 Choose Adventure Media. All rights reserved.

name: David Horowitz
subject: Time’s running out for America
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don't say this to shock you or scare you --_ I say it because it's true._ And I say it with confidence because when I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. **My name is David Horowitz, and 50 years ago I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end.** I worked side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts - the largest magazine of the radical Left. I marched, I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam - and my eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible. **So I left.** I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left, and dedicated my life to exposing them. I did it because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake. And I knew that if I didn't tell the American people what I knew - what I'd seen firsthand - we would lose our country forever. [**Today, I 'm asking you to join me in this fight, and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $45 or more to my Freedom Center.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=017ebf2f893c4459a7dbbdab4b8a6000&_e=_VkTYlgu1q7Ikn6wg6xWOuNYKKdwDIAOjRVepnJ2z6DsFDt5Tdp0x-Iz32IcQClXzF-DIShDe_L1iw0mK1dP3i-nXOo2at0rGnBi5KlLkqZr0T96UzLMZA4ZFAve8PFEH96LAgerCvANbMEMdKYYZdrDt-4Em9Ankczh1dZn-w_D6EYUwymA2TKLO8k_re0nqBLalt8yLoyvCEzoXetqrRUeRoi4VGN4BMXU9arjLHoubIl_PCXcb-Jis9lnSIYhYzhkXG_mOcStkzxi3Yo3V70Te4t5hQTTCAE4PaZbVk8nPBuV6UBW7CfnszKEWT8fmprcnCm10myuCEpO0nivxsfkiw-nt7mSJhyKdJ7QMiUD_4nDhUwR436KC_0lVhk6) _What we 're seeing today didn't happen overnight. It's no coincidence. It's no stroke of luck._ **It 's the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making.** For decades now, the Freedom Center has been in the trenches, exposing this sinister movement and warning of what was to come. America's domestic enemies have smeared us every step of the way and worked around the clock to cut off both political and financial support to silence us for good. We've been targeted by MasterCard, DiscoverCard, the Southern Poverty Law Center, and so many more because we're willing to say and do what no one else would to expose the enemy within. But after the 2020 presidential election was stolen, the stakes became even higher. That's why I wrote _Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last_ to expose the threat the radical Left poses to our nation and our freedoms... ...and how conservatives can stop them and take back the White House. It's no secret the radical Left's ultimate goal is to create a one-party state, and to cancel, de-platform, and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as "white supremacists" and worse. "My great friend and author David Horowitz, is out with a new book ... It is great! Get your copy!" **\-- Donald J. Trump** "David Horowitz exposes the outrages perpetrated by the Biden administration and the Democratic left." **\-- Dinesh D 'Souza** "Final Battle may be the most devastating book-length indictment of the Democratic Party yet written. This is nothing less than a handbook for the salvation of the United States of America." **\-- Dennis Prager** I wrote _Final Battle_ because I knew that if America stood a chance, Americans had to understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I wrote _Final Battle_ because I used to be a part of the radical Left -- and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. I wrote _Final Battle_ because we've reached the point in our history that will decide our future -- and we either win the White House in 2024 or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. [**So if you donate $45 or more to the Freedom Center today**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=017ebf2f893c4459a7dbbdab4b8a6000&_e=_VkTYlgu1q7Ikn6wg6xWOuNYKKdwDIAOjRVepnJ2z6DsFDt5Tdp0x-Iz32IcQClXzF-DIShDe_L1iw0mK1dP3i-nXOo2at0rGnBi5KlLkqZr0T96UzLMZA4ZFAve8PFEH96LAgerCvANbMEMdKYYZdrDt-4Em9Ankczh1dZn-w_D6EYUwymA2TKLO8k_re0nqBLalt8yLoyvCEzoXetqrRUeRoi4VGN4BMXU9arjLHpWwOBzN1vNxOFUbggpyRSuBHiLUPD9Uas-AihG88vqxfMIBJ_DCa21jfVf6NzYJcNPMAJyQAvHDRN2tYFIklk_oAVUtGW19GTYJaoE-PZ4jAKhRYBhI_7h9NLqzWJUqs48bX-OdH5lQufsmGNRBQHo) and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left's evil agenda to every American patriot, I will send you a complimentary copy _Final Battle: This Election Could Be the Last._ The Left is at war with America. They don't simply disagree with us about how to make it better -- they want to destroy it and make way for their Marxist dystopia. **And they don 't care how much they have to lie, cheat, or steal to achieve it.** So it's up to patriots like you and me to show our fellow Americans who they really are and what they really want while we still can. The 2024 elections will be here before we know it. The clock is ticking...
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But time is running out and our country is hanging by a thread. [**Please make a generous donation of $45 or more to the Freedom Center today**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=017ebf2f893c4459a7dbbdab4b8a6000&_e=_VkTYlgu1q7Ikn6wg6xWOuNYKKdwDIAOjRVepnJ2z6DsFDt5Tdp0x-Iz32IcQClXzF-DIShDe_L1iw0mK1dP3i-nXOo2at0rGnBi5KlLkqZr0T96UzLMZA4ZFAve8PFEH96LAgerCvANbMEMdKYYZdrDt-4Em9Ankczh1dZn-w_D6EYUwymA2TKLO8k_re0nqBLalt8yLoyvCEzoXetqrRUeRoi4VGN4BMXU9arjLHq6-87q5uK5wf6H03Aa2L-1P7PhVc8WmGfBoOPgvhtQ5NqeF-UQi2TM4Dq6fREZMMbvsbX2YJzrjPnjY247KW8aZqqYer3MStq5edyusFmMx5e7ij9d4GnCYh3xgsdpH0MuLwpotjvJ3M1KSPhJu0CF), and as a thank you for your generous support, I'll reserve a complimentary copy of my latest book _Final Battle: The Next Election Could Be the Last_ for you, explaining this in depth.
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=017ebf2f893c4459a7dbbdab4b8a6000&_e=_VkTYlgu1q7Ikn6wg6xWOuNYKKdwDIAOjRVepnJ2z6DsFDt5Tdp0x-Iz32IcQClXzF-DIShDe_L1iw0mK1dP3i-nXOo2at0rGnBi5KlLkqZr0T96UzLMZA4ZFAve8PFEH96LAgerCvANbMEMdKYYZdrDt-4Em9Ankczh1dZn-w_D6EYUwymA2TKLO8k_re0nqBLalt8yLoyvCEzoXetqrRUeRoi4VGN4BMXU9arjLHpjjXSFWn8MUYkKlkaN8J7h-CVXvhi43FTpI9IlIeT8_am7Tv_bTBVRe9uVW0_WVSUJdPR9olVQRhCmOZm_Wu9IuKcD_rVDgiuTUAtYNbpl5-hicpax4IEbodrwZuOgGc7V-oWbYfTKIHqydWZogI_K)

body:
The witch hunts truly will never end... and that is why we MUST win.

| | | [ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=355eb04a9fab4302b4c28a10c0d60d16&_e=uSWT7ZnJPhzjI4sJXG1JXnVLKMyCYafViceHdod00eC9vr3334zfspi8bmQfzpuONaOicF_wUBxZWkMh_5oBFsdg_uEW6qHt4VHqoXY2HwrgOXVDsjDfcnomKRCtIaA-dTkO7EcU6uPP9FDvY8SHZvoQrhIJC5ocPDJCQ-RjtGA52Q11kDpSDKmN-wJODUIcTFn2XtcvTK5OoXi-BACOQxXLWz7C0IpYM9gsLUs9fdfDz8xPglpmX8IHpQzSsGBlNQv9jJwBWKMvTVpypl4plhlzwJbqOJQ2by1rUbY9hgriU-e-rOGaCtpEaFcN7WjwaHhfLaNnuL4tGXYMcPB7QlU0noANwLUS_adYtvrsXLcOpqrPtLC4Ng4rnzs93mAx5NCsjLKo24tUCgzKqZXmcA%3D%3D)

Friend,
The radical Left will never stop...
**In Trump Probe, Special Counsel Zooms In on Possible Criminal Charges** [Source: _Wall Street Journal_]
They will continue to viciously attack me, smear me, and even **ARREST** me despite not having committed a single crime.
The Deep State will continue this assault on _my_ freedom solely because I fight for _YOUR_ freedom...
_... Because it's not really me they're after, it's YOU - I'm just standing in the way._
When I first came down the golden escalator at Trump Tower, I denounced the Washington Swamp and put you FIRST. And together, for the first time in decades, WE created a government _of_ , _by_ , and _for_ the PEOPLE.
For that, the globalist special interests, the entrenched bureaucrats, and the Deep State have all made me their public enemy #1.
But despite the endless despicable witch hunts, not a day goes by where my resolve wavers.
**_Time and time again, I am reminded of the more than 74 MILLION American patriots who make up our incredible MAGA movement. _**
YOU are my courage, my strength, and my hope.
And with every new witch hunt they throw our way, I only grow that much more confident that we WILL win back the White House and SAVE our country in 2024!
**[Please make a contribution of ANY amount- _truly even just $1_ - to help continue to DEFEND our movement from the never-ending witch hunts - for 1,500% impact. ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=355eb04a9fab4302b4c28a10c0d60d16&_e=uSWT7ZnJPhzjI4sJXG1JXnVLKMyCYafViceHdod00eC9vr3334zfspi8bmQfzpuONaOicF_wUBxZWkMh_5oBFsdg_uEW6qHt4VHqoXY2HwrgOXVDsjDfcnomKRCtIaA-dTkO7EcU6uPP9FDvY8SHZvoQrhIJC5ocPDJCQ-RjtGA52Q11kDpSDKmN-wJODUIcTFn2XtcvTK5OoXi-BACOQxXLWz7C0IpYM9gsLUs9fdfDz8xPglpmX8IHpQzSsGBlIkje6efzjioxb2-FtU69O6r8uShbz0s8yZXHGA-kai2RbdmWSfo79d2f_WYo6yPE_o2zKx8Pc3Z_x8iKdXeh5quGm9rQUEuLepfg6ZMirQIr5mn2ZtQjYGgyU4yM3yoZluvjXkV3llwD6Jz-80IIOg%3D%3D)**
Thank you and God bless you,

The Deep State will continue this assault on my freedom solely because I fight for YOUR freedom... ... Because it's not really me they're after, it's YOU - I'm just standing in the way. When I first came down the golden escalator at Trump Tower, I denounced the Washington Swamp and put you FIRST. And together, for the first time in decades, WE created a government of , by , and for the PEOPLE. But despite the endless despicable witch hunts, not a day goes by where my resolve wavers. name: Kevin Tordoff, Americans United for Life
subject: Abortion survivors deserve care
body:
Americans United for Life is committed to exposing the truth about abortion and protecting the most vulnerable through policy and legislation

| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsisah8ofno1uvoahjrt4ro30dlffe8jru74lsmo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j62pb1cth2bs)
---
Friend, A baby is born – alive – after _surviving_ an attempted abortion. But what happens next is not the same in all places ... because, Friend, that precious baby’s life is NOT YET protected in all 50 states! [**Will you stand with Americans United for Life to help us ensure born-alive babies are given medical care in _all 50 states_? Please add your name to our urgent national petition right now.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1olm6ppkoncrpir15aiod08c91ffr06re0t1nj8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j62pb1cth2bs)
---
[Sign the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zuu0rod8h3il9i3rjqb7m1k3vr4er40j1gq09h10_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j62pb1cth2bs)
---
Thanks to advances in medical science, babies as young as just 21 or 22 weeks gestation can increasingly survive outside the womb – but only with the care of medical professionals. **But in many states, babies of that age or later who survive abortion _are not given legal protection_.** Friend, I’m sure you would agree that infants surviving attempted abortions are in critical need of medical intervention to provide comfort care and increase their chances of survival... ...and born-alive infants who survive an abortion attempt deserve to be protected under the law, treated with human dignity, and given appropriate care! [**Please help Americans United for Life continue to fight to protect born-alive babies in all 50 states. Add your name to this urgent petition now to stand with us.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0509f9eril95bidi5f8295bt43l637d0ko0k1rg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j62pb1cth2bs)
---
[Sign the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z58pk9akkmnsekoqghrdn1sgv9kc9jolk2iq3sp8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j62pb1cth2bs)
---
Your support today can help protect precious babies in America this year. Currently, just eight states in the U.S. report abortion information on born-alive infants. From those eight states, reports show that 35 infants in 2020 and 2021 were born alive and another 8 babies were born alive just in Florida in 2022. Nationally, there are no numbers available. But in a study that looked at 241 children aborted for having a suspected fetal anomaly between 20 and 24 weeks, 122 infants _survived_ the procedure! [**Please stand with Americans United for Life’s efforts to ensure abortion survivors receive care to increase their chances of survival and alleviate their pain. All 50 states need to treat these children with human dignity; if you agree, please sign our petition today.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z38mnoabl1fq24qnr201cc3anmptgssopk5ahu4g_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j62pb1cth2bs) As America’s first national pro-life organization, AUL has saved thousands of precious lives through behind-the-scenes work in America’s legislatures, courts, and public life. _We’re in pursuit of real change and tangible impact._ Americans United for Life is committed to exposing the truth about abortion and protecting the most vulnerable through policy and legislation. We’re representing those without a voice, advancing the human right to life, and working on your behalf to:
* Ensure all 50 states and every territory have policies that require healthcare professionals to provide medically appropriate and reasonable care for survivors of abortion.
* Establish enforcement mechanisms to ensure that born-alive infants receive proper medical care.
* Provide civil and criminal penalties for violation of laws that protect babies who survive attempted abortions.

No one has a right to commit infanticide, nor justify the denial of basic protections for the born, living human infants. But, without legislative protections, born-alive babies In a majority of states will continue to suffer. [**The most vulnerable lives need our help, which is why I need your signature on the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies today.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8nl77utfo352qfk5kmh69884va540hfbgavmse0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j62pb1cth2bs) Founded in 1971, two years before the tragic _Roe v. Wade_ decision, Americans United for Life is still fighting for preborn and born-alive babies over 50 years later! _Since our founding, those not yet born have been dehumanized, life itself has become politicized, and the most vulnerable have faced increasing marginalization due to their age, ability, or perceived value._ Americans United for Life is working to ensure all survivors of abortion are welcomed throughout life and protected by law. But we can’t do this work alone. This is a fight we will win — culturally and legally, locally and nationally — if we have the support of Americans who recognize the importance of protecting born-alive babies. [**Will you sign this petition to help us protect survivors of abortion in all 50 states?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb8bf1ble3cv6ukiluvfioll60g3h7e6rk36njgo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j62pb1cth2bs)
---
[Sign the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjdqunuguf7jl8qah12g82sqm5l4uk4fpqij5k3o_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j62pb1cth2bs)
---
For life, Kevin Tordoff Americans United for Life
---
[Sign the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zuv82ef9e3rtmgju8epttgsqcl9k2lh32gi435fg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j62pb1cth2bs)
---
Americans United for Life
1150 Connecticut Avenue NW, Suite 500
Washington, DC 20036
---

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zraco9p2t6cj2ea3bhh2k6f12qah82d4okeg9au0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshi60oj2c1gm48d245p25oh4cdgeco76c5im2pr24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zp23pd1ulbik4j13jfs5a98n2iepc2vhldcbof7g_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j62pb1cth2bs)_

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpfp48pdbtem061lvt6lifo0c8tcvq516949pko8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j62pb1cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

clean_body: Ohio extremists just took steps to restrict the power of your vote. Help us fight back >> | | BREAKING: The Ohio state legislature has officially referred a DANGEROUS measure to the ballot for this August that could strip Ohioans of the power of their vote. If passed, this measure would require all ballot measures to pass with at least a 60% supermajority, making it extremely difficult for any future measures to succeed. = Team: We refuse to stand by while extremists make blatant attempts at restricting the power of American voters — in Ohio and everywhere. Our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign is at the ready to fight back against this attack on democracy, but we need to show extremist Ohio officials exactly who they’re up against. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We know if we stand together and show Ohio officials the strength of this movement, we can defeat their attacks, team. Our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign helped us defeat Amendment C in South Dakota and Issue 2 in Arkansas last year — both attacks that required the same 60% supermajority for any future measures to pass. = We cannot and will not stand by while extremists in Ohio try to suppress the power of direct democracy. Will you show the strength of this movement and let Ohio extremists know we’re ready to fight to defend our voting rights?= = Thank you, Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. name: VoteVets
subject: We made sure Trump lost in 2020
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We will do it again in 2024
#
Derek —
Trump came off of his “Town Hall” on CNN last night as the clear frontrunner in the Republican Presidential Primary.
And we’re all the worse for it.
We’re not interested in re-litigating all the lies that traitor told last night because we already know the truth.
The man has no shame. He has no sense of honor or dignity. And he has no respect for the men and women who serve this country.
VoteVets made sure he lost in 2020. We will do it again in 2024. We’re the Veterans holding the line against Trump, and we’re not about to back down. Not now — not ever.
For our Veterans, for our children, and for the future of our country, please: **[We’re humbly asking you to make a donation of any amount to keep Trump out of the Oval Office. $5, $10, $25 — anything you can afford. It all adds up when we’re all chipping in.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-may23.LTpcsd&refcode=em230511-1-15&t=1&akid=8428%2E3013755%2EDP_rsc)**

name: Jazz Lewis
subject: Don't miss our spring happy hour!
body:
Hey Team,

I wanted to quickly reach out and extend a personal invitation to next week's spring happy hour with Speaker Jones. I am so proud of the work we were able to accomplish this session not just our personal priorities but also as a larger caucus under the Speaker's leadership.

I hope you can join us as we celebrate this year's progress and we plan for the future.

All the details are below and you can RSVP here >> jazzlewis.com/events [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/0518woodmore]

Hope to see you next week,

Jazz

--
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode2=logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode2=logo]

Join us for a Spring Happy Hour in support of

Majority Whip Jazz Lewis

Chair, Oversight Committee on Personnel and Vice Chair, Capital Budget Subcommittee
House Appropriations Committee

with Special Guest

Speaker Adrienne A. Jones

Thursday, May 18th, 2023
6:00-8:00pm
The Country Club at Woodmore
12320 Pleasant Prospect
Mitchellville, MD 20721
RSVP > [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/0518woodmore]

For questions or to RSVP contact Megan at megan@skybp.com or (240) 283-4899

As a proven progressive leader and champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Majority Whip in the Maryland House. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Bowie with his wife and son.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: — MY STATEMENT —
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
##########################

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze75mrrfb57t8pk9h56muht547bg35cs5s8h71a0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6ap36clh2bs)
---
Friend,
America is in serious trouble.
Our justice system has been HIJACKED by corrupt political forces who use their power, money, and connections to destroy anyone who stands in their way.
I have once again become the target of a disgusting witch hunt that lacks _ANY_ EVIDENCE, PROOF, or EYEWITNESSES.
**But my freedom and justice did not matter to the Marxists who orchestrated this witch hunt in a city where the voter registration of the jury pool favors Democrats 7:1.**
_This witch hunt was funded by a Democrat mega-donor who slept at Pedophile Jeffrey Epstein 's private island - with a Clinton-appointed judge presiding over the bogus trial._
Let me be as clear as humanly possible: I did NOTHING wrong.
_So, I 'll tell you what this is all about... _
Everybody has seen the polls. No one honestly believes that Joe Biden - sitting at a 36% approval rating - can beat me in a _**fair**_ election next year.
**So, the Democrats have decided that their strategy is to launch witch hunt after witch hunt to try and bleed me dry.**
But the Democrats don't understand that I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the radical Left. _There is not a single attack on the face of the planet that will break me._
...Because I know that if this left-wing cabal can slander and attack a former U.S. President, they could one day do it to a private citizen like **YOU**.
_I refuse to let that happen. I refuse to let America 's justice system completely collapse._
Together, we will win back the White House and we will SAVE AMERICA.

Our justice system has been HIJACKED by corrupt political forces who use their power, money, and connections to destroy anyone who stands in their way. I have once again become the target of a disgusting witch hunt that lacks ANY EVIDENCE, PROOF, or EYEWITNESSES. But my freedom and justice did not matter to the Marxists who orchestrated this witch hunt in a city where the voter registration of the jury pool favors Democrats 7:1. This witch hunt was funded by a Democrat mega-donor who slept at Pedophile Jeffrey Epstein 's private island - with a Clinton-appointed judge presiding over the bogus trial. Let me be as clear as humanly possible: I did NOTHING wrong. So, I 'll tell you what this is all about... Everybody has seen the polls. No one honestly believes that Joe Biden - sitting at a 36% approval rating - can beat me in a fair election next year. So, the Democrats have decided that their strategy is to launch witch hunt after witch hunt to try and bleed me dry. But the Democrats don't understand that I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the radical Left. There is not a single attack on the face of the planet that will break me. ...Because I know that if this left-wing cabal can slander and attack a former U.S. President, they could one day do it to a private citizen like YOU. I refuse to let that happen. I refuse to let America 's justice system completely collapse. Together, we will win back the White House and we will SAVE AMERICA. [#VeteranOfTheDay Navy Veteran Ryan Job](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkrpr28uo7e0eol76oq8292la6epnlbkee064cfo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6aoj6cdh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cth6kpjactmekpradrmeej3fddnk9g64pj7k1imf930cuhnacbl69q37dtj65obac9k6jqq7d1jejqq6t9hekp78ctlk9qf8ctlkarr4dt24no)
Ryan Job was born in Washington state in March 1981. He was raised in Issaquah, Washington, and attended Issaquah High School. After graduation, he enrolled in the University of Washington, where he studied for three years before joining the Navy in 2002. He began boot camp in December of that year in Great Lakes, Illinois, and graduated in February 2003.

name: Jon Tester
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Hey folks, Jon Tester here.
I’m not like most of my colleagues in the Senate, and it’s not too hard to see why. All you have to do is look at my $12 flattop haircut and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts.
I’m the Senate’s only working farmer, and damn proud of it.
Yes, it can make for early mornings and late nights during planting and harvest seasons — but it keeps me grounded, and gives me a unique perspective on issues. Like how climate change affects my farm, or how rural communities like mine need high-speed internet.
These are real challenges that deserve real solutions, and that’s what I’m fighting for in Washington. But political experts rank my seat as one of the most likely to flip red, so I need your help to beat the odds and win this critical race:
Can you split a donation between Seth Moulton and my campaign? We need to raise another $1,000,000 to reach our goal. Anything you can give helps. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
This will be one of the most competitive races of 2024, and I’ll need your help from the very beginning to build a team strong enough to win.
Thank you,
Jon
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9414be64fd44466891573b769f1a5517&_e=MxdH9vi1B3sC6M1u7wXiZwaNxeJiHlG-iirZsChtrjCn2dfe_6_Z4WYreVV1mgMkmOIfAXGzY_xsz7jhg5TGctoezGqM3wUVlhhW4eN5SKRsDI7_d_e3UwHIES9r2X17z8usUBsHWKHs4Q_0wI8jEhOi2qQEP5bGFRgx-_-PNTlNHeEIFJ5Qw0VLc17uddZ3IwS_zZCEUC_hvQ5CHT9b0pCHq2tZ4WbKxWn6txDeyk8nQVaIkkNSwLcKotCsgoLxghlIni_T-gUTseX5euvqyKlLpeUJWMu-AEAzGaOlK9jx2raaWLeKRW2G-6f5NOsQEvQ8mEFQ9_y9rHuQwscdlraljeb8WeM3rY50cfkPHuKYS4Xk07RM5zJpDAD__DNXPejQMfI-RuKDjQY-sMVqkXcBUjar6Teo6CYppgkMpVNOVRm8vQRMwbCfNTAo1hCT)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9414be64fd44466891573b769f1a5517&_e=MxdH9vi1B3sC6M1u7wXiZwaNxeJiHlG-iirZsChtrjCn2dfe_6_Z4WYreVV1mgMkmOIfAXGzY_xsz7jhg5TGctoezGqM3wUVlhhW4eN5SKRsDI7_d_e3UwHIES9r2X17z8usUBsHWKHs4Q_0wI8jEhOi2qQEP5bGFRgx-_-PNTlNHeEIFJ5Qw0VLc17uddZ3IwS_zZCEUC_hvQ5CHT9b0pCHq2tZ4WbKxWn6txDeyk8nQVaIkkNSwLcKotCsgoLxghlIni_T-gUTseX5euvqyCJjc2RcFG8Qb-xC0UcEdNS07CZyyollkond9ZiyJAStmstPPoIoH41TnTzu8EMy3IMjrSfr7o-POplUYZ1lNy8B4bZixRP3FegDRiNAKvXpd0Lxp9mV4_oXqKQ8eg0pglpo9rBrrzUbMvcQQqix28AGRK40cMvAJT0dR33bw-S_)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9414be64fd44466891573b769f1a5517&_e=MxdH9vi1B3sC6M1u7wXiZwaNxeJiHlG-iirZsChtrjCn2dfe_6_Z4WYreVV1mgMkmOIfAXGzY_xsz7jhg5TGctoezGqM3wUVlhhW4eN5SKRsDI7_d_e3UwHIES9r2X17z8usUBsHWKHs4Q_0wI8jEhOi2qQEP5bGFRgx-_-PNTlNHeEIFJ5Qw0VLc17uddZ3IwS_zZCEUC_hvQ5CHT9b0pCHq2tZ4WbKxWn6txDeyk8nQVaIkkNSwLcKotCsgoLxghlIni_T-gUTseX5euvqyIluZ8BSIh-nRsxFIs9gXq0vJ5rvk_KteS5TBHaRFU6v0Bxo5hCHoiFmQW_G8uh4segDCJmBmx04lcdz5U3TIiPCbINxTAPzzYaVn_xe_DSnDxYPeV8qgSZGEdgd_BN4y9vZyeiKhVFisyJvta5usu5apSiX2zGojlT-jhSKXDua)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign the petition: Investigate electeds who may be constitutionally disqualified from holding office
body:
Add your name
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4b601eb6-f14d-4d2a-a215-89b27f5f31b5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**Sign if you agree: Elected who participated in the insurrection must be banned from office, and bans on January 6 insurrectionists must be enforced!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T348187a7-f5c5-4190-9ebd-1f24d7b870ce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The U.S. Constitution provides eligibility requirements for people who want to run for public office. Section 3 of the 14th Amendment is clear: No elected official who previously swore an oath to the U.S. Constitution may serve if they "engaged in insurrection or rebellion" against the Constitution. To that end, electeds need to be investigated to determine if they meet the constitutional qualifications for office or are disqualified for engaging in insurrection. In the aftermath of the January 6th attack, [several elected officials](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6134cb0a-d202-41f7-bac4-3c4f865614ae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), including Arizona Rep. Paul Gosar, North Carolina State Rep. Donnie Loftis, and Pennsylvania State Senator Doug Mastriano, have been implicated in the insurrection. Mastriano specifically not only mobilized the mob but also participated in the fake electors' scheme and joined the mob within the restricted area of the Capitol grounds. A [new report](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teaa9061d-005f-44e6-b2cf-1b042e384a8c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) makes clear that his actions warrant investigation and accountability under the Pennsylvania Senate rules and the Pennsylvania Constitution. Accountability for those involved in the January 6 attack is essential to preserving the integrity of our democracy. We must send a clear message that those who seek to undermine our government through violence and insurrection have no place in elected office. Insurrectionists have no business serving as elected officials and are barred from office. That's not a matter of opinion or political preference, it's what the Constitution says. [**Sign if you agree: Elected who participated in the insurrection must be banned from office, and bans on January 6 insurrectionists must be enforced!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2b74d079-2e57-4eda-8ac3-1378447275ba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T183b1e63-9254-47b1-b3e5-0b4952fadad5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: John Fetterman
subject: Say it with me, fellow dudes: Abortion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I have *always* supported the right to an abortion — and I’ll say it loud.
#
Derek,
Ugh. I *truly* hope you didn’t watch Trump’s CNN town hall last night — it was a shitshow.
One of the (many) ugly things he said jumped out at me:
“Getting rid of _Roe v. Wade_ was an incredible thing for pro-life.”
Yep, that’s right. Trump was on national TV bragging about attacking women’s reproductive freedoms, but _he couldn’t even say the *word* abortion._
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230511-1?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20230511-1-8371&refcode2=8371_434096_1h9N_r&akid=8371%2E434096%2E1h9N_r)
It’s embarrassing — but we see the same thing from dudes in both parties!!! I mean, how can we fight the extreme right’s attempts to outlaw abortion if we treat it like a dirty word?
So say it with me, fellow dudes: **Abortion.**
**Abortion** is a non-negotiable right.
**Abortion** saves lives.
**Abortion** MUST be codified into law.
**[Derek, help me keep fighting against extreme Republicans like Trump to protect the right to an abortion. They won’t stop until abortion is illegal nationwide, and I’ll never stop fighting to codify _Roe_ into law.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230511-1?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20230511-1-8371&refcode2=8371_434096_1h9N_r&akid=8371%2E434096%2E1h9N_r)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230511-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230511-8371&refcode2=8371_434096_1h9N_r&akid=8371%2E434096%2E1h9N_r)**
Thank you for fighting back,
John
John Fetterman
U.S Senator, Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230511-8371-footer&t=1&refcode2=8371_434096_1h9N_r&akid=8371%2E434096%2E1h9N_r)**

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: I have always supported the right to an abortion — and I’ll say it loud. Derek, Ugh. I truly hope you didn’t watch Trump’s CNN town hall last night — it was a shitshow. One of the (many) ugly things he said jumped out at me: “Getting rid of Roe v. Wade was an incredible thing for pro-life.” Yep, that’s right. Trump was on national TV bragging about attacking women’s reproductive freedoms, but he couldn’t even say the word abortion. It’s embarrassing — but we see the same thing from dudes in both parties!!! I mean, how can we fight the extreme right’s attempts to outlaw abortion if we treat it like a dirty word? So say it with me, fellow dudes: Abortion. Abortion is a non-negotiable right. Abortion saves lives. Abortion MUST be codified into law. Thank you for fighting back, John John Fetterman U.S Senator, Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

One year ago, our nation was reeling over a leaked draft of the Supreme Court opinion that overturned Roe v. Wade.

**Peter, one year ago, our nation was reeling over a leaked draft of the Supreme Court opinion that overturned** Roe v. Wade**.**

And from that moment forward, myself and countless other leaders have been fighting tooth and nail to protect reproductive freedom and increase access to abortion. In the last year, we've made incredible steps toward protecting our reproductive freedom – from voting to protect this right in states across our country to keeping mifepristone on shelves – but we cannot relent.

**That's why, on this grim anniversary, I'm asking top supporters like you to stand with me and reaffirm your commitment to protecting reproductive rights.[Peter, ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63141698/405735323/583292334?code=jtk1073-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-reproductive-rights-0423&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWJhZTg1YS0xOGYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W2pPgQOGR94bleD4W_DLJxnlzkiBwpaFzjmBffoQWeo=&emci=ee42213f-89ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=6ebae85a-18f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)****[will you add your name now to my petition to protect reproductive rights? I need 1,392 more signatures before midnight tonight, and I’m still missing YOUR response.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63141699/405735324/583292334?code=jtk1073-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-reproductive-rights-0423&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWJhZTg1YS0xOGYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W2pPgQOGR94bleD4W_DLJxnlzkiBwpaFzjmBffoQWeo=&emci=ee42213f-89ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=6ebae85a-18f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63141700/405735325/583292334?code=jtk1073-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-reproductive-rights-0423&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWJhZTg1YS0xOGYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W2pPgQOGR94bleD4W_DLJxnlzkiBwpaFzjmBffoQWeo=&emci=ee42213f-89ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=6ebae85a-18f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
---
With the House of Representatives under Republican control, reproductive rights continue to be in a precarious position. **That’s why I’m calling on fearless fighters like you to step up now and join my fight to protect reproductive freedom.

Let me be clear:** I will not accept a future where Americans are denied access to essential health care products and services. Since the moment Roe v. Wade was struck down, I’ve fought tirelessly to make New York a safe haven for all those seeking reproductive care, and I’m proud to say that we’ve already made _real_ progress.

I’ve fought in court against state laws that outlaw abortion with no exceptions, convened a task force to assist reproductive health care providers and patients in this new legal landscape, and called for the creation of an abortion fund – all because I know that abortion access is a social justice issue.

**But, Peter, we can only win this fight for reproductive freedom if we _all_ work together. That’s why I set a goal to collect 5,000 signatures on my reproductive rights petition before midnight tonight — and I’m counting on you to step up now.

[Will you please take 30 seconds to add your name to my petition to PROTECT reproductive rights on this grim anniversary?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63141701/405735326/583292334?code=jtk1073-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-reproductive-rights-0423&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWJhZTg1YS0xOGYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W2pPgQOGR94bleD4W_DLJxnlzkiBwpaFzjmBffoQWeo=&emci=ee42213f-89ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=6ebae85a-18f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
Thank you for standing with me to defend reproductive rights for every last person.

Letitia

name: American Briefing
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlf00l4v0p36odi58jr01ged3a73v0hqoa1hfvq0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6eo32cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z54snlv69h0bqv9eb3ps0j2d9pc9lc4i3hrmsf8g_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6eo32cph2bs)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ze6il9hddgijb64vqfp5rle9ed3qr77gu3anjl78_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6eo32cph2bs)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Briefing
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5vvdcep39jom2kfmudj07elpp0uq4nbc5md4r20_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6eo32cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm8p79d9j6iprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni68o32c9jm9oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z75gbkm51uc29epp7oe50n8h4h9i38persrobeag_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6eo32cph2bs)_

The Democrats are in FULL CONTROL of the Senate and the White House. Chuck Schumer wants this to happen. Joe Biden wants this to happen.

A Republican House is the LAST line of defense.

Democrats know they can't win with standard tactics so they're making a power play by trying to flip the game board to their advantage!

It is IMPERATIVE that we stop this radical power grab right here and now. If the Dems get away with this, NOTHING. ELSE. MATTERS.
