name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b50a31479acf4f8683023bff8c406adf&_e=KpncOcuZdoOlD41XH5a0q9iiKWDJLPVKuP3N0moNNVOi5RKXu9-oIY8DeqCAyrV6OE8C0zQY-dDrb-vQBjbo9M7EdcUodKJSvAvy0k29Qp0pWQnMhwEqSINYRFRMO9GowBXiRZPKEiTvz5xwqd8rwxm9mYGNre4xAT5RvPWdrg4J-EEWXK1aqOuK5qQcBtVE_Of6laaX15TXr0mtQnWX7NJyxgpcwTNTFvsNd44U_0_zLDV4mBv2gbfbzoIDDsUK20uaOktCnGl0YYwUSerSEUktPV76vTtBzdGMIyG7WIrLVCvSKyKAzbxIh_EGOlQJoHBUzVPT59eOcKLtGWKi-_zpK0eTlcEE36EVLGE0TDsnmkXv-LOd90g9S-TTaGQCWj_yKNtv0W6b2YH2iwUYczewovk8ypYIk5KTgVBNmI3avQc6EY12am3wpoScKRKJ)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b50a31479acf4f8683023bff8c406adf&_e=KpncOcuZdoOlD41XH5a0q9iiKWDJLPVKuP3N0moNNVOi5RKXu9-oIY8DeqCAyrV6OE8C0zQY-dDrb-vQBjbo9M7EdcUodKJSvAvy0k29Qp0pWQnMhwEqSINYRFRMO9GowBXiRZPKEiTvz5xwqd8rwxm9mYGNre4xAT5RvPWdrg4J-EEWXK1aqOuK5qQcBtVE_Of6laaX15TXr0mtQnWX7NJyxgpcwTNTFvsNd44U_0_zLDV4mBv2gbfbzoIDDsUK20uaOktCnGl0YYwUSerSETHUTHEhnjNlrOad5ZeiGiuIO-kcoec3C7J43vnYED-A9EPadPtbH8uv_lKKqOLyhTki5KUSwcyZXQtJihOGjJFblDfRgCKhub4Xfxj8myKqcmmkCuT8OHR4vba8yB5GCgUvxRWAhC2jaJlzIXms7thDCW22PlYMBhW98wdtI2UP)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b50a31479acf4f8683023bff8c406adf&_e=KpncOcuZdoOlD41XH5a0q9iiKWDJLPVKuP3N0moNNVOi5RKXu9-oIY8DeqCAyrV6OE8C0zQY-dDrb-vQBjbo9M7EdcUodKJSvAvy0k29Qp0pWQnMhwEqSINYRFRMO9GowBXiRZPKEiTvz5xwqd8rwxm9mYGNre4xAT5RvPWdrg4J-EEWXK1aqOuK5qQcBtVE_Of6laaX15TXr0mtQnWX7NJyxgpcwTNTFvsNd44U_0_zLDV4mBv2gbfbzoIDDsUK20uaOktCnGl0YYwUSerSET9nC4xwJ-N3D9sf_yEdV2U47PCsf2rpoAhi4lr-ul-V9OHtiiltsa6ttNlhMkfygmqTjpYCvc0-sg-cN6q6wr_ynX1tuLoCQ6npB5GNkuI-xpT9-x-5EA6p4DJDuMsIjBUVTzzvuvHW9__P6NxRsZ2kp1cmjgR86v5dKewn7G2c)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

body:

| |
---
| | |
Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.

As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

name: Kevin Tordoff, Americans United for Life
subject: Abortion survivors deserve care
body:
Americans United for Life is committed to exposing the truth about abortion and protecting the most vulnerable through policy and legislation

| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zopbu4or0ffvg3hegc02fda4tpfq365v5domnpq8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6ep76c1h2bs)
---
Friend, A baby is born – alive – after _surviving_ an attempted abortion. But what happens next is not the same in all places ... because, Friend, that precious baby’s life is NOT YET protected in all 50 states! [**Will you stand with Americans United for Life to help us ensure born-alive babies are given medical care in _all 50 states_? Please add your name to our urgent national petition right now.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z86qsmbs9is1ndgrtjkuubp6it9qk6gpv826qku8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6ep76c1h2bs)
---
[Sign the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zc77jo4rbe5psh56jipb9o6mnrhg80pds8lf3afo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6ep76c1h2bs)
---
Thanks to advances in medical science, babies as young as just 21 or 22 weeks gestation can increasingly survive outside the womb – but only with the care of medical professionals. **But in many states, babies of that age or later who survive abortion _are not given legal protection_.** Friend, I’m sure you would agree that infants surviving attempted abortions are in critical need of medical intervention to provide comfort care and increase their chances of survival... ...and born-alive infants who survive an abortion attempt deserve to be protected under the law, treated with human dignity, and given appropriate care! [**Please help Americans United for Life continue to fight to protect born-alive babies in all 50 states. Add your name to this urgent petition now to stand with us.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zg25u8f70a5is2rom3va0uj7c5aqa6i8pbo3ahc8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6ep76c1h2bs)
---
[Sign the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvqapsuhdski28fmeofk0n2vodlcmfknmevhb6og_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6ep76c1h2bs)
---
Your support today can help protect precious babies in America this year. Currently, just eight states in the U.S. report abortion information on born-alive infants. From those eight states, reports show that 35 infants in 2020 and 2021 were born alive and another 8 babies were born alive just in Florida in 2022. Nationally, there are no numbers available. But in a study that looked at 241 children aborted for having a suspected fetal anomaly between 20 and 24 weeks, 122 infants _survived_ the procedure! [**Please stand with Americans United for Life’s efforts to ensure abortion survivors receive care to increase their chances of survival and alleviate their pain. All 50 states need to treat these children with human dignity; if you agree, please sign our petition today.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs8fiu72leasm4a2aerhjtopr8eipvrrc960q8kg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6ep76c1h2bs) As America’s first national pro-life organization, AUL has saved thousands of precious lives through behind-the-scenes work in America’s legislatures, courts, and public life. _We’re in pursuit of real change and tangible impact._ Americans United for Life is committed to exposing the truth about abortion and protecting the most vulnerable through policy and legislation. We’re representing those without a voice, advancing the human right to life, and working on your behalf to:
* Ensure all 50 states and every territory have policies that require healthcare professionals to provide medically appropriate and reasonable care for survivors of abortion.
* Establish enforcement mechanisms to ensure that born-alive infants receive proper medical care.
* Provide civil and criminal penalties for violation of laws that protect babies who survive attempted abortions.

No one has a right to commit infanticide, nor justify the denial of basic protections for the born, living human infants. But, without legislative protections, born-alive babies In a majority of states will continue to suffer. [**The most vulnerable lives need our help, which is why I need your signature on the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies today.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zph8t40gkkpfa7gijvvg15askjhrcvbfum08oev8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6ep76c1h2bs) Founded in 1971, two years before the tragic _Roe v. Wade_ decision, Americans United for Life is still fighting for preborn and born-alive babies over 50 years later! _Since our founding, those not yet born have been dehumanized, life itself has become politicized, and the most vulnerable have faced increasing marginalization due to their age, ability, or perceived value._ Americans United for Life is working to ensure all survivors of abortion are welcomed throughout life and protected by law. But we can’t do this work alone. This is a fight we will win — culturally and legally, locally and nationally — if we have the support of Americans who recognize the importance of protecting born-alive babies. [**Will you sign this petition to help us protect survivors of abortion in all 50 states?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6n0bkqigct59lis8rkfql1fde6m8ura6b85ndrg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6ep76c1h2bs)
---
[Sign the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqmarkumfcisgoqsubvg6cpug2nv0vfr9c7mkamo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6ep76c1h2bs)
---
For life, Kevin Tordoff Americans United for Life
---
[Sign the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zee0ubmcm9bbrjja14bic6843hd5rj935uies038_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6ep76c1h2bs)
---
Americans United for Life
1150 Connecticut Avenue NW, Suite 500
Washington, DC 20036
---

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zplg5oab3fmplgj1ebpui3du2gv95vmkgr5676kg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6ep76c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p30c9h69oj24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqaqrg8bkik8cv3bgo5u2o1d5mfcgljmfq0caj1o_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6ep76c1h2bs)_

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9j0avt63uv6f2fljmc8hstgle7r317ibh1cu81g_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or0spgecpr4spg649fg)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: My campaign goal: the Presidential debate stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Another new poll has us TIED with VP Mike Pence and AHEAD of Nikki Haley!

| **🚨 NEW POLL 🚨**
Fellow American,

We're gaining momentum. (❗ ❗ ❗)

**Another new poll has us TIED with VP Mike Pence and AHEAD of Nikki Haley!**

I may have launched this campaign just a few months ago - but conservative voters are taking notice of our outsider campaign.

This polling shows our momentum - but in order to secure a prime spot on the debate stage we need solid polling numbers AND unique grassroots donors.

That's what I am just asking for $1 today, Fellow American.

| [** WATCH NOW -> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znmgcubnk5rmecrkj1303kkf2t28jnuaptfo58n8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6ep76c1h2bs)
---

**[Please take 30 seconds to watch this video from the campaign trail and chip in whatever you can to help.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z11br6kju306ltqv4g3honfo3qbfj4i9foaqc4s0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6ep76c1h2bs) **

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgkrs16d5s5g2pf1gav3r60882rbf6qp595hlpbo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6ep76c1h2bs)
- Vivek

P.S. I am in Iowa this week to connect with primary voters. We're seeing real momentum on the ground - but we need to continue to build the Vek-head when it comes to adding new, grassroots donors to our team.

**[Before the end of the day, can I count on you to chip in any amount to add to that number?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z03n7h4kcrvlqrjns9r5nopfuv7hqqdd41af2npg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6ep76c1h2bs)**

[** WATCH NOW -> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0guafgkte5d0ggj80p30po5sk682d6vp726gssg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6ep76c1h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk4ha470akp0a55a903eflg7sn5834op7u0njc88_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j6ep76c1h2bs)

---

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. Fellow American,

Things were better under President Trump. **They just were.**

Our economy was stronger. Gas was cheaper. Our neighborhoods were safer. Our border was more secure. The list goes on and on.

Perhaps most importantly, America was more respected in the world because we had a leader who projected courage and strength.

**Under President Biden’s weak leadership, everything has tanked in the past two years. Gas prices. The economy. The culture. Everything.**

Our Republican majority in the House is busy getting things back on track, but to truly save our great country, we need to win back the White House.

I know and like each of the Republican presidential candidates, **but I want you to know that I am 100% behind Donald Trump in 2024.**

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1ab642c0daa4482a8e65d791ff7c8daa&_e=5CTYtogt1oYq2d5SczkR6Yyb6FKe8_Z4-7jmaPfkHrGktJ3zFzWJnrvvTyXo4JSUGyZLmAQfkbxUXCr-O6EX0463OAttsYa3ORKT0DROpPR5KmIEvUg7wiOrjmh8rVookJ8716K-cgThqqsQ6rvZRBuWdzc__vckKazf0pfMzqwEN6-vkM7x3JQptCW2H_saRmfpEVmaOSaFMe0b0sa5koWI3LIH6b_3GjFUCmQJ8NEWrlhtn_GQo7MWgTHGOAfRcAe1Gz8jEb4SKD7iorr6E0VhpiafDEU2Uy7Kfr2GJAF9A53Vl5rRcYdNWtY88jnqLN2wKjXaACqblMyLNmGs3lrdWy9sq9zLoYs73Oi9ZDKlKqvghsCfZ1JI17DhUNIf-5Cgn_VZz9vpLreprqeoImAueAfW8IpycOxHxHoR5EskblJsEXOJ5gcY3a-yUD0C59Bu1rKBig3kwVIeIZDj-kHFdas_ShAqT-OqWQNWbV4c5jBPV128oELIrPxmr14S-BI0z-ATF7EUCPor4Bwt8w%3D%3D)
No president in my lifetime has demonstrated Trump’s willingness to keep their word and get things done. And he did it with **everyone** in Washington against him.

**It’s quite clear that the swamp will stop at nothing to scuttle Trump’s candidacy.** They started their relentless attack before he was even a candidate, and they will NEVER stop. The reason? It’s because Trump doesn’t need them. He’s a self-made man who loves this country and is willing to stand up for ordinary citizens against the corruption in Washington.

That’s why no one, and I mean NO ONE scares the radical left more than Donald Trump.

**I’m 100% in![Please let me know what you think by clicking the link!](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1ab642c0daa4482a8e65d791ff7c8daa&_e=5CTYtogt1oYq2d5SczkR6Yyb6FKe8_Z4-7jmaPfkHrGktJ3zFzWJnrvvTyXo4JSUGyZLmAQfkbxUXCr-O6EX0463OAttsYa3ORKT0DROpPR5KmIEvUg7wiOrjmh8rVookJ8716K-cgThqqsQ6rvZRBuWdzc__vckKazf0pfMzqwEN6-vkM7x3JQptCW2H_saRmfpEVmaOSaFMe0b0sa5koWI3LIH6b_3GjFUCmQJ8NEWrlhtn_GQo7MWgTHGOAfRcAe1Gz8jEb4SKD7iorr6E0VhpiafDEU2Uy7Kfr2GJAF9A53Vl5rRcYdNWtY88jnqLN2wKjXaACqblMyLNmGs3lrdWy9sq9zLoYs73Oi9ZDKlKqvghsCfZ1JI17DhUNIf5CNYhfxrA9mfj15MFqYtD4pdLElB6txDlIOB2TF-SFPmNUIxljI_ONQmx2f3bvnNJyzsAp3pJu4PuoNrXyX57aL_S_PJwUgCIF-5G8M9_L0vDXe6boEey53Pf7-HWakHnJDv43RGoqoCTo59-914Hg%3D%3D) **

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Jacqueline Coleman
subject: Kentucky teachers deserve our appreciation, and so much more.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Here's how we can show teachers our appreciation. Peter — This week, we celebrate Teacher Appreciation Week!

Teachers are the backbones of our communities. They prepare the next generation of students to lead successful, meaningful, and productive lives and to be valuable members of our communities.

As a former educator, assistant principal, and basketball coach, I may be biased. But I am so grateful for all of Kentucky's outstanding teachers. Still, I know that our educators struggle to get the support they deserve.

We have far too many teacher vacancies, and we rank 44th nationally for starting teacher pay. A 2022 survey found that 53% of Kentucky teachers expressed a negative sense of efficacy, well-being, and belonging at work. And the same number experienced dissatisfaction with the adequacy of school resources. **We CAN and MUST do more for our teachers.**

That's why I'm proud to stand behind Andy's “Education First Plan.” This plan would raise pay by 5% for every single school staff member, increase funding for textbooks, technology, and training, add more mental health resources for students and teachers, and fully fund universal pre-K. This is a huge and necessary investment into our education system to help every child, regardless of their zip code, reach their full potential.

To show Kentucky teachers our appreciation, it's time we support policies that invest in the teaching profession and provide them with the necessary resources to give our kids the best possible education. We can make this happen for our educators (and our kids!), but Andy needs your support to win this tough re-election race.

clean_body: Here's how we can show teachers our appreciation. Peter — This week, we celebrate Teacher Appreciation Week! Teachers are the backbones of our communities. They prepare the next generation of students to lead successful, meaningful, and productive lives and to be valuable members of our communities. As a former educator, assistant principal, and basketball coach, I may be biased. But I am so grateful for all of Kentucky's outstanding teachers. Still, I know that our educators struggle to get the support they deserve. We have far too many teacher vacancies, and we rank 44th nationally for starting teacher pay. A 2022 survey found that 53% of Kentucky teachers expressed a negative sense of efficacy, well-being, and belonging at work. And the same number experienced dissatisfaction with the adequacy of school resources. We CAN and MUST do more for our teachers. That's why I'm proud to stand behind Andy's “Education First Plan.” This plan would raise pay by 5% for every single school staff member, increase funding for textbooks, technology, and training, add more mental health resources for students and teachers, and fully fund universal pre-K. This is a huge and necessary investment into our education system to help every child, regardless of their zip code, reach their full potential. To show Kentucky teachers our appreciation, it's time we support policies that invest in the teaching profession and provide them with the necessary resources to give our kids the best possible education. We can make this happen for our educators (and our kids!), but Andy needs your support to win this tough re-election race. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = = | = | = Thank you, Lieutenant Governor Jacqueline Coleman | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign? = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

subject: We Cannot Afford Bob Ferguson as Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Support our efforts to elect a REPUBLICAN as Governor in our great state

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

name: Rep. Andy Biggs
subject: Don’t look to D.C. to reform education
body:
I'm sure you'd agree that we can't count on D.C. politicians and bureaucrats to fix our education system by throwing out the radicals in charge.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi11ltgiagl1if0b2au6i18o36esb4vojk9dummg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j61or1clh2bs)

Hello Friend,

I'm sure you'd agree that we can't count on D.C. politicians and bureaucrats to fix our education system by throwing out the radicals in charge.

I've been a Congressman since 2017, and as a member of the Freedom Caucus, I'm not ashamed to call myself a conservative. I can tell you that the Beltway Swamp will never apply the common sense steps necessary to do anything positive for our kids and our future.

But that doesn't mean we can't kick the radicals out of education. There's been tremendous success at the state level and through the courts, and one organization is leading the battle: **The Goldwater Institute**.

Through school choice, the Goldwater Institute is actively dismantling the power of teachers' unions and the U.S. Department of Education.

The Goldwater Institute is defeating Critical Race Theory (CRT) and the woke nonsense that we see in the classroom. Goldwater's legislative success created the blueprint for conservatives to tie funding to students instead of sending your tax dollars to school districts controlled by radical administrators and school boards.

[Before I tell you more about why the Goldwater Institute is so incredibly successful, I must ask for your immediate help.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbe30jhvm5ep066106dlpt05mhks8vhpdbm612ng_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j61or1clh2bs) To stay in the fight, Goldwater needs the support of Americans like you.

[Will you please donate $10, $35, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or any amount you can generously spare? Click here to support the Goldwater Institute. >>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcv1b17d8qdip62suj2k425qfol25jk29k0qqm6o_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j61or1clh2bs)

Here is what makes the Goldwater Institute different from ALL other pro-liberty organizations and why I'm asking you for support on their behalf.

The Goldwater Institute transformed Arizona into the most pro-school choice state in the country. In fact, they created Education Savings Accounts, which ensures parents can use their own tax dollars to make the right choices for their families. Now, Goldwater is applying this formula across the country, and so far, 22 states have enacted school choice legislation.

The Goldwater Institute doesn't engage in abstract theories or unreadable white papers. They focus entirely on results. Their policy research is used by legislators in every single state to pass laws that help Americans live freer, happier lives.

[Please support the Goldwater Institute with a donation of any amount today. >>

The reason Goldwater's school choice movement is so successful isn't simply because legislation is passing in legislatures... It's because they DEFEND those bills in the courts.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh7muh4uis1d98ilq8v0naie6es9kps1o52ko4uo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j61or1clh2bs)

The Goldwater Institute is prepared for the teachers' unions and their radical left-wing allies. Whenever conservatives have a victory, you can be certain the unions will sue to try to stop it. But the Goldwater Institute's team of aggressive attorneys is ready to defeat the unions every time they try to overturn the rights of parents.

Not only is the Goldwater Institute shaping legislation, but they are defending it in the courts. **Conservative victories require both legislation and litigation**. And the Goldwater Institute is the ONLY pro-liberty organization that understands this and achieves major victories in both.

Extremists are doing everything they can to destroy public education:
* Radical bureaucrats show students how to organize BLM protests.
* Administrators lower our test standards in the name of "equity."
* Woke professors label basic math as "racist."

**You and I must defeat the radicals who are hijacking our education system.**

The Goldwater Institute is leading the school choice movement, abolishing Critical Race Theory, and changing the lives of both students and parents by providing children with the best possible education.

This is the start of a new movement where conservatives are on the offensive. I am personally urging you to join.

[Please consider supporting the Goldwater Institute this month. Select any amount below to rush your support.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkmql8ump3dl17rshe0m4ibp0sa4ra82u7q37ma8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j61or1clh2bs)
[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zres9g73ev513d2ja6spqrom2t057etefp6mnvcg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j61or1clh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeofttuked5lu79dsan5dkcvgumfor4mtjcatc48_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j61or1clh2bs)
[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0vts4jlqc4ic4sulj3k87dnvjffgpubipopd69o_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j61or1clh2bs)
[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4ev5ohmc9vnm2840p316frhrv8e6qg0b5brrqgo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j61or1clh2bs)
[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcug2fchk74h23v18mkfc0q60ls4uk7ouhim0f00_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j61or1clh2bs)

Once you complete your gift, the Goldwater Institute will be in touch with you on how to stay updated.

Can I count on you to be the first new donor?

**Please consider this both a personal and urgent favor to the Goldwater Institute and me. **

For liberty,

Congressman Andy Biggs

Through school choice, the Goldwater Institute is actively dismantling the power of teachers' unions and the U.S. Department of Education. The Goldwater Institute is defeating Critical Race Theory (CRT) and the woke nonsense that we see in the classroom. Goldwater's legislative success created the blueprint for conservatives to tie funding to students instead of sending your tax dollars to school districts controlled by radical administrators and school boards. To stay in the fight, Goldwater needs the support of Americans like you. Here is what makes the Goldwater Institute different from ALL other pro-liberty organizations and why I'm asking you for support on their behalf. The Goldwater Institute transformed Arizona into the most pro-school choice state in the country. In fact, they created Education Savings Accounts, which ensures parents can use their own tax dollars to make the right choices for their families. Now, Goldwater is applying this formula across the country, and so far, 22 states have enacted school choice legislation. The Goldwater Institute doesn't engage in abstract theories or unreadable white papers. They focus entirely on results. Their policy research is used by legislators in every single state to pass laws that help Americans live freer, happier lives. The Goldwater Institute is prepared for the teachers' unions and their radical left-wing allies. Whenever conservatives have a victory, you can be certain the unions will sue to try to stop it. But the Goldwater Institute's team of aggressive attorneys is ready to defeat the unions every time they try to overturn the rights of parents. Not only is the Goldwater Institute shaping legislation, but they are defending it in the courts. Conservative victories require both legislation and litigation. And the Goldwater Institute is the ONLY pro-liberty organization that understands this and achieves major victories in both. Extremists are doing everything they can to destroy public education: Radical bureaucrats show students how to organize BLM protests. Administrators lower our test standards in the name of "equity." Woke professors label basic math as "racist." You and I must defeat the radicals who are hijacking our education system. The Goldwater Institute is leading the school choice movement, abolishing Critical Race Theory, and changing the lives of both students and parents by providing children with the best possible education. This is the start of a new movement where conservatives are on the offensive. I am personally urging you to join. Once you complete your gift, the Goldwater Institute will be in touch with you on how to stay updated. Can I count on you to be the first new donor? Please consider this both a personal and urgent favor to the Goldwater Institute and me. ** For liberty, Congressman Andy Biggs The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. Pro Life Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Nick Melvoin
subject: A $106,000 average teacher salary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63144284/405744879/2045957508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzE3YWRjM2QtMWVmMC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yQAXLJ94h6PDF9-SmMwkGY25XswRjzYb5Gdf2K1i0Tc=&emci=62966811-88ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=717adc3d-1ef0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=10481059)
---

| | It's Teacher Appreciation Week, Peter, and it's never been more necessary. I became a teacher because I wanted to be on the front lines of social change, building a better America for everyone. And I'll admit that when I walked in the door that first day, I was pretty impressed with my own idealism and work ethic. **But as I got to know my fellow teachers and got to see them in action, I realized – and I mean this in the very best way – I wasn't unique. Instead, I was awed by my colleagues' commitment and enthusiasm.** Day after day, our teachers show up for our kids. And Peter, "show up," isn't a matter of punching a clock or filling out the right forms; it's a whole-self effort academically, socially, creatively, and emotionally, as every one of our country's structural issues appears in our classrooms. Despite the challenges, **the teachers I know will give everything they have to help their students succeed.** Whether it's staying after school to provide extra help, chaperoning dances, lending a sympathetic ear, or spending their own money to buy school supplies, teachers _give_. And yet, we're seeing a nationwide campaign to discredit, dismiss, and disparage not just our teachers, but the very profession of teaching; legislatures across the country are systematically defunding schools and libraries, banning books, and undermining the judgment of educators. Let's not forget the awful truth that while extremists put our teachers in the cultural crosshairs, others are putting them in literal crosshairs. As Congress continues to stonewall meaningful gun safety legislation, our schools are sites of horrific – and preventable – violence. Teacher Appreciation Day gives us the chance to let teachers know that we see through all of the disinformation and mud-slinging, and show our appreciation for the long hours, the early mornings, the late nights, and the constant dedication to our children's education. **As a former teacher, I know how a simple "thank you" from a student or family member can make all the difference during a rough time. If you can, please take a minute to express your gratitude to the teachers who work tirelessly to make a difference in our students' lives.** This campaign is about turning that gratitude into policy – in fact, just yesterday, I voted to approve a historic contract that raises the average teacher salary to $106,000. But our work extends well beyond the LAUSD; that's why we're bringing this movement to Congress. Together, we'll lead the fight to fully fund our schools, make sure every student gets the support they need to succeed, and build a future where _every_ week is Teacher Appreciation week. In gratitude, _Nick_ |
---|---|---

| | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289
---

|

subject: Why we’re fighting Ranked-Choice Voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
Fellow Conservative, we're bringing your attention to a growing concern that is affecting our election system...

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e8da5f1f71b44ff8dae4610c4338797&_e=ek4dXghL-MjgdvaT7tISSN5_prB47n7xoY5LJGzrxO4f7xjYZJ-yv7TJeIwCLfhlUWAGWf3JLsiM52Kd13xR0_ET0TDl8AMFH3ztw-Up5EHyqTDcKSg-XKcWs3vgFaNrfnQf1Z-EHUYOzVmsZ3lWcAZ_ioPaPCci1kn0SqNa2UiG6lPgh_FmpUUYrAo6Gi6_l4jdnAjbF-8VVxTCbbAJMBYTeywnktYxxYVDqO2wueTJ5RmHWke6cXUAZDD_COS7FOGTI40VmMQkKJw7uV_a8hgmqBhyR4HYAQY5LNgGB21ki25IWzsqapw1f7XlgXnDBhDtBrKv6DIjMaKznUay1PU3EJzGVxAAylTTCnpH16fBlxPI-Puy4dsuMqi7e0Oz)
---
| | Fellow conservative, we're bringing your attention to a growing concern affecting our election system: **_ranked-choice voting_.** Ranked-choice voting is a flawed election scheme pushed by Left-wing mega-donors and political operatives seeking more influence and control over our nation's elections.
At Heritage Action, we believe it should be "easy to vote and hard to cheat."

But ranked-choice voting makes it "hard to vote and easy to cheat." In multiple states where it has been tried, ranked-choice voting has decreased voter turnout!
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e8da5f1f71b44ff8dae4610c4338797&_e=ek4dXghL-MjgdvaT7tISSN5_prB47n7xoY5LJGzrxO4f7xjYZJ-yv7TJeIwCLfhlUWAGWf3JLsiM52Kd13xR0_ET0TDl8AMFH3ztw-Up5EHyqTDcKSg-XKcWs3vgFaNrfnQf1Z-EHUYOzVmsZ3lWcAZ_ioPaPCci1kn0SqNa2UiG6lPgh_FmpUUYrAo6Gi6_l4jdnAjbF-8VVxTCbbAJMBYTeywnktYxxYVDqO2wueSIsRtiVaQPU1goRM285r7hDuc-WOKDzVF6nhdt__4gvGonRjhUsa0GmzXEWm1aU3TPhAM2YErky_VLmnLd8fwR_rPxirv4DPPpxshtAG1CMP5wYUp6NiLj_O_HX5p5WcdUf8VZF4ZHFyY1KTiElLmG)
---
Heritage Action is _already_ working in states across the country to stop this voting scheme from being implemented further. That's why I am asking you to [**join us and add your name**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e8da5f1f71b44ff8dae4610c4338797&_e=ek4dXghL-MjgdvaT7tISSN5_prB47n7xoY5LJGzrxO4f7xjYZJ-yv7TJeIwCLfhlUWAGWf3JLsiM52Kd13xR0_ET0TDl8AMFH3ztw-Up5EHyqTDcKSg-XKcWs3vgFaNrfnQf1Z-EHUYOzVmsZ3lWcAZ_ioPaPCci1kn0SqNa2UiG6lPgh_FmpUUYrAo6Gi6_l4jdnAjbF-8VVxTCbbAJMBYTeywnktYxxYVDqO2wueTqWmqpsUHaa2CaFzZ8LnErL2gFqhjDJ67JRskVRYUJGXH9Z2nuOokjjvf2X7gi5eYqM_IcKZp4jUBo8QheomH36U1skLWNA9hdvHLsUUNCNhPJG4hKEvl1lLgRj-OhirAhJrSOI2dPW1j06QNay7vr)**** to the growing list of concerned Americans who are standing up against this flawed system. Together, we can work to preserve the integrity of our elections and ensure that the voices of the people are fairly heard. [**Please add your name today to help us stop Ranked-choice voting >>>**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e8da5f1f71b44ff8dae4610c4338797&_e=ek4dXghL-MjgdvaT7tISSN5_prB47n7xoY5LJGzrxO4f7xjYZJ-yv7TJeIwCLfhlUWAGWf3JLsiM52Kd13xR0_ET0TDl8AMFH3ztw-Up5EHyqTDcKSg-XKcWs3vgFaNrfnQf1Z-EHUYOzVmsZ3lWcAZ_ioPaPCci1kn0SqNa2UiG6lPgh_FmpUUYrAo6Gi6_l4jdnAjbF-8VVxTCbbAJMBYTeywnktYxxYVDqO2wueQBWaEan0lM2cHWLGK33IaJE9ORIHKMSxgU-t-Cy8m0y1tAZFbkjni-IGjjobzWj4gzoVA-XXAgDxx3_HVbOmahuK9_DAHW4lBMxPwImXXflFUOo2OxB7_edDfr19JfkjXNZ3asvAiMtwPL2EB_TSpQ) Thank you, Jessica Anderson Executive Director | Heritage Action

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
As Speaker of the House, I need to know.

| |
---
| | | Biden renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants in his State of the Union speech - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.
As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

---
| | [OPTION 1](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjobkqjqlontli2vb5ja98qbg98o6p1fh28tfb60_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j61o72c1h2bs)

---

Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?

I know where I stand: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be _NO_ amnesty for illegal immigrants. **[Are you with me?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zii8iti42hc31tidusq52tk9hifd5vtbi12kpnr8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3j61o72c1h2bs "Are you with me?")** I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Friend, I’m *still* paying off my student loans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
And I’m one of the lucky ones. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63145392/405748696/253275352?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDIyZDY1Ni0yMGYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1rHdbR4ldnsi4n-BZF-Xi59A5MCZ1D-VI8iu_3P8k6c=)
Friend, I’ve been out of school for almost 20 years, but do you know the one piece of my education that’s stuck with me _to date?_ If your answer was **five figures worth of student loans that I’m _still_ paying off**, then _ding, ding, ding!_ You’d be correct. I know I’m not alone in this, either. _**Millions**_ of Americans are saddled with sky-high student loan payments. Under President Biden’s student debt relief plan, which would forgive up to $20,000 in student loans, working families would have a light at the end of the never-ending tunnel of payments. **But now, President Biden’s plan to tackle student loan debt is tied up in the Supreme Court, and if they rule against Biden’s plan before June 30, borrowers with remaining balances will need to start repaying the loans 60 days after the Court’s decision.** _That also means interest rates will start up again, too._ Let me be clear: No matter the Supreme Court’s ruling, I _will_ fight to give borrowers across the country federal support by eliminating federal interest rates and expanding our Pell Grant opportunities. **Receiving a higher education shouldn’t mean signing your income away _decades_ after you’ve walked the stage. [If you’re with me, add your name to demand federal support for borrowers, _regardless_ of SCOTUS’s rule:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63145393/405748697/1970220761?109963173&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDIyZDY1Ni0yMGYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1rHdbR4ldnsi4n-BZF-Xi59A5MCZ1D-VI8iu_3P8k6c=&emci=1420c197-4aef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c022d656-20f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7878003)** | [ADD MY NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63145394/405748698/1970220761?109963173&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDIyZDY1Ni0yMGYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1rHdbR4ldnsi4n-BZF-Xi59A5MCZ1D-VI8iu_3P8k6c=&emci=1420c197-4aef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c022d656-20f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7878003)
---
— Eric Swalwell

body:
Hi friend,
This past weekend we sent out our Arizona's 3rd Congressional District Community Survey.
Haven’t filled it out yet? You still can, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/csuqxP39MU29LFegTvzC2g2]
We know there are so many pressing issues facing our district and our state. Our campaign is powered by grassroots support. Hearing from you helps us better understand what is happening with everyday Arizonans like you and me and how our campaign can respond most effectively.
Let us know what issues matter most to you >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/csuqxP39MU29LFegTvzC2g2]
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Raquel Terán <info@teamteran.com>
Date: Sat, May 6, 2023 at 12:46 PM
Subject: We want to hear from you!
https://secure.ngpvan.com/csuqxP39MU29LFegTvzC2g2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/csuqxP39MU29LFegTvzC2g2]
Hi friend,
Before she was elected to the Arizona Legislature, Raquel Terán worked as an organizer for over a decade. She spent her days knocking on doors, meeting with people one-on-one, hearing their stories and, most importantly, listening to their concerns.
We know that there's no shortage of issues that need to be addressed in Washington. However, the ones that matter most to Raquel are the issues that matter most to you.
That's why we are conducting a survey of Arizona's 3rd Congressional District Community to better respond to your top priorities. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/csuqxP39MU29LFegTvzC2g2]
AZ-03 COMMUNITY SURVEY >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/csuqxP39MU29LFegTvzC2g2]
Our campaign is powered by grassroots support. Hearing from you helps us better understand what is happening on the ground, and how we can respond most effectively.
Have a few minutes to spare? Take our Community Survey >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/csuqxP39MU29LFegTvzC2g2]
A ganar,
Team Terán
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_051123_reAZ03survey&amount=25]
Raquel Terán for Congress
PO Box 1041
Glendale, AZ 85311
United States

body:
As the Republican party fights tooth and nail to dismantle our fundamental right to equal access to the ballot, it’s imperative we fight back with the same fervor.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63145789/405750133/-1382951893?refcode=BLU-SAN-20230511-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTdlOTdiMC0yMWYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eYkYW_T2t_JD_Sf-Jv3bO7BUsfspURGT1D4djSyIHXI=)

| Peter,

Republicans across the country are going after our voting rights.

_**Texas**_ \- Republicans are seeking to overturn elections in Harris County, a blue district and the third-largest county in the US.

_**North Carolina**_ \- New Republican supermajority has overturned a previous ruling barring egregious partisan gerrymandering. [_**As the Republican party fights tooth and nail to dismantle our fundamental right to equal access to the ballot, it’s imperative we fight back with the same fervor.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63145790/405750134/-1382951893?refcode=BLU-SAN-20230511-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTdlOTdiMC0yMWYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eYkYW_T2t_JD_Sf-Jv3bO7BUsfspURGT1D4djSyIHXI=)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: — MY STATEMENT —
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
##########################

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvnc9jf8cg08ucnr66tsei4dbl30bbjilpuol438_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3gm0or2c9h2bs)
---
Friend,
America is in serious trouble.
Our justice system has been HIJACKED by corrupt political forces who use their power, money, and connections to destroy anyone who stands in their way.
I have once again become the target of a disgusting witch hunt that lacks _ANY_ EVIDENCE, PROOF, or EYEWITNESSES.
**But my freedom and justice did not matter to the Marxists who orchestrated this witch hunt in a city where the voter registration of the jury pool favors Democrats 7:1.**
_This witch hunt was funded by a Democrat mega-donor who slept at Pedophile Jeffrey Epstein 's private island - with a Clinton-appointed judge presiding over the bogus trial._
Let me be as clear as humanly possible: I did NOTHING wrong.
_So, I 'll tell you what this is all about... _
Everybody has seen the polls. No one honestly believes that Joe Biden - sitting at a 36% approval rating - can beat me in a _**fair**_ election next year.
**So, the Democrats have decided that their strategy is to launch witch hunt after witch hunt to try and bleed me dry.**
But the Democrats don't understand that I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the radical Left. _There is not a single attack on the face of the planet that will break me._
...Because I know that if this left-wing cabal can slander and attack a former U.S. President, they could one day do it to a private citizen like **YOU**.
_I refuse to let that happen. I refuse to let America 's justice system completely collapse._
Together, we will win back the White House and we will SAVE AMERICA.
**[Please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA- for 1,500% impact.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsbb98qtdo3ee9m970t13no2klg780kc0e56aaag_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3gm0or2c9h2bs)**
_(But if you are doing poorly right now, please don 't even think about donating. Take care of yourself right now!)_

| | | CNN gave Donald Trump a free national stage, with an audience full of his cult members, and then was surprised when he did what he always does -- lie, insult, and be a terrible human being. Trump is a threat to our democracy, and a traitor. He shouldn't be given a platform, he should be put in prison. name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Is the Constitution “trash?!”
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vskRU8cDNc

You've likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and
politics are making outrageous statements like "The Constitution
is kind of trash."

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oskRU8cDNc

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

"The
Constitution is kind of trash."

That's
what a guest-with an Ivy League degree-said recently on a
highly-rated daytime talk show.

You've
likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and
politics are amplifying attacks on our nation's principles of
limited government and personal liberty with outrageous
statements like "The Constitution is kind of trash."

And like
that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative
that our Constitution is flawed, outdated, and incapable of
dealing with the challenges of our time.

Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution-Alexander
Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison-gave you and me the perfect
guide to understanding its timeless principles: The Federalist
Papers.

Written
between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius,
The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper
editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.

Thomas
Jefferson described them as "the best commentary on the
principles of government which ever was written."

And these
documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If
we're serious about solving the current issues in our country, we
shouldn't run from them. We should embrace them.

That's
why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course, "The
Federalist Papers," on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible
donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

"The
Federalist Papers" course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for
viewing in your home or a small group.

You might
also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal
study. Hillsdale's faculty teach the course, and it will deepen
your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even
more.

These
DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our
nation's founding principles-maybe even a friend or family
member.

But
supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of
"The Federalist Papers" on DVD today. More than 200,000 people
have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won't last
long.

You can
use this secure link to receive your copy of "The Federalist
Papers" right now:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61792656:skRU8cDNc:m:3:2532013465:573EC73456BDA8CA8EDFA228467450CC:r

Warm
regards,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

Wes Moore and Lt. Gov. Aruna Miller can keep moving Maryland forward! **The bad news: We still need 146 people to chip in by May 13 to stay on track with our fundraising goals.** If everyone reading this email pitched in, we will hit that number in NO time. **[So, I'm asking for your help. name: Team Veronica
subject: Title 42 and today’s border, explained
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
What is Title 42 and what does its expiration tonight mean for immigration and our borders?
image of ... [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/61645/images/Asylum.png]
Hi Friend,
Tonight at 11:59pm, Title 42 will expire.
What is Title 42?
Title 42 is a part of U.S. law that addresses public health, social welfare and civil rights. It allows the federal government to take emergency action in an effort to keep communicable diseases out of the country.
Truthfully, it was the Trump Administration’s best attempt to break the asylum processes and prevent any and all migrants from crossing our borders, regardless of how valid or urgent their asylum claim.
What does that mean for migrants moving forward? When Title 42 expires tonight, the Biden Administration will return to using Title 8, our nation's immigration law. Yes, that means criminal prosection and civil penalities will be enforced for unlawful crossings as will the legal protections for asylum seekers. Basically, we're back to where we were before the mass expulsions of the pandemic.
What we're seeing is a result of decades of inaction from Congress to reform our broken immigration policies. It is Congress that must pass humane immigration reform that addresses the root causes of migration, modernizes the way we process migrants, and re-evaluates pathways to citizenship that give people viable options.
While the Biden Administration is working to mitigate the arrivals at our border by opening processing centers in Central and South American countries and requiring migrants to apply for asylum in the first country in which they arrive, it's on Congress to support legislation that will address the long-term challenges with immigration.
And, as I continue to remind our nation -- seeking asylum is entirely legal. And a right protected by our Constitution . We need humane immigration reform, and I'm committed to continuing to push my colleagues on the ideas I think will provide lasting solutions.
My campaign will continue to be a source of information. If you're local and looking to help in-person or with donated goods, please see this resource guide [https://elpasomatters.org/2023/05/08/how-to-help-migrants-el-paso-texas-organizations-2/] from El Paso Matters.
Thank you for your continued support. I'll keep you updated as things develop.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/61645/images/%40mx_500%40my_300.jpg]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]

Veronica Escobar for Congress
P. O. Box 3961
El Paso, TX 79923
United States

| | | [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=914586c2b38542329a78c46d13ed0737&_e=kvjaLbo3yRQ_tJbl4TsejK3Pzg24DwDox-n2wImVChD2qYy51zVr1CSCOnliL3kC8gobnzochq01VdcpqLPz57zYfrnPlaI1FKKO4Kkg6B-iiZxjf6NxFJZPulgeQMly2lFi8EUWACCbrxw-w-kB1wbh9rE_0t7EzmRQuLHsB6RsIsTvWyyGlMcF6_8E93yi9b3rxPUOrL5CS9Wq1kufsg8crCkmVz-GuxF8wgg-tSuC8jMlO8mLx73eogiLiyUMK33GxGfa8KaEFMZR_LOkgUM849pZFLm7zkMJaqSCKFVe_a6SO0mictQxqYIasIcKRT-Gn_wEtxLI5HyZIHTV01HvvQzWrU5C_qIENvxpYl3tgWRi-O_eKkLGsZYKMPJRmoMghlE6RiskMY9KPt1k1g%3D%3D)

Friend,
The radical Left will never stop...
**In Trump Probe, Special Counsel Zooms In on Possible Criminal Charges** [Source: _Wall Street Journal_]
They will continue to viciously attack me, smear me, and even **ARREST** me despite not having committed a single crime.
The Deep State will continue this assault on _my_ freedom solely because I fight for _YOUR_ freedom...
_... Because it's not really me they're after, it's YOU - I'm just standing in the way._
When I first came down the golden escalator at Trump Tower, I denounced the Washington Swamp and put you FIRST. And together, for the first time in decades, WE created a government _of_ , _by_ , and _for_ the PEOPLE.
For that, the globalist special interests, the entrenched bureaucrats, and the Deep State have all made me their public enemy #1.
But despite the endless despicable witch hunts, not a day goes by where my resolve wavers.
**_Time and time again, I am reminded of the more than 74 MILLION American patriots who make up our incredible MAGA movement. _**
YOU are my courage, my strength, and my hope.
And with every new witch hunt they throw our way, I only grow that much more confident that we WILL win back the White House and SAVE our country in 2024!
**[Please make a contribution of ANY amount- _truly even just $1_ - to help continue to DEFEND our movement from the never-ending witch hunts - for 1,500% impact. ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=914586c2b38542329a78c46d13ed0737&_e=kvjaLbo3yRQ_tJbl4TsejK3Pzg24DwDox-n2wImVChD2qYy51zVr1CSCOnliL3kC8gobnzochq01VdcpqLPz57zYfrnPlaI1FKKO4Kkg6B-iiZxjf6NxFJZPulgeQMly2lFi8EUWACCbrxw-w-kB1wbh9rE_0t7EzmRQuLHsB6RsIsTvWyyGlMcF6_8E93yi9b3rxPUOrL5CS9Wq1kufsg8crCkmVz-GuxF8wgg-tSuC8jMlO8mLx73eogiLiyUMhp1sLMflA9YRO1bA6xR1kPhMIXEIkBJ-2MZCqKJzCw01tWK9YWUCnsU2o6-8_7bVzSHKOhtzxYwDduPSjeVSEeNIa9lW8LFgzLr_-C2oFJSwiXKNh5-M3nXln2-R2nvNjaFUPyQEbw872w-JFggIwA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: The witch hunts truly will never end... and that is why we MUST win. | | | Friend, The radical Left will never stop... In Trump Probe, Special Counsel Zooms In on Possible Criminal Charges [Source: Wall Street Journal] They will continue to viciously attack me, smear me, and even ARREST me despite not having committed a single crime. The Deep State will continue this assault on my freedom solely because I fight for YOUR freedom... ... Because it's not really me they're after, it's YOU - I'm just standing in the way. When I first came down the golden escalator at Trump Tower, I denounced the Washington Swamp and put you FIRST. And together, for the first time in decades, WE created a government of , by , and for the PEOPLE. For that, the globalist special interests, the entrenched bureaucrats, and the Deep State have all made me their public enemy #1. But despite the endless despicable witch hunts, not a day goes by where my resolve wavers. Time and time again, I am reminded of the more than 74 MILLION American patriots who make up our incredible MAGA movement. YOU are my courage, my strength, and my hope. And with every new witch hunt they throw our way, I only grow that much more confident that we WILL win back the White House and SAVE our country in 2024! Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. | Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson, and I'm writing to you today because your name is on my list of Americans who **[cherish our nation's guiding values of life, liberty, community, and faith.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpl5rh7077v5kj6fpke9h02a22dbkvpnmqc7nbeg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3gm8pb6c5h2bs)**

Have you ever stopped to think about how charitable giving is a brilliant reflection of freedom? **[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znfnr8893dcres5lbs8mb2ti40bbo52edfke4npg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3gm8pb6c5h2bs)** It's a way for every American to use our hard-earned money to freely support the causes we care most about.

This is democracy in action: **[because every dollar you give is a vote for the future you want to see.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfr7gga5co6ed5dlab753b2v9i9qnq1fvflc4amg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3gm8pb6c5h2bs)**

I'd like to personally invite you to join me in advancing common-sense solutions to our nation's toughest challenges by **[making a generous gift of whatever your budget allows.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zib7fti3qji5sto782thp4muveq3rv2ba36uk808_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3gm8pb6c5h2bs)**

Your investment will allow the American Cornerstone Institute to engage in independent research, grassroots outreach, and collaboration with conservative leaders to set forth a better path forward for our country, **[safeguarding freedom for you and your family in the coming years.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znac00eaeqsmvblk6g3l3jfc9qcbecq0ae8ng9c0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3gm8pb6c5h2bs)**

Will you join me? If so, you can support these efforts by clicking the link below:

**[https://secure.americancornerstone.org/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3moclvvo6l5rstlgf48qc0a8hgqqmv2c7sc1uko_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3gm8pb6c5h2bs)**

Where the Left wants bigger government, we'll fight for limited government and self-determination.

America is the greatest country that has ever existed. Please help me do everything possible to make sure it stays that way.

Thank you for your support,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

P.S. I know these are uncertain times. But no gift is too small. And every dollar you give today will have a long-term impact on restoring our nation's founding values. **[Click here to give whatever you can today»](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhq6327olaps5974j9an4aal4c791fvcn26i8ui0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c3gm8pb6c5h2bs)**

name: Young Democrats of America
subject: YDA Condemn Blatant Disenfranchisement of Young People by the Alabama Democratic Party, Remain in Solidarity with Abolished Disability and LGBTQ+ Caucuses
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zZDxta_rmckKERplAGsr51uf9sCfvvDwOuoWGVoe3eh51iP3z2qebssiUH-ipnONmCuPoW-b7LPpdLJWfAW2eOGCOfYlkazuBTP9E8qMi38kFqHUEN5cWsEj_D8PR4PMng7f3XiEy7iyyaJSV8AZAqg31-wifd2LEVffCyY5H3NurSERT7lYuebsnRz1gMotOVPERuvUOGuV8gW_N3XhtnY3ObFIJhmZ-TjH-dKeX8CmPWKWuIkneTc3BGneGBU2fLs875IZ0_XSEzuTFRTqLl4svECwyiiX8UbCwpPWC-LmOohpcMdOqN3vyxiV9j7h_i44GJ8beyDUhRdzgnKFSNof16_PW6dNIQbRhNBm_mzxRYS77Ztb2PXirql7EpE8FQ-l2V3PKDFCqlO-j95KPrjlB6tcQN-Z2Gz47RBmby1rffaHqfSukSkt0leUf50BILqXUm7eO7gjaWVJuvFOZETxo7zNk4RZYFsdSZ5Us6Ew/3w3/_zE3XrJEQW2EuVZezcwbNA/h0/QBXjfXrJwe8aYNpBL8YrR-OsnFKRX7FdXWQm-mQLB38)
---
On Saturday, May 6th, the Alabama Democratic Party abolished the three DNC-mandated constituency caucuses which afford young democrats, disabled democrats, and LGBTQ+ democrats automatic representation on the ADP Executive Committee, the ADP’s principal decision-making body. Many members of the affected constituencies were prevented from voting to preserve their caucus because of a surprise $50 fee levied against committee members in order to vote; not everyone was notified of the fee, and payment at the door was not accepted. Even after suppressing duly-elected committee members’ right to vote, the standing vote to abolish the caucuses failed—but the chair ruled that it had passed and refused to allow a roll call vote to confirm the results. **** The Young Democrats of America are unafraid to call this what it is: corrupt. As Democrats across America are fighting to preserve and expand voting rights for all people, the leaders of the Alabama Democratic Party have brought back the poll tax. When the poll tax didn’t work, they lied. When members demanded accountability, they were denied. Not only was Saturday’s meeting a mockery of democratic process, it showed who the leadership of the Alabama Democratic Party is willing to cast aside for political gain. Our success as a party will not come at the expense of the young, the disabled, and the queer. Our diversity is our strength. We find our victory at the crossroads of our diverse, multiracial, and multigenerational coalition. The Young Democrats of America are appalled at the blatant disenfranchisement of the young people of the Alabama Democratic Party and stand in solidarity with abolished disability and LGBTQ+ caucuses. We urge the DNC to take swift action to address the events which transpired on May 6th, and also to address the pattern of anti-democratic behaviors of the Alabama Democratic Party. YDA has opened a petition to support the young Democrats, the disabled Democrats, and LGBTQ+ Democrats and to call on the DNC to do the same. [Add you name now to show your support](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk-RGBZ2FoaVMr2JutHhjozLSKe_ebkAvKWIbWOcYJoSxO82Fj1S6ibPS94oUHvHKGQ2DT8owt3ftI0wlyTzTB35tU5_yPT6X6T3ZPSgRe7uxyEdxDiG4v0UXqxViH8iXpP4K0K44Zx1lfwrRxrkzq-51-8mID61sn53vlD8nz81C_16kuaAZ5XT0p016kN_Z5qCpZ0KwSKQovIMH2z7xMpCWrbJ6pQa27LmY-hPjz5RPoYC5_5f742hG_fv4QdVqM9Jzys1IlG1Uj_T6JjEfJJp8wIeUFYVJjQlljYHT13ewnLnGQt7_ZvBFVzzqI6_R9hr73Ys1GxiMJUUNhSC3ZcuqXK86P-wAAGMNLR-4fLfRqb8UyOI9zDFzH7sjllOa8/3w3/_zE3XrJEQW2EuVZezcwbNA/h1/PSLz70VSHjD9kDSpF_xDIaBCl5tUOyyPTGJP_UXzdEk).

clean_body: | | On Saturday, May 6th, the Alabama Democratic Party abolished the three DNC-mandated constituency caucuses which afford young democrats, disabled democrats, and LGBTQ+ democrats automatic representation on the ADP Executive Committee, the ADP’s principal decision-making body. Many members of the affected constituencies were prevented from voting to preserve their caucus because of a surprise $50 fee levied against committee members in order to vote; not everyone was notified of the fee, and payment at the door was not accepted. Even after suppressing duly-elected committee members’ right to vote, the standing vote to abolish the caucuses failed—but the chair ruled that it had passed and refused to allow a roll call vote to confirm the results. ** The Young Democrats of America are unafraid to call this what it is: corrupt. As Democrats across America are fighting to preserve and expand voting rights for all people, the leaders of the Alabama Democratic Party have brought back the poll tax. When the poll tax didn’t work, they lied. When members demanded accountability, they were denied. Not only was Saturday’s meeting a mockery of democratic process, it showed who the leadership of the Alabama Democratic Party is willing to cast aside for political gain. Our success as a party will not come at the expense of the young, the disabled, and the queer. Our diversity is our strength. We find our victory at the crossroads of our diverse, multiracial, and multigenerational coalition. The Young Democrats of America are appalled at the blatant disenfranchisement of the young people of the Alabama Democratic Party and stand in solidarity with abolished disability and LGBTQ+ caucuses. We urge the DNC to take swift action to address the events which transpired on May 6th, and also to address the pattern of anti-democratic behaviors of the Alabama Democratic Party. YDA has opened a petition to support the young Democrats, the disabled Democrats, and LGBTQ+ Democrats and to call on the DNC to do the same. . | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To help us mobilize the next generation of Democrats,** | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Young Democrats of America, please .

Let me explain why:

It's no secret that campaigns can be _expensive_ \-- especially if you're running for Congress in the Los Angeles media market, the second priciest in the country.

It's not uncommon to see Democratic candidates resort to taking big checks from corporate PACs to keep up. Some are even forced to indefinitely pause their legislative work to spend hours making calls to wealthy donors.

**I'm doing things a bit differently.** For starters, I'm not slowing down on my work in Sacramento. Issues like combating climate change, building more affordable housing, and protecting consumers from being gouged by big corporations like Ticketmaster are too important.

Second, I believe if we want to reign in the influence of big money in Washington, we can't rely on their cash. So, I’m rejecting all corporate PAC support.

A single donation of $3 might sound like a drop in the bucket compared to millions from a super PAC. But when you chip in, someone else reading this email might decide to as well. These contributions can really add up in a big way.

**[So I'm asking: Will you please send in a donation to help power our campaign in CA-30?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63146953/405753339/62647395?refcode=em-5.11.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWJhNWM3N2EtMjRmMC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZwlMZRb6ES_EFaUinvDR6KfLmt2Lod51W950YjJhZ9Y=)**

body:

Peter,

Last month, Tammy officially launched her reelection campaign, and since
then, our team has been working hard to kick off the campaign in the
strongest position possible so we can send her back to the Senate.

Tammy is hitting the road in Wisconsin to meet voters from across the
state — but even if she can’t meet you in person, she wants to get in
touch with some of her strongest supporters to say thanks!

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23call.SUmzmZ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230511_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=277%2E35263%2EcXQCPz ]Peter, if you
chip in before Friday night, you'll be automatically entered for a chance
to receive a call from Tammy thanking you for your continued support. So
please, pitch in to help us in the early stages of our reelection
campaign, and Tammy might just give you a call!

donation will go through immediately:

When you donate to our campaign, you’re saying you are part of a movement
for progress and are committed to fighting alongside Tammy as she works to
restore abortion rights, protect access to the ballot box, lower costs for
working families, and more.

You’re saying you want a leader who will take on the tough fights and

away.

You’re saying you want Tammy to keep up her work in the Senate, ensuring

You are at the heart of everything Tammy and our team have accomplished so
far. Tammy is so appreciative of your support, and she’ll be calling a few
supporters in the coming weeks to say thank you.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23call.SUmzmZ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230511_PM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=277%2E35263%2EcXQCPz ]So please, if you can, make a contribution to support our campaign
today, and Tammy could give you a phone call to show her gratitude!

Thank you for your support, and be sure to keep an eye on your phone!

— Team Baldwin

name: Jim Jordan
subject: My 2024 presidential endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
No president in my lifetime has demonstrated Trump’s willingness to keep their word and get things done. And he did it with everyone in Washington against him.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=ca9bbd835c3444afa071d4b8db259a9e&_t=4ePLGe1I7Om_nAwCGrlmwdL2rmzrKvH-yMsPH9I6Bcmfsru2yg6dne5bBEFboBDERh3fgjcrHBlzl-F8yywPour_w0HtNGFEw5S7qYWf5FI%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=ca9bbd835c3444afa071d4b8db259a9e&_t=4ePLGe1I7Om_nAwCGrlmwdL2rmzrKvH-yMsPH9I6Bcmfsru2yg6dne5bBEFboBDERh3fgjcrHBlzl-F8yywPour_w0HtNGFEw5S7qYWf5FI%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ca9bbd835c3444afa071d4b8db259a9e&_e=nIqraIp3fN8k6B3g8TsV087AoEbXJDR229f1mzt5ESfa4wgrsjlZHGDGeCJaC3QsBz6EkDRmaPo9gn3mL5PONHWUVMMGZQirfJFKEwO29oclojSLrp0eU2CBv_jQTLvpaEZ7afnmLcF5bliL5adu2QRtzlw3QyyDshtFY-Bv514T1JHUezrBqXvp6a2DYKw2rktDBtudI_RaM51NoNGVg8PyM9YyBOa2YJ9WZo1i9lveFRp7Mhozj5cjZ9DxrIUJd5O84bw0D4_Wx13g31Fseip6XUqC7yBSmTc64MyhDVpkCFNNVCR4O1d23tNdCW5nuy5_SudoR1i4zADTktPQgK86TAZBQY19_IYMPmkZJ28Op_fXI7QCjwqpxnFsJVzoemlSDIWMTCjHUJ0BxSE32YQPyzVEAK8CQyy0fIt5x1eysBhUOPHWp2DZCFu_4pUtE7Yby1QYVygygjEeo5IhMh8tIe7bb8V1-iP6oAv0MPR0IXm7wUF5gCdJ_LpTm9uY)
|

Fellow American,

Things were better under President Trump. **They just were.**

Our economy was stronger. Gas was cheaper. Our neighborhoods were safer. Our border was more secure. The list goes on and on.

Perhaps most importantly, America was more respected in the world because we had a leader who projected courage and strength.

**Under President Biden’s weak leadership, everything has tanked in the past two years. Gas prices. The economy. The culture. Everything.**

Our Republican majority in the House is busy getting things back on track, but to truly save our great country, we need to win back the White House.

I know and like each of the Republican presidential candidates, **but I want you to know that I am 100% behind Donald Trump in 2024.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ca9bbd835c3444afa071d4b8db259a9e&_e=nIqraIp3fN8k6B3g8TsV087AoEbXJDR229f1mzt5ESfa4wgrsjlZHGDGeCJaC3QsBz6EkDRmaPo9gn3mL5PONHWUVMMGZQirfJFKEwO29oclojSLrp0eU2CBv_jQTLvpaEZ7afnmLcF5bliL5adu2QRtzlw3QyyDshtFY-Bv514T1JHUezrBqXvp6a2DYKw2rktDBtudI_RaM51NoNGVg8PyM9YyBOa2YJ9WZo1i9lveFRp7Mhozj5cjZ9DxrIUJd5O84bw0D4_Wx13g31Fseip6XUqC7yBSmTc64MyhDVpkCFNNVCR4O1d23tNdCW5nuy5_SudoR1i4zADTktPQgK86TAZBQY19_IYMPmkZJ2_NOVZ-dTYLMowWJGc2fsByhUwlchbqtp44sVhvvWUm17iuR6wNHiflq8CKqHuCzgyJa3r-F8z9zWXDCY0yJNH4ANoniPb-2fmMrB6Uw7Bl8ysr7WURyG5W8T_17f3LEbQXJntIG3pjvUP9b-lHjz_n)
No president in my lifetime has demonstrated Trump’s willingness to keep their word and get things done. And he did it with **everyone** in Washington against him.

**It’s quite clear that the swamp will stop at nothing to scuttle Trump’s candidacy.** They started their relentless attack before he was even a candidate, and they will NEVER stop. The reason? It’s because Trump doesn’t need them. He’s a self-made man who loves this country and is willing to stand up for ordinary citizens against the corruption in Washington.

That’s why no one, and I mean NO ONE scares the radical left more than Donald Trump.

**I’m 100% in![Please let me know what you think by clicking the link!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ca9bbd835c3444afa071d4b8db259a9e&_e=nIqraIp3fN8k6B3g8TsV087AoEbXJDR229f1mzt5ESfa4wgrsjlZHGDGeCJaC3QsBz6EkDRmaPo9gn3mL5PONHWUVMMGZQirfJFKEwO29oclojSLrp0eU2CBv_jQTLvpaEZ7afnmLcF5bliL5adu2QRtzlw3QyyDshtFY-Bv514T1JHUezrBqXvp6a2DYKw2rktDBtudI_RaM51NoNGVg8PyM9YyBOa2YJ9WZo1i9lveFRp7Mhozj5cjZ9DxrIUJd5O84bw0D4_Wx13g31Fseip6XUqC7yBSmTc64MyhDVpkCFNNVCR4O1d23tNdCW5nuy5_SudoR1i4zADTktPQgK86TAZBQY19_IYMPmkZJ28P7u3s72hQQt5YFYvVF7-s3dYQZfulNWMetlPKcFkxqCK2eAriziWFhN1_X1izF6n8mvQeuRlAYwYbgczY_mw5Cf1z6AehxiVdkNd0wLDoHWhVoJPcKm8pNQHlvDaIusVt02t6WOddeh6pYZbCmYXR) **

God Bless,
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ca9bbd835c3444afa071d4b8db259a9e&_e=nIqraIp3fN8k6B3g8TsV087AoEbXJDR229f1mzt5ESfa4wgrsjlZHGDGeCJaC3QsBz6EkDRmaPo9gn3mL5PONHWUVMMGZQirfJFKEwO29oclojSLrp0eU2CBv_jQTLvpaEZ7afnmLcF5bliL5adu2QRtzlw3QyyDshtFY-Bv514T1JHUezrBqXvp6a2DYKw2rktDBtudI_RaM51NoNGVg8PyM9YyBOa2YJ9WZo1i9lveFRp7Mhozj5cjZ9DxrIUJd5O84bw0D4_Wx13g31Fseip6XUqC7yBSmTc64MyhDVpkCFNNVCR4O1d23tNdCW5nuy5_SudoR1i4zADTktPQgK86TAZBQY19_IYMPmkZJ2_C3AM_rfkMTb8eyrPi_yVdtbF8SGyqbZrp_kGPjVQsZ0nx2ZY66fSKEkUF2J1RxrJHSZmLf6jGvNw6diaAwJ2n8keTvnq6lnXIH0SNxGi7MmVUH0eXq1ohH_d21b-vaFf4NSCsKw9eiedG8N-nHYV4)
Jim Jordan

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ca9bbd835c3444afa071d4b8db259a9e&_e=nIqraIp3fN8k6B3g8TsV0ylkCAWXaWR3iMI-mfkdhCSpGqEtKKe_3KxhhJ0SGJyw_wEM6qmrFe8CUCL6dtK0wQuWjDjBkGsrfTEtKVpQ5uY2NMz44UHZxeAH73RNqhXD-Ikj26uchQkeamBErgcJDuRZ2QFIxgq1ulGCZux3T-j4OzfbyjyPFfdYeTLLMZXzDItH_KFyxgw7rVArxFHfyQ%3D%3D)
