**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ca9bbd835c3444afa071d4b8db259a9e&_e=nIqraIp3fN8k6B3g8TsV087AoEbXJDR229f1mzt5ESfa4wgrsjlZHGDGeCJaC3QsBz6EkDRmaPo9gn3mL5PONHWUVMMGZQirfJFKEwO29oclojSLrp0eU2CBv_jQTLvpaEZ7afnmLcF5bliL5adu2QRtzlw3QyyDshtFY-Bv514T1JHUezrBqXvp6a2DYKw2rktDBtudI_RaM51NoNGVg8PyM9YyBOa2YJ9WZo1i9lveFRp7Mhozj5cjZ9DxrIUJd5O84bw0D4_Wx13g31Fseip6XUqC7yBSmTc64MyhDVpkCFNNVCR4O1d23tNdCW5nuy5_SudoR1i4zADTktPQgK86TAZBQY19_IYMPmkZJ2_QbcR03hpk6_QXR9dG8AFahiqm_-8nGC9ucOYrcYo6V5c5UKZRGpTXiMKBaXk1kkLqA2VLLvQMX5Iv3G7n3IAYY_MX6rpkhlWrVevMGUBQU9mEEncjcX8qEbH3kA0poIXcvBYRqL_A0vYrsK4Qk5ol)

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Trump on CNN
body:
At Courier Newsroom, we aren’t driven by profit or clicks — we’re driven by the truth.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=974%2E120351%2E_fKRXD)
**Peter, last night Trump was on CNN. It was a disaster.**
The network hosted a town hall for the disgraced former President in New Hampshire, where Republican and undecided voters got to ask questions.
Trump’s answers were riddled with misinformation, as he made false claims about voter fraud, the January 6th Capitol insurrection, the 2020 election results, and more. And though the moderator tried to rein Trump in, **his bad information reached countless viewers — generating profits and clicks for CNN.**
At Courier Newsroom, that’s not what drives us — **we’re driven by the truth.**
[**As the 2024 cycle kicks into high gear, our reporters are working hard to hold the mainstream media, and bad actors like Donald Trump, accountable. Our honest, accessible journalism is powered by grassroots donations from folks like you, so can we count on you to chip in $5 now?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3708?refcode=em-20230511&t=2&akid=974%2E120351%2E_fKRXD)
In 2016, it was mainstream media networks like CNN that helped legitimize Trump and his candidacy by giving him sensational, wall-to-wall coverage to drive ratings and profits — all while Trump berated them as ‘fake news.’
**Last night’s town hall shows the mainstream media is willing to put ads revenue and ratings ahead of what’s best for our democracy.**
[**Our reporters are ready to pick up their slack, call Trump out, and ensure Americans know the truth about him and his campaign. But for us to do that, we need the resources to spread our news stories far and wide. Will you chip in $5 now to power our work?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3708?refcode=em-20230511&t=3&akid=974%2E120351%2E_fKRXD)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3708?refcode=em-20230511&t=4&akid=974%2E120351%2E_fKRXD)**
Thanks for sticking with us,
Everyone at Courier Newsroom
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=974_120351__fKRXD&akid=974%2E120351%2E_fKRXD)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)

subject: Will you please pitch in today to support my re-election and make these plans possible?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Right now we have a system that holds millions of struggling student loan borrowers in limbo while also ensuring billion-dollar crypto firms wouldn’t lose a dime in deposits. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63164941/405796413/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ13R_EGR_E_20230511_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmZhODE0Mi00N2YwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ggb5G2d9ckxb4xffsgj4wUmq59ivpCHvVT_Yi_IhsGo=&emci=77fa8142-47f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7ffa8142-47f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
Throughout my time in Washington, I’ve learned that when you start talking about policies that help working people instead of wealthy people or big corporations, plenty of critics will be quick to tell you what you can’t do and what’s not possible. It’s like clockwork. Take student loan cancelation for example. Cynics said we could never put our government on the side of working-class and middle-class people and get something like that accomplished. But we got organized, we got in the fight, and we got this policy to the president’s desk. I’ll stay in the fight to get student debt cancelation over the finish line. Because that’s a case where we still see how the rules work differently for different groups of people: Right now we have a system that holds millions of struggling student loan borrowers in limbo, but that same system worked overnight to ensure that big banks and billion-dollar crypto firms wouldn’t lose a dime in deposits during recent bank failures. **The difference between these two scenarios? The willingness to fight for them.** I’m running for re-election to continue to use my voice to advocate for big, structural changes that help working people. Changes like canceling student debt, taxing the rich, reining in big banks, and making child care affordable. **But I need you by my side in this fight.** [_**A contribution of $3 or anything you can will power my re-election campaign and help show the naysayers that these plans have strong support in your area and across the country. Will you please pitch in today to support my re-election and make these plans possible?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63164942/405796414/-551446403?amount=3&refcode=EMZ13R_EGR_E_20230511_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmZhODE0Mi00N2YwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ggb5G2d9ckxb4xffsgj4wUmq59ivpCHvVT_Yi_IhsGo=) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

BREAKING news, Peter: The _SHIELD Act_ was just passed out of committee by a bipartisan, unanimous vote. The _SHIELD Act_ would**FINALLY** make image-based sexual abuse, including so-called “revenge porn,” a federal crime. It’s just common sense. This is an issue very personal to me, and it has been one of my number one legislative priorities since stepping away from Congress. Now, we’re closer than ever before to seeing this bill signed into law. [_**It’s critical that we build on this momentum and push the entire Senate to approve the _SHIELD Act_ while we have their attention. clean_body: | = BREAKING news, Peter: The SHIELD Act was just passed out of committee by a bipartisan, unanimous vote. The SHIELD Act wouldFINALLY make image-based sexual abuse, including so-called “revenge porn,” a federal crime. It’s just common sense. This is an issue very personal to me, and it has been one of my number one legislative priorities since stepping away from Congress. Now, we’re closer than ever before to seeing this bill signed into law. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for all your support over the years. name: Hung Cao
subject: I’m not asking for money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unleash America PAC
body:
| | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=03b0aa98ea4f4564a34fe260694603bf&_e=PWcDsdXKOLFziIQ7hYawKqNk-x4rECSJ5DWIbaQ5UiRi_s-uT3gDWyko4Op62CIGi3F1nLkwk01sy8kvVEpyTn8UWo2YDXTj4lR6hu6K7wgcTQdZRijz4luyBZNrRy7w8iT2D0Zju6V4clE98r2LADEDZHjco3JyrNPLAPQ7_Rc6YVSaoHlx_byssjLzyuV5qoZLanpiyAP_lwCF0uuEx2S4TfZJvGEtCHTI2B0yz1EWQXHJTAkvSeNfchbXkfMIebJs5LVt_j3UL6zNhKBVcBd8eNkMV11kruP02FmqCL99vZuLGNhQ9FT9MFFtoFG7aV79tb-vgUMCebnt_NGn9FsaK49lH4_jGjMusS3bkONKjkKSs1jE9AEosuf__uNiX460-vWTN1uABE5Je-a6-g%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American, You may not know me, but my name is Hung Cao.
I’m a legal immigrant from Communist Vietnam, a 25-year special operations Navy Veterans and a father of five.
I know you get a lot of emails asking for money, but today, I’m not going to do that - **I’m only asking for you to sign onto our vision for America.**
You see, I was born in a country where people were executed for trying to fight for the freedoms too many of us take for granted.
After my father was put on a kill list for speaking out against the Communist Party, we were able to legally come to America, where my parents worked hard to build a life for us.
I came here at four years old not knowing a word of English. But by the time I was 18, I was a cadet in the Naval Academy preparing to serve my country.
_But after 25 years of service in Naval Special Operations, I knew I had to take my fight for America to a new arena._
Watching the Left try to erase the American Dream I owe my life to makes me absolutely sick, Fellow American. With their socialist agenda, they’re trying to slowly erode the freedoms my family came to this country for years ago.
**I won’t stand for it.**
I know you get a ton of emails, but today, I’m asking you one simple question: [**will you sign on to our mission to UNLEASH American potential and defend the American Dream?**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=03b0aa98ea4f4564a34fe260694603bf&_e=PWcDsdXKOLFziIQ7hYawKqNk-x4rECSJ5DWIbaQ5UiRi_s-uT3gDWyko4Op62CIGi3F1nLkwk01sy8kvVEpyTn8UWo2YDXTj4lR6hu6K7wgcTQdZRijz4luyBZNrRy7w8iT2D0Zju6V4clE98r2LADEDZHjco3JyrNPLAPQ7_Rc6YVSaoHlx_byssjLzyuV5qoZLanpiyAP_lwCF0uuEx2S4TfZJvGEtCHTI2B0yz1EWQXHJTAkvSeNfchbXkfMI9sqNanjBsfVLRtFEIUDMT17fUNNRgvS5NogYSV2ebGKA_dtfINoFdcnNWkvj79vfKRrdmxSHuTDrJwYlun0I-YJyOIsirGSbEysNqERI4TAzGoPmzYUUxRjzHYc7tDQgt5cJ3LT9dKE8HqMSdK4t5g%3D%3D)
---
[**JOIN OUR TEAM - ADD YOUR NAME**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=03b0aa98ea4f4564a34fe260694603bf&_e=PWcDsdXKOLFziIQ7hYawKqNk-x4rECSJ5DWIbaQ5UiRi_s-uT3gDWyko4Op62CIGi3F1nLkwk01sy8kvVEpyTn8UWo2YDXTj4lR6hu6K7wgcTQdZRijz4luyBZNrRy7w8iT2D0Zju6V4clE98r2LADEDZHjco3JyrNPLAPQ7_Rc6YVSaoHlx_byssjLzyuV5qoZLanpiyAP_lwCF0uuEx2S4TfZJvGEtCHTI2B0yz1EWQXHJTAkvSeNfchbXkfMIvOkrhIntLk4QrhKAEok1gMYxOvnlmPJMjikptuWUhEI8uUft5rN8fOQsaU65Iur8SL1kzgwn4dtr2jUreIaPRYpJi20AL-kmthDgsQhW-n7UJ62Eq998v_Lpsc_KQQIVpzFnq2eUDjvV3anTT8fyZw%3D%3D)
---
With you fighting alongside me, I know we can defeat the socialist Left and DEFEND the American Dream. In Liberty,

CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET)
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Will you help me restore America’s guiding values?
body:
I'm writing to you today because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish our nation's guiding values of life, liberty, community, and faith.

|
---
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3f01efb1951a4ccab5a5cf658097c97e&_e=bW-sbuskSrGYjpYLP4tHx1y5y4NgN-JH7VyP9MmA6SpUXRLrvlIwMvje67xGFaP8XGLYQmxigBIBuexa-hWRP_nSnrBXi1xWWJVHQy0825GwqjbbuNIwVyBnYcQAzW8KskUJtcKQvnayFotonKkz4rAMdhLyWaLn6fTsjUjSiR8F8KBK2TYnPolcNbEdOzn_cqgTuFhias5L-8s2-ZV9JpUfxL0voQlogmFKIfYdRVFAkCgqDCSrgoOYi-yk09RV2Xnh3gAYN3LdRKhKNsCXuXeZMcJyS8eN7grfdL2TWrr_sC4rwEX02ywgko6Sh1sLN8exZgzrkyeMya8oGvEQuoARvez-tNgOOL8OWGcbDzxZrQGtN5riPm8RQUd7aZiHZ54_kjvKAab3gjbFRh_8bQ%3D%3D)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson, and I'm writing to you today because your name is on my list of Americans who **[cherish our nation's guiding values of life, liberty, community, and faith.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3f01efb1951a4ccab5a5cf658097c97e&_e=bW-sbuskSrGYjpYLP4tHx1y5y4NgN-JH7VyP9MmA6SpUXRLrvlIwMvje67xGFaP8XGLYQmxigBIBuexa-hWRP_nSnrBXi1xWWJVHQy0825GwqjbbuNIwVyBnYcQAzW8KskUJtcKQvnayFotonKkz4rAMdhLyWaLn6fTsjUjSiR8F8KBK2TYnPolcNbEdOzn_cqgTuFhias5L-8s2-ZV9JpUfxL0voQlogmFKIfYdRVFAkCgqDCSrgoOYi-yk09RVk161gG9kercYw_--hgP1gKUt07AtH7dZF6g04ds1r9efm2u4Ln-tzUyooDA7DrhiCiOr0Ys8YNehmxh7goQT3BLLLplD2Dlo7CV4xS5ehTQJrIq6WHqPLiO2QIRSj7GXqS33Uxil2uG81wDLedAXHA%3D%3D)**

Have you ever stopped to think about how charitable giving is a brilliant reflection of freedom? **[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3f01efb1951a4ccab5a5cf658097c97e&_e=bW-sbuskSrGYjpYLP4tHx1y5y4NgN-JH7VyP9MmA6SpUXRLrvlIwMvje67xGFaP8XGLYQmxigBIBuexa-hWRP_nSnrBXi1xWWJVHQy0825GwqjbbuNIwVyBnYcQAzW8KskUJtcKQvnayFotonKkz4rAMdhLyWaLn6fTsjUjSiR8F8KBK2TYnPolcNbEdOzn_cqgTuFhias5L-8s2-ZV9JpUfxL0voQlogmFKIfYdRVFAkCgqDCSrgoOYi-yk09RVSu5L-k6n4hOWm6faogPprZ4BG10xgfe7Jaf8rg4jtT3q4D4UN46GAyyqO1LYNfSAmdT0TSTGONC7T9TwtDozVbE2y_VYIEvRa3M33j-Thm_fkiUhb7z76K5_ykseFDfz56hUEC9six54p63QmHZ_NA%3D%3D)** It's a way for every American to use our hard-earned money to freely support the causes we care most about.

This is democracy in action: **[because every dollar you give is a vote for the future you want to see.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3f01efb1951a4ccab5a5cf658097c97e&_e=bW-sbuskSrGYjpYLP4tHx1y5y4NgN-JH7VyP9MmA6SpUXRLrvlIwMvje67xGFaP8XGLYQmxigBIBuexa-hWRP_nSnrBXi1xWWJVHQy0825GwqjbbuNIwVyBnYcQAzW8KskUJtcKQvnayFotonKkz4rAMdhLyWaLn6fTsjUjSiR8F8KBK2TYnPolcNbEdOzn_cqgTuFhias5L-8s2-ZV9JpUfxL0voQlogmFKIfYdRVFAkCgqDCSrgoOYi-yk09RV13LDKaRF3cYf1xg8bpke5HvrZczmR_0El5O28NBUCb1neJf_lvnCNeionM5dytZgdJniCQ4sQgauig4lU3uu-TPFJMHQELVeDY2PnLjJfTtv56MGDqvyRvTm6C85M1V1b5O20cGyUmRXZLt5bFtxOA%3D%3D)**

I'd like to personally invite you to join me in advancing common-sense solutions to our nation's toughest challenges by **[making a generous gift of whatever your budget allows.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3f01efb1951a4ccab5a5cf658097c97e&_e=bW-sbuskSrGYjpYLP4tHx1y5y4NgN-JH7VyP9MmA6SpUXRLrvlIwMvje67xGFaP8XGLYQmxigBIBuexa-hWRP_nSnrBXi1xWWJVHQy0825GwqjbbuNIwVyBnYcQAzW8KskUJtcKQvnayFotonKkz4rAMdhLyWaLn6fTsjUjSiR8F8KBK2TYnPolcNbEdOzn_cqgTuFhias5L-8s2-ZV9JpUfxL0voQlogmFKIfYdRVFAkCgqDCSrgoOYi-yk09RVxzz9W9jo8KH02qaIu5HjMF30VnSUCLKR-LfjioA9ZgsH489tRiPEr2h-esBYeYXXlJ9oK7DI9M3t-M3EDK9e2szMLAuzscYOpkvzDs0Fl9DFT-z8gQrQx2s6nCOdvyps0Y1_gSQTM4TalyQ6xa6EIA%3D%3D)**

Your investment will allow the American Cornerstone Institute to engage in independent research, grassroots outreach, and collaboration with conservative leaders to set forth a better path forward for our country, **[safeguarding freedom for you and your family in the coming years.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3f01efb1951a4ccab5a5cf658097c97e&_e=bW-sbuskSrGYjpYLP4tHx1y5y4NgN-JH7VyP9MmA6SpUXRLrvlIwMvje67xGFaP8XGLYQmxigBIBuexa-hWRP_nSnrBXi1xWWJVHQy0825GwqjbbuNIwVyBnYcQAzW8KskUJtcKQvnayFotonKkz4rAMdhLyWaLn6fTsjUjSiR8F8KBK2TYnPolcNbEdOzn_cqgTuFhias5L-8s2-ZV9JpUfxL0voQlogmFKIfYdRVFAkCgqDCSrgoOYi-yk09RVKVky2xJly67VpuutOCn8Kqugia25Tjq8y3moZNMLoaoYoWal9i3Rg4RBSj75AfDLPN8YnqU4A84nMGqV50z-ImxrOHPZ1AVMg6HHgl93Pvm3JaRnUzRyA6UrXcIKm-5itR0p9GURN_FaI3oTiM6qMQ%3D%3D)**

Will you join me? If so, you can support these efforts by clicking the link below:

**[https://secure.americancornerstone.org/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3f01efb1951a4ccab5a5cf658097c97e&_e=bW-sbuskSrGYjpYLP4tHx1y5y4NgN-JH7VyP9MmA6SpUXRLrvlIwMvje67xGFaP8XGLYQmxigBIBuexa-hWRP_nSnrBXi1xWWJVHQy0825GwqjbbuNIwVyBnYcQAzW8KskUJtcKQvnayFotonKkz4rAMdhLyWaLn6fTsjUjSiR8F8KBK2TYnPolcNbEdOzn_cqgTuFhias5L-8s2-ZV9JpUfxL0voQlogmFKIfYdRVFAkCgqDCSrgoOYi-yk09RVsv-vkf7hmj_HaJjPZGlaaMZH272WFjmUNCV-iMXzM2qN8prTQneB6c0Y1iY_RafHlMQe3WnfZ2d4pl_FRSG3jcjLMK1-Q75hHvR3IPv6TCZPhoHqlAzSXUhHySfJJAGEkGLcJFmHhoBGOELvNGbymA%3D%3D)**

Where the Left wants bigger government, we'll fight for limited government and self-determination.

America is the greatest country that has ever existed. Please help me do everything possible to make sure it stays that way.

Thank you for your support,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

P.S. I know these are uncertain times. But no gift is too small. And every dollar you give today will have a long-term impact on restoring our nation's founding values. **[Click here to give whatever you can today»](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3f01efb1951a4ccab5a5cf658097c97e&_e=bW-sbuskSrGYjpYLP4tHx1y5y4NgN-JH7VyP9MmA6SpUXRLrvlIwMvje67xGFaP8XGLYQmxigBIBuexa-hWRP_nSnrBXi1xWWJVHQy0825GwqjbbuNIwVyBnYcQAzW8KskUJtcKQvnayFotonKkz4rAMdhLyWaLn6fTsjUjSiR8F8KBK2TYnPolcNbEdOzn_cqgTuFhias5L-8s2-ZV9JpUfxL0voQlogmFKIfYdRVFAkCgqDCSrgoOYi-yk09RVYNARdrFnbhrsWWHqVRDAiLvtOUHZXD_kfau2xMwWllLB0OFDKWS_-QwbtyRvMA487nZ_HvsERjz1rz7JaBFWIIvlp-ScFBmqTsZOD1NFfHmyUVZh20kowjM4Lo3UyRpruDV-y0fAocP3IoPXw5LDEw%3D%3D)**
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Friend, Today we commemorate one year since the Israeli military murdered Shireen Abu Akleh, a beloved Palestinian American journalist. We honor Shireen by continuing to tell the truth, which she did every day by exposing Israel’s human rights abuses against Palestinians. Just this week, the Israeli military dropped bombs on a captive Palestinian population in Gaza, intentionally murdering families and children sleeping in their beds. The U.S. government funds these massacres, which traumatize generations of people. On May 11 last year, an Israeli soldier shot and killed Shireen while she was clearly marked as press. Investigations by news organizations and human rights groups have concluded that she was intentionally targeted. Then Israeli forces brutally attacked mourners at her funeral. The Israeli military has a pattern of killing journalists and U.S. citizens with impunity.1 And Shireen’s family is still calling for the U.S. to hold Israel accountable for the government’s murder of a U.S. citizen. [**Sign now to tell Congress and the Biden administration: We need justice for Shireen and for all Palestinians, and that means holding the Israeli government accountable. Stop using U.S. tax dollars to fund Israel’s human rights violations.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnyZfCXBQdKjpIuP5gCGC9WMeGOKtI59Al2viOph5_UHj1gLLgiqsIfFae74JZIWy2jecEwVgLg3wvr_fKJE8MFS6YUDuJuCErg83Ct5AFNls_s8-NyqUbBMOU9OfgkgDxp3kB0sm1vudc8l7rQBoYuuRDKH0yZDUfFrjI6Yc4p2NMtX5iRsgPGCBGjoXfTMsOVOONlgJRrWE1j3S-0Yi1aujP_p8zm-5drbz7ldFki-P9IRKWQr5tHwdenEyvMxQeqDeA6iuU2TwYG0bgiSGbzYDZeL_bVasmjLSmf115JUudoNzlQ9XvTB6HFxynBAfCsmb6x3JiziVZ6ayTd6kuhlgIb8kDXtxVA7RaEYjJPbEpXhmHmjKHnmY9knhikyZ8/3w3/nR2HLUk9QcWyZlXr1XsvZQ/h1/tLLgnWK6gmS0YKAUSn2U02KWpwiMGKlQw5XpujZurZk) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnyZfCXBQdKjpIuP5gCGC9WMeGOKtI59Al2viOph5_UHj1gLLgiqsIfFae74JZIWy2jecEwVgLg3wvr_fKJE8MFS6YUDuJuCErg83Ct5AFNls_s8-NyqUbBMOU9OfgkgDzCKfI2Ky1GShilriCpmGT5rqZU1TQs6x3JwsGHNrlb5kRMCyJwuQ_klvc2MVxry_wNTP8tNrTkqIEZw08yiJe7O7jc6QFNrvZJ5fJBhCjEVpBcs8382zbEZ7UMNgf8yUh8YE-IcFdrOyFrqdd6hPuTrVoGwZOU63PSgHiOnAOXKPdhNsFDPbcGBtntJ3yIVDd9KPrEtV6me2DZYzGHAiOVMPl8sn0GbaRaj7Yrh_iufB83y2avyvj5OZzzjO76P7s/3w3/nR2HLUk9QcWyZlXr1XsvZQ/h2/eGRLA72XSjR54iy-0Zs8GTdJOUlPVqAqMJfSi2kVefs)

As the top funder of the Israeli military, the U.S. government should use our leverage to demand the Israeli government end its apartheid regime and allow true democracy to thrive.
Instead, the bipartisan majority in Congress has insisted that Israel doesn’t have to comply with basic human rights laws to receive U.S. military aid. This is a stark contrast from our standards for all other countries.
In a world trying to erase the Palestinian people, Shireen Abu Akleh was committed to shining a spotlight on everyday Palestinian life under Israeli oppression. She knew that everyone deserves human rights, dignity, and freedom.

name: Callie Barr
subject: This is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress
body:
Rep. Jack Bergman wants to force an extremist agenda that will slash veterans’ services by 22%. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63149164/405760667/1201310784?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230511vacuts_cb_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWY2NzY4YWItMjhmMC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=l5eQ4_TW-jRpOl2sGrL6orgdVEFkoMQUIWWvOKEMXwg=&emci=e4493369-08f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=1f6768ab-28f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9697413)
---
Hey Peter, Rep. Jack Bergman wants to use the straightforward debt ceiling vote to force an extremist agenda that will **slash veterans’ services by 22%.** **As a military spouse who's fought against red tape and bureaucracy that kept my husband Matt and thousands like him from getting the healthcare they needed, I’m outraged that our current congressman would even consider a proposal that would make it even harder for veterans to get lifesaving care.** My husband Matt's service in Iraq resulted in a traumatic brain injury and PTSD – a diagnosis that took years for us to get. Getting Matt the right treatment and affordable care he needed was hard, and watching him suffer was even harder. That's why I went to work for Blue Star Families, to give a voice to military families like mine. And when I became a lawyer, I used my position at one of Michigan's top law firms to help veterans get free legal services. **This is personal.** **[That's why I'm running, and it's why I'm asking you to pitch in your first donation of $5 or whatever you can to help send me to Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63149165/405760668/-621152178?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230511vacuts_cb_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWY2NzY4YWItMjhmMC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=l5eQ4_TW-jRpOl2sGrL6orgdVEFkoMQUIWWvOKEMXwg=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Rep. Jack Bergman wants to force an extremist agenda that will slash veterans’ services by 22%. | Hey Peter, Rep. Jack Bergman wants to use the straightforward debt ceiling vote to force an extremist agenda that will slash veterans’ services by 22%. As a military spouse who's fought against red tape and bureaucracy that kept my husband Matt and thousands like him from getting the healthcare they needed, I’m outraged that our current congressman would even consider a proposal that would make it even harder for veterans to get lifesaving care. My husband Matt's service in Iraq resulted in a traumatic brain injury and PTSD – a diagnosis that took years for us to get. Getting Matt the right treatment and affordable care he needed was hard, and watching him suffer was even harder. That's why I went to work for Blue Star Families, to give a voice to military families like mine. And when I became a lawyer, I used my position at one of Michigan's top law firms to help veterans get free legal services. This is personal. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = When we launched our campaign for Congress, I committed myself to standing up for people in this district, working to solve problems – not create them. This is exactly why we need to change who is representing us in Congress. Our veterans – all of us – deserve better. And I'm determined to make it happen with your help. Thank you, Callie Barr Candidate Michigan’s 1st Congressional District | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. name: Team Tina
subject: Tina’s been on the road!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Before Tina was even sworn in as Governor, she promised to visit every county in Oregon in her first year in office. Her goal is to build strong, working partnerships across the state — especially when it comes to housing, mental health & addiction care, and education. **Tina’s One Oregon Listening Tour has already taken her to 13 counties in four months. ** The Governor has taken the time to sit down with local leaders and community members everywhere she goes, eager to hear about the issues at the top of their minds and how she can help. She’s been to schools, health clinics, affordable housing projects, small businesses, and more in her efforts to improve life for all Oregonians and bring the state together. Here are just a few highlights of the tour so far: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63149583/405761899/-1372139438?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230511_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDA2ZTRkMC0yYWYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUrr74h7fARUL6ygDP25ZA18HCX3rLzL7SUJ7kAjkjw=)
_Tina at Vernonia Elementary School, where she read to a group of first graders, answered questions from a classroom of fourth graders, and held a roundtable discussion with teachers and administrators on summer programs, early literacy, and youth mental health._ [__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63149584/405761900/-1372139438?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230511_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDA2ZTRkMC0yYWYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUrr74h7fARUL6ygDP25ZA18HCX3rLzL7SUJ7kAjkjw=)
_Tina learning about sweet cherry production at a fruit processing agricultural cooperative in The Dalles. While in The Dalles, she also toured a local food bank and led a roundtable discussion on homelessness and housing in the region._ [__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63149585/405761901/-1372139438?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230511_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDA2ZTRkMC0yYWYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUrr74h7fARUL6ygDP25ZA18HCX3rLzL7SUJ7kAjkjw=)
_Tina at a listening session with residents of Morrow County in the Lower Umatilla Basin. Tina has been coordinating with federal and state agencies as well as local leaders to address the groundwater contamination issue in the area._ [__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63149586/405761902/-1372139438?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230511_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDA2ZTRkMC0yYWYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUrr74h7fARUL6ygDP25ZA18HCX3rLzL7SUJ7kAjkjw=)
_Tina visiting Village Cottage Homes in La Grande, an affordable housing project with cottages that have rehoused homeless veterans in the community._ Tina’s just getting started on this tour, and she’s looking forward to all the people she’ll meet and places she’ll visit by the end of the year. [_**If you like the work Tina is doing, will you chip in any amount right now to support Tina and her mission to put Oregon on a brighter path forward?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63149587/405761903/-1372139438?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230511_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDA2ZTRkMC0yYWYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUrr74h7fARUL6ygDP25ZA18HCX3rLzL7SUJ7kAjkjw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63149588/405761904/-1372139438?express_lane=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230511_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDA2ZTRkMC0yYWYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUrr74h7fARUL6ygDP25ZA18HCX3rLzL7SUJ7kAjkjw=)

clean_body: | Peter, Before Tina was even sworn in as Governor, she promised to visit every county in Oregon in her first year in office. Her goal is to build strong, working partnerships across the state — especially when it comes to housing, mental health & addiction care, and education. Tina’s One Oregon Listening Tour has already taken her to 13 counties in four months. The Governor has taken the time to sit down with local leaders and community members everywhere she goes, eager to hear about the issues at the top of their minds and how she can help. She’s been to schools, health clinics, affordable housing projects, small businesses, and more in her efforts to improve life for all Oregonians and bring the state together. Here are just a few highlights of the tour so far: = Tina at Vernonia Elementary School, where she read to a group of first graders, answered questions from a classroom of fourth graders, and held a roundtable discussion with teachers and administrators on summer programs, early literacy, and youth mental health. = Tina learning about sweet cherry production at a fruit processing agricultural cooperative in The Dalles. While in The Dalles, she also toured a local food bank and led a roundtable discussion on homelessness and housing in the region. = Tina at a listening session with residents of Morrow County in the Lower Umatilla Basin. Tina has been coordinating with federal and state agencies as well as local leaders to address the groundwater contamination issue in the area. = Tina visiting Village Cottage Homes in La Grande, an affordable housing project with cottages that have rehoused homeless veterans in the community. Tina’s just getting started on this tour, and she’s looking forward to all the people she’ll meet and places she’ll visit by the end of the year. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Peter. Tina is working hard to make progress on the issues we all care about, and she’ll be grateful to know you have her back. — Team Tina | Tina Kotek is working hard to make Oregon a better place to live and work for all Oregonians – and making real progress on issues like housing and homelessness, education and child care, and mental health and addiction services. Can you chip in any amount now to support her work? | = Tina for Oregon PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 | mailto:info@tinafororegon.com | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

clean_body: I don’t fit their narrative. First Black Female elected statewide in Virginia...| | | | | In case you didn't know, I wanted to introduce myself, Peter. My name is Winsome Sears, and I am the Republican Lt. Governor of Virginia, serving alongside Governor Glenn Youngkin._ Governor Youngkin and I won a historic election in what many considered an EXTREMELY BLUE state. Democrats don’t want you to know all of our successes, and they CERTAINLY don’t want you to hear from me. I am the mainstream media and Left-wing Democrats’ nightmare. I am the FIRST black female elected statewide in Virginia and a CONSERVATIVE. That makes their heads spin. Additionally, here in Virginia, we are leading the way to provide a blueprint for Republicans NATIONWIDE on how to take BACK Democrat-controlled states. We have put parents and students FIRST again, pushing back on the woke indoctrination in our schools. We have lowered taxes for Virginians. We have led the way in BANNING the Chinese Communist App ‘TikTok” on government devices. And so much more. Senate Republicans asked me to reach out to you because our Party has the BEST chance to take back the Senate Majority in 2024 than EVER before. They know you’re a trusted supporter, and we're counting on grassroots Republicans like you to put our Party IN the Majority. Can I report back to them you stepped up big time? | | 2024 GOP SENATE MAJORITY FUND PATRIOT: CONTRIBUTION: $25 DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT - | | I know Republicans have had a hard time after the results of the 2022 Midterm Elections, but I’m here to tell you: if we did it in VIRGINIA, we could do it NATIONWIDE. subject: $7 can help defeat Trumpism in the states
body:
Trump opened the door for the GOP’s dangerous attacks on abortion access – and now he’s saying he was “honored to do it.” | | |
---
| | **Donald Trump: “Getting rid of _Roe v. Wade_ was an incredible thing...” ** These are words straight from the disgraced, twice-impeached former president’s mouth at last night’s CNN town hall. Trump spent his entire time on stage making baseless accusations, taking credit for overturning _Roe_ and spreading harmful lies about the 2020 election. **Here’s the truth:**
1. Donald Trump appointed three far-right justices to the Supreme Court – giving the court an ultra-conservative majority.
2. These justices overturned _Roe v. Wade_ – leaving abortion access up to state legislatures where Republicans have been passing abortion bans at every turn.
3. Trump opened the door for the GOP’s dangerous attacks on abortion access – and now he’s saying he was “honored to do it.”

Trump and his allies don’t care about representing Americans and supporting our democracy; they _only_ care about clinging to power and passing their extreme agenda – it’s up to all of us to hold them accountable. [Trump and his allies are gaining momentum from his right-wing, anti-abortion followers nationwide. We need to stop them. clean_body: Trump opened the door for the GOP’s dangerous attacks on abortion access – and now he’s saying he was “honored to do it.” | | | | | Donald Trump: “Getting rid of Roe v. Wade was an incredible thing...” These are words straight from the disgraced, twice-impeached former president’s mouth at last night’s CNN town hall. Trump spent his entire time on stage making baseless accusations, taking credit for overturning Roe and spreading harmful lies about the 2020 election. Here’s the truth: 1. Donald Trump appointed three far-right justices to the Supreme Court – giving the court an ultra-conservative majority. 2. These justices overturned Roe v. Wade – leaving abortion access up to state legislatures where Republicans have been passing abortion bans at every turn. 3. Trump opened the door for the GOP’s dangerous attacks on abortion access – and now he’s saying he was “honored to do it.” Trump and his allies don’t care about representing Americans and supporting our democracy; they only care about clinging to power and passing their extreme agenda – it’s up to all of us to hold them accountable. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thanks so much, DLCC Team | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Donald J. Trump May 10th, 2023
**Mar-a-Lago, FL—** Donald J. Trump for President 2024 campaign released the following statement:
Tonight, President Donald J. Trump laid out his vision to reverse the Biden Decline starting on Day One.
Joe Biden has turned everything into a disaster: inflation, the economy, the border, crime, energy, China, Russia, and wokeness in schools.
President Trump will save the economy, bring down inflation, secure the border, crush the Deep State and prevent World War 3.

The U.S. Border Patrol has reported _**three times as many** _ illegal border crossings under Joe Biden than took place under President Trump. [[1]](applewebdata://2FAC155C-CF57-45E8-96AC-B5A76A119B76#_ftn1) The Biden administration continues to break records for historic illegal border crossings, with over 6.3 million illegal crossings since taking office, more than the populations of Los Angeles and Houston combined. [[2]](applewebdata://2FAC155C-CF57-45E8-96AC-B5A76A119B76#_ftn2)
Data shows 191,899 illegal immigrants were apprehended attempting to cross the U.S.-Mexico border in March 2023 alone. [[3]](applewebdata://2FAC155C-CF57-45E8-96AC-B5A76A119B76#_ftn3) 5 million illegal immigrants have been apprehended by Customs and Border Protection and an estimated 1.3 million ‘gotaways’ have escaped past Border Patrol. [[4]](applewebdata://2FAC155C-CF57-45E8-96AC-B5A76A119B76#_ftn4)
In his first year in office, Biden passed nearly 90 executive orders undoing successful Trump border and immigration policies. [[5]](applewebdata://2FAC155C-CF57-45E8-96AC-B5A76A119B76#_ftn5) Since, Joe Biden has encouraged unending migration.
On January 5, Biden announced unilateral executive mass amnesty and work permits for 30,000 new illegals every month before they even reach our borders [[6]](applewebdata://2FAC155C-CF57-45E8-96AC-B5A76A119B76#_ftn6) —allowing migrants to apply for entry from a mobile app.
As a result, foreign nationals from around the world and deadly drugs continue to flow across the southern border. In Joe Biden’s America, 300 people are poisoned with fentanyl each day. [[7]](applewebdata://2FAC155C-CF57-45E8-96AC-B5A76A119B76#_ftn7) 2,848 pounds of deadly fentanyl and 13,639 pounds of methamphetamine were seized at the southern border in March 2023 alone. [[8]](applewebdata://2FAC155C-CF57-45E8-96AC-B5A76A119B76#_ftn8)
On Joe Biden’s watch, record amounts of deadly fentanyl have entered the country through ports of entry and illegal border crossings. In FY 2022, CBP and Border Patrol agents seized over 14,104 pounds of deadly fentanyl. [[9]](applewebdata://2FAC155C-CF57-45E8-96AC-B5A76A119B76#_ftn9)
For the first time in the history of the United States, our nation surpassed 100,000 overdoses in a 12-month period. Of those 100,000 overdose fatalities reported from April 2020 to April 2021, over 64,000 deaths were due to fentanyl — a synthetic opioid that is 80 to 100 times stronger than morphine. [[10]](applewebdata://2FAC155C-CF57-45E8-96AC-B5A76A119B76#_ftn10)
Amid the record numbers of illegal border crossings, the Biden administration plans to repeal Title 42, which immigration officials have used 2.5 million times at the southern border to expel migrants to Mexico or their home countries. [[11]](applewebdata://2FAC155C-CF57-45E8-96AC-B5A76A119B76#_ftn11)
The Biden administration immediately revived the “catch-and-release” policy, sparking a surge in illegal border crossings since Biden has taken office. [[12]](applewebdata://2FAC155C-CF57-45E8-96AC-B5A76A119B76#_ftn12)
Last year alone, agents seized enough fentanyl to kill 379 million people— **more than the entire population of the United States.[[16]](applewebdata://2FAC155C-CF57-45E8-96AC-B5A76A119B76#_ftn16) **
Additionally, at least 98 known or suspected terrorists attempted to cross the southern border in 2022—a figure that doesn’t include any “gotaways.” [[17]](applewebdata://2FAC155C-CF57-45E8-96AC-B5A76A119B76#_ftn17) Last year, federal agents uncovered a plot by a known ISIS-affiliated immigrant to smuggle four Iraqi nationals across the open border.
While the Northern Triangle nations—comprised of El Salvador, Guatemala, and Honduras—have continued to violate America’s sovereignty, Biden’s border czar Kamala Harris has provided the Northern Triangle with record foreign aid. [[18]](applewebdata://2FAC155C-CF57-45E8-96AC-B5A76A119B76#_ftn18)
Since Joe Biden took office, convicted-criminal-alien encounters—including rapes, murders, and assaults—have increased by 466% in the United States. [[19]](applewebdata://2FAC155C-CF57-45E8-96AC-B5A76A119B76#_ftn19)
To conceal the true cost of the border crisis, the Biden administration has recruited NGOs to settle illegal aliens in states across the country, in exchange for federal grants worth over $137 million. [[20]](applewebdata://2FAC155C-CF57-45E8-96AC-B5A76A119B76#_ftn20)
_**President Trump secured our southern border and honored the U.S. Border Patrol.** _
President Trump built over 450 miles of the world’s most robust and advanced border wall, resulting in an 87% reduction in illegal border crossings where the wall stands. [[21]](applewebdata://2FAC155C-CF57-45E8-96AC-B5A76A119B76#_ftn21)
The Trump administration fully enforced America’s immigration laws with the Department of Justice prosecuting a record number of immigration-related cases. [[22]](applewebdata://2FAC155C-CF57-45E8-96AC-B5A76A119B76#_ftn22)
President Trump ended the dangerous policy of “catch-and-release,” which allowed illegal aliens to be released into the United States, often never to be seen again.
To combat asylum claim abuse and backlog for authentic asylum claims, the Trump administration trained frontline Border Patrol agents to assist USCIS perform credible fear screenings for illegal border crossers. [[23]](applewebdata://2FAC155C-CF57-45E8-96AC-B5A76A119B76#_ftn23)
Under President Trump, the United States entered a historic partnership with the Mexican government to deploy tens of thousands of Mexican soldiers to secure their side of the border. Additionally, President Trump ordered nearly 5,000 troops to the southern border.
President Trump has pledged to shut down Biden’s border disaster. He will again end catch-and-release, restore Remain in Mexico, and eliminate asylum fraud.
President Trump’s plan to secure the border includes a commitment to declare war and defeat the cartels, just as President Trump did with ISIS.
In addition to restoring strong border security, President Trump will deploy all necessary military assets, including the U.S. Navy to impose a full naval embargo on the cartels.
President Trump has also committed to direct the Department of Defense to make appropriate use of special forces, cyber warfare, and other overt and covert actions to inflict maximum damage on cartel leadership, infrastructure, and operations.
President Trump has pledged to designate the dangerous cartels as foreign terrorist organizations, to curb their access to global financial systems.
Additionally, President Trump has vowed to form an unprecedented partnership with neighboring governments in our region to defeat these cartels. President Trump is prepared to take every action, including exposing every bribe, payoff, and corruption that is allowing the cartels to continue their brutal reign.
President Trump will work with Congress to pass legislation that ensures drug smugglers and human traffickers receive the death penalty.

Donald J. Trump May 10th, 2023
As Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America President Marjorie Dannenfelser said just last week, President Trump’s “presidency was the most consequential in American history for the pro-life cause.” [[1]](applewebdata://D1725662-F0D6-4763-B470-3B3B34E190A7#_ftn1)
“During the meeting, President Trump reiterated his opposition to the extreme Democratic position of abortion on demand, up until the moment of birth, paid for by taxpayers – and even in some cases after the child is born. President Trump believes such a position is unworthy of a great nation and believes the American people will rebel against such a radical position that aligns us with China and North Korea.
“President Trump knows the vast majority of Americans oppose brutal late-term abortions when the child can feel pain and suck their thumbs. President Trump reiterated that any federal legislation protecting these children would need to include the exceptions for life of the mother and in cases of rape and incest. Protecting unborn children capable of feeling pain would align America with the civilized world and with 47 out of 50 European nations.”
As President, Donald J. Trump fought tirelessly and successfully for the pro-life cause.
President Trump appointed three strong and courageous justices to the United States Supreme Court, who stood for life. [[2]](applewebdata://D1725662-F0D6-4763-B470-3B3B34E190A7#_ftn2)
In 2020, President Trump made history, as the first sitting President to address the March for Life in Washington, D.C. [[3]](applewebdata://D1725662-F0D6-4763-B470-3B3B34E190A7#_ftn3)
President Trump issued a rule preventing Title X family planning funds from supporting the abortion industry. [[4]](applewebdata://D1725662-F0D6-4763-B470-3B3B34E190A7#_ftn4)
President Trump enacted the “Protecting Life in Global Health Assistance” policy, which prohibited foreign NGOs from using American aid to perform abortions in developing countries. [[5]](applewebdata://D1725662-F0D6-4763-B470-3B3B34E190A7#_ftn5)
President Trump was honored to have the support of leading pro-life groups like Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America in 2016 and 2020. [[6]](applewebdata://D1725662-F0D6-4763-B470-3B3B34E190A7#_ftn6)

Donald J. Trump May 10th, 2023
**President Donald J. Trump achieved American energy independence for the first time in nearly 70 years, lowering costs for consumers, and creating thousands of American jobs. Joe Biden has demolished America’s energy independence through radical policies, excessive regulation, and anti-fossil fuel fiction.**
In 2020, the U.S. Department of Energy projected that American consumers wouldn’t see gasoline prices over five dollars a gallon until the year 2040. [[1]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#_ftn1) Clearly, their report failed to factor Joe Biden and his energy-killing policies into their projections.
In reality, gasoline prices doubled in Joe Biden’s first two years in office [[2]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#_ftn2) , and diesel prices increased 75%. [[3]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#_ftn3)
Under Biden, Americans suffered the highest national average price of gasoline ever recorded in American history. [[4]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#_ftn4) The current national average for gas prices sits around $3.52. [[5]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#_ftn5)
Under Biden, the average cost for residential heating oil hit $4.56 per gallon, an increase of 95% since taking office. [[6]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#_ftn6) Natural gas prices have risen 28%, and electricity prices have climbed 10% from last winter. [[7]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#_ftn7)
On Biden’s first day in office, he killed the Keystone XL pipeline, crippling the American energy sector.
Not long after, the Biden was forced to beg OPEC to increase oil production to combat the historic costs.
Biden’s own party is getting tired of his lack of energy production. Sen. Joe Manchin ripped the administration for ignoring federal law that requires fossil fuel and critical mineral development. [[8]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#_ftn8)
In March 2023, the Biden administration announced that it is blocking 16 million acres of federal land and water in Alaska from future fossil fuel drilling. [[9]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#_ftn9)
**The Trump Administration led the United States to become the number one producer of oil in the world while maintaining America’s position as the number one natural gas producer.**

The year 2019 marked the first time in 67 years that American annual gross energy exports exceeded gross energy imports. [[10]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#_ftn10)
The United States supplied 16% of the world’s oil and 21% of the world’s natural gas—more than any other country. [[11]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#_ftn11) Under President Trump’s watch, Americans enjoyed gas prices as low as $1.77 per gallon. [[12]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#_ftn12)
The Trump administration cut energy regulations that lowered energy costs and unlocked new investments for American energy producers and consumers. [[13]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#_ftn13) As a result, the average American family saved $2,500 a year in lower electric bills. [[14]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#_ftn14)
President Trump approved the Keystone XL and Dakota Access pipelines, opening federal lands and offshore areas for responsible oil and gas production, and ending the unfair and costly Paris Climate Accord. [[15]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#_ftn15)
In 2019, America achieved the largest decline in carbon emissions of any country on Earth. Since withdrawing from the Paris Climate Accord, the United States has reduced carbon emissions more than any nation. [[16]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#_ftn16)
While unleashing the full power of America’s energy sector, the Trump administration Recovered more endangered or threatened species than any other administration in its first term. [[17]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#_ftn17)
President Trump’s America First energy policies not only saved Americans money, but it also strengthened our national security and made the world a safer place. As American energy broke new barriers, OPEC and Russia cut their own energy production by nearly 10 million barrels per day, stabilizing global oil markets. [[18]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#_ftn18)
President Trump’s energy successes enabled countries around the world to buy from the United States instead of hostile nations that manipulate energy prices as a means of political obedience. [[19]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#_ftn19)
President Trump will unleash the production of domestic energy resources, reduce the soaring price of gasoline, diesel, and natural gas, promote energy security for our friends around the world, eliminate the socialist Green New Deal and ensure the United States is never again at the mercy of a foreign supplier of energy.
President Trump has promised to protect the American energy sector from China and will ban Chinese companies from owning any vital infrastructure, including energy, technology, communications, farmland, medical supplies, minerals, and other strategic national assets.
President Trump has also proposed forcing the Chinese to sell any current holdings that jeopardize America’s national security.

Donald J. Trump May 10th, 2023
**Joe Biden has overseen the worst economic decline since the Great Depression.**
**When President Donald J. Trump returns to office, he will deliver economic opportunity and prosperity for Americans of all backgrounds, lower inflation and cut wasteful government spending.**
Through Biden’s energy-crippling policies, Americans suffered the highest national average price of gasoline ever recorded in American history. [[1]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn1) Biden’s runaway spending for his radical agenda has caused inflation to reach 14.9%. [[2]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn2)
Real wages have decreased for 24 months in a row—the longest streak on record. [[3]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn3) Real wages are down 3.5% since Biden took office. [[4]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn4)
Year over year, the price of eggs have increased by 21.4%, electricity 8.4%, bread 12.6%, groceries 7.1%, and shelter 8.1%. [[5]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn5)
America has experienced three of the worst bank failures in our nation's history under Biden. [[6]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn6)
Monthly mortgage payments on a median-priced home have shot up 82% since Joe Biden took office. [[7]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn7) The 30-year fixed mortgage rate is up 130% since January 2021. [[8]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn8)
70% of Americans report feeling financially stressed, [[9]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn9) and 58% of Americans are living paycheck to paycheck. [[10]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn10)
A record number of Americans say they are worse off financially since Biden became president. [[11]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn11)
Rather than rebuild the Trump economy that Joe Biden destroyed, Democrats simply paid Americans to notwork. Millions of capable workers were making more money from government handouts than they were making from working at their job. [[12]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn12)
The average American family has lost $7,100 in purchasing power under Biden due to inflation and high interest rates. [[13]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn13)
The national debt increased by about $4 trillion since Biden arrived in office. And the administration is eager to pile up more debt, with a student-loan forgiveness program that will cost half a trillion dollars if it survives court challenges. [[14]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn14)

**Under President Trump, America was roaring back with the No. 1 fastest economic recovery ever recorded.**
On President Trump’s last day in office, GDP was growing at 6.3 percent, inflation was 1.4 percent, the price of gasoline was $2.39 a gallon. [[15]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn15)
President Trump created 7 million new jobs—triple the projections. These new high-paying jobs led to the lowest unemployment rate in nearly 50 years. [[16]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn16) Income rose in every single metropolitan area for the first time in three decades.
Unemployment rates for African Americans, Hispanic Americans, Asian Americans, Native Americans, veterans, individuals with disabilities, and those without a high school diploma all reached record lows. [[17]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn17)
President Trump reformed the tax code to better serve middle-class families. The Trump administration doubled the standard deduction, making the first $24,000 a married couple earns completely tax-free. [[18]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn18)
President Trump’s economic policies lifted nearly 7 million people off of food stamps. [[19]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn19)
The Trump administration achieved record stock market numbers and record 401ks. Under President Trump, the DOW closed above 20,000 for the first time in 2017 and topped 30,000 in 2020. The S&P 500 and NASDAQ repeatedly notched record highs. [[20]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn20)
President Trump’s tariffs on imported aluminum and steel secured massive wage hikes for over 16,000 American steelworkers. [[21]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn21)
President Trump successfully negotiated a deal requiring China to purchase an additional $200 billion worth of United States exports. [[22]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn22)
Under President Trump, blue-collar jobs grew at the fastest rate in more than 30 years, helping fuel a hiring boom in many small towns and rural areas. [[23]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn23)
Rural employment grew at an annualized rate of 5.1 percent in the first quarter of 2018, adding over 656,000 blue-collar jobs in 2018. [[24]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#_ftn24)
**President Trump’s vision for America’s economic revival is lower taxes, bigger paychecks, and more jobs for American workers.** ****

We have allowed false and totally made-up claims from troubled individuals to interfere with our elections, doing great damage.
Make no mistake, this entire bogus case is a political endeavor targeting President Trump because he is now an overwhelming front-runner to be once again elected President of the United States.
The continued abuse of our great Constitution for political ends is disgusting and cannot be tolerated. Our nation is in serious trouble when claims lacking any evidence or proof or eyewitnesses can invade our courts to score political points.
Sadly, for the enemies of American freedom and democracy, President Trump will never stop fighting for the American people, no matter what the radical Democrats dream up next. This case will be appealed, and we will ultimately win.”
**The Democrats Weaponization Of The American Judicial System Against President Trump Reaches A New Low**
_**The E. Jean Carroll Case Is Part Of The Democrats’ Vast Campaign Against President Trump.** _
\- President Trump Is Dominating Polling Against Joe Biden And All Republican Primary Challengers, We Are Winning And The Trump-Haters Are Panicking.
\- The Carroll Case Was Orchestrated And Funded By The Biggest Trump-Hating Democrats In The Country.
\- President Trump Has Never Had Any Kind Of Relationship With E. Jean Carroll.
**Voter Registration Of The Jury Pool For This Case Favors Democrats By An Seven To One Ratio Over Republicans.[[1]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#_ftn1) **
_**E. Jean Carroll Hired The Disgraced Hypocrite, Roberta Kaplan To Lead Her Frivolous Lawsuit At The Urging Of Trump-Hater George Conway.** _
**\- Ms. Kaplan Resigned In Disgrace From “Time’s Up,” For Helping Gov. Andrew Cuomo Smear A Sexual Harassment Accuser.** Roberta Kaplan, Carroll’s attorney, was forced out of her role leading activist group Time’s Up, after it was revealed that she advised the public smearing of a woman who accused former NY governor Andrew Cuomo of sexual harassment. Kaplan’s motives for taking this case are purely political. [[2]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#_ftn2)
**\- Carroll Testified That Only After Speaking WithNotorious Trump-Hater, George Conway Did She Consider Suing The President.** “Tacopina played a part of Carroll's taped deposition from October in which she recalled her response of ‘no, no, no’ when people asked her in 2019 if she planned to sue Trump. It wasn't until she spoke to Conway, ‘who knew the ins and outs,’ that she decided to consider suing Trump, Carroll testified. ‘Before that, you had no intention of suing Donald Trump, as we just heard,’ Tacopina said. Carroll contended that was correct, saying after speaking with Conway, she met with a lawyer he recommended and that she was aware at the time of Conway's anti-Trump disposition.” [[3]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#_ftn3)
_**This Case Was Funded By Democrat MEGA-Donor And LinkedIn Founder, Reid Hoffman.** _
**\- Hoffman Said He’ll “Do Whatever It Takes” To Defeat President Trump.[[4]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#_ftn4) **
**\- Hoffman Made The Largest Contribution To The Biden-Supporting Unite The Country Super PAC When It Launched In Late 2019.** “The Unite the Country PAC, which launched in late October as Biden was posting low fundraising totals, hauled in $4.2 million in February, its newest records show. Its largest donation was $1 million from LinkedIn founder and Democratic megadonor Reid Hoffman, who previously apologized for ‘helping to repair’ Epstein's reputation and for funding a pro-Democrat disinformation campaign in Alabama.” [[5]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#_ftn5)
**\- Hoffman Admitted To Staying Overnight At Epstein’s Island, Little St. James In 2015.** “Mr. Hoffman told the Journal he only once visited Epstein’s Island residence, Little St. James, for an MIT fundraising trip with Mr. Ito. He said he regrets ever meeting with Epstein and his last interaction with Epstein was in 2015. ‘It gnaws at me that, by lending my association, I helped his reputation, and thus delayed justice for his survivors,’ Mr. Hoffman said in an email. He said he met with Epstein to discuss science projects at universities. ‘While I relied on MIT’s endorsement, ultimately I made the mistake,’ he said, ‘and I am sorry for my personal misjudgment.’” [[6]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#_ftn6)
_**Neither Carroll Nor Anyone Else Offered As A Witness In The Trial Could Remember The Year The Event Allegedly Occurred.** _
**\- In Testimony Carroll Said She Cannot Recall The Date Of The Alleged Event.** “’When do you believe Donald Trump assaulted you?’ her attorney, Mike Ferrara, asked Carroll during her testimony Wednesday. ‘This question, the when, the when, the date, has been something I’ve constantly trying to pin down,’ Carroll said.” [[7]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#_ftn7)
Clinton-Appointed Judge Lewis Kaplan (Who Officiated The Wedding Of Carroll’s Co-Counsel) Excluded Key Evidence From The Trial—Namely The Funding Of The Case By Reid Hoffman And The Supposed DNA Evidence Carroll Claimed She Has.
\- Judge Kaplan Officiated The Wedding Of Ms. Carroll’s Attorney, Ms. Crowley. [[8]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#_ftn8)
_**Ms. Carroll’s Story Is Suspiciously Similar To A 2012 Episode Of “Law And Order SVU.”** _
**\- In Evidence, It Was Revealed That A 2012 “Law & Order SVU” Episode Featured A Storyline Centering On An Alleged Rape In A Dressing Room At Bergdorf-Goodman. This Episode Aired Several Years After Carroll’s Allegations, And 7 Years Prior To Her Making Coming Forward With Them.** “On Monday, Trump’s attorney also mentioned another stunning coincidence. Carroll’s description of the alleged incident is very similar to a 2012 episode of Law & Order: Special Victims Unit. In that episode, titled ‘Theatre and Tricks,’ an individual talks about a rape fantasy in Bergdorf Goodman — the same store Carroll claims the incident took place. ‘Role-play took place in the dressing room of Bergdorf’s. While she was trying on lingerie I would burst in,’ the character in the episode said. According to Carroll, the two were in the lingerie section, and Trump allegedly assaulted her in the dressing room. Carroll claimed to be ‘aware’ of the episode but denied watching it.” [[9]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#_ftn9)

Trump May 10th, 2023 Mar-a-Lago, FL— Donald J. Trump for President 2024 campaign released the following statement: Tonight, President Donald J. Trump laid out his vision to reverse the Biden Decline starting on Day One. Joe Biden has turned everything into a disaster: inflation, the economy, the border, crime, energy, China, Russia, and wokeness in schools. President Trump will save the economy, bring down inflation, secure the border, crush the Deep State and prevent World War 3. President Trump is the only one who can stop the forces from destroying our country—anyone else will be ripped to shreds. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump May 10th, 2023 President Donald J. Trump rebuilt America’s military, increased readiness, and destroyed our nation’s enemies. Joe Biden has weakened America’s national security, emboldened our adversaries, and betrayed our allies. Biden presided over a tragic and embarrassing military withdrawal in Afghanistan, which took the lives of 13 U.S. servicemembers. Joe Biden left 10,000 to 15,000 Americans behind in Afghanistan. [[1]](applewebdata://E198430D-601E-4961-8772-C4121F0358E0#ftn1) Biden’s reckless withdrawal resulted in the Taliban effectively controlling all of Afghanistan, dramatically more territory than they did on Sept. 11, 2001. [[2]](applewebdata://E198430D-601E-4961-8772-C4121F0358E0#ftn2) The Biden administration left over $7 billion in military equipment behind, including 78 aircraft worth $923.3 million, 9,524 air-to-ground munitions, over 40,000 military vehicles, 300,000 weapons, and 17,500 “pieces of explosive detection, electronic countermeasure, disposal and personal protective equipment. [[3]](applewebdata://E198430D-601E-4961-8772-C4121F0358E0#ftn3) Just months after Biden’s calamitous Afghanistan disaster, Russia invaded Ukraine. In 2022 alone, U.S. military aid to Ukraine reached over $50 million. [[4]](applewebdata://E198430D-601E-4961-8772-C4121F0358E0#ftn4) As a result of never-ending military aid to Ukraine, the U.S. stock of Javelin anti-tank missiles and Stinger anti-aircraft missiles have been depleted by a third. [[5]](applewebdata://E198430D-601E-4961-8772-C4121F0358E0#ftn5) By issuing over $100 billion in aid without asking President Zelensky for a realistic timeline, Biden is prolonging and escalating this conflict as it reaches its first anniversary with tens of thousands of people killed. [[6]](applewebdata://E198430D-601E-4961-8772-C4121F0358E0#ftn6) [[7]](applewebdata://E198430D-601E-4961-8772-C4121F0358E0#ftn7) [[8]](applewebdata://E198430D-601E-4961-8772-C4121F0358E0#ftn8) This month, the Biden Administration announced another $1.2 billion for weapons in Ukraine. [[9]](applewebdata://E198430D-601E-4961-8772-C4121F0358E0#ftn9) In addition, leaked Pentagon documents revealed that Ukraine may run out of Air Defenses by May 2023. [[10]](applewebdata://E198430D-601E-4961-8772-C4121F0358E0#ftn10) The Biden Department of Defense has been more focused on liberal indoctrination than military preparedness and warfighting. Amid revelations that the Biden Department of Defense’s woke, diversity chief made public comments condemning “white folks,” DOD leadership did nothing to address the racist statements. [[11]](applewebdata://E198430D-601E-4961-8772-C4121F0358E0#ftn11) According to a December 2022 poll of U.S. servicemembers, 68% reported witnessing politicization in the military. [[12]](applewebdata://E198430D-601E-4961-8772-C4121F0358E0#ftn12) Meanwhile, 80% reported a decrease in trust in the U.S. military because of the push to allow unrestricted service by transgender individuals. [[13]](applewebdata://E198430D-601E-4961-8772-C4121F0358E0#ftn13) Joe Biden has overseen a severe recruitment crisis in the U.S. military, forcing the U.S. Navy to lower recruiting standards. [[14]](applewebdata://E198430D-601E-4961-8772-C4121F0358E0#ftn14) Joe Biden fired more than 5,000 servicemembers for noncompliance with his COVID-19 vaccine mandate. [[15]](applewebdata://E198430D-601E-4961-8772-C4121F0358E0#ftn15) Joe Biden’s soft on China policies, have invited increased aggression towards Taiwan and the United States. Joe Biden allowed a Chinese spy balloon to violate American airspace for at least seven days, allowing the surveillance craft to observe critical national security infrastructure, including U.S. intercontinental ballistic missile fields. [[16]](applewebdata://E198430D-601E-4961-8772-C4121F0358E0#ftn16) Military exercises suggest China is getting ready to launch a war against Taiwan. [[17]](applewebdata://E198430D-601E-4961-8772-C4121F0358E0#ftn17) The Biden administration also prioritized radical climate change policy over the human rights abuses of China’s genocidal regime. [[18]](applewebdata://E198430D-601E-4961-8772-C4121F0358E0#ftn18) Biden has cowered to NATO, as the U.S. continues to unilaterally fund the organization.
