[[11]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftn11) Under President Trump’s watch, Americans enjoyed gas prices as low as $1.77 per gallon. [[12]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftn12) The Trump administration cut energy regulations that lowered energy costs and unlocked new investments for American energy producers and consumers. [[13]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftn13) As a result, the average American family saved $2,500 a year in lower electric bills. [[14]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftn14) President Trump approved the Keystone XL and Dakota Access pipelines, opening federal lands and offshore areas for responsible oil and gas production, and ending the unfair and costly Paris Climate Accord. [[15]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftn15) In 2019, America achieved the largest decline in carbon emissions of any country on Earth. Since withdrawing from the Paris Climate Accord, the United States has reduced carbon emissions more than any nation. [[16]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftn16) While unleashing the full power of America’s energy sector, the Trump administration Recovered more endangered or threatened species than any other administration in its first term. [[17]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftn17) President Trump’s America First energy policies not only saved Americans money, but it also strengthened our national security and made the world a safer place. As American energy broke new barriers, OPEC and Russia cut their own energy production by nearly 10 million barrels per day, stabilizing global oil markets. [[18]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftn18) President Trump’s energy successes enabled countries around the world to buy from the United States instead of hostile nations that manipulate energy prices as a means of political obedience. [[19]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftn19) President Trump will unleash the production of domestic energy resources, reduce the soaring price of gasoline, diesel, and natural gas, promote energy security for our friends around the world, eliminate the socialist Green New Deal and ensure the United States is never again at the mercy of a foreign supplier of energy. President Trump has promised to protect the American energy sector from China and will ban Chinese companies from owning any vital infrastructure, including energy, technology, communications, farmland, medical supplies, minerals, and other strategic national assets. President Trump has also proposed forcing the Chinese to sell any current holdings that jeopardize America’s national security. [[1]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftnref1) [[2]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftnref2) [[3]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftnref3) [[4]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftnref4) [[5]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftnref5) [[6]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftnref6) [[7]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftnref7) Ibid. [[8]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftnref8) [[9]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftnref9) [[10]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftnref10) [[11]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftnref11) [[12]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftnref12) [[13]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftnref13) Ibid. [[14]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftnref14) [[15]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftnref15) [[16]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftnref16) Ibid. [[17]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftnref17) Ibid. [[18]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftnref18) [[19]](applewebdata://4C341496-D6C4-4C66-8EB4-6E9034ECDB6C#ftnref19) | ---|--- Donald J. Trump May 10th, 2023 Joe Biden has overseen the worst economic decline since the Great Depression. When President Donald J. Trump returns to office, he will deliver economic opportunity and prosperity for Americans of all backgrounds, lower inflation and cut wasteful government spending. Through Biden’s energy-crippling policies, Americans suffered the highest national average price of gasoline ever recorded in American history. [[1]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn1) Biden’s runaway spending for his radical agenda has caused inflation to reach 14.9%. [[2]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn2) Real wages have decreased for 24 months in a row—the longest streak on record. [[3]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn3) Real wages are down 3.5% since Biden took office. [[4]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn4) Year over year, the price of eggs have increased by 21.4%, electricity 8.4%, bread 12.6%, groceries 7.1%, and shelter 8.1%. [[5]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn5) America has experienced three of the worst bank failures in our nation's history under Biden. [[6]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn6) Monthly mortgage payments on a median-priced home have shot up 82% since Joe Biden took office. [[7]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn7) The 30-year fixed mortgage rate is up 130% since January 2021. [[8]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn8) 70% of Americans report feeling financially stressed, [[9]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn9) and 58% of Americans are living paycheck to paycheck. [[10]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn10) A record number of Americans say they are worse off financially since Biden became president. [[11]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn11) Rather than rebuild the Trump economy that Joe Biden destroyed, Democrats simply paid Americans to notwork. Millions of capable workers were making more money from government handouts than they were making from working at their job. [[12]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn12) The average American family has lost $7,100 in purchasing power under Biden due to inflation and high interest rates. [[13]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn13) The national debt increased by about $4 trillion since Biden arrived in office. And the administration is eager to pile up more debt, with a student-loan forgiveness program that will cost half a trillion dollars if it survives court challenges. [[14]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn14) Under President Trump, America was roaring back with the No. 1 fastest economic recovery ever recorded. On President Trump’s last day in office, GDP was growing at 6.3 percent, inflation was 1.4 percent, the price of gasoline was $2.39 a gallon. [[15]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn15) President Trump created 7 million new jobs—triple the projections. These new high-paying jobs led to the lowest unemployment rate in nearly 50 years. [[16]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn16) Income rose in every single metropolitan area for the first time in three decades. Unemployment rates for African Americans, Hispanic Americans, Asian Americans, Native Americans, veterans, individuals with disabilities, and those without a high school diploma all reached record lows. [[17]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn17) President Trump reformed the tax code to better serve middle-class families. The Trump administration doubled the standard deduction, making the first $24,000 a married couple earns completely tax-free. [[18]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn18) President Trump’s economic policies lifted nearly 7 million people off of food stamps. [[19]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn19) The Trump administration achieved record stock market numbers and record 401ks. Under President Trump, the DOW closed above 20,000 for the first time in 2017 and topped 30,000 in 2020. The S&P 500 and NASDAQ repeatedly notched record highs. [[20]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn20) President Trump’s tariffs on imported aluminum and steel secured massive wage hikes for over 16,000 American steelworkers. [[21]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn21) President Trump successfully negotiated a deal requiring China to purchase an additional $200 billion worth of United States exports. [[22]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn22) Under President Trump, blue-collar jobs grew at the fastest rate in more than 30 years, helping fuel a hiring boom in many small towns and rural areas. [[23]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn23) Rural employment grew at an annualized rate of 5.1 percent in the first quarter of 2018, adding over 656,000 blue-collar jobs in 2018. [[24]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftn24) President Trump’s vision for America’s economic revival is lower taxes, bigger paychecks, and more jobs for American workers. ** [[1]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref1) [[2]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref2) [[3]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref3) [[4]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref4) [[5]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref5) [[6]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref6) [[7]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref7) [[8]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref8) [[9]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref9) [[10]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref10) [[11]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref11) [[12]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref12) [[13]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref13) [[14]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref14) [[15]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref15) [[16]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref16) [[17]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref17) [[18]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref18) Ibid. [[19]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref19) Ibid. [[20]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref20) Ibid. [[21]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref21) [[22]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref22) [[23]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref23) [[24]](applewebdata://91A872E5-D4D9-488E-82C6-2C7984116A5E#ftnref24) Ibid. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump May 10th, 2023 “The Democrat Party’s never-ending witch-hunt of President Trump hit a new low today. In jurisdictions wholly controlled by the Democrat Party our nation’s justice system is now compromised by extremist left-wing politics. We have allowed false and totally made-up claims from troubled individuals to interfere with our elections, doing great damage. Make no mistake, this entire bogus case is a political endeavor targeting President Trump because he is now an overwhelming front-runner to be once again elected President of the United States. The continued abuse of our great Constitution for political ends is disgusting and cannot be tolerated. Our nation is in serious trouble when claims lacking any evidence or proof or eyewitnesses can invade our courts to score political points. Sadly, for the enemies of American freedom and democracy, President Trump will never stop fighting for the American people, no matter what the radical Democrats dream up next. This case will be appealed, and we will ultimately win.” The Democrats Weaponization Of The American Judicial System Against President Trump Reaches A New Low The E. Jean Carroll Case Is Part Of The Democrats’ Vast Campaign Against President Trump. \- President Trump Is Dominating Polling Against Joe Biden And All Republican Primary Challengers, We Are Winning And The Trump-Haters Are Panicking. \- The Carroll Case Was Orchestrated And Funded By The Biggest Trump-Hating Democrats In The Country. \- President Trump Has Never Had Any Kind Of Relationship With E. Jean Carroll. Voter Registration Of The Jury Pool For This Case Favors Democrats By An Seven To One Ratio Over Republicans.[[1]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#ftn1) E. Jean Carroll Hired The Disgraced Hypocrite, Roberta Kaplan To Lead Her Frivolous Lawsuit At The Urging Of Trump-Hater George Conway. \- Ms. Kaplan Resigned In Disgrace From “Time’s Up,” For Helping Gov. Andrew Cuomo Smear A Sexual Harassment Accuser. Roberta Kaplan, Carroll’s attorney, was forced out of her role leading activist group Time’s Up, after it was revealed that she advised the public smearing of a woman who accused former NY governor Andrew Cuomo of sexual harassment. Kaplan’s motives for taking this case are purely political. [[2]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#ftn2) \- Carroll Testified That Only After Speaking WithNotorious Trump-Hater, George Conway Did She Consider Suing The President. “Tacopina played a part of Carroll's taped deposition from October in which she recalled her response of ‘no, no, no’ when people asked her in 2019 if she planned to sue Trump. It wasn't until she spoke to Conway, ‘who knew the ins and outs,’ that she decided to consider suing Trump, Carroll testified. ‘Before that, you had no intention of suing Donald Trump, as we just heard,’ Tacopina said. Carroll contended that was correct, saying after speaking with Conway, she met with a lawyer he recommended and that she was aware at the time of Conway's anti-Trump disposition.” [[3]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#ftn3) This Case Was Funded By Democrat MEGA-Donor And LinkedIn Founder, Reid Hoffman. \- Hoffman Said He’ll “Do Whatever It Takes” To Defeat President Trump.[[4]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#ftn4) \- Hoffman Made The Largest Contribution To The Biden-Supporting Unite The Country Super PAC When It Launched In Late 2019. “The Unite the Country PAC, which launched in late October as Biden was posting low fundraising totals, hauled in $4.2 million in February, its newest records show. Its largest donation was $1 million from LinkedIn founder and Democratic megadonor Reid Hoffman, who previously apologized for ‘helping to repair’ Epstein's reputation and for funding a pro-Democrat disinformation campaign in Alabama.” [[5]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#ftn5) \- Hoffman Admitted To Staying Overnight At Epstein’s Island, Little St. James In 2015. “Mr. Hoffman told the Journal he only once visited Epstein’s Island residence, Little St. James, for an MIT fundraising trip with Mr. Ito. He said he regrets ever meeting with Epstein and his last interaction with Epstein was in 2015. ‘It gnaws at me that, by lending my association, I helped his reputation, and thus delayed justice for his survivors,’ Mr. Hoffman said in an email. He said he met with Epstein to discuss science projects at universities. ‘While I relied on MIT’s endorsement, ultimately I made the mistake,’ he said, ‘and I am sorry for my personal misjudgment.’” [[6]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#ftn6) Neither Carroll Nor Anyone Else Offered As A Witness In The Trial Could Remember The Year The Event Allegedly Occurred. \- In Testimony Carroll Said She Cannot Recall The Date Of The Alleged Event. “’When do you believe Donald Trump assaulted you?’ her attorney, Mike Ferrara, asked Carroll during her testimony Wednesday. ‘This question, the when, the when, the date, has been something I’ve constantly trying to pin down,’ Carroll said.” [[7]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#ftn7) Clinton-Appointed Judge Lewis Kaplan (Who Officiated The Wedding Of Carroll’s Co-Counsel) Excluded Key Evidence From The Trial—Namely The Funding Of The Case By Reid Hoffman And The Supposed DNA Evidence Carroll Claimed She Has. \- Judge Kaplan Officiated The Wedding Of Ms. Carroll’s Attorney, Ms. Crowley. [[8]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#ftn8) Ms. Carroll’s Story Is Suspiciously Similar To A 2012 Episode Of “Law And Order SVU.” \- In Evidence, It Was Revealed That A 2012 “Law & Order SVU” Episode Featured A Storyline Centering On An Alleged Rape In A Dressing Room At Bergdorf-Goodman. This Episode Aired Several Years After Carroll’s Allegations, And 7 Years Prior To Her Making Coming Forward With Them. “On Monday, Trump’s attorney also mentioned another stunning coincidence. Carroll’s description of the alleged incident is very similar to a 2012 episode of Law & Order: Special Victims Unit. In that episode, titled ‘Theatre and Tricks,’ an individual talks about a rape fantasy in Bergdorf Goodman — the same store Carroll claims the incident took place. ‘Role-play took place in the dressing room of Bergdorf’s. While she was trying on lingerie I would burst in,’ the character in the episode said. According to Carroll, the two were in the lingerie section, and Trump allegedly assaulted her in the dressing room. Carroll claimed to be ‘aware’ of the episode but denied watching it.” [[9]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#ftn9) [[1]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#ftnref1) [[2]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#ftnref2) [[3]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#ftnref3) [[4]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#ftnref4) [[5]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#ftnref5) [[6]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#ftnref6) [[7]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#ftnref7) [[8]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#ftnref8) Case 1:22-cv-10016-LAK Document 13, Filed 12/09/22 [[9]](applewebdata://98623B79-4FFF-4E74-85D6-2AA369A63DAC#ftnref9) | ---|--- Donald J. Historic property tax relief legislation advances forward! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2688d6bd0226/n41kepo7ku-481590?e=25844e23a8)

---
| | Peter,
---
| Conservatives cinched another victory today with a taxation relief package that will positively impact all Nebraskans.

Senator Tom Briese has championed a far-reaching tax proposal in [LB 243](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=9b64670de0&e=25844e23a8) that will provide **$3 billion of property tax relief** over the next six years! In 2022, the state party passed a provision in our legislative plan to "Reduce the Burden of Local Property Taxes". Our Senators delivered today!

_**Thank you Senator Briese and every Nebraska legislator who advanced this bill, which just passed Select File today. We have one more round (Final Reading) to go before this bill can go to the Governor's desk for signature!**_
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=6aad397087&e=25844e23a8)
---
| _**With rampant Bidenflation impacting us every day,**_ having state representatives walk the talk to deliver tax relief will leave more of Nebraskans’ hard-earned money in their pockets!

[**Please consider accepting the invitation to join us in the mission of upholding the Republican values to design a life of purpose and abundance as Americans:**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=4a158a24d3&e=25844e23a8)

clean_body: Historic property tax relief legislation advances forward! | | | | | | | Peter, | Conservatives cinched another victory today with a taxation relief package that will positively impact all Nebraskans. Senator Tom Briese has championed a far-reaching tax proposal in that will provide $3 billion of property tax relief over the next six years! In 2022, the state party passed a provision in our legislative plan to "Reduce the Burden of Local Property Taxes". Our Senators delivered today! Thank you Senator Briese and every Nebraska legislator who advanced this bill, which just passed Select File today. We have one more round (Final Reading) to go before this bill can go to the Governor's desk for signature! | | With rampant Bidenflation impacting us every day, having state representatives walk the talk to deliver tax relief will leave more of Nebraskans’ hard-earned money in their pockets! | "CONTRIBUTE TODAY »" | Sincerely, | Todd Watson Political Director Nebraska Republican Party | | | | | | | | | | | | "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY" | | Copyright © 2023 Nebraska Republican Party, All rights reserved.

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Strong unions, stronger economy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

We’re entering into a new golden-age for the American labor movement. Union election petitions rose by 53 percent [https://www.epi.org/publication/unionization-2022/] between October 2021 and September 2022. Workers at companies like Starbucks and Amazon are unionizing in droves. Graduate student workers [https://www.fastcompany.com/90868530/graduate-student-unions-temple-duke-rutgers] throughout the US have been striking and demanding fair compensation and benefits from their universities. And Gen Z is the most pro-union generation to date.

But we can’t just sit back and let union organizers do the hard work. We need to step up and stand with them. We need to support workers who choose to form unions, ensure that corporations allow free and fair union elections, and demand that union workers are not retaliated against by Big Business.

We can start by demanding that the Senate pass the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act. Introduced by Senator Bernie Sanders, this bill is designed to strengthen collective bargaining rights and hold corporations accountable for violating workers' rights.

Tell the U.S. Senate: Pass the PRO Act! [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/pro-act-unions?contactdata=VJ4IFDGh3MrrSQIV/NxzKKepz/mgDgZGZDa97FLeiFd5nfnuqGQWYkWSTrPeU3kH65NPb4vRU5ZCF0YbWWa0FgwBl1s4c+YLmFyTz5ZzuoQEA7XWLnnQMuN604Fb4OT/f/zP2UuicG9gixQKG2bpIg==]

Sign the Petition [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/pro-act-unions?contactdata=VJ4IFDGh3MrrSQIV/NxzKKepz/mgDgZGZDa97FLeiFd5nfnuqGQWYkWSTrPeU3kH65NPb4vRU5ZCF0YbWWa0FgwBl1s4c+YLmFyTz5ZzuoQEA7XWLnnQMuN604Fb4OT/f/zP2UuicG9gixQKG2bpIg==]

I have proudly stood with unions throughout my career, helping the United Auto Workers (UAW) secure federal worker retraining grants and fighting for fair contracts and labor practices with the Service Employees International Union (SEIU). While serving in the Department of Commerce during the Obama administration, I pushed to give labor unions a stronger voice in influencing economic policy. And this past week, I joined demonstrators outside Netflix’s New York headquarters in support of the Writers Guild of America as they strike for fair pay and job security.

[https://twitter.com/RoKhanna/status/1653951220111884290 [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna/status/1653951220111884290]

Strong unions mean a strong middle class and a stronger economy overall. They mean fair wages, improved benefits, and better working conditions for everyone. That’s why the fight for workers to unionize matters so much, and why we need to protect and support these unionization efforts.

Sign the petition and tell Congress to pass the PRO Act and strengthen workers’ rights! [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/pro-act-unions?contactdata=VJ4IFDGh3MrrSQIV/NxzKKepz/mgDgZGZDa97FLeiFd5nfnuqGQWYkWSTrPeU3kH65NPb4vRU5ZCF0YbWWa0FgwBl1s4c+YLmFyTz5ZzuoQEA7XWLnnQMuN604Fb4OT/f/zP2UuicG9gixQKG2bpIg==]

Onward,
Ro

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: IN 5 DAYS: Pennsylvania’s Democratic state house majority is on the line as we count down to these special elections! MAGA Republicans are eager to reverse their losses last November and hold up Democratic Gov. Josh Shapiro’s agenda.
body:
Important swing state legislature
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3e207482-6dd5-4420-909b-d9933e3e6056/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **You Can Make A Huge Difference Today.** _In FIVE DAYS there'll be 2 special elections in Pennsylvania to determine if we hold onto our state house majority--to protect democracy, abortion rights & enact gun safety--or lose it to a seditionist Republicans hostile to these essential rights._ [**_We have a 101-100 margin in the state house. Yet, if we lose both races, we'll be down 102-101. WE CAN'T LET THAT HAPPEN._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T67538e80-53dc-4149-966a-a519118e7032/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**There are 13 million Pennsylvanians who will suffer if we do. Worse yet, what happens in Pennsylvania doesn't stay there--guns, air & water pollution, economic panics (see Silicon Valley Bank) don't recognize state lines. Tens of millions more Americans live in surrounding states like New York, Ohio and New Jersey. They too, will suffer.**_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T979fe7e9-2c4b-4072-802b-f9da2ca0b3b6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Please, for the liberty of these tens of millions--and all Americans--support Democrats Heather Boyd, running to "protect women's bodily autonomy" and Trevor S. Finn's, who'll block the permitless carry of guns to protect our children fron the insanity we just saw in the Allen, TX mall._ [**_Will you join Blue Amp in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Heather Boyd & Trevor S. Finn to fight for our basic rights, instead of letting MAGA Republicans force dictatorial policies on so many of us?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T328c74a1-7071-449b-9179-5a5d1d9e60a4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting this fight everywhere it's required!_ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T546cace8-f430-4760-b62b-48dd0af33002/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Emilia Sykes
subject: My personal story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
Hi Peter, it’s Emilia. I wanted to take a moment to share my personal story with you and remind you why I’m in this fight.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63150503/405765303/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.11_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTAyYWQ0ZS0yZWYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9QzxJav9qXBuUeKcxYM_NcvpWe_UvGeFnoeYrNUbqw0=)
Hi Peter, it’s Emilia. I wanted to take a moment to share my personal story with you and remind you why I’m in this fight. [**I hope you’ll take a moment to read, but if you’re already with me, will you chip in $10 to my campaign to ensure Northeast Ohio continues to receive the best representation possible?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63150504/405765304/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.11_b1_es_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTAyYWQ0ZS0yZWYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9QzxJav9qXBuUeKcxYM_NcvpWe_UvGeFnoeYrNUbqw0=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63150505/405765305/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.11_b1_es_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTAyYWQ0ZS0yZWYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9QzxJav9qXBuUeKcxYM_NcvpWe_UvGeFnoeYrNUbqw0=)
I like to joke that most parents expose their children in utero to classical music and reading certain books – but I was exposed to city council meetings. Growing up in a household of public servants, the power of public service and the importance of using my voice to advocate for my community was ingrained in me from a young age.

So when I saw, first-hand, that Northeast Ohio families work incredibly hard every day but too often aren’t given the opportunity that many others enjoy, I knew I had to stand up and challenge the status quo.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63150506/405765306/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.11_b1_es_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTAyYWQ0ZS0yZWYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9QzxJav9qXBuUeKcxYM_NcvpWe_UvGeFnoeYrNUbqw0=)
**That’s why I entered a career in public service: To fight on behalf of the people against the powerful and change the status quo.**

That’s why, during my time as State Representative for Akron and Ohio's State House Minority Leader, I stood up against politicians who didn’t care about the day-to-day lives of Ohioans and worked across the aisle to fight for higher wages, middle and working-class tax cuts, and other legislation that would put more money in our pockets.

And that’s why, last year, I ran for – _and won_ – one of the most competitive House seats in the country.

Because our community knows we deserve an advocate on the federal level – someone who isn’t afraid to stand up for our jobs, healthcare, and freedoms and fight to make the day-to-day a little bit easier.

My promise to you is that I’ll always strive to be that type of leader, and that I’ll never stop delivering for the community I love. **When it comes to fighting for Northeast Ohio, I’m only just getting started.**

[**But, Peter, the reality is that the race here in OH-13 is, once again, shaping up to be one of the most competitive elections in the country. To defend this seat and continue delivering for Northeast Ohio in Congress, I’m going to need the support of this grassroots team. Please, will you join me in this fight and chip in to my re-election campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63150507/405765307/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.11_b1_es_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTAyYWQ0ZS0yZWYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9QzxJav9qXBuUeKcxYM_NcvpWe_UvGeFnoeYrNUbqw0=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63150508/405765308/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.11_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTAyYWQ0ZS0yZWYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9QzxJav9qXBuUeKcxYM_NcvpWe_UvGeFnoeYrNUbqw0=) | [$25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63150509/405765309/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.11_b1_es_all-nd&amount=25&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTAyYWQ0ZS0yZWYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9QzxJav9qXBuUeKcxYM_NcvpWe_UvGeFnoeYrNUbqw0=)

clean_body: Hi Peter, it’s Emilia. I wanted to take a moment to share my personal story with you and remind you why I’m in this fight. = Hi Peter, it’s Emilia. I wanted to take a moment to share my personal story with you and remind you why I’m in this fight. = = I like to joke that most parents expose their children in utero to classical music and reading certain books – but I was exposed to city council meetings. Growing up in a household of public servants, the power of public service and the importance of using my voice to advocate for my community was ingrained in me from a young age. So when I saw, first-hand, that Northeast Ohio families work incredibly hard every day but too often aren’t given the opportunity that many others enjoy, I knew I had to stand up and challenge the status quo. = That’s why I entered a career in public service: To fight on behalf of the people against the powerful and change the status quo. That’s why, during my time as State Representative for Akron and Ohio's State House Minority Leader, I stood up against politicians who didn’t care about the day-to-day lives of Ohioans and worked across the aisle to fight for higher wages, middle and working-class tax cuts, and other legislation that would put more money in our pockets. And that’s why, last year, I ran for – and won – one of the most competitive House seats in the country. Because our community knows we deserve an advocate on the federal level – someone who isn’t afraid to stand up for our jobs, healthcare, and freedoms and fight to make the day-to-day a little bit easier. My promise to you is that I’ll always strive to be that type of leader, and that I’ll never stop delivering for the community I love. When it comes to fighting for Northeast Ohio, I’m only just getting started. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you so much. It’s an honor to have you on this team. Emilia A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. My 2024 presidential endorsement...I want you to know that I am 100% behind Donald Trump in 2024.

Peter,

Things were better under President Trump. **They just were.**

Our economy was stronger. Gas was cheaper. Our neighborhoods were safer. Our border was more secure. The list goes on and on.

Perhaps most importantly, America was more respected in the world because we had a leader who projected courage and strength.

**Under President Biden’s weak leadership, everything has tanked in the past two years. Gas prices. The economy. The culture. Everything.**

Our Republican majority in the House is busy getting things back on track, but to truly save our great country, we need to win back the White House.

I know and like each of the Republican presidential candidates, **but I want you to know that I am 100% behind Donald Trump in 2024.**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1f1e38627bd449c9b39428d8a0e94827&_e=X9XeeeiYqhbCZ9FKDnvGBlYanbcTi7f1LuASFSC_PxzauxBvx0L06jHtX2IP7C1-PFIOXUc7n0wZTdbwjtf69NhfEp_UXqyLxIiz9CJODN-mmM6o4DiFXYJmFwlOMSWfn-zIrJC_oie0qjkUxBeYxoJXQj3-_2mhgvugxaS2g5VNEV01NWD1xrZMbfyZB9O7MK_BghGZkuGvRe2gwLH4Vt72kbpqATq7KaEBEQVBf7DhB59mGaLF6-hHUQlTbEJRjHVXKRRcn0j9kyCmDfLesQ7pBJyaybbAWSE25tPMlt78FWTRzYiMsUhQuEGnGnBpiUuvjjf1b8JpdXNOe6S2GFVrSN2fMaDuVWFChXfcBDiYzjSJ-cqwGLXUgaPkF6lX1UcmXJ-tKqVkgJUwm9BGFhsf-iH653wBHq_2T93L-eyj1zO8CR8pv4uqtubkXFjX2PZKuysDWdnRfKu4eljRVUI9sWfEqD2mUJMPjDhvOgeey_dqxygWN6pRBMQ4kXH3)
No president in my lifetime has demonstrated Trump’s willingness to keep their word and get things done. And he did it with **everyone** in Washington against him.

**It’s quite clear that the swamp will stop at nothing to scuttle Trump’s candidacy.** They started their relentless attack before he was even a candidate, and they will NEVER stop. The reason? It’s because Trump doesn’t need them. He’s a self-made man who loves this country and is willing to stand up for ordinary citizens against the corruption in Washington.

That’s why no one, and I mean NO ONE scares the radical left more than Donald Trump.

**I’m 100% in![Please let me know what you think by clicking the link!](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1f1e38627bd449c9b39428d8a0e94827&_e=X9XeeeiYqhbCZ9FKDnvGBlYanbcTi7f1LuASFSC_PxzauxBvx0L06jHtX2IP7C1-PFIOXUc7n0wZTdbwjtf69NhfEp_UXqyLxIiz9CJODN-mmM6o4DiFXYJmFwlOMSWfn-zIrJC_oie0qjkUxBeYxoJXQj3-_2mhgvugxaS2g5VNEV01NWD1xrZMbfyZB9O7MK_BghGZkuGvRe2gwLH4Vt72kbpqATq7KaEBEQVBf7DhB59mGaLF6-hHUQlTbEJRjHVXKRRcn0j9kyCmDfLesQ7pBJyaybbAWSE25tPMlt78FWTRzYiMsUhQuEGnGnBpiUuvjjf1b8JpdXNOe6S2GFVrSN2fMaDuVWFChXfcBDjq4ZSuik515CLGkH7LpnzEJ0WjjGq_VMG6ycKkIY3HNxJCq7angZiGrtMhU0Yl6xLw_qcGjL40ZWFq2H5VLYBIoB-INjvd0kgqvYKUhtwhqnk-0l9Dx18UMem7KUC5ibo--CoejZ2zdeDckS0I39lr) **

God Bless,
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1f1e38627bd449c9b39428d8a0e94827&_e=X9XeeeiYqhbCZ9FKDnvGBlYanbcTi7f1LuASFSC_PxzauxBvx0L06jHtX2IP7C1-PFIOXUc7n0wZTdbwjtf69NhfEp_UXqyLxIiz9CJODN-mmM6o4DiFXYJmFwlOMSWfn-zIrJC_oie0qjkUxBeYxoJXQj3-_2mhgvugxaS2g5VNEV01NWD1xrZMbfyZB9O7MK_BghGZkuGvRe2gwLH4Vt72kbpqATq7KaEBEQVBf7DhB59mGaLF6-hHUQlTbEJRjHVXKRRcn0j9kyCmDfLesQ7pBJyaybbAWSE25tPMlt78FWTRzYiMsUhQuEGnGnBpiUuvjjf1b8JpdXNOe6S2GFVrSN2fMaDuVWFChXfcBDggLh-FLo2UTC1aIR5TZVTKdPse92MTW3NjVSmq81yXtnVs4VF432yiuihpUeS5MJS8FFJtZfZGVmE8eKOSdZOduZyVuXNXz_lD91pnyGr65-oShRCG31QlUeJXUfRYs82b0H1SIqlt3oZbMhpBQe6M)

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1f1e38627bd449c9b39428d8a0e94827&_e=X9XeeeiYqhbCZ9FKDnvGBlYanbcTi7f1LuASFSC_PxzauxBvx0L06jHtX2IP7C1-PFIOXUc7n0wZTdbwjtf69NhfEp_UXqyLxIiz9CJODN-mmM6o4DiFXYJmFwlOMSWfn-zIrJC_oie0qjkUxBeYxoJXQj3-_2mhgvugxaS2g5VNEV01NWD1xrZMbfyZB9O7MK_BghGZkuGvRe2gwLH4Vt72kbpqATq7KaEBEQVBf7DhB59mGaLF6-hHUQlTbEJRjHVXKRRcn0j9kyCmDfLesQ7pBJyaybbAWSE25tPMlt78FWTRzYiMsUhQuEGnGnBpiUuvjjf1b8JpdXNOe6S2GFVrSN2fMaDuVWFChXfcBDgE2M4vMom9o7hDoaJfqJ06RyqX7G1eSiMfIVefe2LQuMfxKNaWS97RvwewLlJnRWHAU2PNqdVytX-6Ggf84kcnzdyw7H0drWax_PXeMInvucJgVXUy-f3sVvgZxGNPgOHV7jdfrTNmt1_A5dTUJkMc)

Dan is taking action to defend our democratic institutions and fight for New Yorkers in Congress. He’s introduced legislation like the _Early Voting Act_ to expand access to the ballot box nationwide, crafted legislation to improve access to mental health care and invest billions in much-needed repairs for NYCHA residents, and is fighting back against MAGA extremism every day.
**Dan’s work in Congress gives me hope — and it’s why I’m a part of this team.**
My role on this campaign is to build our path to victory in 2024 and ensure we have all the resources we need to take back New York for Democrats and flip the House. But as we look ahead to next year’s elections, we’re facing a huge challenge.
**According to _Axios_ , House Republicans have “dominated” Democrats’ in fundraising since last November.** GOP leaders like Elise Stefanik have already raised _$3 million_ to target New York Democrats like Pat Ryan and prop up extreme candidates across the country. Make no mistake, we’re going all-in to defend toss-up seats, but it’s going to take significant resources.
**[So Peter, will you please consider making a donation to support our campaign today? Early investment is what helped us win last year, and it can make the difference again as we look toward 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63151001/405767208/-648373131?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230511_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWJmYmE2ZC0yZmYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=40wuAVUzlqe5Vco8ZRzrB3nfusggxuDtb6pbJD_-yFA=)**
I’ll be in touch as we continue to build up our 2024 campaign. Thank you for all your support for Dan so far, and for all that you continue to do.
— Caroline

Friend,
America is in serious trouble.
Our justice system has been HIJACKED by corrupt political forces who use their power, money, and connections to destroy anyone who stands in their way.
I have once again become the target of a disgusting witch hunt that lacks _ANY_ EVIDENCE, PROOF, or EYEWITNESSES.
**But my freedom and justice did not matter to the Marxists who orchestrated this witch hunt in a city where the voter registration of the jury pool favors Democrats 7:1.**
_This witch hunt was funded by a Democrat mega-donor who slept at Pedophile Jeffrey Epstein 's private island - with a Clinton-appointed judge presiding over the bogus trial._
Let me be as clear as humanly possible: I did NOTHING wrong.
_So, I 'll tell you what this is all about... _
Everybody has seen the polls. No one honestly believes that Joe Biden - sitting at a 36% approval rating - can beat me in a _**fair**_ election next year.
**So, the Democrats have decided that their strategy is to launch witch hunt after witch hunt to try and bleed me dry.**
But the Democrats don't understand that I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the radical Left. _There is not a single attack on the face of the planet that will break me._
...Because I know that if this left-wing cabal can slander and attack a former U.S. President, they could one day do it to a private citizen like **YOU**.
_I refuse to let that happen. I refuse to let America 's justice system completely collapse._
Together, we will win back the White House and we will SAVE AMERICA.

| Friend
As of right now, Title 42 is set to expire at midnight tonight...
What is Title 42? Title 42 is a Federal Government mandate that has allowed Border Patrol agents to expel illegal immigrants from the U.S. back to their home country in times of a public health emergency.
Why is it important? Title 42 has been the only effective policy that has granted power to Border Patrol agents to prevent drug traffickers and criminals from entering our country.
What can we do about it? We need to show as much support as possible to AMERICA FIRST fighters like Kat who are ready to defend our nation and end the border crisis once and for all!

subject: Born-alive babies need our help
body:
Americans United for Life is committed to exposing the truth about abortion and protecting the most vulnerable through policy and legislation

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=51fc429ff47542fc83fc581eac990111&_e=ZL2YUhHaOmQN0CKYKyokemiKqXeRh-FWSn7NOsCpTMGv748Q4KnB9cwr8RFoWb8yCAy-kb0wZl9g7g855HarOr-t0mACvaQmnax4CcM5tyEcYUiPG0bp3hRSGSv5Iwu0WZ2PLOzUTODLWkS1tlOJTByV7ZmUWdtWQbg8FOgopF9xMqR3eKhP2M7YSmwcbkgpDrW5qBEu3ZGZPH9NGjxH-6xjJmfiIzqpCquGfwivClshlRwF8vvubwUKukPaRm3DwGmFZg1cXdvut-EP2eAO1NFUQzupNuS7QywdH2OFvgro7Y9j1SUyrTA_I7SZI8Pm)
---
Friend, A baby is born - alive - after _surviving_ an attempted abortion. But what happens next is not the same in all places ... because, Friend, that precious baby's life is NOT YET protected in all 50 states! [**Will you stand with Americans United for Life to help us ensure born-alive babies are given medical care in _all 50 states_? Please add your name to our urgent national petition right now.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=51fc429ff47542fc83fc581eac990111&_e=ZL2YUhHaOmQN0CKYKyokemiKqXeRh-FWSn7NOsCpTMGv748Q4KnB9cwr8RFoWb8yCAy-kb0wZl9g7g855HarOr-t0mACvaQmnax4CcM5tyEcYUiPG0bp3hRSGSv5Iwu0WZ2PLOzUTODLWkS1tlOJTByV7ZmUWdtWQbg8FOgopF8LN5XWJbEBlhoaT_p-QjUlzYbVwDHYD6gdcIg2TC5cwaZSpk0r0LnQsTWqxiCKxhGnYej_3873dw8hrjqdHoUYscKeBAeg9iE3fGCZTm19MTCvNb0n4VqLglmZd_s7h_u8lRhsWU5g1Ohc5kTQHZzg)
---
[Sign the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=51fc429ff47542fc83fc581eac990111&_e=ZL2YUhHaOmQN0CKYKyokemiKqXeRh-FWSn7NOsCpTMGv748Q4KnB9cwr8RFoWb8yCAy-kb0wZl9g7g855HarOr-t0mACvaQmnax4CcM5tyEcYUiPG0bp3hRSGSv5Iwu0WZ2PLOzUTODLWkS1tlOJTByV7ZmUWdtWQbg8FOgopF-EpYiYUYM-__6UuEIveYuKkBRjICloRX_czqBeYsyZa_ok00jWa0Flx-WmfaCMxJ6YXEGrGaq51FPvjX9PL4dyQ-oqnQIDpM2ZPf-8B2fq5rKyFM_j-BkR3IiGiXl72uzhrws6_1Ti3Dqqv6oDenWF)
---
Thanks to advances in medical science, babies as young as just 21 or 22 weeks gestation can increasingly survive outside the womb - but only with the care of medical professionals. **But in many states, babies of that age or later who survive abortion _are not given legal protection_.** Friend, I'm sure you would agree that infants surviving attempted abortions are in critical need of medical intervention to provide comfort care and increase their chances of survival... ...and born-alive infants who survive an abortion attempt deserve to be protected under the law, treated with human dignity, and given appropriate care! [**Please help Americans United for Life continue to fight to protect born-alive babies in all 50 states. Add your name to this urgent petition now to stand with us.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=51fc429ff47542fc83fc581eac990111&_e=ZL2YUhHaOmQN0CKYKyokemiKqXeRh-FWSn7NOsCpTMGv748Q4KnB9cwr8RFoWb8yCAy-kb0wZl9g7g855HarOr-t0mACvaQmnax4CcM5tyEcYUiPG0bp3hRSGSv5Iwu0WZ2PLOzUTODLWkS1tlOJTByV7ZmUWdtWQbg8FOgopF-Ecy8Hq_DVbZC0m8cbyW8pf-MFXcPXyA3NZQvTiEHDEQGG19omMQlYwm9V0Ijw3iEV24LGrjITUor4rEkNH9umHRtp6_UxGiDveKu_nrFmMAUTRVYLg2LfXLPUH2MJd5A8t8iYFNHB9VQUlemZG67V)
---
[Sign the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=51fc429ff47542fc83fc581eac990111&_e=ZL2YUhHaOmQN0CKYKyokemiKqXeRh-FWSn7NOsCpTMGv748Q4KnB9cwr8RFoWb8yCAy-kb0wZl9g7g855HarOr-t0mACvaQmnax4CcM5tyEcYUiPG0bp3hRSGSv5Iwu0WZ2PLOzUTODLWkS1tlOJTByV7ZmUWdtWQbg8FOgopF_aeAk5dh4HZlEXrquHeI0uBlV0SZnTc98GZycb6TvQeUN0tAZDGomhQFULeb932UAdUuwo9vkOmLhY14cP0aFPwGjNEDUYwY4uffx74jum89ykBfF94upgRVMLr_gasWwALuqzFZb7-rR6LN1Vgvpi)
---
Your support today can help protect precious babies in America this year. Currently, just eight states in the U.S. report abortion information on born-alive infants. From those eight states, reports show that 35 infants in 2020 and 2021 were born alive and another 8 babies were born alive just in Florida in 2022. Nationally, there are no numbers available. But in a study that looked at 241 children aborted for having a suspected fetal anomaly between 20 and 24 weeks, 122 infants _survived_ the procedure! [**Please stand with Americans United for Life 's efforts to ensure abortion survivors receive care to increase their chances of survival and alleviate their pain. All 50 states need to treat these children with human dignity; if you agree, please sign our petition today.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=51fc429ff47542fc83fc581eac990111&_e=ZL2YUhHaOmQN0CKYKyokemiKqXeRh-FWSn7NOsCpTMGv748Q4KnB9cwr8RFoWb8yCAy-kb0wZl9g7g855HarOr-t0mACvaQmnax4CcM5tyEcYUiPG0bp3hRSGSv5Iwu0WZ2PLOzUTODLWkS1tlOJTByV7ZmUWdtWQbg8FOgopF_FlLeR8Si-UEpjPr1OdMHx22tlyZhCfxA5AQPaV-F2iuZpocV3DTzoTK4lzyMvowoBcaI7G79xRQfHzwyi-aNM7bxc1fhZXiDd7FB-jZ9-RtxlNPJSCVn7h_vqdHqb3qDC_RKWq9d0cbCTCnHkkOTB) As America's first national pro-life organization, AUL has saved thousands of precious lives through behind-the-scenes work in America's legislatures, courts, and public life. _We 're in pursuit of real change and tangible impact. _ Americans United for Life is committed to exposing the truth about abortion and protecting the most vulnerable through policy and legislation. We're representing those without a voice, advancing the human right to life, and working on your behalf to:
* Ensure all 50 states and every territory have policies that require healthcare professionals to provide medically appropriate and reasonable care for survivors of abortion.
* Establish enforcement mechanisms to ensure that born-alive infants receive proper medical care.
* Provide civil and criminal penalties for violation of laws that protect babies who survive attempted abortions.

No one has a right to commit infanticide, nor justify the denial of basic protections for the born, living human infants. But, without legislative protections, born-alive babies In a majority of states will continue to suffer. [**The most vulnerable lives need our help, which is why I need your signature on the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies today.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=51fc429ff47542fc83fc581eac990111&_e=ZL2YUhHaOmQN0CKYKyokemiKqXeRh-FWSn7NOsCpTMGv748Q4KnB9cwr8RFoWb8yCAy-kb0wZl9g7g855HarOr-t0mACvaQmnax4CcM5tyEcYUiPG0bp3hRSGSv5Iwu0WZ2PLOzUTODLWkS1tlOJTByV7ZmUWdtWQbg8FOgopF_39yZUTrc_SJ90jCGs1fiiqfa8RshTPzWMnsR35l6zjtTVIKi5X8qYybXv_u7B6wv2v1Yg-e7ZVpf-h8JU5cjiREiBddXm3GbyNVKCD7nahoDkMX1NiLmdg_gT0XGeQ4O1s8bPQ_T1HYBkmnEGpnOH) Founded in 1971, two years before the tragic _Roe v. Wade_ decision, Americans United for Life is still fighting for preborn and born-alive babies over 50 years later! _Since our founding, those not yet born have been dehumanized, life itself has become politicized, and the most vulnerable have faced increasing marginalization due to their age, ability, or perceived value._ Americans United for Life is working to ensure all survivors of abortion are welcomed throughout life and protected by law. But we can't do this work alone. This is a fight we will win -- culturally and legally, locally and nationally -- if we have the support of Americans who recognize the importance of protecting born-alive babies. [**Will you sign this petition to help us protect survivors of abortion in all 50 states?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=51fc429ff47542fc83fc581eac990111&_e=ZL2YUhHaOmQN0CKYKyokemiKqXeRh-FWSn7NOsCpTMGv748Q4KnB9cwr8RFoWb8yCAy-kb0wZl9g7g855HarOr-t0mACvaQmnax4CcM5tyEcYUiPG0bp3hRSGSv5Iwu0WZ2PLOzUTODLWkS1tlOJTByV7ZmUWdtWQbg8FOgopF_8-7SjQs1QRd7QE8EWiBC0_xuM4Rq20wUEjPv5QsvVbxKu7YAzpLL5LYpTFiLUR0yF9uCWfGCBeJi5DAmVOZRJcoP5phgkPlzfVl-mQJ6Il2CMPQYMLqMCcgzqTw_cfGzoPmJAXDPS8YDPErAW1cqo)

clean_body: Americans United for Life is committed to exposing the truth about abortion and protecting the most vulnerable through policy and legislation | | | Friend, A baby is born - alive - after surviving an attempted abortion. But what happens next is not the same in all places ... because, Friend, that precious baby's life is NOT YET protected in all 50 states! Thanks to advances in medical science, babies as young as just 21 or 22 weeks gestation can increasingly survive outside the womb - but only with the care of medical professionals. But in many states, babies of that age or later who survive abortion are not given legal protection. Friend, I'm sure you would agree that infants surviving attempted abortions are in critical need of medical intervention to provide comfort care and increase their chances of survival... ...and born-alive infants who survive an abortion attempt deserve to be protected under the law, treated with human dignity, and given appropriate care! Your support today can help protect precious babies in America this year. Currently, just eight states in the U.S. report abortion information on born-alive infants. From those eight states, reports show that 35 infants in 2020 and 2021 were born alive and another 8 babies were born alive just in Florida in 2022. Nationally, there are no numbers available. But in a study that looked at 241 children aborted for having a suspected fetal anomaly between 20 and 24 weeks, 122 infants survived the procedure! As America's first national pro-life organization, AUL has saved thousands of precious lives through behind-the-scenes work in America's legislatures, courts, and public life. We 're in pursuit of real change and tangible impact. Americans United for Life is committed to exposing the truth about abortion and protecting the most vulnerable through policy and legislation. We're representing those without a voice, advancing the human right to life, and working on your behalf to: Ensure all 50 states and every territory have policies that require healthcare professionals to provide medically appropriate and reasonable care for survivors of abortion. Establish enforcement mechanisms to ensure that born-alive infants receive proper medical care. * Provide civil and criminal penalties for violation of laws that protect babies who survive attempted abortions. No one has a right to commit infanticide, nor justify the denial of basic protections for the born, living human infants. But, without legislative protections, born-alive babies In a majority of states will continue to suffer. Founded in 1971, two years before the tragic Roe v. Wade decision, Americans United for Life is still fighting for preborn and born-alive babies over 50 years later! Since our founding, those not yet born have been dehumanized, life itself has become politicized, and the most vulnerable have faced increasing marginalization due to their age, ability, or perceived value. Americans United for Life is working to ensure all survivors of abortion are welcomed throughout life and protected by law. But we can't do this work alone. This is a fight we will win -- culturally and legally, locally and nationally -- if we have the support of Americans who recognize the importance of protecting born-alive babies. For life, Kevin Tordoff Americans United for Life Americans United for Life 1150 Connecticut Avenue NW, Suite 500 Washington, DC 20036 Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

We have no choice but to fight back NOW! | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you, — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: =?utf-8?Q?Carmen=20Goers?=
subject: Enumclaw Mayor Jan Molinaro Endorses Carmen Goers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carmen for Congress]( "Paid for by Carmen for Congress")
body:
I’m grateful for Mayor Molinaro’s recognition of my proven record as a community leader | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/261f11cf45b5/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-in-the-8th-congressional-district-13549219?e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=a2f7e95a66&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | Peter,
---
| I’m excited to announce that Enumclaw Mayor Jan Molinaro has endorsed my campaign to serve Washingtonians in Congress!

Mayor Molinaro’s decades of experience in Operations Management has given residents a leader with expertise in managing a city budget of over $50 million with integrity and accountability since 2017.
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=c4379418df&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| **I’m deeply honored to have Mayor Jan Molinaro’s endorsement.** Our nation needs more leaders like Mayor Molinaro who will put the American taxpayer dollar to work to enrich the lives of residents while advancing the progress of our communities’ infrastructure.

I’m grateful for Mayor Molinaro’s recognition of my proven record as a community leader. Our nation’s greatness is a result of dedicated public servants whose efforts have led to improved lives and American exceptionalism.

When politicians become preoccupied with self-gain from the taxpayer dollars of constituents, the neglect is visible in the communities they represent.

**As a future Congresswoman,** I look forward to offering my experience and commitment as a community leader in putting the federal government to work for the great people of Washington.
**_[Peter,](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=9f0ce8a503&e=0e51d1e991)_**[**with the exciting news of this endorsement, perhaps you would consider offering one of your own today:**](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=ff2951d821&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| [ENDORSE GOERS FOR CONGRESS](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=f7dfc36333&e=0e51d1e991 "ENDORSE GOERS FOR CONGRESS")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=36dd61cddd&e=0e51d1e991 "CONTRIBUTE TODAY")
---
| For Washington,
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=c99571bf77&e=0e51d1e991)
---

Candidate for U.S. Congress, WA-8

name: =?utf-8?Q?Gabe=20Amo?=
subject: NEW: I’m the first candidate who has earned a mayoral endorsement in the race to represent RI-01 in Congress.
body:
Grateful to have Newport Mayor Xay Khamsyvoravong’s support! | | | |
---
| | | Friend,

Great news: Our campaign for Congress has been endorsed by **Newport Mayor Xay Khamsyvoravong!** [](https://gabeamo.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cc42fee5a4ff30fb7e2aead18&id=0521d07293&e=9651074c98) Check out what Mayor Khamsyvoravong said about our campaign:

**“Mayors need partners in Congress who we can count on to show up and help when it matters most. Gabe Amo was often the first call from the White House that my colleagues across the country received when they were guiding their communities through their darkest moments and hardest challenges.” said Khamsyvoravong. “I’ve known Gabe for almost twenty years, and he’s always showed up for Rhode Islanders. I’m proud to endorse Gabe Amo to represent Rhode Island’s First Congressional District.” **

I’m immensely proud and grateful to be the first candidate in the race for Congress to receive a mayoral endorsement. From my time at the State House and the White House, I know our cities and towns are on the front lines in supporting Rhode Islanders. Dynamic leaders like Mayor Xay Khamsyvoravong are crucial to the wellbeing and success of our entire state.

I look forward to the work — and friends, this is just the beginning. We’re going to build a coalition of strong leaders across Rhode Island in our campaign for Congress. You can show your support by [sharing and liking my announcement tweet](https://gabeamo.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cc42fee5a4ff30fb7e2aead18&id=1770b8e797&e=9651074c98) and [donating to our team](https://gabeamo.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cc42fee5a4ff30fb7e2aead18&id=148ee9ce25&e=9651074c98) today. [****](https://gabeamo.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cc42fee5a4ff30fb7e2aead18&id=78d9f62954&e=9651074c98) Forward,

Gabe Amo

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63152485/405771434/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDgyZDY4Zi0zM2YwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NRcyCLrh8GojdT7HszVza6ILQv5KeRBrHHiqkZUfkNo=&emci=cd82d68f-33f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=d482d68f-33f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379)
I just got off the House floor, Peter.

**As a proud son of Mexican immigrants, I had to speak out against House Republicans’ latest extreme anti-immigration bill, H.R. 2.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63152486/405771435/-569515752?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDgyZDY4Zi0zM2YwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NRcyCLrh8GojdT7HszVza6ILQv5KeRBrHHiqkZUfkNo=)
This bill isn’t about fixing our immigration system. It’s about intentionally hurting asylum-seeking families and creating more chaos that can be covered by Fox News day-and-night.
And chaos is exactly what Republicans want. This bill would destroy the asylum system as we know it, bring back cages for children and families, and even eliminate funding for the ~legal~ immigration system.

**I'm fighting for an efficient, humane, and orderly immigration system that lives up to our values. That’s why I’ve signed onto bills like the New Way Forward Act.** [**Can you chip in $20, or whatever you can, to help us fight back against this attack on immigrants and deliver real reform?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63152487/405771436/-569515752?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDgyZDY4Zi0zM2YwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NRcyCLrh8GojdT7HszVza6ILQv5KeRBrHHiqkZUfkNo=)

Earlier this week, fellow Texas Congressman Joaquin Castro and I delivered $38 million in funding to support migrant families in San Antonio — helping to connect them with their loved ones so they can begin the legal immigration process.

That’s the kind of investment we need to fix our immigration system and support asylum seekers. Caging kids and further militarizing our border isn’t the answer.

**[Help me fight for real reform – chip in $20 or whatever you can to support our fight for immigrants and asylum seekers.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63152491/405771440/-569515752?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDgyZDY4Zi0zM2YwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NRcyCLrh8GojdT7HszVza6ILQv5KeRBrHHiqkZUfkNo=)**

Thank you,
-Greg

That’s why I’ve signed onto bills like the New Way Forward Act. = **= Earlier this week, fellow Texas Congressman Joaquin Castro and I delivered $38 million in funding to support migrant families in San Antonio — helping to connect them with their loved ones so they can begin the legal immigration process. That’s the kind of investment we need to fix our immigration system and support asylum seekers. Caging kids and further militarizing our border isn’t the answer. = Thank you, -Greg Greg Casar Congressman Texas Congressional District 35 ****=** | ****** ---|---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=537392ac7dcb4bc68bfad64887244bfd&_e=iq1LsQheg3Fa8UG2o0lU_VLVUmlAsWPcSsO0ntMvh1PipxH7UzD4jLJncBqqeSz_3TCtDR-7grG2v4PMgC6Rb2BLkhKda61R0GF4NPVCtGakCNjqp3OKltZFy1cWVQX3T4m5t1n83gp4CVEROlHfZj_YFxLf_dKW5VXgRcSATH3H7zpybyU4ZrwYrNAXO0dqUN7NBtUvKJBxe6T03bA8_Ycv3Qw9_AO4TBfcUhVa-AIk3wb4ha-rdEJbXv2PCwc_Ih69_cOwAmu2mZS8RJ8aBwrOhnhuy5QNf7RR6bXAoSPNVHMs6zjdBs4pSJDE6D2Be6olNxV-F5To9Gbm_ZCCMd8QlMMmqeBLvrpFiAnPEs5sxeYHDi9sw0NoMppQKz8qmc_OZ5mi0ViLa72YP0dVVUm0pGh8Y6cngFssAJei1uciQ8H1zD8NLcHXePN-zV9G)

Friend,
America is in serious trouble.
Our justice system has been HIJACKED by corrupt political forces who use their power, money, and connections to destroy anyone who stands in their way.
I have once again become the target of a disgusting witch hunt that lacks _ANY_ EVIDENCE, PROOF, or EYEWITNESSES.

Let me be as clear as humanly possible: I did NOTHING wrong.
_So, I 'll tell you what this is all about... _
Everybody has seen the polls. No one honestly believes that Joe Biden - sitting at a 36% approval rating - can beat me in a _**fair**_ election next year.
**So, the Democrats have decided that their strategy is to launch witch hunt after witch hunt to try and bleed me dry.**
But the Democrats don't understand that I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the radical Left. _There is not a single attack on the face of the planet that will break me._
...Because I know that if this left-wing cabal can slander and attack a former U.S. President, they could one day do it to a private citizen like **YOU**.
_I refuse to let that happen. I refuse to let America 's justice system completely collapse._
Together, we will win back the White House and we will SAVE AMERICA.

clean_body: ########################## | | | Friend, America is in serious trouble. Our justice system has been HIJACKED by corrupt political forces who use their power, money, and connections to destroy anyone who stands in their way. I have once again become the target of a disgusting witch hunt that lacks ANY EVIDENCE, PROOF, or EYEWITNESSES. But my freedom and justice did not matter to the Marxists who orchestrated this witch hunt in a city where the voter registration of the jury pool favors Democrats 7:1. This witch hunt was funded by a Democrat mega-donor who slept at Pedophile Jeffrey Epstein 's private island - with a Clinton-appointed judge presiding over the bogus trial. Let me be as clear as humanly possible: I did NOTHING wrong. So, I 'll tell you what this is all about... Everybody has seen the polls. No one honestly believes that Joe Biden - sitting at a 36% approval rating - can beat me in a fair election next year. So, the Democrats have decided that their strategy is to launch witch hunt after witch hunt to try and bleed me dry. But the Democrats don't understand that I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the radical Left. There is not a single attack on the face of the planet that will break me. ...Because I know that if this left-wing cabal can slander and attack a former U.S. President, they could one day do it to a private citizen like YOU. I refuse to let that happen. I refuse to let America 's justice system completely collapse. Together, we will win back the White House and we will SAVE AMERICA. (But if you are doing poorly right now, please don 't even think about donating. Take care of yourself right now!) | Thank you, | Donald J. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63153467/405772380/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230511KhalifIntro_N_KA_90do_5_B_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3ZmVmZDcxLTM0ZjAtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i4nK1xScFiHWfKFRWG4UJrX7TDapJjTL-dXbWA5UqBo=)
| Hi fellow activist,

The New Pennsylvania Project is continuing its growth – and I am honored to say I am joining the team as the new Director!

I have long been dedicated to community organizing, engagement, and public policy, always centering vulnerable populations. I look forward to continuing that work with the New Pennsylvania Project. **[And with an election that will determine our Commonwealth’s House majority just five days away, I have already hit the ground running. Would you consider contributing $10 today to help fuel our efforts to get out the vote for this election? Anything you can spare is deeply appreciated.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63153468/405772381/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230511KhalifIntro_N_KA_90do_5_B_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3ZmVmZDcxLTM0ZjAtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i4nK1xScFiHWfKFRWG4UJrX7TDapJjTL-dXbWA5UqBo=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63153469/405772382/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230511KhalifIntro_N_KA_90do_5_B_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3ZmVmZDcxLTM0ZjAtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i4nK1xScFiHWfKFRWG4UJrX7TDapJjTL-dXbWA5UqBo=) Republicans in Harrisburg have sabotaged the integrity of our democracy, through both outright voter disenfranchisement and undermining confidence in its practice.

The New Pennsylvania Project’s work building a representative and inclusive electorate is vital to fighting back against that sabotage, and I am thrilled to have this opportunity to join them in strengthening our democracy. **[Next Tuesday’s special election in Delaware County is an excellent example of that work, with the balance of our State House resting on who turns out for a relatively obscure election in May. Will you make a $10 donation right now to help us educate and mobilize the voters of our focus communities in the little time we have clean_body: Let’s get to work building a representative and inclusive electorate in PA. = | Hi fellow activist, The New Pennsylvania Project is continuing its growth – and I am honored to say I am joining the team as the new Director! I have long been dedicated to community organizing, engagement, and public policy, always centering vulnerable populations. I look forward to continuing that work with the New Pennsylvania Project. = = Republicans in Harrisburg have sabotaged the integrity of our democracy, through both outright voter disenfranchisement and undermining confidence in its practice. The New Pennsylvania Project’s work building a representative and inclusive electorate is vital to fighting back against that sabotage, and I am thrilled to have this opportunity to join them in strengthening our democracy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Khalif Ali Director The New Pennsylvania Project = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. body:
| | Did you see Kim’s message? She sent you a survey to fill out yesterday but she’s still waiting on your response.

We need 1,000 responses before tonight at midnight and your input is critical. [Take a look at Kim’s note below and share your thoughts in our issues survey.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63153527/405772404/-368512245?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_WL_230511_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTlkOWE5NGYtMzRmMC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BwsuUQFlD0FSX631zDFhhlwecPL5iPh8xhSCPnjS6ko=&emci=864c1d14-51ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a9d9a94f-34f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971) | | **[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63153545/405772407/-368512245?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_WL_230511_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTlkOWE5NGYtMzRmMC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BwsuUQFlD0FSX631zDFhhlwecPL5iPh8xhSCPnjS6ko=&emci=864c1d14-51ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a9d9a94f-34f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971)**

**_Kim’s Original Message:_**

Hi, it’s Kim.

We’ve reached the point in the year when it feels like there’s a LOT going on – from multiple mass shootings that highlight our desperate need for an assault weapons ban to the chaos in Congress caused by Kevin McCarthy and his allies holding our economy hostage.

Hearing from you about your concerns makes me a better leader, and I promise to carry your stories with me to Congress and fight to make your voice heard.

[I want to hear from 1,000 of my supporters in the next 48 hours! Will you take one minute to share your thoughts with me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63153557/405772421/-368512245?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_WL_230511_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTlkOWE5NGYtMzRmMC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BwsuUQFlD0FSX631zDFhhlwecPL5iPh8xhSCPnjS6ko=&emci=864c1d14-51ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a9d9a94f-34f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971) | **[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63153564/405772428/-368512245?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_WL_230511_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTlkOWE5NGYtMzRmMC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BwsuUQFlD0FSX631zDFhhlwecPL5iPh8xhSCPnjS6ko=&emci=864c1d14-51ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a9d9a94f-34f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971)**
---
While Michelle Steel votes with the right-wing of her party to cut veteran benefits and food assistance programs, I’m traveling the 45th district talking with voters about the issues that matter most to them.

I want to make sure I hear from each one of my grassroots supporters, so my team and I put together a brief issues survey to get your input and hear your concerns.

[Please take a moment to fill out our issues survey and let me know what you care about most:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63153581/405772442/-368512245?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_WL_230511_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTlkOWE5NGYtMzRmMC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BwsuUQFlD0FSX631zDFhhlwecPL5iPh8xhSCPnjS6ko=&emci=864c1d14-51ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a9d9a94f-34f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971) | **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63153587/405772454/-368512245?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_WL_230511_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTlkOWE5NGYtMzRmMC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BwsuUQFlD0FSX631zDFhhlwecPL5iPh8xhSCPnjS6ko=&emci=864c1d14-51ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a9d9a94f-34f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971)**

Thank you so much for your support and your input.

Kim

| **Democrat Kim Bernice Nguyen is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation.** The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant, Kim's story is the quintessential California tale of sacrifice, hard work, and dedication to community. At just 25, she became the youngest person ever elected to the Garden Grove City Council. Now, she's running for Congress to reduce prescription drug costs, increase housing affordability, invest in working families, and strengthen our democracy.
