name: Laura Loomer
subject: This is crazy!
body:
I've been trickling out my expose on the secret gathering of Secretaries of State and election officials at a Mark Zuckerberg funded, Leftist event that took place this week to discuss the 2024 elections . . . and the story KEEPS BLOWING UP! | | | | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FERoCyKTakai07WO763HHpRGA%2Fdm9uWwWZrZqR3P52QePX7A/1/010001880c61c66a-9d708849-2211-417a-a563-0845f6a74f9c-000000/EbJZNvN6629RSimu_i5txCCbB3A=321) | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FERoCyKTakai07WO763HHpRGA%2Fdm9uWwWZrZqR3P52QePX7A/2/010001880c61c66a-9d708849-2211-417a-a563-0845f6a74f9c-000000/co-sU5FmE_EJd57VRNQ224iq-Z8=321) Dear Friend,

I've been trickling out my expose on the secret gathering of Secretaries of State and election officials at a Mark Zuckerberg funded, Leftist event that took place this week to discuss the 2024 elections . . . and the story KEEPS BLOWING UP!

**You won 't believe what happened today,** but before I get into that, I could [**really use your support**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FERoCyKTakai07WO763HHpRGA%2Fdm9uWwWZrZqR3P52QePX7A/3/010001880c61c66a-9d708849-2211-417a-a563-0845f6a74f9c-000000/4ufQDxMITPs0DvdRXoR2Qw1Kcb8=321). But, it's not about me . . . it's about getting out the TRUTH and exposing UNIPARTY corruption and illegal election interference that is funded by Big Tech!

body:
The Ohio GOP has proven that they will suppress the voices of Ohioans as long as it results in their own political gain, team.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63155482/405776162/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTRmNTM2Ny0zNmYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F56WEzwYQbhlMzUmDnYyws7aEN7ufPKxtJx_jwfFdkQ=) | Team, we're furious.

Last night, Ohio Republican politicians passed their self-serving measure through the House that will effectively END citizen-led ballot initiatives in Ohio. **Now, they're forcing Ohio taxpayers to foot the bill for a $20 million special election in August to vote on their shameless proposal.**

This attack on voters is the GOP's latest attempt to further their own extremist agendas. And they're blatantly using the legislature to sabotage the reproductive rights amendment Democrats are working to introduce this fall.

Attacking citizen-led ballot initiatives is bad for voters. It's bad for taxpayers. It's bad for our democracy. _And it's bad for Ohio._

**[Ohio Democrats are united in opposition against these political efforts to rip fundamental rights away from voters — and we need you with us. name: Helen Gym
subject: Our plan for the last five days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]
Hi team, we’re in a tied race with five days left. It’s clear our city’s future could be decided by a small handful of votes, so I’m reaching out personally to request your support of our Get Out The Vote Fund.

Every donation helps reach a few more voters, and every vote could change this race.

Here’s your personal link to chip in: actblue.com/donate/hhg-gotv-fund?supporter=dpwillis67@gmail.com [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-gotv-fund]

From the very beginning, we knew this race would come down to what we do in these last few days. It’s why we worked so hard to build the strongest grassroots movement in this race — a massive coalition of volunteers who’ve knocked tens of thousands of doors.

Now over these final five days, our team is preparing to speak with tens of thousands of undecided voters face-to-face, just as they’re preparing to vote. But we’re still about $5,801 short of what we need to fully fund our efforts.

We can’t afford to pull back in this crucial period, and that’s why I’m reaching out today. Will you please use your personalized link below to help close the $5,801 gap in our Get Out The Vote Fund?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-gotv-fund [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-gotv-fund]

Dollar by dollar, door by door, and vote by vote: We will transform this city.

So grateful to stand with you.

— Helen
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-feb2023]
Friends of Helen Gym
PO Box 11766
Philadelphia, PA 19101
United States
www.helengym.com [https://www.helengym.com/] | info@helengym.com [info@helengym.com]

We're gaining momentum. (❗ ❗ ❗)

I may have launched this campaign just a few months ago - but conservative voters are taking notice of our outsider campaign.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=67ed16c77d5942ca918639b787bb5269&_e=6tPL1IxRuDwFfiQ5X6e4jAAE3xrgCQn_4jVfIKHKxCVjdn3blTAXMbTR88S2SjfnSJnYFiyvlNfnC5MuC002UTuiVFG04tvUwuzj96tjWTvL5g-Mv9aGfm1AZH6hAps5dvrqheGohAb2QtO0md_rFXL5-9Y82mtqPX-nOYYFmS9X8E4gtWtiYUoU7iow49UNDlKMIetrgmFLb_hoxM6zF1GTEsK5KBYUOsCjEXRTbq_X3PT_h89OteABlI43fYevm6Z2lSg9_6nyWJcS9bZIuRmkqScX3BfBznCv_rRkWLOrCKx3h85edZdbIo72ELXSfnTpkZXD0OguH6g0NaY0tfOi1cTjELThcUh-e9F9YB3pTcch4daISSs17F67ba4HfPhjTfSS2kiBDJj1vgaTCx2Hos1tSiaqu9nKTOA_ZY6906nKRMzKclMblEBem-Tt)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

I had a lot of fun taking questions from voters last night at the town hall in New Hampshire – home of the FIRST-IN-THE-NATION primary.
No other Republican candidate has been working this hard to WIN the primary.
**That’s because I firmly believe that we need to wrap up the primary as soon as possible so that we can focus 100% of our energy on beating Crooked Joe.**

_Now is the time to climb even higher so that we can effectively wrap up the Republican nomination and win back the White House._

| Peter,

Ever since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , Republicans in states across the country and at the federal level have moved to _**restrict or completely eliminate reproductive rights.**_

It’s a dangerous pattern that has threatened the health of countless Americans, and if Republicans grow their majority in Congress in 2024, **_they will only become more aggressive in their restrictions._**

Abigail believes in a person’s fundamental right to choose, which is why she’s fearlessly working to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law. _**Around 58% of American women aged 13-44 live in a state hostile or extremely hostile to abortion**_ – Abigail is doing all she can to prevent Virginia from joining that cohort. And with _**2 million women of reproductive age here in Virginia,**_ that work is all the more important.

She will always work to protect reproductive rights, but to continue that important work, [_**we need your support to re-elect her. Will you contribute to our campaign today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63157663/405780804/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230511-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTNhODAwMmQtMzhmMC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wK3ymkqTNFlO8S6qYhU7efRTCULnR8HNB-RRkudSM1s=)

clean_body: She believes in a person’s fundamental right to choose. | = | Peter, Ever since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade , Republicans in states across the country and at the federal level have moved to restrict or completely eliminate reproductive rights. It’s a dangerous pattern that has threatened the health of countless Americans, and if Republicans grow their majority in Congress in 2024, they will only become more aggressive in their restrictions. Abigail believes in a person’s fundamental right to choose, which is why she’s fearlessly working to codify Roe v. Wade into law. Around 58% of American women aged 13-44 live in a state hostile or extremely hostile to abortion – Abigail is doing all she can to prevent Virginia from joining that cohort. And with 2 million women of reproductive age here in Virginia, that work is all the more important. She will always work to protect reproductive rights, but to continue that important work, = | = Anti-choice firebrands like Ron DeSantis – who recently signed an appalling 6-week abortion ban in Florida – are making political moves in our own backyard, where our own Republican governor has pledged to restrict reproductive rights. Abigail is on the frontlines advocating for reproductive healthcare protections at the federal level. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support, Team Spanberger * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. Box 3112 Fredericksburg , VA 22402 United States | | | ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. name: =?utf-8?Q?Russ=20Vought?=
subject: It has begun
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10356139?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
Friends,

Earlier this week Kevin McCarthy met with Joe Biden to discuss raising the debt limit. It was the first meeting in what will assuredly be a series of tense negotiations.

Fortunately, Speaker McCarthy came to the meeting with considerable leverage after passing a bill in the House that would **_cut_ nearly $5 trillion** from the woke and weaponized bureaucracy over the next 10 years in order to set America on a better fiscal path.

Legislation, I'm proud to say, that my team laid the groundwork for and is now the starting point of negotiations with Biden.

→ **Months ago we rolled out a[budget](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=6df73389f2&e=17913c7d6d) **with proposed spending cuts to the woke and weaponized bureaucracy.

→ **We pushed for concessions in the Speakership fight** to ensure 20 fiscally-conservative patriots achieved a substantive power-sharing agreement with GOP leadership.

→ **We educated members of Congress and their staff** on proposed cuts and how to eliminate nearly $5 trillion in spending.

We’ve been a leading voice in this fight from the very beginning and _we plan to see it to the end_. We can make cuts to the woke and weaponized bureaucracy **[but we need your help](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=471746e781&e=17913c7d6d)**.

Biden has attacked me personally for helping steer debt limit cuts. He’ll do it again. It means we’re getting under their skin.

I rarely ask, **[but $25, $50, or a very generous gift of $100 would keep us in the fight and guarantee your voice is heard](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=3bb98c1aa0&e=17913c7d6d)** by President Biden and the DC cartel.
---
| Sincerely,

Russ Vought
President
Citizens for Renewing America

Important breaking news in Ohio yesterday, team.
Yesterday, the Ohio House of Representatives passed Senate Joint Resolution 2 (SJR2), a measure that significantly impacts the fundamental rights of Ohioans.
[**Make no mistake -- this measure is unfair, unpopular, and unnecessary.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63158320/405781228/-1850250812?refcode=20230511_AOTL_F_OHSJR2_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRlMDhhNDk0LTM4ZjAtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=J8GZpV76V7LduCFzSiNL2lXK0qJRa4bkWkMKon3GTFA=)
The anti-democratic SJR2 resolution asks voters to raise the required threshold percentage for enacting constitutional amendments through ballot measures from 50 to 60 percent of the vote. By imposing this higher threshold, the measure would make it more difficult for Ohioans to amend their state's constitution and will limit their ability to shape their own democracy.
**[Ohioans have the right to a say in our democracy, but anti-democratic extremists are doing whatever it takes to stop that. All On The Line is ready to act now, but we need support from folks like you to ensure our voices are heard. **_“From gerrymandering to restricting ballot measures, Ohio Republicans are doing all they can to circumvent the will of the people in order to hold onto artificial power. Make no mistake, this is an attack on the right to vote and Ohioans deserve better. We will do all we can to ensure Ohio voters turn out to vote “no” in August and defeat this anti-democratic measure at the ballot box."
\-- Liz Wester, Director of Advocacy_**
Ohioans will have another opportunity to stop this controversial measure in August. And All On The Line is doubling down on our commitment to protect democracy by **mobilizing grassroots activists like you** to advocate for their rights and defeat this anti-democratic measure at the ballot box.
We are committed to **engaging the public** , ensuring voters in Ohio and beyond are equipped with the knowledge and awareness necessary to make informed choices within their power. We are championing voting accessibility through democracy reform efforts that support citizen-led initiatives -- **ensuring every voice is heard and every vote counts**.
[**Support All On The Line’s mobilization efforts to defeat SJR2 at the ballot box, and everywhere democracy is on the line.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63158330/405781236/-1850250812?refcode=20230511_AOTL_F_OHSJR2_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRlMDhhNDk0LTM4ZjAtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=J8GZpV76V7LduCFzSiNL2lXK0qJRa4bkWkMKon3GTFA=)

By imposing this higher threshold, the measure would make it more difficult for Ohioans to amend their state's constitution and will limit their ability to shape their own democracy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = “From gerrymandering to restricting ballot measures, Ohio Republicans are doing all they can to circumvent the will of the people in order to hold onto artificial power. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| | | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0ec94868edf444e1aa375b93d0d11e39&_e=RcpYl91-bM__jc8Vs36nyNvE419c1DaH_aD5QZ5cMWITSMPL_br0m3zm_Yt20ktyIUQT1cK5KkS9DZ7vTGn9ma1scdBFZUiR9aKlFR_Dbu6k_kg5QoJ8VqcCot3ymYignBVwJSVZMedRApuz_YHEykzQLH9NQEXnRHqO018qYaxm7xSN-aJs37blF3CVW-V1TzUD9G4i0KyyKNQ0TfLyZL1nxfY-aJJVuw9cJbBSmKotedM5XOM9s5d01T7Jh-ytqTJX3S5mERqkP_-IR3Lu0f-C6QgwCSlqVxx6x9XSd9IKluBWQjZW7CjJqbHOihIqgJItC824VC7SfeWrdLKUoNmDAhDYMsOatO4BKn58N1DisNbxW3IjHC3__UMi6LExxT8bxnGTeV1TA_tMivYaP8uaUE419cibmu0Ns2lTUgQZsJdhZFiCAfzjHkyAYeJt)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0ec94868edf444e1aa375b93d0d11e39&_e=RcpYl91-bM__jc8Vs36nyNvE419c1DaH_aD5QZ5cMWITSMPL_br0m3zm_Yt20ktyIUQT1cK5KkS9DZ7vTGn9ma1scdBFZUiR9aKlFR_Dbu6k_kg5QoJ8VqcCot3ymYignBVwJSVZMedRApuz_YHEykzQLH9NQEXnRHqO018qYaxm7xSN-aJs37blF3CVW-V1TzUD9G4i0KyyKNQ0TfLyZL1nxfY-aJJVuw9cJbBSmKotedM5XOM9s5d01T7Jh-ytqTJX3S5mERqkP_-IR3Lu0XbKJGr-0JZX67o0fdFLuOSvcTGLnFTipl0lM2pxQwnq6q9eT4f4B7QgwYBCj4ERWk5XYII8UXPSjhrhLFinfmfrd44II_pmFaDUFy_XbMEkWWwnp_ssvlXe3AovyOGIQjgjU3-pLchJtN21AfT9o6U20E1DX2dhPzAm6YfrTFMP)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0ec94868edf444e1aa375b93d0d11e39&_e=RcpYl91-bM__jc8Vs36nyNvE419c1DaH_aD5QZ5cMWITSMPL_br0m3zm_Yt20ktyIUQT1cK5KkS9DZ7vTGn9ma1scdBFZUiR9aKlFR_Dbu6k_kg5QoJ8VqcCot3ymYignBVwJSVZMedRApuz_YHEykzQLH9NQEXnRHqO018qYaxm7xSN-aJs37blF3CVW-V1TzUD9G4i0KyyKNQ0TfLyZL1nxfY-aJJVuw9cJbBSmKotedM5XOM9s5d01T7Jh-ytqTJX3S5mERqkP_-IR3Lu0UxcP3wThh60i9tknENRjOblmRKczv_9iYWr6aTbXPLzaTjBBbkk91-WaOdZjn-9h_HnmfMbbPLYCKKlfBDGc1vippbbZZZkohEqeOfIDw21kf4PN8OrXlhUAD6BxNXJoDFYMJtWR6_PHdWDCx0qx31YoeFf2bRXtBy_tPpPFOXr)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Reclaiming American Freedom

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: From student government to U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/88?t=1&akid=51%2E52803%2Er7pVIA)

| | Hey there, Peter! Well, it’s been a whirlwind couple of days here at Alsobrooks HQ. The outpouring of support and love I have received from this community just blew me away. I can’t thank you enough. I’m going to lean on this team a lot over the coming months, and I think it’s only fair that you know a little more about who I am, why I’m running, and what I hope to do in Washington. **[Before I get into it, though, can I ask you to make a quick $25 contribution to my campaign for the U.S. Senate?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/716?t=16&amount=25&akid=51%2E52803%2Er7pVIA)** | | | [Become a Founding Donor >>](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/716?t=17&amount=25&akid=51%2E52803%2Er7pVIA)
---
**Student Government**
[****](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/716?t=18&amount=25&akid=51%2E52803%2Er7pVIA)
Just call me President Alsobrooks!
This campaign has me thinking back aaaalllll the way to 1986, when I won my first-ever election for student government treasurer.
I was a freshman in high school then, and I set a goal: Become the student body president by senior year.
And I did it – because I chose not to waste my time dreaming about the next rung up on the ladder. What I did was dive into my role, find problems that needed solutions, and do the best job I possibly could. That was enough, and by my senior year, I was student body president!
**State’s Attorney**
[****](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/716?t=19&amount=25&akid=51%2E52803%2Er7pVIA)
On the campaign trail
[****](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/716?t=20&amount=25&akid=51%2E52803%2Er7pVIA)
Little Alex and me at my campaign kickoff
The next time I ran for office was when my daughter Alex was six. A friend of mine was visiting, and I told her I wouldn’t let Alex play in the yard unless I was keeping an eye on her. The neighborhood just didn’t feel safe.
**She said, “Angela, unless you plan to change it, we shouldn’t have this discussion again.”**
I decided to run for state’s attorney. With the love and support of my community, I was elected to my first term in 2010 and re-elected in 2014.
I repaid that support with action. Over two terms, my office implemented restorative justice policies that reduced crime rates, decreased recidivism, and helped former inmates build productive lives after release.
Together, we helped build the kind of community I wanted for Alex: A safe, peaceful place to live, work, and play.
**County Executive**
[****](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/716?t=21&amount=25&akid=51%2E52803%2Er7pVIA)
Me taking the oath of office at my inauguration!
[****](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/716?t=22&amount=25&akid=51%2E52803%2Er7pVIA)
We worked hard to keep Prince George's safe during COVID-19
After eight years as a state's attorney, I understood the causes of crime well – but I didn’t have the tools to address the problems that led people to the courtroom in the first place. But the County Executive’s office did.
**That’s when I jumped into my toughest race yet, and I’m so fortunate that this community showed up for me once again.**
My administration showed up for the people of Prince George’s every day. We took on complicated, deep-rooted problems and tackled them by listening to the needs of the community, abiding by the evidence, and implementing creative, smart solutions.
We invested in education, equipped testing and treatment facilities for COVID-19, incentivized business development, adapted policing techniques, built a treatment center to address mental illness and addiction, expanded opportunities for students, and so much more.
**Our Next Chapter**
[****](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/716?t=23&amount=25&akid=51%2E52803%2Er7pVIA)
Campaign launch day!
Marylanders don’t need hollow talking points and Band-Aid fixes from their representatives in Washington.
Marylanders deserve practical, comprehensive policies to break down barriers today and help us thrive tomorrow. I learned what that takes as County Executive, and I’m committed to doing better and going farther in the U.S. Senate.
I don’t want to keep you too long, so I just have one last request: **Every campaign takes a village, and this one is absolutely no exception.[Peter, can I count on you to become a Founding Donor of our groundbreaking campaign for the U.S. Senate to build lasting progress for Maryland?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/716?t=9&amount=25&akid=51%2E52803%2Er7pVIA)**
| | [Chip in $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/716?t=10&amount=25&akid=51%2E52803%2Er7pVIA)
---
| | [Chip in $50](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/716?t=11&amount=50&akid=51%2E52803%2Er7pVIA)
---
| | [Chip in $100](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/716?t=12&amount=100&akid=51%2E52803%2Er7pVIA)
---
| | [Chip in $200](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/716?t=13&amount=200&akid=51%2E52803%2Er7pVIA)
---
| | [Chip in $250](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/716?t=14&amount=250&akid=51%2E52803%2Er7pVIA)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/716?t=15&amount=35&akid=51%2E52803%2Er7pVIA)
---
From the bottom of my heart, thank you. I can’t wait to see where this journey takes us.
With love and gratitude,
Angela Alsobrooks

| | [ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/89?t=2&akid=51%2E52803%2Er7pVIA)
---

| | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [click here.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=51%2E52803%2Er7pVIA)
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/115?t=4&akid=51%2E52803%2Er7pVIA)
| | [ Chip in a one-time donation ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/91?t=5&akid=51%2E52803%2Er7pVIA)
---
| | [ Chip in a monthly recurring donation! ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/92?t=6&akid=51%2E52803%2Er7pVIA)
---

| If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click [here to unsubscribe](https://alsobrooks.actionkit.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=7&akid=51%2E52803%2Er7pVIA).
| Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
---
Alsobrooks for Senate
PO Box 6058
Largo, MD 20792

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: We want to hear from you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
As we continue to grow as a progressive movement, we want to ensure that we’re still fighting for the issues you’re most passionate about.
#
Peter,
We’re now at the halfway mark of Q2 and we wanted to take a moment to ensure that our movement’s vision remains aligned with yours.
Pramila is dedicated and determined to continue showing up for her constituents, and communities like hers. And as we continue to grow as a progressive movement, we want to ensure that we’re still fighting for the issues you’re most passionate about. That’s why we’re reaching out:
**Can you take our easy, 1-click survey and share what you think our top priority should be? To share your answer, all you have to do is click on the button that corresponds with your top priority.**
**[Medicare for All](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41909?refcode=em20230511-2470&t=1&akid=2470%2E420207%2EKSZLLd)**
Pramila is dedicated to overhauling our broken for-profit health care system to ensure that everyone has access to universal health care **— everybody in, nobody out.** The Medicare for All Act would improve and expand the Medicare program by removing profit motives, resolving inefficiencies, and guaranteeing comprehensive quality health care.
**[Racial Justice](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41909?refcode=em20230511-2470&t=2&akid=2470%2E420207%2EKSZLLd)**
Pramila has been fighting for racial justice her whole life. As a woman of color and an immigrant, she knows what it means to have the deck stacked against you. Through working to reform the policing system in Seattle, championing the fight to restore voting rights, and fighting to raise the federal minimum wage — Pramila is combatting the pillars of injustice that have disproportionately discriminated against Black and brown folks for far too long.
**[LGBTQ Rights](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41909?refcode=em20230511-2470&t=3&akid=2470%2E420207%2EKSZLLd)**
Pramila knows that despite recent triumphs, 31 states still lack clear non-discrimination protections for LGBTQ people. And with recent attacks from the far-right on our LGBTQ communities, Pramila is ready to use the full force of her membership on the Congressional Equality Caucus to fight for the Equality Act and the Every Child Deserves a Family Act.
**[Immigration](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41909?refcode=em20230511-2470&t=4&akid=2470%2E420207%2EKSZLLd)**
As the first immigrant to hold the position of Ranking Member on the House Immigration Subcommittee, Pramila is determined to build immigration policies that reflect our values of family, human dignity, and work. By working to pass just and human immigration reform that provides a path to citizenship for immigrants, she knows how important it is to fully embrace the contributions that immigrants make to our societies.
**[Energy and the Environment](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41909?refcode=em20230511-2470&t=5&akid=2470%2E420207%2EKSZLLd)** Pramila is not afraid to stand up to polluters and climate change deniers, and grow our movement to combat climate change. As a proud co-sponsor of the Green New Deal and the “100 by ‘50” Act, as well as a champion of the clean energy economy, Pramila knows that this work will only come to fruition through unwavering commitment and dedicated advocacy for our climate.
**We need to ensure that our Congress keeps these issues, and many more, at the forefront of our priorities, Peter. And your voice is exactly the push we need to ensure that we can stay on the right track.**
Thank you for your continued faith and support in this movement.
Jayapal HQ

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230511-2470-footer&t=6&refcode2=2470_420207_KSZLLd&akid=2470%2E420207%2EKSZLLd)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

clean_body: As we continue to grow as a progressive movement, we want to ensure that we’re still fighting for the issues you’re most passionate about. Peter, We’re now at the halfway mark of Q2 and we wanted to take a moment to ensure that our movement’s vision remains aligned with yours. Pramila is dedicated and determined to continue showing up for her constituents, and communities like hers. And as we continue to grow as a progressive movement, we want to ensure that we’re still fighting for the issues you’re most passionate about. That’s why we’re reaching out: Can you take our easy, 1-click survey and share what you think our top priority should be? To share your answer, all you have to do is click on the button that corresponds with your top priority. Pramila is dedicated to overhauling our broken for-profit health care system to ensure that everyone has access to universal health care — everybody in, nobody out. The Medicare for All Act would improve and expand the Medicare program by removing profit motives, resolving inefficiencies, and guaranteeing comprehensive quality health care. Pramila has been fighting for racial justice her whole life. As a woman of color and an immigrant, she knows what it means to have the deck stacked against you. Through working to reform the policing system in Seattle, championing the fight to restore voting rights, and fighting to raise the federal minimum wage — Pramila is combatting the pillars of injustice that have disproportionately discriminated against Black and brown folks for far too long. Pramila knows that despite recent triumphs, 31 states still lack clear non-discrimination protections for LGBTQ people. And with recent attacks from the far-right on our LGBTQ communities, Pramila is ready to use the full force of her membership on the Congressional Equality Caucus to fight for the Equality Act and the Every Child Deserves a Family Act. As the first immigrant to hold the position of Ranking Member on the House Immigration Subcommittee, Pramila is determined to build immigration policies that reflect our values of family, human dignity, and work. By working to pass just and human immigration reform that provides a path to citizenship for immigrants, she knows how important it is to fully embrace the contributions that immigrants make to our societies. Pramila is not afraid to stand up to polluters and climate change deniers, and grow our movement to combat climate change. As a proud co-sponsor of the Green New Deal and the “100 by ‘50” Act, as well as a champion of the clean energy economy, Pramila knows that this work will only come to fruition through unwavering commitment and dedicated advocacy for our climate. We need to ensure that our Congress keeps these issues, and many more, at the forefront of our priorities, Peter. And your voice is exactly the push we need to ensure that we can stay on the right track. Thank you for your continued faith and support in this movement. Jayapal HQ | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

**Greg recently sat down with Spectrum News to talk about his commitment to delivering for OH-01’s working families in Congress. Here’s what he had to say:**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Another new poll has us TIED with VP Mike Pence and AHEAD of Nikki Haley! | | 🚨 NEW POLL 🚨 Fellow American, We're gaining momentum. (❗ ❗ ❗) Another new poll has us TIED with VP Mike Pence and AHEAD of Nikki Haley! I may have launched this campaign just a few months ago - but conservative voters are taking notice of our outsider campaign. This polling shows our momentum - but in order to secure a prime spot on the debate stage we need solid polling numbers AND unique grassroots donors. That's what I am just asking for $1 today, Fellow American. | - Vivek P.S. I am in Iowa this week to connect with primary voters. We’re seeing real momentum on the ground - but we need to continue to build the Vek-head when it comes to adding new, grassroots donors to our team. GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Ashley
subject: I spoke out against these hateful policies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
When I served in combat, I didn’t fight just for cisgender and straight folks. I fought for all Americans. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63162176/405786091/-945033547?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230511cbsd_ae_act_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDU4NmI0ZC0zZGYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8tMZmvSDG0oWW31CwjmHyaxjEim5UzkmWt6-ZpL9cnM=)
---
| _“This soil is bad for certain kinds of flowers. Certain seeds it will not nurture, certain fruit it will not bear, and when the land kills of its own volition, we acquiesce and say the victim had no right to live.” — Toni Morrison, The Bluest Eye_
---
When I was a young girl, growing up right here in Southeastern PA, I was able to get my hands on Toni Morrison’s devastatingly profound work, _The Bluest Eye_.
The novel dissects the intersection of race, gender, power, and society. It reflects on how discriminatory institutions can crush the humanity out of certain groups of people.
**And school boards across the country — including Central Bucks School District — are trying to ban Ms. Morrison’s book.**
This was personal for me. That’s why I attended a CBSD school board meeting this week to speak out and share my connection to this important work ([you can watch my remarks here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63162177/405786092/-1102548222?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDU4NmI0ZC0zZGYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8tMZmvSDG0oWW31CwjmHyaxjEim5UzkmWt6-ZpL9cnM=&emci=e94a8ede-22f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=cd586b4d-3df0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5643323)).
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63162178/405786093/-1102548222?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDU4NmI0ZC0zZGYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8tMZmvSDG0oWW31CwjmHyaxjEim5UzkmWt6-ZpL9cnM=&emci=e94a8ede-22f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=cd586b4d-3df0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5643323)
---
**When I served in combat, I didn’t fight just for cisgender and straight folks._I fought for _all_ Americans_.**
I find it incredibly disturbing that school boards have become hellbent on enacting policies that erase the history and lived experiences of people of color and LGBTQ people rather than making their classrooms a safe and welcoming environment for ALL students.
As a result, they are making the lives of LGBTQ kids, children of color, and anyone who does not fit into their self-righteous and hateful definition of ‘normal’, a living hell.
The courage and authenticity with which Ms. Morrison wrote is something from which we all should learn. Everyone should be able to speak their truth, and kids deserve to have their truth reflected on the bookshelves in their school’s libraries.
**So, in case I wasn’t clear before, I’ll say it now: You don’t _ban_ Toni Morrison. You _listen_ to Toni Morrison.**
You can draw a direct line between policies like these and the widespread bullying and abuse LGBTQ youth face on a daily basis.
We have the power to create a world in which ALL seeds are nurtured.
If elected, I will fight for our shared values of equality, diversity, and inclusivity in Congress.
Thanks for hearing me out.
Ashley
_(P.S. Running this race has always been about fighting for what’s right — right for southeast Pennsylvanians and for all Americans.[If you’re with me, I hope you’ll consider making a contribution to our campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63162179/405786094/-945033547?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230511cbsd_ae_act_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDU4NmI0ZC0zZGYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8tMZmvSDG0oWW31CwjmHyaxjEim5UzkmWt6-ZpL9cnM=).)_

| Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA.
---

clean_body: When I served in combat, I didn’t fight just for cisgender and straight folks. I fought for all Americans. | = | “This soil is bad for certain kinds of flowers. Certain seeds it will not nurture, certain fruit it will not bear, and when the land kills of its own volition, we acquiesce and say the victim had no right to live.” — Toni Morrison, The Bluest Eye When I was a young girl, growing up right here in Southeastern PA, I was able to get my hands on Toni Morrison’s devastatingly profound work, The Bluest Eye. The novel dissects the intersection of race, gender, power, and society. It reflects on how discriminatory institutions can crush the humanity out of certain groups of people. And school boards across the country — including Central Bucks School District — are trying to ban Ms. Morrison’s book. This was personal for me. That’s why I attended a CBSD school board meeting this week to speak out and share my connection to this important work (). When I served in combat, I didn’t fight just for cisgender and straight folks.I fought for all Americans. I find it incredibly disturbing that school boards have become hellbent on enacting policies that erase the history and lived experiences of people of color and LGBTQ people rather than making their classrooms a safe and welcoming environment for ALL students. As a result, they are making the lives of LGBTQ kids, children of color, and anyone who does not fit into their self-righteous and hateful definition of ‘normal’, a living hell. The courage and authenticity with which Ms. Morrison wrote is something from which we all should learn. Everyone should be able to speak their truth, and kids deserve to have their truth reflected on the bookshelves in their school’s libraries. So, in case I wasn’t clear before, I’ll say it now: You don’t ban Toni Morrison. You listen to Toni Morrison. You can draw a direct line between policies like these and the widespread bullying and abuse LGBTQ youth face on a daily basis. We have the power to create a world in which ALL seeds are nurtured. If elected, I will fight for our shared values of equality, diversity, and inclusivity in Congress. Thanks for hearing me out. Ashley (P.S. Running this race has always been about fighting for what’s right — right for southeast Pennsylvanians and for all Americans.=.) | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. name: Jessica Anderson, Heritage Action
subject: Latest update on the fight for women’s sports
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
April was a busy month in the fight for women’s sports. Here’s where we are now...| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1edcbe0ecc30417cb471b87daf55b125&_e=OsuG16VgjGRuPGwyoBa0Yd5hPO7QykGw_fyK4dwDhJRqlFOfdnV8bBzm20PuZBRhDJ0hYBfnwy4HOIdFl6Hnxb3RjgJW2Mw_gdF83rXdROPDPuC6LLPowTT50E87QOW_JDlWaYGtQB61DHx2K_Nzr8UAbwIkmH8Rd0kqUF1DAVd7gp-Am_3R53uRopG8nwDTkjhggw6WEKfTVvTol9XxyOK399Rkt968ls3xiW9JT5MyuFxewFrvNI5HKLEBnNINCN3wQDMs7xxSSULfTLnbXDXJ8piHuox1MtqDnOc9kl2REGqQ2GUCUNY6TT2xXSohF-bapgSIh9N7gsU72lCpvFDECsRzrFUAEyIW4hKGux8C9kkkeBHxUmxEpDGlU5xw)
---
| | Peter, April was a busy month in the fight for women’s sports. **Here’s where we are now.** **_FIRST_** , Heritage Action had _the Protection of Women and Sports Act_ on our legislative scorecard and played a critical role in supporting the House passage of it in April. **_THEN_** , Chuck Schumer signaled his intent to obstruct it in the Senate, and Biden threatened to veto it if it reaches his desk. **In addition, Biden proposed a new rule through the Department of Education** **that**** requires schools to allow males who self-identify as female to compete on female teams.** **_NOW_** , we’ve launched a public comment campaign **until May 15th** against this disastrous rule by the Biden Administration. But campaigns like these depend on grassroots supporters like YOU continuing to support and fund our efforts. [**Peter, will you help us continue efforts by rushing a critical deadline donation by May 15th?**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1edcbe0ecc30417cb471b87daf55b125&_e=OsuG16VgjGRuPGwyoBa0Yd5hPO7QykGw_fyK4dwDhJRqlFOfdnV8bBzm20PuZBRhDJ0hYBfnwy4HOIdFl6Hnxb3RjgJW2Mw_gdF83rXdROPDPuC6LLPowTT50E87QOW_JDlWaYGtQB61DHx2K_Nzr8UAbwIkmH8Rd0kqUF1DAVd7gp-Am_3R53uRopG8nwDTkjhggw6WEKfTVvTol9XxyOK399Rkt968ls3xiW9JT5P2cECa3lYgI0ZxE2g33w8Jj1NZLtbsZqbLZnYAQLFndVroIIdza0g9aK0L3aiajz7-LFak-xPrQxnYapgsu7vLlHdt8Uvg70p0zTyCJr4Oico-z2bWhEMl1PSatXSxy6UP1n90t64sd1CulIQv8xPM)
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1edcbe0ecc30417cb471b87daf55b125&_e=OsuG16VgjGRuPGwyoBa0Yd5hPO7QykGw_fyK4dwDhJRqlFOfdnV8bBzm20PuZBRhDJ0hYBfnwy4HOIdFl6Hnxb3RjgJW2Mw_gdF83rXdROPDPuC6LLPowTT50E87QOW_JDlWaYGtQB61DHx2K_Nzr8UAbwIkmH8Rd0kqUF1DAVd7gp-Am_3R53uRopG8nwDTkjhggw6WEKfTVvTol9XxyOK399Rkt968ls3xiW9JT5PT-XzBNM7JOT4hYHbqSKzY5kao3iIZioH_SPzGoFCvrU35NTR4Bt0JvT6irHSk_Rc5ql4QQRYmsJxSxYaSWjEV3TbsrMku7y-ukR2g_yF13aA1rd7LjXEM9PERS5CdCDgoMntMRVuJ8wTRnb5PEFlt)
---
Peter, this new Biden rule is a direct attack on women’s sports. Biden’s regulation creates an almost unachievable hurdle—for every women’s sport–every school will be forced to demonstrate the risk of a “sports-related injury” to females to prevent the participation of a male on a female team. **The cost of this regulation is immeasurable–it will...**
* _Destroy fairness_
* _Erase protected spaces_
* _Threaten women’s safety and privacy_
* _Eliminates opportunities for female athletes_

clean_body: April was a busy month in the fight for women’s sports. Here’s where we are now...| | | | | Peter, April was a busy month in the fight for women’s sports. Here’s where we are now. FIRST , Heritage Action had the Protection of Women and Sports Act on our legislative scorecard and played a critical role in supporting the House passage of it in April. THEN , Chuck Schumer signaled his intent to obstruct it in the Senate, and Biden threatened to veto it if it reaches his desk. In addition, Biden proposed a new rule through the Department of Education that requires schools to allow males who self-identify as female to compete on female teams. NOW , we’ve launched a public comment campaign until May 15th against this disastrous rule by the Biden Administration. But campaigns like these depend on grassroots supporters like YOU continuing to support and fund our efforts. Peter, this new Biden rule is a direct attack on women’s sports. Biden’s regulation creates an almost unachievable hurdle—for every women’s sport–every school will be forced to demonstrate the risk of a “sports-related injury” to females to prevent the participation of a male on a female team. The cost of this regulation is immeasurable–it will... Destroy fairness Erase protected spaces Threaten women’s safety and privacy Eliminates opportunities for female athletes Don’t let Biden destroy women’s sports – Thank you,Jessica AndersonExecutive Director | Heritage Action P.S. If you haven’t made your voice heard against these horrible regulations yet, you can visit this page to submit your public comment: By law, this regulation must be subject to public comment. name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: They need to do their damn job.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
Tell Biden: NO VETO. President Biden is making the lives of every American sheriff more difficult by failing to secure the southern border.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=43af66524db041ce805fc777eccff2d0&_t=BHj9OHrCFwL5YegF0Mc2GzYNssY5w2kgXmwDyo2B--USshE6Mm0wFm4Uf3uKQdcLmi0DbE0Q6MzKgWl3m6wKJH7AgvOP7EMOyZ08HYgMaBw%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=43af66524db041ce805fc777eccff2d0&_t=BHj9OHrCFwL5YegF0Mc2GzYNssY5w2kgXmwDyo2B--USshE6Mm0wFm4Uf3uKQdcLmi0DbE0Q6MzKgWl3m6wKJH7AgvOP7EMOyZ08HYgMaBw%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=43af66524db041ce805fc777eccff2d0&_e=ODeEkSBcGZlTxwZkUgsk2FW9WNeAGQAf16DO7hANGqLWWX8lT8FtwLFLq0jwgWnKMAE9t-gTubYBiRe7t58v1uWdVBfpWIhZBuSUuYTwr4mnNqXtSb7z6y62XYDRTZ78ii2xjK344fWHDPHchg1YBUQHlwh7CAmTTnW_-UKYdJVmbSLPN5oPop53WaQM6MDy9qV0SFxwabhGvDLKYV-9oc_RN4wkU8zlMk_DJDd16AGhMRfjyameOMB8uuHFe2GywZAPbQubY5BVOE1lzTy0zp73zu0V-sol4GBduGJH72pOCcFYXdGXvqHY-x0DyC-6Rizmw_8dL69soom5F5XDtVOUVdThob77ejTKRKYSM_G3h6NUaIbcWCdnKgBChhym9lY_vIiphLYp3S2C_c29oB-8KyfkDSsb8q2QV-lmrgo%3D)
|
Fellow Conservative,

This week, Republicans in the U.S. House are voting on legislation that would bring about some of the most stringent border security measures our country has ever known.

Against ALL common sense, **President Biden has promised to veto the bill.**

As an American, this makes me angry. **As the Sheriff of Arizona’s third largest county, it will make doing my job even harder than it already is.**

Why on earth would President Biden veto legislation that secures and protects the border?

**Because Republicans led the efforts to pass it**.

**As someone who has personally pulled the dead bodies of immigrants out of ditches, I cannot express my dismay at Biden’s failure to secure the border.**

As a candidate for the U.S. Senate and a Sheriff in my own right, **[I’m putting together a petition to send to President Biden urging him to let this border bill become law. I’m looking for 500 Americans to sign it right now](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=43af66524db041ce805fc777eccff2d0&_e=ODeEkSBcGZlTxwZkUgsk2FW9WNeAGQAf16DO7hANGqLWWX8lT8FtwLFLq0jwgWnKMAE9t-gTubYBiRe7t58v1uWdVBfpWIhZBuSUuYTwr4mnNqXtSb7z6y62XYDRTZ78ii2xjK344fWHDPHchg1YBUQHlwh7CAmTTnW_-UKYdJVmbSLPN5oPop53WaQM6MDy9qV0SFxwabhGvDLKYV-9oc_RN4wkU8zlMk_DJDd16AGhMRfjyameOMB8uuHFe2GyJZ9fjZw96T1MFV45x_Zx5TaPmIghnxGLkkkjRML4mr616CAE39xZRsqGn6155tEEFKQYwmBvAh4HeMhcLGWWZoE1qof8028CGQDupB1n7nFUZ61lmsgOchsxg-Viq8DOvkPO55-wOQ-Lh07hJvNzt6F5007czFxn6TI8M1rJ_jE%3D)**.

[**TELL BIDEN: DO NOT VETO THIS BILL ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=43af66524db041ce805fc777eccff2d0&_e=ODeEkSBcGZlTxwZkUgsk2FW9WNeAGQAf16DO7hANGqLWWX8lT8FtwLFLq0jwgWnKMAE9t-gTubYBiRe7t58v1uWdVBfpWIhZBuSUuYTwr4mnNqXtSb7z6y62XYDRTZ78ii2xjK344fWHDPHchg1YBUQHlwh7CAmTTnW_-UKYdJVmbSLPN5oPop53WaQM6MDy9qV0SFxwabhGvDLKYV-9oc_RN4wkU8zlMk_DJDd16AGhMRfjyameOMB8uuHFe2GytmcjKNIuE-58nGk6NAnQJ4mnDUGj9N1BixU8msgAMwktF33ftLhnnn4n4SNttJuMmAVtW7G55hfraHtuq_l4vqn5vZOE5eYNklZM3UFMWyUYanMh4Sgx3rMv_CGjgcNzEpO0TK_c2Wy3X42F7X3XaQDHoUC-9xMcI3J2yUYkyrU%3D)

If you’re tired of people from all over the world treating our border like an imaginary line, will you **[join me in telling Biden he simply cannot veto Republicans’ border bill?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=43af66524db041ce805fc777eccff2d0&_e=ODeEkSBcGZlTxwZkUgsk2FW9WNeAGQAf16DO7hANGqLWWX8lT8FtwLFLq0jwgWnKMAE9t-gTubYBiRe7t58v1uWdVBfpWIhZBuSUuYTwr4mnNqXtSb7z6y62XYDRTZ78ii2xjK344fWHDPHchg1YBUQHlwh7CAmTTnW_-UKYdJVmbSLPN5oPop53WaQM6MDy9qV0SFxwabhGvDLKYV-9oc_RN4wkU8zlMk_DJDd16AGhMRfjyameOMB8uuHFe2GyU2z1adcC-dNjalGdzFxXvvOaqmz7yuV4cpLO2s-v13GlW_5qqjvzQjZM2DRM3odldmY1AUq0jHEzLuJwd2-Ic_OANyHZdcaXEkmndG9T2JxCl6Y2dC8xWquaeEIWaYb712ED_L0qvZo6m6cnih9H3yuUfdmEOEbSFJFeekmY5lI%3D)**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=43af66524db041ce805fc777eccff2d0&_e=ODeEkSBcGZlTxwZkUgsk2FW9WNeAGQAf16DO7hANGqLWWX8lT8FtwLFLq0jwgWnKMAE9t-gTubYBiRe7t58v1uWdVBfpWIhZBuSUuYTwr4mnNqXtSb7z6y62XYDRTZ78ii2xjK344fWHDPHchg1YBUQHlwh7CAmTTnW_-UKYdJVmbSLPN5oPop53WaQM6MDy9qV0SFxwabhGvDLKYV-9oc_RN4wkU8zlMk_DJDd16AGhMRfjyameOMB8uuHFe2GyYXqFVYtn5XwXMakM0x9xjivAohdPMBvOB7seQns5jTJLIEYYUZwsJLoxK8ewfJdACHDHQUIGFuXnS1Wdty9OxcPAHynZGhpQiFfMT2V_-zWw32U9UmhNYOp6Z_vDveD0w-B4RRAAUv0rxmgoaPh-X6BkL6zStk23o15ebHaLLuk%3D)

Fellow Conservative, we must stop the invasion. It’s as simple as that.

We do that by sending law enforcement officials, who know a thing or two about quelling unrest, to replace Democrats in the Senate who can’t seem to figure out how to do their damn jobs.
**

This is not how we fix immigration. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63163255/405789950/-1912557965?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230511immigration_gv_180da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWZjMzNhZS00MGYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mHef3p0HMN__3KeDx91qZ2GTVzbmcIyTRGKilE40YGo=)

Friends, I’m headed to the U.S. House floor right now to cast my vote on the Republican’s extreme, unrealstic, anti-immigrant legislation. **I’m voting no.** Here’s why👇 1\. **It turns away those who need our help the most.** This legislation attempts to completely strip the asylum process, something that has helped many seek refuge in our country for decades. 2\. **It doesn’t provide much-needed resources to the border.** Instead, it proposes extreme policies, like having police - who are already overwhelmed - act as immigration agents. 3\. **It’s not a long-term solution.** It provides no path to permanent citizenship for the 580,000 DACA DREAMers who were brought to the U.S. as children and have always called this home. I’ve lived on both sides of the border and my district includes 180 miles of the US-Mexico border. We’ve felt the effects of a broken immigration system, but we also know the opportunities immigrants bring to our community. I want to see us come together on real solutions and get this done. We need comprehensive immigration reform that treats asylum-seekers humanely, offers a fair path to citizenship for those who meet certain requirements, and ensures that our border is secure. **The bottom line, this bill falls short. That’s why I’m voting no.** Yours, Gabe Vasquez
U.S. Representative (NM-02) **P.S. My far-right extremist opponent is going to use this vote against me in attack ads. **But I’m not going to stop doing what’s right just to have an easier re-election. **[Friend, can you chip in $20.24 (or any amount) to help me get out our _positive_ message and protect this TOP TARGET seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63163256/405789951/-1912557965?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230511immigration_gv_180da_xx_l1&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWZjMzNhZS00MGYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mHef3p0HMN__3KeDx91qZ2GTVzbmcIyTRGKilE40YGo=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: This is not how we fix immigration. | = Friends, I’m headed to the U.S. House floor right now to cast my vote on the Republican’s extreme, unrealstic, anti-immigrant legislation. I’m voting no. Here’s why👇 1\. It turns away those who need our help the most. This legislation attempts to completely strip the asylum process, something that has helped many seek refuge in our country for decades. 2\. It doesn’t provide much-needed resources to the border. Instead, it proposes extreme policies, like having police - who are already overwhelmed - act as immigration agents. 3\. It’s not a long-term solution. It provides no path to permanent citizenship for the 580,000 DACA DREAMers who were brought to the U.S. as children and have always called this home. I’ve lived on both sides of the border and my district includes 180 miles of the US-Mexico border. We’ve felt the effects of a broken immigration system, but we also know the opportunities immigrants bring to our community. I want to see us come together on real solutions and get this done. We need comprehensive immigration reform that treats asylum-seekers humanely, offers a fair path to citizenship for those who meet certain requirements, and ensures that our border is secure. The bottom line, this bill falls short. That’s why I’m voting no. Yours, Gabe Vasquez U.S. Representative (NM-02) P.S. My far-right extremist opponent is going to use this vote against me in attack ads. But I’m not going to stop doing what’s right just to have an easier re-election. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and giving a voice to underserved communities in Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

[**May 11, 1910:** President William Taft signed the bill that established Glacier National Park. The 1 million-acre park became the country’s 10th national park. Located in Montana, it features glacier-carved peaks and valleys, pristine lakes and streams, and dense forests, perfect for hiking, camping, and exploring American nature at its finest.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=005047185d8d4dc395f77c316474e106&_e=_zFsT1jW9AI7Y-hu5A5TbRPqlIkAAJ2qmTU5jIj8WAlmb11-6BTZq_fLoPP6VFCoPErjESgJR-uEBrTVgeDjY7NMfbs4XDLFRVh0kG_HSpPaOmoq7hkh5gtLmaXvtGarz-SGeIq9-wl5gNNLNPHR9C6GEi1nJmHEzq3kXVRmejalWmlVJC9Nrt0fWz0VUWNKim97xX4jI2zO0TLyxdO1OuE-XrbAGUSsL7EZUXIojtrg7FTmpJUYK900aXK-PVQs82SSCIWd-8r_NNzW0jdXup8JoJcjdTHMJSyjWz1x5cQcBJkWwUiy1FaoboTKuX60kl7sbznroAiOmItvjJm-exQXjSSok-HsbUNftV5yr97CKL0M3qHqEz1aQpKMDnqq) **Source -[doi.gov](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=005047185d8d4dc395f77c316474e106&_e=_zFsT1jW9AI7Y-hu5A5TbRPqlIkAAJ2qmTU5jIj8WAlmb11-6BTZq_fLoPP6VFCoPErjESgJR-uEBrTVgeDjY7NMfbs4XDLFRVh0kG_HSpPaOmoq7hkh5gtLmaXvtGarz-SGeIq9-wl5gNNLNPHR9C6GEi1nJmHEzq3kXVRmejalWmlVJC9Nrt0fWz0VUWNKim97xX4jI2zO0TLyxdO1Or6xd-1M2BLE-kf3KKvrSc1vYf74h6GJXKXb64yCsOTwxySX5IHFCreeHtTYWX_3ismCvFaIWJPLFcvRi77ekbUszwmZnuNJN2LexvJ9O7dkZNx620eT9z1qbX6CezwbjRZe3akXyHvx0upYDBEFOEao32mspmbBOtP4UybVOtbX)**

[**May 11, 1934:** A massive dust storm dubbed the “Black Blizzard” blew eastward across the continental United States. The storm moved millions of pounds of dirt and dust from farmland to the eastern seaboard, catching the attention of Washington, D.C. politicians to plights of American farmers.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=005047185d8d4dc395f77c316474e106&_e=_zFsT1jW9AI7Y-hu5A5Tbaa4pAgkE67WFw5cXxxFGq_rNuAcTbcos6wmxhvMXyrvEopETbjxHjiajkXbiJ4b1FAb99hW2e7T30rkHdj1qTQfPOjrFiQzped2KaGYJq2MGPOVfsVAII6m3PhGOTNkK8QEFUMIjGN7wLmYv3j80PPSafPVFxmEtrSnwXaV077jSqd21pjVbXHx4YBmjoEudWh33zfQ02O6oa_kKphe5fKT4V4fcSbrjyMrZtd4MrrV) **Source -[history.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=005047185d8d4dc395f77c316474e106&_e=_zFsT1jW9AI7Y-hu5A5Tbaa4pAgkE67WFw5cXxxFGq_rNuAcTbcos6wmxhvMXyrvEopETbjxHjiajkXbiJ4b1F3RAtC7IqzM26u_zSJrRggZlWheBbZZJ7e-Fi0obXHfbGI9kB9kFvaf8l7RnADmpTadxI_9HMijGMS3GQL8z4b_MI1CprvrJKos4WceEEsMVXWXDT2NX8H1WjoRtfey-ITscEzU8ACpdRIFeSJpG1usl7KxdXBK3tN01toBgqZz)**

body:
It’s never been more important that we defeat extremism, and that starts by rooting out the radical Republicans in the House.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63163343/405790486/-576970961?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.11_b2_td_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTU4NzBlMC00MGYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YW0Py5EJP3IFD7pFBQ5MctEPX-C26LjE8Xw_XF_C94A=) Derek, did you hear the news? **Last night, Donald Trump was on CNN _and it was just as unhinged as you think._** [_**(Before we break down the wildest claims Trump made last night, can you chip in $15 today to help our campaign defeat the MAGA Republicans targeting western PA?)**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63163344/405790488/-576970961?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.11_b2_td_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTU4NzBlMC00MGYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YW0Py5EJP3IFD7pFBQ5MctEPX-C26LjE8Xw_XF_C94A=) **Here’s just some of what Donald Trump said last night:**
* He encouraged House Republicans to push for massive spending cuts, **which could include cuts to the VA.**
* He **called the 2020 election “rigged” despite there being no evidence of election fraud** , and he refused to say he would support the outcome of the 2024 election.
* He **defended the January 6 insurrection** , calling it a “beautiful day,” and he stated he would consider pardoning the Capitol attackers.
* He celebrated the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ and **entertained the idea of a federal abortion ban.**

**Derek, it’s clear that Donald Trump’s MAGA agenda hasn’t changed at all. It’s never been more important that we defeat extremism, and that starts by rooting out the radical Republicans in the House.**

**[Can you chip in $15 or another amount today to help us re-elect Chris and ensure Democrats are able to take back the Speaker’s gavel in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63163345/405790490/-576970961?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.11_b2_td_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTU4NzBlMC00MGYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YW0Py5EJP3IFD7pFBQ5MctEPX-C26LjE8Xw_XF_C94A=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

He called the 2020 election “rigged” despite there being no evidence of election fraud , and he refused to say he would support the outcome of the 2024 election. He defended the January 6 insurrection , calling it a “beautiful day,” and he stated he would consider pardoning the Capitol attackers. He celebrated the overturning of Roe v. Wade and entertained the idea of a federal abortion ban. Derek, it’s clear that Donald Trump’s MAGA agenda hasn’t changed at all. subject: Tax Relief for Nebraskans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Historic property tax relief legislation advances forward! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1fd0b3f44bde/n41kepo7ku-519682?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=398d78a4be&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| We're excited to share that the [LB754](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=40e28b95dc&e=25844e23a8) income tax relief package has achieved a significant milestone! This progress brings us one step nearer to delivering tax relief to hardworking Nebraskans and will make our state much more competitive in competing for business and labor!

The bill has advanced to the Enrollment and Review for Engrossment stage, where all adopted amendments are incorporated, preparing it for Final Reading. Upon completion, the full Legislature will consider the bill during Final Reading, where senators will vote without debate to decide if the bill should be submitted to the governor.

Senator Lou Ann Linehan's relentless efforts and the support of many others have helped us reach this crucial juncture. But our work isn't over yet.

---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=f67eaa623b&e=25844e23a8)
---
|
**[Your ongoing support is vital to maintaining our momentum and pushing for our Conservative values of limited government and fiscal responsibility.](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=f5b87facad&e=25844e23a8) Let's continue working together to make this historic tax relief a reality for Nebraskans, allowing them to keep more of their hard-earned income.** Sincerely,

Todd Watson
Political Director
Nebraska Republican Party
**[NE.GOP](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=af470b298c&e=25844e23a8)**

**[P.S. Your contribution to the Nebraska Republican Party, no matter the size, bolsters our mission to uphold Conservative values. Every donation counts in our pursuit of promoting limited government and responsible use of taxpayer dollars.](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=dd3b2f489c&e=25844e23a8)**

Friend,

It is our DUTY as Americans to ignore the loud, incessant squabbling from radicals in our nation. It’s up to us to preserve American values that have proven, time and time again, to form the backbone of our country. [**We must return to our roots to protect this Democracy and ensure prosperity for our children and grandchildren — before it’s too late.**](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=b96d0938b11144bbb1a7797af377540b&_e=DdKIaaGJMW3La4YtbWijp6ln5mYA9uXGj0pGoaSY-X1-VQUa4_OGKsDfPf4tf9nP_noRuTunP9t6hNI6DK48s6ChIXhMLzNfYtjmN5avDkz7iSQN6_r0ieV1naAieA3Xat5Zn-wZlVHGMzpcCiVZLVQ3qHQee9OV9MtbvJHg08uK9Q_A7fSpfWfwgmXgDIkcOgFXYNPKBBOTIHVvpg1CUCpty3WF925dIXk8VLbJW4Sg6FmR34H-x2pig3cjta2BnxrC2r3EIxPmg-O66tLeq9NPiGeIxIc8_GHguDatW9YtqLYrKAo5oIO-9X9IKvLM04uh6baCbhbDxFXUuZ6CBQkMVTb6JBVlATuE4vhE2vM07MVVJIOwU3iwYVA2HUOCDpc2rG3_wzc1FcdPVztGZEXrQtQqlSKneQj4oxrlIVBihdHDqEY2HJXt4To8wD2VmRHkjJ7uhE8C4lNpe80exU9rlykQxBjRNRQEfOLTQg8B1UMCQMhgbV0JvWesbiqJmotLbYOMxLqmYzeF7RjB4Q%3D%3D)

There’s no better time than the present. Our country is embroiled in an ideological tug-of-war between left and right, which is tearing this nation apart. We cannot be dragged through the mud by a select few. **We need to let the world know we can and will do better.**
_**We can preserve this Democracy.
We can uphold the Rule of Law.
We can honor the Constitution.**_

**We can save this country.**
**[We need your help to fix this country and protect our Democracy.](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=b96d0938b11144bbb1a7797af377540b&_e=DdKIaaGJMW3La4YtbWijp6ln5mYA9uXGj0pGoaSY-X1-VQUa4_OGKsDfPf4tf9nP_noRuTunP9t6hNI6DK48s6ChIXhMLzNfYtjmN5avDkz7iSQN6_r0ieV1naAieA3Xat5Zn-wZlVHGMzpcCiVZLVQ3qHQee9OV9MtbvJHg08uK9Q_A7fSpfWfwgmXgDIkcOgFXYNPKBBOTIHVvpg1CUCpty3WF925dIXk8VLbJW4Sg6FmR34H-x2pig3cjta2BnxrC2r3EIxPmg-O66tLeq9NPiGeIxIc8_GHguDatW9YtqLYrKAo5oIO-9X9IKvLM04uh6baCbhbDxFXUuZ6CBQkMVTb6JBVlATuE4vhE2vNV6hqz897ftigqBmi8X7vUM567vM4kLeIHd8H6xgbt5Bvmp8_ddgVb0bvrIxWYPL34MIrSjMjDlWyppMv7znJvMEhOQT5z8pFWAo-u0YFxiD-IFaFVMEbmGbAA2dsTLFpi1a93ycg1eduR4BmjpEp0Al52MoyR2UcD_Iz70Hak7g%3D%3D)**

[**It’s time to restore common sense, and civility, to this nation— do we have your support?**](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=b96d0938b11144bbb1a7797af377540b&_e=DdKIaaGJMW3La4YtbWijp6ln5mYA9uXGj0pGoaSY-X1-VQUa4_OGKsDfPf4tf9nP_noRuTunP9t6hNI6DK48s6ChIXhMLzNfYtjmN5avDkz7iSQN6_r0ieV1naAieA3Xat5Zn-wZlVHGMzpcCiVZLVQ3qHQee9OV9MtbvJHg08uK9Q_A7fSpfWfwgmXgDIkcOgFXYNPKBBOTIHVvpg1CUCpty3WF925dIXk8VLbJW4Sg6FmR34H-x2pig3cjta2BnxrC2r3EIxPmg-O66tLeq9NPiGeIxIc8_GHguDatW9YtqLYrKAo5oIO-9X9IKvLM04uh6baCbhbDxFXUuZ6CBQkMVTb6JBVlATuE4vhE2vPVaTON4qruY5-bq-jdxz4LGNIvcN4Ce1FMfaohYrzZQskDXd2XPvfDfU4EjNRczlJitTDQigujKScAVs4XUHFh2yETw9VgRp667kAwW3pRT5sWqCK7eFesEp8nEQf_QKcJXaj6_lEzwSvcTpep4ZJPp-zxuHrmmGLUpCNpsoCAxQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: Defend Democracy | Friend, It is our DUTY as Americans to ignore the loud, incessant squabbling from radicals in our nation. It’s up to us to preserve American values that have proven, time and time again, to form the backbone of our country. There’s no better time than the present. Our country is embroiled in an ideological tug-of-war between left and right, which is tearing this nation apart. We cannot be dragged through the mud by a select few. We need to let the world know we can and will do better. We can preserve this Democracy. We can uphold the Rule of Law. We can honor the Constitution. We can save this country. | Best, Conservatives for Democracy PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO Not authorized by any other candidate.

# The Biden administration is completely ignoring the crisis at the border...
And it’s about to get even worse with the end of Title 42, a COVID-era policy that slowed the flow of immigrants.
Check out my latest YouTube video explaining why I think this is intentional:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=60db4b7415&e=f6564bbe3b)
Don’t forget to subscribe to make sure you see all of my upcoming content.
|
---
# Becoming an investigative reporter...
This week on my podcast, Beyond the Briefing, I had my friend and new Brave Books author John Solomon on. We talked about his career and how he went from working for the legacy media, to being largely criticized by them, his work to modernize Washington Times digital, his platform Just the News, and his most recent project, a children’s book with Brave Books.
| [Listen now](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=167c38095a&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|

[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=af7b411389&e=f6564bbe3b)
|

# Stories I’m Reading...
[Biden White House says it can expel reporters who don’t act professionally, raising First Amendment concerns](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9f07bc5624&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Fox News
[Corey Lewandowski spoke with Vivek Ramaswamy Super PAC about role](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f20fc6c53a&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Politico
[Opinion: President Biden should hold more solo press conferences](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=8ffc86274e&e=f6564bbe3b)— via The Washington Post
[Net trustworthiness of social media news sources, according to Americans ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=a9a65e21f0&e=f6564bbe3b)— via YouGov
[Georgia election chief denies Democrats early 2024 primary](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=aced270e1b&e=f6564bbe3b) — via AP News
[The Washington Commanders are lobbying federal legislators to give D.C. over the RFK Stadium site, which would pave the way for the city to offer it as a potential new home for the team](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=2a68fe8e8f&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Washington Post

# "In times of market downturn and economic instability, I turn to the experts at Bishop Gold Group”
---
In the Joe Biden economy, the stock market and inflation have become serious concerns. I’ve begun working with Bishop Gold Group to put my money in a consistent asset, gold and silver.
Bishop Gold Group are trusted experts in the precious metals space, I urge you to call them and find out how they can help you diversify your assets.
If you go to the link: [bishopgoldgroup.com/Sean](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3333c1abcf&e=f6564bbe3b), they’ll know I sent you.
Thanks to my friends at Bishop Gold Group for sponsoring this newsletter so I can continue to bring you content for free.
|

Bishop Gold Group are trusted experts in the precious metals space, I urge you to call them and find out how they can help you diversify your assets. If you go to the link: , they’ll know I sent you. name: Michelle Dorothy
subject: Fwd: inviting you to speak with Chrissy
body:
---
Hi, Derek! I'm Michelle Dorothy, Chrissy’s chief political advisor – and I'm just dropping in to follow up on Chrissy's email.
**Connecting with supporters like you directly is the bread and butter of Chrissy's work in Congress.** It's amazing to see, Derek – the way these conversations guide her fights for legislation that make life better for ALL of us. **I'd really love for her to connect with you, too, so that's why I'm asking: **

**Have you signed up for a monthly recurring contribution yet? If you do, you could get a call from Chrissy in the next few weeks!**

Because you're such an important part of Team Chrissy, I'd love to hear what's on your mind right now. The first 10 people to sign up for a monthly recurring contribution to my campaign will receive a call from me in the next few weeks.
