name: Team Cori
subject: $18.4 million in community funding for St. Louis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Cori is working every day to serve St. Louis and make real change for our community.
#
Peter, Cori is working every day to serve St. Louis and make real change for our community.
In December, Cori helped deliver nearly $18.4 million in federal funding for community projects in St. Louis in the 2023 government funding package.
This funding responds directly to some of the most pressing needs in St. Louis — which will help to advance projects that will create jobs, deliver public health services, build new affordable housing units, and more.
This is yet another victory for St. Louis and brings us closer to a more just and equitable St. Louis. [**Peter, can you chip in $5 or more today to keep Cori focused on legislating and organizing for progressive change?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230511.G7LVEO&refcode=em20230511-2675&t=1&akid=2675%2E1082990%2EI-SxEa)
**[Donate](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230511.G7LVEO&refcode=em20230511-2675&t=2&akid=2675%2E1082990%2EI-SxEa)**
After months of negotiations, these are the projects that are being funded this year:
✅ $70,000 for the Girl Scouts of Eastern Missouri, St. Louis, MO for student mental health and anti-violence programs
✅ $685,000 for the City of St. Louis — Improvement of the 911 Dispatch System
✅ $1,812,891 for the LIFE Housing Project
✅ $990,000 for the Public Wi-Fi for St. Louis Housing Authority Residents
✅ $380,000 for the Seed St. Louis, MO for STEM education programs
✅ $1,000,000 for the SSM Health - St. Mary's Hospital - St. Louis, MO for facilities and equipment
✅ $252,713 for the St. Louis Public Schools, St. Louis, MO for CTE programs in construction trades, including scholarships for technical college program
✅ $1,000,000 for the UAW Labor Employment and Training Corporation, St. Louis, MO for job training in the automotive services industry
✅ $750,000 for the Urban League Plaza Property Improvements
**And Cori's work is just getting started.** Cori is hard at work right now to secure even more community project funding in 2024 and pass urgently needed legislation that will benefit working people.
While the 2024 election seems a while away, we know that opponents are preparing potential runs against Cori and GOP super PACs are readying to spend millions in an attempt to defeat us. **That's why we need to step up to keep Cori focused on legislating for us in Congress — not fundraising.**
Peter, Cori needs this grassroots team to have her back so she can work to save lives and transform livelihoods. [**Please, will you make a $5 donation right now to help keep Cori in Congress so she can continue boldly leading legislation to make real change for those who need it the most?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230511.G7LVEO&refcode=em20230511-2675&t=3&akid=2675%2E1082990%2EI-SxEa)
**[Donate](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230511.G7LVEO&refcode=em20230511-2675&t=22&akid=2675%2E1082990%2EI-SxEa)**
Together,
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-footer?refcode=em20230511-2675-footer&t=23&refcode2=2675_1082990_I-SxEa&akid=2675%2E1082990%2EI-SxEa) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.coribush.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.coribush.org/signup/update-your-information?t=24&akid=2675%2E1082990%2EI-SxEa)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.coribush.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2675%2E1082990%2EI-SxEa)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Save innocent sea turtles from choking to death on plastic
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1767122?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | _**Small flippers, tiny hard shell, and wide-open eyes -- the mighty baby sea turtle embarks on its journey to reach the ocean!**_ This is an emotional journey, Friend. Baby sea turtles are eager to meet their mama, ready to eat some yummy jellyfish and experience the great blue it will call home. On its way to the ocean, the hungry, curious creature takes one bite into a translucent-looking jellyfish object, and **then it is CHOKING! **The jellyfish-looking object is not a nutritious meal, but plastic that is now **STUCK** in the tiny throat of the baby sea turtle! With no other way to try to save itself, __**the newborn sea turtle will likely CHOKE TO DEATH!**__ The ocean is no place for plastic, Friend. With the dangers to sea creatures and our ocean ecosystems, plastic garbage is a CRISIS! The sad story does not end here. Scientists think there will be **more plastic than fish in the sea by 2050** \-- making it even harder for animals like baby sea turtles to determine what is food and what is not. More needs to be done to reduce plastic waste. __**We need action at the federal level**__ if we are going to protect our oceans, marine life, and the planet from the **_PLASTIC APOCALYPSE._[Tell the Biden administration to address the plastic crisis NOW before it’s too late >> ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1767123?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [STOP PLASTICS NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1767124?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
We only have _**ONE**_ planet Earth, Friend, and it is suffering from the wasteful production of single-use plastics. Plastic does not disappear; over time, most of it breaks down into microplastics that pollute the water we drink, the food we eat, and even the air we breathe. A cycle that continues to _**repeat, and repeat... and repeat! **_
The plastic industry causes harm long before these toxic products make it to the ocean. Giant plastic production facilities **SPEW POLLUTION ONTO NEARBY COMMUNITIES** \-- largely low-wealth communities and communities of color. The people who live here face an increased risk of _cancer, respiratory diseases, and other illnesses._
**Plastic-producing corporations are profiting off of harming people and our planet. [If just 64 more people from your city take action by TONIGHT, we can help STOP the PLASTIC APOCALYPSE!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1767125?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) **
[STOP PLASTICS NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1767124?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for fighting against plastics with us,
Friends of the Earth**
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)

body:
| | | Peter, I penned an op-ed in Town Hall about the crisis at our Southern Border, and I’m proud of the traction it’s gotten.

**_But when others tried to share my article, it was flagged as HATE SPEECH by Facebook!_**
---
[](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=84f25d8fbcc34509a704f173b74745e3&_e=k1ynHK0jN4z-Bl19Lt4SSFAPYMOZfSqhgFDmQPnWMZDr1PqmfL_CPWMDZuGHcoHopBqPdA5fXPbQUmL4qrh2VErm6QHVcq18t9Yl-MF2KRuT1zDc68wd_JoNrG0nxZUvDFHB6rptJ7tRLoRBoylItXLWV2v3O0RDCQluqj3oRwabFXiynGoiqNt-jHP8HJodg6Yg6fXtK1j_0FV282_1tLAEw9r5KzMY4akkSuoRdnLT2vJFZzAnigEBkfy2ezKJI_nZlCvv8NPDWRm1Txqll1Bnn3cVhzRsfkTHOrizhUKGszIBVxgib5bc6D_c-VBUhrBViWAJS4csB2o1YAhdT6o7u5SClEN5-M89A2Yv93U%3D)
---
**How is telling the truth about the crisis at our border hate speech? Was it mentioning the 85,000 exploited and unaccounted migrant children? Or telling my own immigration story?_Or was it criticizing the Biden administration?_ **

My family came to America to escape communist oppression in Vietnam, Peter. Now, I’m proud to call the freest country on Earth home. _But I NEVER thought I’d see censorship like this in America._

**The crux of our democracy is the freedom to share our differing opinions, viewpoints, and stories, and _anyone_ who tries to stop that isn’t just in the wrong, they’re downright un-American.**

[**Join me today to fight censorship so we can continue telling the TRUTH about the inept Biden Administration!**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=84f25d8fbcc34509a704f173b74745e3&_e=k1ynHK0jN4z-Bl19Lt4SSFAPYMOZfSqhgFDmQPnWMZDr1PqmfL_CPWMDZuGHcoHopBqPdA5fXPbQUmL4qrh2VErm6QHVcq18t9Yl-MF2KRuT1zDc68wd_JoNrG0nxZUvDFHB6rptJ7tRLoRBoylItXLWV2v3O0RDCQluqj3oRwabFXiynGoiqNt-jHP8HJodg6Yg6fXtK1j_0FV282_1tOOLbCGEKUyTWGsnfqnPdXz9txdN7IyjOvFEA_4KJsCOMskxfLespV7mjE7oI7ihNSjT0aYsxL9nD4dEZhXDerxwB8RxLZBugkuNdV_QY7yt5_Qf1VjxuxRA6uNdeIKgHMluzIxfCDgUvkj-jq7fAoA%3D)

| | Friend, My name is Tori Taylor, wife of Police Officer Josh Taylor, and I am reaching out to you with a heavy heart. Our family has been shattered, and our children, Creedence and Lainey, are growing up without their loving father. We URGENTLY need your help to launch our emergency appeal and right the terrible wrong that has been done to Josh. Josh is currently serving an 11-year prison sentence for a crime he didn’t commit. The injustice we’re facing is unbearable, but we have hope through an emergency appeal. We urgently need your support to fund this appeal and prove Josh’s innocence.Please, help us reunite our family and shine a light on the truth. [Our future depends on the kindness and compassion of people like you. ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxcUU1vnDAQ_TXmBsJjL2YPHNIiemmlpmq2uVnGHsCNsZExjfj3FWSTQ27Wm-d5H6Pmxdlhb4j4QgAma1YCQNgDAdgSu6mnpx9xz2_Pj_m3yw3GYwhfCUDaF_xg3pcUOCvrDlS0mWk4KDroDBta1azmUDOeTY2gXPXiqpjqlaYwMH5VV0E1gKm5EJjZBkpg5YVSgFLQsuC8R1Eb2g-iFlUFhJenUDFExDRZ_4LRKOv2Qoc5c82U0rKexjoC3Yp6i1gojyakg0Gg83oxBDrT5wlMTtmFsG4NW9QodTBIWGv6_CDlOHOal6wkUG1pljMau82EtfekJ_j2k7DWayfvVdxHWs2LsqMnrD0ilfW5VZrgVbLBS_wX3Ha8jB1tUk5-jiTDMFiN8W9Yp6R2h1H2MbxgVCPK957exYJP6NObkfz3mB6x-_P80xOopHfWENZ-As9zsxZ4tN9_vT5ksTHLq3XOrpUgvBzPlnWY_wcAAP__yrGxQQ) On July 4th, 2019, Josh and his fellow officer, Brandon Dingman, were wrongfully convicted and sentenced to 11 years in prison for a crime they didn’t commit. Their trial was filled with misconduct, and their constitutional rights were violated. Our family has drained our bank accounts, and our legal defense fund is struggling to cover the mounting bills. We have ONE LAST CHANCE to save Josh’s life and our family. By supporting our emergency appeal, you can help us overturn Josh and Brandon’s convictions, reunite our family, and bring the truth to light. Please, consider making a donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more today. Thank you for your kindness and compassion. Your support means the world to us. With deepest gratitude, Tori Taylor

name: Cecile Richards
subject: I need your help to protect reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63165097/405797259/891280485?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2556-su-nd&refcode=jtk2556-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY3ZTZiOWRjLTQ3ZjAtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Wx7ACcGiFgGJoeDiYLS1EA6WaMq5_Cz2Qt5QEm5AUMg=&emci=86d90350-b9ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=67e6b9dc-47f0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=23124236) I'll be the first to say that things seem disheartening right now, friend. In all my years in politics, I've _never_ witnessed such an intense period of attacks on reproductive rights as this one.

Just last month, Florida and North Dakota passed near-total bans on abortion. Roe v. Wade wasn't overturned overnight, and constitutionally protecting our reproductive rights won't happen overnight either.

**The majority of Americans are on our side, friend, on the side of protecting reproductive freedom, and together, we can build a country in which everyone has access to the health care they need. **
I'm working with American Bridge to hold Republicans accountable at the ballot box and stop them from ending abortion access nationwide, but we can't do that without your help. name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: ALERT: Why Don Tracy Supports IL GOP Endorsing in Primaries
body:
Financial interests are motivating a desire by IL GOP Chair Don Tracy to make primary endorsements.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/86dd0022f32e/alert-why-don-tracy-supports-il-gop-endorsing-in-primaries?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=50f58c3f93-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_11_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-50f58c3f93-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=50f58c3f93-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_11_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-50f58c3f93-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Why Don Tracy Supports the IL GOP Endorsing in Primaries: His Close Allies Get Rich During the Campaign Season (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/why-don-tracy-supports-the-il-gop-endorsing-in-primaries-his-close-allies-get-rich-during-the-campaign-season.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=50f58c3f93-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_11_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-50f58c3f93-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/why-don-tracy-supports-the-il-gop-endorsing-in-primaries-his-close-allies-get-rich-during-the-campaign-season.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=50f58c3f93-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_11_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-50f58c3f93-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
IL GOP General Counsel John Fogarty, left, and chairman Don Tracy, center, at the SSC meeting in December. (Source: Michael Blackshire/Chicago Tribune)

Illinois Republican Party Chairman Don Tracy has made it clear, in the form of a new committee that he’s coincidentally chairing, that the state party should have the right to officially endorse (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/don-tracy-secretly-creates-il-gop-endorsement-committee-in-attempt-to-block-grassroots-from-winning-future-primary-elections-catching-gop-leaders-by-surprise.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=50f58c3f93-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_11_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-50f58c3f93-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) their preferred candidates in primaries in a deliberate attempt to stymie grassroots candidates – and prevent them from winning in primary elections.

But there’s another motive as well – and it’s not political, but rather financial – and it benefits a select few within Tracy’s inner circle – including his close ally and top legal advisor
John Fogarty (https://www.fogartylawoffice.com/about?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=50f58c3f93-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_11_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-50f58c3f93-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , who serves as the general counsel to the Illinois Republican Party.

During the 2022 gubernatorial primary, Fogarty served (https://www.cities929.com/2022/04/05/30890/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=50f58c3f93-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_11_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-50f58c3f93-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , and was paid, as both the state party’s general counsel and general counsel to IL GOP-favored candidate for governor Richard Irvin – the mayor of Aurora, who last June, would lose to a grassroots-favored candidate by a shocking 43 points (https://www.nbcchicago.com/news/local/chicago-politics/illinois-primary-election-results-republican-darren-bailey-to-face-jb-pritzker-in-race-for-illinois-governor-in-november/2869100/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=50f58c3f93-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_11_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-50f58c3f93-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , despite $50 million coming in from billionaire Ken Griffin to prop up the mayor’s failed gubernatorial campaign.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/why-don-tracy-supports-the-il-gop-endorsing-in-primaries-his-close-allies-get-rich-during-the-campaign-season.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=50f58c3f93-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_11_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-50f58c3f93-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
IL GOP General Counsel John Fogarty was paid $50,662.47, while at the same time, he’s representing the Richard Irvin for governor campaign and other organizations that work closely with the IL GOP. (Source: Illinois State Board of Elections website)

In a February 22, 2022 article (https://www.theillinoize.com/articles/some-gop-operatives-believe-irvin?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=50f58c3f93-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_11_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-50f58c3f93-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) about the Richard Irvin campaign taking over the IL GOP, Tracy was initially not available for a comment, but shortly after the article went live, Tracy changed his mind, and offered this to say,

“The Illinois Republican Party has been neutral and will always be neutral in the GOP primary for governor. Any accusation that we are coordinating with a particular campaign is absolutely false and I find it personally offensive to suggest otherwise.”

But this statement by Tracy was a lie, and the
IL GOP (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/the-big-lie-how-don-tracy-and-the-il-gop-supported-democrat-richard-irvins-primary-campaign.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=50f58c3f93-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_11_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-50f58c3f93-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) was never neutral during the GOP primary for governor – and Fogarty’s work with Tracy and the Irvin campaign – at the same time, is yet more proof.

Although Tracy didn’t officially endorse Irvin during the primary, his
personal donation records (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ContributionSearchByAllContributions.aspx?ddlContributionType=wOGh3QTPfKqV2YWjeRmjTeStk426RfVK&ddlState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTime=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTimeThru=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&txtLastOnlyName=xs6pE3aHsP7GjQPVV6Ds2A%3d%3d&ddlLastOnlyNameSearchType=uhV70GVj7rs2mYAJ0IPVG%2fPXF28eNgo%2f&txtFirstName=2IwpeG5iH7o%3d&ddlFirstNameSearchType=uhV70GVj7rs2mYAJ0IPVG%2fPXF28eNgo%2f&ddlVendorState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=50f58c3f93-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_11_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-50f58c3f93-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) show that he only contributed to candidates aligned with Irvin’s gubernatorial campaign.

Last May, it was revealed in first quarter campaign filings that the Irvin campaign spent over $546,000 on payroll, including staffers and political consultants.

The filings also revealed a direct connection to Tracy and the IL GOP.

>From January 2020 to January 2022,
Derek Murphy (https://www.linkedin.com/in/derek-w-murphy-aba49072/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=50f58c3f93-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_11_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-50f58c3f93-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) served as Executive Director of the IL GOP.

In January 2022, Murphy joined the Irvin campaign as Senior Political Director.

On February 9, 2021, Tracy was elected chairman of the Illinois Republican Party – meaning Murphy was his top deputy and closest confidante before resigning his position as Executive Director of the IL GOP to take an official role with the Irvin campaign.

But the one top ally of Tracy who benefits the most from a new endorsement policy that Tracy is pushing is Fogarty, as
state election board (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ExpenditureSearchByAllExpenditures.aspx?ddlExpenditureType=wOGh3QTPfKqV2YWjeRmjTeStk426RfVK&ddlState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlReceivedDateTime=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlReceivedDateTimeThru=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&txtLastOnlyName=jOLzaSMV6MWKgkFkGBHjUg%3d%3d&ddlLastOnlyNameSearchType=%2fOm8zAJ7f4ioTTB90BLGGijKP5NjRbIx&radSupportingOpposing=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=50f58c3f93-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_11_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-50f58c3f93-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) disclosures reveal.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/why-don-tracy-supports-the-il-gop-endorsing-in-primaries-his-close-allies-get-rich-during-the-campaign-season.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=50f58c3f93-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_11_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-50f58c3f93-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
IL GOP General Counsel John Fogarty was paid $106,158.28 to represent the House Republican Majority and the Illinois House Victory Fund, organizations that work directly with the IL GOP. (Source: Illinois State Board of Elections website)

In 2022, the Illinois Republican Party, House Republican Majority, Illinois House Victory Fund, Senate Republican Victory Fund and the Irvin campaign paid Fogarty $433,363.22.

$129,250 of that total came from the Irvin campaign for “legal services.”
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/why-don-tracy-supports-the-il-gop-endorsing-in-primaries-his-close-allies-get-rich-during-the-campaign-season.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=50f58c3f93-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_11_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-50f58c3f93-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
IL GOP General Counsel John Fogarty was paid $129,250 to represent the Richard Irvin campaign for governor during the 2022 primary while also being paid as the IL GOP General Counsel. (Source: Illinois State Board of Elections website)

State Rep. Jim Durkin, the House Republican leader at the time – and another close ally of Tracy, was also a staunch supporter of Irvin – and was one of the first to endorse (https://www.politico.com/f/?id=0000017e-6d5c-dbc8-a1ff-7d7dbf990000&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=50f58c3f93-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_11_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-50f58c3f93-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) his gubernatorial campaign last winter.

Since the start of this year – with only school board races on the radar – which the
IL GOP (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/we-cant-help-you-il-gop-leaders-abandon-conservative-school-board-candidates-while-pritzker-goes-on-the-attack-and-funds-their-opponents.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=50f58c3f93-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_11_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-50f58c3f93-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) did not get involved in, Fogarty has been paid $81,692.47, with a majority of those payments coming from the Illinois Republican Party, House Republican Majority and the Senate Republican Victory Fund.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/why-don-tracy-supports-the-il-gop-endorsing-in-primaries-his-close-allies-get-rich-during-the-campaign-season.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=50f58c3f93-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_11_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-50f58c3f93-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
IL GOP General Counsel John Fogarty has been paid $81,692.47 since the start of the year for legal services, even though the campaign season ended last November. (Source: Illinois State Board of Elections website)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/why-don-tracy-supports-the-il-gop-endorsing-in-primaries-his-close-allies-get-rich-during-the-campaign-season.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=50f58c3f93-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_11_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-50f58c3f93-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
IL GOP General Counsel John Fogarty was paid $65,600 to represent the Senate Republican Victory Fund, an organization that works directly with the IL GOP. (Source: Illinois State Board of Elections website)

Illinois State Board of Elections data also reveals that while Fogarty has been profiting off of IL GOP-supported campaigns, he’s only donated (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ContributionSearchByAllContributions.aspx?ddlContributionType=wOGh3QTPfKqV2YWjeRmjTeStk426RfVK&ddlState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTime=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTimeThru=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&txtLastOnlyName=vUudcK1IWr01BsAC1h5daA%3d%3d&ddlLastOnlyNameSearchType=uhV70GVj7rs2mYAJ0IPVG%2fPXF28eNgo%2f&txtFirstName=Kx%2f8w6RR2aLKHxFj%2fK%2fwYw%3d%3d&ddlFirstNameSearchType=uhV70GVj7rs2mYAJ0IPVG%2fPXF28eNgo%2f&ddlVendorState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=50f58c3f93-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_11_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-50f58c3f93-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) a total of $500 since 2022 – and a total of $4,250 since 2010.

Not a lot of money in support of Republican candidates, considering Fogarty and his law firm’s entire practice is centered around his work with the IL GOP and associated campaigns.

And it’s no surprise that Fogarty remains a close ally and supporter of Tracy – he’s made a fortune as Tracy’s top legal advisor.

You can bet that one thing is certain – there’s no other person rooting for a change in the IL GOP’s endorsement policy than Fogarty.

Forget the grassroots and winning – it’s all about the money.

And it’s no wonder we’re always losing.

https://youtu.be/olowz7GgoBI?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=50f58c3f93-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_11_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-50f58c3f93-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Publisher Scott Kaspar joins Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas on "Mark My Words" on AM 560 The Answer to discuss the next Chair of the IL GOP.

https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=50f58c3f93-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_11_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-50f58c3f93-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

name: Troy E. Nehls
subject: … your move, Joe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
alert from House floor →
| | | BREAKING via U.S. House Floor**:
GOP-led Majority Passes H.R. 2** ###
---
|
---
WE DID IT, Friend! You asked for it, and I fought to make it happen. I am honored to have passed the most conservative, proactive border legislation in American history. **Real America deserves Real Results.**
---
[**THE RIGHT SIDE OF HISTORY**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/79110ed3cbbafd37/498d1222091b3c38c3d6b838967d376c/35193)
---
I’m a Texan who calls a spade a spade, and the far-left open-border fanatics have tried doing everything they can to silence America First patriots like you and I... they’ve lost this round, but we know their radicalism knows no bounds. _Speaking of boundaries_ – I can guarantee this Biden-backed border crisis would’ve never happened under President Trump. I’m no mathematician, **but one of these doesn’t add up**.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/79110ed3cbbafd37/409addae8ba0e5aac3d6b838967d376c/35193)
---
As we speak, Joe Biden and his Washington leftists are scheming how to cripple our great nation from within... I’ve stayed consistent in calling out this cabal, and your passionate compatriotism is what I carry with me here in Congress. This is only the beginning, the best is yet to come! – Troy E. Nehls [**Fund The Fight for Our Border Today >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/79110ed3cbbafd37/cc40fb2f9faeefb3c3d6b838967d376c/35193)

Donate to our Senate Flash Fund now:**

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63165437/405798780/-1635730215?sourceid=1050051&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWRhN2M2YS00YWYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KyrEkniOFT1LcnA2FFJFw7GQNbQhBwEpIAxWMgQO8XE=&emci=492f7662-4af0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=45da7c6a-4af0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Peter,

When it comes to holding the Democratic Senate majority in 2024, defense is the name of the game. There are almost twice as many Democratic seats as Republican seats up for reelection this cycle, which means the GOP will be fighting hard to flip seats wherever they can. And remember — they only need to flip TWO to take control of the chamber (and therefore all of Congress). A Republican-held Congress is a one-way ticket to a national abortion ban, plain and simple. It was a day-one priority for House Republicans, and we know the Senate under Mitch McConnell would be no different. **[That's why we're running a Senate Flash Fund — 48 hours to surge support for Democratic pro-choice women running for Senate seats. The fund ends at midnight tonight. To be a part of it, donate now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63165444/405798787/-1635730215?sourceid=1050051&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWRhN2M2YS00YWYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KyrEkniOFT1LcnA2FFJFw7GQNbQhBwEpIAxWMgQO8XE=&emci=492f7662-4af0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=45da7c6a-4af0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** There are two open seats held by Democrats this year, and we're proud to have endorsed for both of them. Holding these seats is critical to holding our majority. Rep. **Elissa Slotkin** is running for the Michigan seat EMILYs List champion Sen. Debbie Stabenow will retire from next year, and County Executive **Angela Alsobrooks** is running to keep Maryland's open seat blue. We've also endorsed a slate of righteous Democratic pro-choice women already in office across the country, including Sens. **Mazie Hirono (HI)** , **Amy Klobuchar (MN)** , **and Elizabeth Warren (MA)**. We cannot protect the Senate majority without protecting our Democratic pro-choice incumbents! Two open seats. Two endorsements this week. Two days to raise $75,000 and help save the Senate — and we're on day two! ****This is your last chance to surge support as part of our Senate Flash Fund. Donate now to be a part of the fight:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Senate-Flash-Fund](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63165445/405798788/-1635730215?sourceid=1050051&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWRhN2M2YS00YWYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KyrEkniOFT1LcnA2FFJFw7GQNbQhBwEpIAxWMgQO8XE=&emci=492f7662-4af0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=45da7c6a-4af0-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you for stepping up for Senate women!

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
It will all come down to Arizona. Arizona is the NEW swing state. As this state goes, so goes the presidential election.
#

Peter -
Did you watch Trump last night on CNN?
In case you missed it, he lied and lied and lied. But one thing in particular stood out to us: he defended the insurrection of January 6th. He said he’d pardon a lot of the people who participated. He refused to accept he lost in 2020, or the results in 2024.
Obviously, the country cannot afford four more years of Trump.
But here is the thing: it will all come down to Arizona. Arizona is the NEW swing state. As this state goes, so goes the presidential election.
Our campaign has a HUGE role to play in that. If we win this Senate race, Democrats will almost surely win the presidential.
If we lose... it’s more Trump (and probably Senator Kari Lake).
Persuasion, volunteer mobilization, turnout... Democrats will be counting on us to get it done in Arizona. But Ruben cannot do it alone. So we’re asking:
[**Can you PLEASE contribute $3 to our campaign TODAY to help us win this Senate race, and to help Joe Biden win in Arizona. We cannot afford four more years of Trump.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.79Akcp&refcode=em230511-2-500&t=1&akid=628%2E734936%2ExrTVop)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: Team Schrier
subject: [POLL] Do you support Kevin McCarthy’s hostage tactics?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Do you support Kevin McCarthy’s reckless debt ceiling bill? We have less than 3 weeks before our nation could default on its debt, Peter.

It's up to Congress to ensure that doesn't happen. But Kevin McCarthy is demanding draconian cuts to programs our veterans, students, and families depend on in exchange for raising the debt ceiling.

**[We're reaching out today because Kim needs to hear from you. Please take our quick, one-minute poll, and let Kim know where you stand. From: Dr. Kim Schrier For Congress
Subject: McCarthy’s dangerous debt ceiling plan
Date: Saturday, May 6, 2023

Peter,

According to Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen, our nation could default on our debt as soon as June 1 if Congress doesn't act.

The consequences of defaulting on our debt are substantial. Moody's just released a report showing a default could result in the loss of over seven million jobs and create a financial crisis.

But instead of raising the debt ceiling – like Republicans voted to do three times during the Trump administration – **Speaker Kevin McCarthy is holding our economy hostage. He's refusing to raise the debt ceiling unless we make draconian cuts to essential programs.**

McCarthy's proposed bill would eliminate more than 81,000 U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs jobs that service our veterans. In addition to slashing the VA, McCarthy's plan includes major cuts to education and health care. That's unacceptable.

Kim voted against Kevin McCarthy's reckless brinkmanship, but she wants to know what you think:

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63165727/405799652/-665437442?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTA2MjE5ZC00YmYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KFMFQ5NWEwbAabsBPJ64HBberaHP06bxJV5WBMWqu5E=)
Peter,

This isn't the news I wanted to share today, but it's important that you're kept in the loop about what's happening in my race.

**Earlier this week, we got word that the National Republican Congressional Committee -- Kevin McCarthy's political arm -- has launched yet another wave of digital ads attacking me. They're running in my district as you read this email.**

I'll admit, it's a bit jarring to see the Republicans up with attack ads this soon. I've been laser-focused on advancing bills to lower prescription drug cost, address climate change, and secure reproductive rights. Meanwhile, Kevin McCarthy is _raising and spending record-shattering sums_ to unseat vulnerable Democrats like me.

Defending this seat was never going to be easy, and it's clear our work needs to start much sooner than we anticipated. That's why I need to ask:

[**Can you please chip in $3 to help us fend off this wave of attacks? | | **This just in, Peter: Yadira made _Roll Call’s_ list of the _top 10 most vulnerable House candidates._ And our race was rated a ‘TOSS UP’ which means it could go either way. With our race already in the news – there’s no time to waste, Peter. That’s why right now we need every person on this grassroots team to help us make sure we win in 2024 and take back the House Majority.

_**Yadira doesn’t take any corporate PAC money, so we have to work twice as hard to keep up with Republicans and their deep pockets.**_

**But we’ve got something they don’t – we have you, Peter._This incredible grassroots team makes all the difference._** Together, we got Yadira to Congress, and now it’s up to us to keep her in Washington fighting for Coloradans. **[Will you chip in right now to help keep Yadira in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63165876/405800205/533250332?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.05.11_b1_co08ra_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTVhYjc3Yi00Y2YwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5147lrALbtuLPhAkad_Y9EOpOsN0Ez_UVqm96GGsfYg=)**

| I know you hear from me quite a bit – and I know that usually when I’m reaching out, it’s to ask for your financial support of my re-election campaign.

**Peter: I hate asking for even a dollar of your hard-earned money._But the reality is that fundraising is the price of admission for the job I love._

[_I’ll explain more in a moment, but if you’re short on time here’s a link to chip in $10 or whatever makes sense for you today._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63165903/405800375/428766023?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230511-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGQwODIyMS00ZGYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gg0opVHtaE_Bsvza0cHmsTfEwJCXSqr5rQzUFqSnN4w=)**

As a member of the House of Representatives, my seat is on the ballot every two years – which means I’m almost constantly running for re-election.

As someone who doesn't take corporate PAC money, the contributions from folks like you are key to my successful campaigns. The amount we raised in 2022 was a record for a Pennsylvania House race, and let me tell you, we needed every penny of it. (Someday I truly hope we see campaign finance reform, but that's a topic for another day.)

Stronger fundraising allows me to spend less time dialing for dollars and more time doing what I came to Washington to do: advocate for Pennsylvania families and workers. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1979c8426ac74303a15d75ff2448c276&_e=SzAUzzTiScGbIgKFLIg1BGa8NQrG1zYvBnPzWbrq1LkFboq30147HVlBdHaWc1hw1Kuus4nLxaPC3OGuKYIQpMGTOIDg95lWH-oWZZ-EMgte0k_nZU9Zcf5z_LEn9x3ToNpNgGl-EUHebYmZVoqa44M9RjOCivXmm1ls3rdahUDzOVEUJ_h5ItgDYIV16Mlrnz6BKIk3iiqTKe8wujsvz-xLcL063jPJ55A27RihvqtPG1wFwHVYShsRqTnGLhXDrn0ig95oS-XFV2O_J4VdSSneGz3CEoXIna0nsWWVfMY6LebChwnKiL7761GXmHye6NG1HfOx7tPVNqMNtplyMVMcs2z-pNIfUwG5vybk0z4UIXWOdP6dj0pBVX6s1EjDoWSxGGXlAwuhsKWGkmBwkA2dhKUTAfMcLilu2fYODv0%3D)

name: Katie Porter
subject: We don’t need more of the same
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=22744%2E3422442%2Eo9CIXc)
I’m abundantly proud to say: **I “do Congress” differently than most of my colleagues:**
* I don’t take money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil, Big Pharma, or Wall Street Banks. **I’m the only person in the race who can say this.**
* I’m leading the fight to ban Members of Congress and their families from trading stocks.
* When Congress brought back earmarks (which are a way of funding Members’ pet projects) in 2021, I was the only Democrat to oppose them.
* When I’m home in Orange County, my toughest constituents are my three kids. Seriously, they track the bills we vote on and come prepared with the tough (but fair) questions.

Washington needs change, and we can do that by electing leaders who aren’t beholden to corporate special interests. [**I’m ready to take our fight to the U.S. Senate. If you’re with me, consider pitching in today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230511-1?refcode=EMAH11_1_CON_20230511_V1_F&refcode2=22744_3422442_o9CIXc&akid=22744%2E3422442%2Eo9CIXc)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230511-1?refcode=EMAH11_1_CON_20230511_V1_F&refcode2=22744_3422442_o9CIXc&akid=22744%2E3422442%2Eo9CIXc)**
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH11_1_CON_20230511_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=22744_3422442_o9CIXc&akid=22744%2E3422442%2Eo9CIXc)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=22744%2E3422442%2Eo9CIXc)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=22744%2E3422442%2Eo9CIXc)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: PETITION (via Wexton for Congress)
subject: Tell the GOP: stop your dangerous games
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63166166/405801303/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230511DC_N_PT_FULL_8_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTIxYzBkNi00ZWYwLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oUQu3ZoxE89tuv9-JUnX9ueO5-zxIpqKBgfkr_bI1XU=)
---
Look, House Republicans are engaging in an incredibly dangerous game.

They're trying to force an impossible choice upon the American people: default on our economy, or make massive cuts to programs that provide food and housing to low-income people and roll back critical investments that we've made to fight climate change.

**We need to make it clear to Kevin McCarthy that the vast majority of Americans are not on his side — and that he needs to back down from his posturing.**

[**Please join Jennifer and sign our petition now. Dear Friend,

I need your urgent support to help us secure our borders and take back America from the disastrous leadership of Joe Biden.

**The Biden administration 's open border policies have created chaos and crime, empowering Mexican cartels to profit from human trafficking and push deadly fentanyl into communities across America. More than 70,000 Americans died from overdose deaths last year.

And Title 42 ends at midnight TONIGHT!

Tens of thousands of migrants are waiting to surge across our border. **

The consequences of President Biden's open border policies are devastating. On Joe Biden's watch, an unprecedented number of migrants has crossed our borders without our permission, overwhelming already strained resources, and posing a serious threat to our national security.

Joe Biden's failure to faithfully execute the laws of the land and lead on this critical issue is dangerous to U.S. sovereignty. We cannot sit back and let this crisis continue to spiral out of control. We need to take immediate action to secure our borders and restore order to our immigration system.

name: James Comer
subject: Big news about the “Big Guy”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
The FD-1023 form at the FBI is going to shed light on exactly what I’ve been saying.
| | [ [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=5721c31045f54d3abb5ab63c80d2da8c&_t=66-uNSngC-1azRTrRfZdKJZWHDBhj8uv95iSdTj_N7rbuhf6DU-XCob3hc-h8zKPN4O0pdOdkfl_FdGjYhVxNikqURN5DOw7D-vMUi4lb_k%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=5721c31045f54d3abb5ab63c80d2da8c&_t=66-uNSngC-1azRTrRfZdKJZWHDBhj8uv95iSdTj_N7rbuhf6DU-XCob3hc-h8zKPN4O0pdOdkfl_FdGjYhVxNikqURN5DOw7D-vMUi4lb_k%3D)

](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5721c31045f54d3abb5ab63c80d2da8c&_e=nxex15DLchqo8R_7XMVQtR2Pq7ciJOzZNilF3dj5H7DzCi-u8pNF73iAtqHSKnrYNdCK__3jm1VVfcIb_FVV1a9GjpcMYSVAfyZS_nsH6wK9lB92B6Fkf6tswJImy8fcNH8g3dSgQoXOt3VYuUzrT3Q-VmLurnV6lp9NhEGWIiG2tBJ2-XMvhA4Ce1w48iTV2utwEglmLSSl3p6EoPHxkz5-_PPVgaiFZ4tU4QTcWqGPuPD4X2BvwzqmYjHTS7-wJM50CH9la-_1N1hLjHFR9ans7FzNxJOSC0aofv2L6l5yGybotn7GhtcAEEL7t_y_b_ZYqwN38zurkkZK_zwyE4p2h-o0lymq8a1VkA9rkcVZ8cBysRRfwXJR-yF6fv921wOxi8Amq2xKeJSb4XCprA%3D%3D)
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative, This week, I issued a subpoena to FBI Director Christopher Wray for an FD-1023 form that a whistleblower said links Joe Biden to a criminal scheme.
We’ve been wondering why so many foreign nationals paid the Bidens so much money, and we could be very close to finding out.
**This FD-1023 form that the FBI has links Joe Biden himself to a criminal scheme involving money for policy decisions during his vice presidency.**
It is with a heavy heart that I fear our Commander-in-Chief may be compromised by foreign actors, and I’m going to do everything in my power to deliver the whole truth to the American people.
These revelations destroy the Democrat’s and media’s false narrative about Joe Biden and his family, and they are going to fight until the end to stop me from exposing their lies.
I am under constant attack, and they are only going to intensify as I get closer to providing Americans the facts. **[My only defense is fighting back and defending my integrity and credibility, and I rely on grassroots conservatives to help me do that. ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5721c31045f54d3abb5ab63c80d2da8c&_e=nxex15DLchqo8R_7XMVQtR2Pq7ciJOzZNilF3dj5H7DzCi-u8pNF73iAtqHSKnrYNdCK__3jm1VVfcIb_FVV1a9GjpcMYSVAfyZS_nsH6wK9lB92B6Fkf6tswJImy8fcNH8g3dSgQoXOt3VYuUzrT3Q-VmLurnV6lp9NhEGWIiG2tBJ2-XMvhA4Ce1w48iTV2utwEglmLSSl3p6EoPHxkz5-_PPVgaiFZ4tU4QTcWqGPuPD4X2BvwzqmYjHTS7-wRqo74lMNcAOjfv6oKpzImQqKxt-9TXj4OOwt_DpGZXIkP2O3Tp-MWyRtq323dMkO-WL11b0xn4fxnI4ccNetRV3QonZlcgO57Y5UPT-uuY6rk2Itm482MIiAPpjjHLe_0XIu3dTDtO2fFy_ESfrjfw%3D%3D)**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5721c31045f54d3abb5ab63c80d2da8c&_e=nxex15DLchqo8R_7XMVQtR2Pq7ciJOzZNilF3dj5H7DzCi-u8pNF73iAtqHSKnrYNdCK__3jm1VVfcIb_FVV1a9GjpcMYSVAfyZS_nsH6wK9lB92B6Fkf6tswJImy8fcNH8g3dSgQoXOt3VYuUzrT3Q-VmLurnV6lp9NhEGWIiG2tBJ2-XMvhA4Ce1w48iTV2utwEglmLSSl3p6EoPHxkz5-_PPVgaiFZ4tU4QTcWqGPuPD4X2BvwzqmYjHTS7-wVyr_dyQnPqPZdePjepzfTekViMQ0e3PpD7KFqwD77qLbg7r_LNupDkWdaf69ANzPEEsG34RPvdzmtZARxbHVWbojzHth0_ir3NSQovzsvHKJ3YL0djxPFEU7m9166MeiFFiC1Mqeu0tul0HtzvDT3Q%3D%3D)
---
Like I’ve said before, county boys from West Kentucky are a tough breed, _**we don’t back down and we don’t cave to pressure from high and mighty big city liberals on cable TV.**_
But that’s not going to stop the folks in the mainstream media from attacking me and trying to destroy the credibility of my work and the good name I’ve spent an honest life building.
**[So please, if you’re able, chip in a couple bucks so my team and I can mount a defense to the onslaught of attacks that have already begun.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5721c31045f54d3abb5ab63c80d2da8c&_e=nxex15DLchqo8R_7XMVQtR2Pq7ciJOzZNilF3dj5H7DzCi-u8pNF73iAtqHSKnrYNdCK__3jm1VVfcIb_FVV1a9GjpcMYSVAfyZS_nsH6wK9lB92B6Fkf6tswJImy8fcNH8g3dSgQoXOt3VYuUzrT3Q-VmLurnV6lp9NhEGWIiG2tBJ2-XMvhA4Ce1w48iTV2utwEglmLSSl3p6EoPHxkz5-_PPVgaiFZ4tU4QTcWqGPuPD4X2BvwzqmYjHTS7-wrRDe0FHtH-NBZsiJMXCjjDlzjX_K1xnjsG9omVkJMPLO-krzjFkGHxejFYbUXxzAV-2j0jRYogYGe7hVpP-vp8qioN13oc_9UCEwP5Ddr0DM0n_qCJEia6Boa9EfMJap59PpYf3YHezHN8KrXqq76Q%3D%3D)**
If you can’t, please take the time to say a prayer for our country, we’re going to need it.
With Courage,
| |
---
|
---
**James Comer**
Chairman,**** House Oversight Committee

Friend,
America is in serious trouble.
Our justice system has been HIJACKED by corrupt political forces who use their power, money, and connections to destroy anyone who stands in their way.
I have once again become the target of a disgusting witch hunt that lacks _ANY_ EVIDENCE, PROOF, or EYEWITNESSES.
**But my freedom and justice did not matter to the Marxists who orchestrated this witch hunt in a city where the voter registration of the jury pool favors Democrats 7:1.**
_This witch hunt was funded by a Democrat mega-donor who slept at Pedophile Jeffrey Epstein’s private island – with a Clinton-appointed judge presiding over the bogus trial._
Let me be as clear as humanly possible: I did NOTHING wrong.
_So, I’ll tell you what this is all about..._
Everybody has seen the polls. No one honestly believes that Joe Biden – sitting at a 36% approval rating – can beat me in a _**fair**_ election next year.
**So, the Democrats have decided that their strategy is to launch witch hunt after witch hunt to try and bleed me dry.**
But the Democrats don’t understand that I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the radical Left. _There is not a single attack on the face of the planet that will break me._
...Because I know that if this left-wing cabal can slander and attack a former U.S. President, they could one day do it to a private citizen like **YOU**.
_I refuse to let that happen. I refuse to let America’s justice system completely collapse._
Together, we will win back the White House and we will SAVE AMERICA.

My team told me about a deal for early supporters. name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: Biden is putting my deputies in danger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
As someone who has personally pulled the dead bodies of immigrants out of ditches, I cannot express my dismay at Biden’s failure to secure the border
[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=e830a5b21e15401e8341fc2251d321df&_t=Q2abniCSto2eSkWtjLXMnGrl2fj35tKDzxKH1OekibJFj2bShkRB2nj0T8a-wPhIAC1m_GYH46ZgxUownW1RNuZP-AeYFL8wxqQ3sqDi7kk%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=e830a5b21e15401e8341fc2251d321df&_t=Q2abniCSto2eSkWtjLXMnGrl2fj35tKDzxKH1OekibJFj2bShkRB2nj0T8a-wPhIAC1m_GYH46ZgxUownW1RNuZP-AeYFL8wxqQ3sqDi7kk%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e830a5b21e15401e8341fc2251d321df&_e=9AIVCH9pO0YFgM5X97Ce6IbArRO7OWHmyO7MpGC67ArgSRLLa_FuoEdcu99lRd7n0a9-Wgr1-nm-vOefvyznksWRc3FEgvmvdlCe6bXW8XOXQ5OTmdY-BI9_Wmr50Unf4t4muwNKQU6D00FBr-BPaiO-a5Qn3IdFS-WpCt4ZJXPVMu-kWQpErRuYVFeCJ-wuUF85zBOqbDyZDBYkU7n7ehnJuqbwSWRjbr2tNGOE1Q77KPczGcS7jqUuPlU8baZFnQsOpO0UDQKaQu8rBKn8t5GFNtxYMGyBXz_rMH2Kp4fiCCta7gGnLSyQ-2WDzZDkrIN0gbW3L6317Di9pk1fRICbmD155vca_llEQiWX2oFOJF4RjVcyaJ9txPmrPIFnIE8SgXHWPeRDG7jGj58fIyFeTCEU62NqYMaVdkrYUOk%3D)
|
Peter,

This week, Republicans in the U.S. House are voting on legislation that would bring about some of the most stringent border security measures our country has ever known.

Against ALL common sense, **President Biden has promised to veto the bill.**

As an American, this makes me angry. **As the Sheriff of Arizona’s third largest county, it will make doing my job even harder than it already is.**

Why on earth would President Biden veto legislation that secures and protects the border?

**Because Republicans led the efforts to pass it**.

**As someone who has personally pulled the dead bodies of immigrants out of ditches, I cannot express my dismay at Biden’s failure to secure the border.**

As a candidate for the U.S. Senate and a Sheriff in my own right, **[I’m putting together a petition to send to President Biden urging him to let this border bill become law. I’m looking for 500 Americans to sign it right now](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e830a5b21e15401e8341fc2251d321df&_e=9AIVCH9pO0YFgM5X97Ce6IbArRO7OWHmyO7MpGC67ArgSRLLa_FuoEdcu99lRd7n0a9-Wgr1-nm-vOefvyznksWRc3FEgvmvdlCe6bXW8XOXQ5OTmdY-BI9_Wmr50Unf4t4muwNKQU6D00FBr-BPaiO-a5Qn3IdFS-WpCt4ZJXPVMu-kWQpErRuYVFeCJ-wuUF85zBOqbDyZDBYkU7n7ehnJuqbwSWRjbr2tNGOE1Q77KPczGcS7jqUuPlU8baZFrXuSWVI4NTmzgXII_WaieMHH5E8TUhtm905P1LGvvfdmDWxUeziNM2iOfHV16Jfcryg2spLvR2pVhqrQreKMy41PAfj2mGukGR8a191at1X7ZrBYcz1IVlmR0MSz9B2ViWxuzShOnj38_BK0CG0YFTq1M4VXsNLOUYtpR2Yx9QM%3D)**.

[**TELL BIDEN: DO NOT VETO THIS BILL ->**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e830a5b21e15401e8341fc2251d321df&_e=9AIVCH9pO0YFgM5X97Ce6IbArRO7OWHmyO7MpGC67ArgSRLLa_FuoEdcu99lRd7n0a9-Wgr1-nm-vOefvyznksWRc3FEgvmvdlCe6bXW8XOXQ5OTmdY-BI9_Wmr50Unf4t4muwNKQU6D00FBr-BPaiO-a5Qn3IdFS-WpCt4ZJXPVMu-kWQpErRuYVFeCJ-wuUF85zBOqbDyZDBYkU7n7ehnJuqbwSWRjbr2tNGOE1Q77KPczGcS7jqUuPlU8baZFIM-lXw-h7wuPNdEISY3qD5FzuZshfPs0Y8uHl4Zz43uf55cISGbl8EHAYq0U36UrmU-J3Snk5ScOg7oB1kqI3HnOc56E0iDve6xsbqdiEvQKuOwxjTRV5RwsUrdhE_fGEBGSHEAsEyYFUx2qf26ljwyIZZGmaHmE7ap11rgunIA%3D)

If you’re tired of people from all over the world treating our border like an imaginary line, will you **[join me in telling Biden he simply cannot veto Republicans’ border bill?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e830a5b21e15401e8341fc2251d321df&_e=9AIVCH9pO0YFgM5X97Ce6IbArRO7OWHmyO7MpGC67ArgSRLLa_FuoEdcu99lRd7n0a9-Wgr1-nm-vOefvyznksWRc3FEgvmvdlCe6bXW8XOXQ5OTmdY-BI9_Wmr50Unf4t4muwNKQU6D00FBr-BPaiO-a5Qn3IdFS-WpCt4ZJXPVMu-kWQpErRuYVFeCJ-wuUF85zBOqbDyZDBYkU7n7ehnJuqbwSWRjbr2tNGOE1Q77KPczGcS7jqUuPlU8baZFXU1Nu0r0pQZhRNAFU4ECedqScaorwwYOfhfAbXEgZsObm42lFJolWNAYZgp1qSQXL4duXrnFt87qh2I37Q7K14wlQMw2EnHmxAoOWdmeZNtEFjb-k2x6PJ3UxmQ1dlglY02RzyIR9mxktInSCzA2UvJ2yoF6BBXtEHb43ClEmkY%3D)**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e830a5b21e15401e8341fc2251d321df&_e=9AIVCH9pO0YFgM5X97Ce6IbArRO7OWHmyO7MpGC67ArgSRLLa_FuoEdcu99lRd7n0a9-Wgr1-nm-vOefvyznksWRc3FEgvmvdlCe6bXW8XOXQ5OTmdY-BI9_Wmr50Unf4t4muwNKQU6D00FBr-BPaiO-a5Qn3IdFS-WpCt4ZJXPVMu-kWQpErRuYVFeCJ-wuUF85zBOqbDyZDBYkU7n7ehnJuqbwSWRjbr2tNGOE1Q77KPczGcS7jqUuPlU8baZFkxaoZphNhRaxInf_bWkZvxUFmveHMuyug-giPifqme26ThHnyECVtgy41va3nlrnE4cevXQHrNQ0NO7bmvuzXYoMmxQkw9Y3TWZgGje5BAToWzWUuhexvwtldkm93oLKIANS4C33zjqD9KJSMssKDPEpNOURrZDr-Nfbj4RWHZo%3D)

Peter, we must stop the invasion. It’s as simple as that.

We do that by sending law enforcement officials, who know a thing or two about quelling unrest, to replace Democrats in the Senate who can’t seem to figure out how to do their damn jobs.

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: As someone who has personally pulled the dead bodies of immigrants out of ditches, I cannot express my dismay at Biden’s failure to secure the border | | Peter, This week, Republicans in the U.S. House are voting on legislation that would bring about some of the most stringent border security measures our country has ever known. Against ALL common sense, President Biden has promised to veto the bill. As an American, this makes me angry. As the Sheriff of Arizona’s third largest county, it will make doing my job even harder than it already is. Why on earth would President Biden veto legislation that secures and protects the border? Because Republicans led the efforts to pass it. As someone who has personally pulled the dead bodies of immigrants out of ditches, I cannot express my dismay at Biden’s failure to secure the border. As a candidate for the U.S. Senate and a Sheriff in my own right, . If you’re tired of people from all over the world treating our border like an imaginary line, will you Peter, we must stop the invasion. It’s as simple as that. We do that by sending law enforcement officials, who know a thing or two about quelling unrest, to replace Democrats in the Senate who can’t seem to figure out how to do their damn jobs. Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Derek, we’ll be blunt: **we have a shortage of teachers in Pennsylvania.**

We’re going to need thousands of new teachers in the next few years, and if we fail to act now, this crisis is only going to get worse.

**That’s why Josh Shapiro just announced a bold plan to put $2,500 back into the pockets of new Pennsylvania teachers.**

We’re not going to back down in this fight, Derek. And we know Josh Shapiro won’t either.
